# Migration Report: main.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/main.lua
+++ patched/main.lua
@@ -1,234 +1,4 @@

---[[
-	Adjustable tags
-	on hull body
-	spacing: how far center of tack pieces should be from each other Effectively the length of a track piece also allowing interlocking
-	travelup: how far up the track can move when suspension pushes it
-	traveldown: how far down the track can fall when it's loose / there's nothing below
-
-	on track piece body
-	trackdist: how far away maximum tracks can be when looking for the parent tank. Needs to be bigger for huge tanks
-
-	on turret body
-	rotspeed: left to right rotation speed of turret in degrees per second
-	nostagger: by default multiple barrel shots are staggered, add  this tag to make them shoot together
-	index: number of the turret, affects switching order and used to assign guns to the right turret
-	notforward: for turrets intentionally facing sidewas/ backward this switches off the error message
-
-	on cannon body
-	rotspeed: up / down rotation speed of gun in degrees per second
-	turretindex: make sure it is assigned to the right turret
-
-	Armor shapes
-	"RHA" (rolled homogeneous armor) (entire shape is calculated as that armour value)
-	"ERA"  (explosive reactive armor)
-	"CHA" (cast homogenous armour) (each individual voxel is calculated as that armour value)
-
-	Lights
-	Weapon: (must be under shape part=Breech), shows where weapon is shooting from can have another tag id, which is the name
-		order: on the weapon light left out will be left last order=1, 2 3 etc to switch between weapons in non default order
-		rocketsmoke: if rocket smoke should come out at the end this tag shows it, = to a number shows the amount (default 1)
-		Stabilised: turret is Stabilised up and down
-	barrelpos: in same position as barrel light, used as position for multi barrel turrets.
-	track: must be under shape of main body of vehicle, on each side used for tracks
-
-	Weapon door joint
-	id=u5ts: shows which weapon on the same turret it belongs to
-	WeaponDoor: required to show it's for a weapon door
-	speed: rotation speed, 1.5 default
-]]
-
-
-
-
-
-
-
-

-function update(dt)
-	if InitCompleted ~= true then if not FatalErrorMsgSent then DebugPrint("A fatal error occurred while initializing the TABS framework.") FatalErrorMsgSent = true end return end
-
-	-------------------------------------------
-	-- General vehicle handling and features --

-
-	ManageSpinningWeapons(dt)
-	
-	HandleNewVehicles()
-
-	IsSpawningLastUpdate = IsSpawning
-
-	for v,vInfo in pairs(TABSVehicles) do
-
-		if IsHandleValid(v) then
-
-			----------------------
-			-- Managing Weapons --
-			----------------------
-
-			for k, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
-
-				local shellInfo = wInfo.shelltypes[wInfo.curShell]
-				--DebugPrint(wInfo.shelltypes[wInfo.curShell])

-				local shellAmmo = shellInfo.ammo
-				local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-				
-
-				if wInfo.reloadtimer ~= nil then
-					if wInfo.reloadtimer > 0 then
-						-- Loader won't load if the crew has evacuated
-						if not vInfo.ammorack.bail then
-							wInfo.reloadtimer = wInfo.reloadtimer - dt
-						end
-
-						-- Emitting casings
-						local Turret = wInfo:getTurret()
-						local casingEmitionTransform = nil
-						local casingEmitterJoint = nil
-						local casingEmitterJointTimer = 1 --default of 0.5 will be set later
-						if #Turret.locations.casingEmitters > 0 then
-							for i = 1, #Turret.locations.casingEmitters do
-								if Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].id == wInfo.id then
-									casingEmitionTransform = TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(Turret.body), Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].transform)
-									casingEmitterJoint = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint
-									casingEmitterJointTimer = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint_timer or 0.5
-									break
-								end
-							end
-						end
-
-	
-						if casingEmitterJoint ~= nil then
-							local t = wInfo.reloadtimer/wInfo.reloadtime
-							if t > casingEmitterJointTimer then
-								SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,-3,10)
-							else
-								SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,3,10)
-							end
-
-							if casingEmitionTransform ~= nil and t < .8 and not wInfo.casingEmitted then
-								wInfo.casingEmitted = true
-
-								if wInfo.caliber < 50 then
-									local dir = TransformToParentVec(casingEmitionTransform,Vec(0,0,1))
-									local casingsound = SOUNDS.casings.lmg
-									if wInfo.caliber >= 30 then
-										casingsound = SOUNDS.casings["40mm"]
-									elseif wInfo.caliber >= 20 then
-										casingsound = SOUNDS.casings["20mm"]
-									elseif wInfo.caliber > 7.62 then
-										casingsound = SOUNDS.casings.hmg
-									end
-									SpentCasing(casingEmitionTransform,dir,6,2,.2,wInfo.caliber,"rifle",casingsound)
-								else
-									local dir = TransformToParentVec(casingEmitionTransform,Vec(0,0,-1))
-									local len = math.clamp(2+round(wInfo.caliber/40,1),3,10)
-									casingEmitionTransform.pos = VecAdd(casingEmitionTransform.pos,VecScale(dir,-.2*len))
-									local e = Spawn('<voxbox pos="-0.05 0.05 0.0" rot="0.0 0.0 0.0" size="1 1 '..tostring(len)..'" color=".8 .65 .5" texture="17 .7"/>', casingEmitionTransform)
-									SetBodyVelocity(e[1],VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(Turret.body),VecScale(dir,80)))
-								end
-							end
-						end
-
-					elseif wInfo.reloadtimer < 0 then
-
-						----------------
-						-- End Reload --
-						----------------
-						wInfo.reloadtimer = 0
-
-						if not wInfo.autoloader then -- shellInfo.magsize == 1 and
-							VOICELINES.Play.ReloadFinished(vInfo)
-						end
-						
-						wInfo.casingEmitted = false
-						local Turret = wInfo:getTurret()
-						local casingEmitterJoint = nil
-						if #Turret.locations.casingEmitters > 0 then
-							for i = 1, #Turret.locations.casingEmitters do
-								if Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].id == wInfo.id then
-									casingEmitterJoint = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint
-									break
-								end
-							end
-						end
-						if casingEmitterJoint ~= nil then
-							SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,3,10)
-						end
-
-					end
-				elseif wInfo.reloadtimer == nil then
-					wInfo.reloadtimer = 0
-				end
-
-				if wInfo.shoottimer ~= nil then wInfo.shoottimer = wInfo.shoottimer - dt end
-
-				ManageWeaponRecoil(wInfo)
-
-				ManageFumeExtraction(wInfo, shellInfo, selected_shell)
-
-				if wInfo.triggerReload then
-					wInfo.reloadtimer = wInfo.reloadtime
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/"..wInfo.reloadsound..".ogg"), wInfo:getTransform().pos, 2)
-					wInfo.triggerReload = false
-				end
-				if wInfo.triggertimer then
-					if wInfo.triggertimer > 0 then
-						wInfo.triggertimer = wInfo.triggertimer - dt
-					end
-				else wInfo.triggertimer = 0 end
-
-				if wInfo.triggertimer < 0 then
-					wInfo.triggertimer = 0
-					if wInfo.shoottimer <= 0 then
-						if wInfo.group.nostagger == false then
-							ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
-						else
-							for i = 1,wInfo.group.count,1 do
-								ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
-							end
-						end
-					end
-				end
-
-				if wInfo.ballJoint then
-					local rotspeedY = wInfo.rotspeed*math.max(wInfo.breech.hp^.5,.4)
-					HandleBallRot(k==vInfo.controls.curWeapon, vInfo, wInfo, rotspeedY)
-				end
-			end
-
-			----------------------
-			-- Managing Turrets --
-			----------------------
-
-			for k, tInfo in ipairs(vInfo.parts.turrets) do
-				if tInfo.active then
-					SetJointMotor(tInfo.joints.turretJointX,0,GetBodyMass(tInfo.body)*1.2)
-					tInfo.active = false
-				end
-				local jBs = GetJointedBodies(tInfo.body)
-				if (IsJointBroken(tInfo.joints.turretJointX) or not table.contains(jBs, vInfo.parts.hull)) and not tInfo.broken then
-					local shapes = GetBodyShapes(tInfo.body)
-					for i = 1, #shapes do
-						SetShapeCollisionFilter(shapes[i],1,255-BREECH_COL_FILTER)
-					end
-					tInfo.broken = true -- workaround before removing turret is implemented
-					tInfo.active = false
-
-					for l, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
-						if wInfo.index==k then
-							wInfo.broken = true
-						end
-					end
-					-- RemoveTurret() --should remove the turret so the collision filters arent constantly set
-				end
-			end
-			for k, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
-				if wInfo.active then
-					SetJointMotor(wInfo.joints.turretJointY,0,wInfo.mass*3)
-					wInfo.active = false
-				end
-			end
-
-			HandleAmmo(vInfo,dt)
-
-			HandleTracks(vInfo)
-			
-			AnimateSuspension(vInfo)
-
-			HandleVehicleHitch(vInfo)
-
-				
-			if vInfo.amphibious.amphibious and GetVehicleHealth(v) > .9 then
-				ManageBuoancy(vInfo)
-			end
-		else
-			removeVehicle(v)
-		end
-	end
-

-						else
-							rotspeedX = rotspeedX*math.max(tInfo.turretring.hp^.5,.3)

-

-					end
-				end
-			else
-				if Weapon ~= nil then
-					local tInfo = Turret
-					if tInfo ~= nil then
-						local ADS = TABSVehicles[playerV].controls.aimDownSight
-						local rotspeedX = tInfo.rotspeed
-						local rotspeedY = Weapon.rotspeed*math.max(Weapon.breech.hp^.5,.4)
-
-						if tInfo.turretring.broken then

-

-					end
-				end
-			end
-
-
-			--[[local weight = 0

 		ApplyBodyImpulse(vInfo.parts.hull,VecAdd(comLow,VecScale(sideVec,10)),Vec(0,-f*mass*sideVec[2],0))
 
-		if GetPlayerVehicle() == vInfo.vehiclehandle then

 	end

---=========================--
--- Framework UI and Sights --
---=========================--
----@param draw(dt)
----@DebugPIDAdjustment
----@HandleAiming
----@DrawSights
----@DebugTracks
----@DroneDraw
----@AC130Draw
----@TABS_TAK_DRAW
----@DebugTable
-
-function draw(dt)
-	if InitCompleted ~= true then return end
-	local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle()
-
-	HandleAimingPlus(dt)
-
-	-- pirates beware
-	UiPush()
-		UiColor(0,0,0,0)
-		UiCircle(1)
-	UiPop()
-
-
-	if false then
-	UiPush()
-		local crx,cry,crz = GetQuatEuler(GetCameraTransform().rot)
-		UiAlign("center middle")
-		local ww,wh = 200,500
-		UiTranslate(UiCenter(),UiMiddle())
-		UiRotate(-crz)
-		UiWindow(ww,wh,true)
-		for i = 1, 180 do
-			local x = ww/2
-			local y = wh/2+30*(i-90)+UiMiddle()*crx*.048
-			local aw = 0
-			if (i+1)%5 == 0 then aw = 20 end
-			UiColor(0,1,0)
-			UiLine(x-80-aw,y,x-40,y,1)
-			UiLine(x+40,y,x+80+aw,y,1)
-		end
-	UiPop()
-	end
-
-
-	----------------------
-	-- Body-cam overlay --
-	----------------------
-
-	if bodyCamToggle then
-	UiPush()
-		UiAlign("top right")
-		UiTranslate(UiWidth(),0)
-		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/AXON Logo.png", UiWidth()*.04, UiWidth()*.04)
-
-		local fs = UiWidth()*.015
-		UiTranslate(-fs*16,fs*.1)
-		UiAlign("top left")
-		UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf",fs)
-		UiTextOutline(0,0,0,1,.3)
-		UiColor(1,1,1)
-		local t = math.floor(GetTime())
-		local s = t%60
-		local m = math.floor(t/60)
-		local h = math.floor(t/3600)
-		if s < 10 then s = "0"..tostring(s) end
-		if m < 10 then m = "0"..tostring(m) end
-		if h < 10 then h = "0"..tostring(h) end
-		UiText("2023-07-19 "..h..":"..m..":"..s.." +0000")
-		UiTranslate(0,fs)
-		UiText("AXON BODY 3 X6033496M")
-	UiPop()
-	UiPush()
-		UiColor(1,1,1,.04)
-		UiAlign("top left")
-		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/noise"..math.random(1,5)..".png", UiWidth(), UiWidth())
-	UiPop()
-	UiPush()
-		UiColor(1,1,1,.04)
-		UiTranslate(0,GetTime()*1000%UiHeight())
-		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/glitchlines.png", UiWidth(), UiHeight())
-		UiTranslate(0,-UiHeight())
-		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/glitchlines.png", UiWidth(), UiHeight())
-	UiPop()
-	end
-
-
-	---------------------------------------------
-	-- Cinematic camera that follows the shell --
-	---------------------------------------------
-
-	if CinematicCamControlledLastTick or CinematicCamLastTrans ~= nil or CinematicCamReturnTimer > 0 then
-		UiPush()
-			local t = CinematicCamReturnTimer^2
-			if t == 0 then t = 1 end
-			UiAlign("top left")
-			UiColor(0,0,0)
-			UiRect(UiWidth(),UiHeight()*0.1*t)
-			UiTranslate(0,UiHeight())
-			UiAlign("bottom left")
-			UiRect(UiWidth(),UiHeight()*0.1*t)
-		UiPop()
-		if CinematicCamReturnTimer > 0 then
-			UiScale(1+5*CinematicCamReturnTimer^2)
-		else
-			return
-		end
-	end
-

-	--------------------------

-	---@DebugTracks Developer tool for track script
-	UiPush()
-		UiPush()
-			if GraphVelocityDifference then
-				GraphValue(GraphValTest,30)
-				GraphValue(GraphValTest2,30,"blue",false)
-			end
-
-			DebugPIDAdjustment()
-		UiPop()
-
-		UiPush()

-				local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]

-				DebugTracks(vInfo.parts.hull,vInfo.tracks.left.locations,vInfo.tracks.left.isDynamic,vInfo)

-			end
-		UiPop()
-	UiPop()

-	do

-	------------------
-	-- In-game Menu --
-	------------------
-	
-	local target = 0
-	if drawInGameMenu then target = 1 UiMakeInteractive() end
-	inGameMenuTimer = math.clamp(inGameMenuTimer-.1*(inGameMenuTimer-target),0,1)
-	
-	if drawInGameMenu or inGameMenuTimer > .05 then
-		UiPush()
-			UiBlur(.2*inGameMenuTimer)
-			
-			local wsx, wsy = 600, 650

-				wsx, wsy = 600, 650
-			else
-				wsx, wsy = 600, 900
-			end
-			UiTranslate(UiCenter()*.5-wsx/2,UiMiddle()-wsy/2)
-			UiTranslate(0,1200*(1-inGameMenuTimer))
-			UiBackground(wsx, wsy, "[TABS] Options Menu")
-
-			-- Options
-			UiTranslate(5,5)
-			drawdebug = UiTickBox(drawdebug, 30, "Balistics Debug")
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Clear Debug") then
-				debuglines = {}
-				debugholes = {}
-				TriggerEvent("ClearTabsDebug")

-
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			local fastcalc = TABSSettings.toggle.fastcalc
-			fastcalc = UiTickBox(fastcalc, 30, "Fast Spall Calculations")
-			SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fastcalc", fastcalc)
-			TABSSettings.toggle.fastcalc = fastcalc
-
-			local perfSettings = {"explosionparticlemult","spallamountmult","ammorackparticlemult"}
-			local perfSettingsText = {"Explosion Particle Multiplier","Spall Amount Multiplier","Ammorack Particle Multiplier"}

-				UiTranslate(0,40)

-				local value = TABSSettings.sliders[setting]

-			end
-
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			HighlightShapes = UiTickBox(HighlightShapes, 30, "Vehicle Parts Overlay")
-
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			local fixedAiming = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fixedAiming")
-			fixedAiming = UiTickBox(fixedAiming, 30, "Fixed Aiming")
-			SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fixedAiming", fixedAiming)
-
-
-			UiTranslate(0,50)
-			
-			enableAI = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.enableAI")
-			enableAI = UiTickBox(enableAI, 30,  "[WIP] Toggle Battlespace Management System (BMS)")
-			SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.enableAI", enableAI)
-			SetBool("game.tool.TABS_tak.enabled", enableAI)
-
-
-			UiTranslate(0,50)
-			CinematicCam = UiTickBox(CinematicCam, 30, "[PLANNED FEATURE] Cinematic Projectile Camera")
-
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			local smoothCam = TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam
-			smoothCam = UiTickBox(smoothCam, 30, "Smooth Camera")
-			SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.smoothcam", smoothCam)
-			TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam = smoothCam
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			smoothcamMult = round(GetFloat("savegame.mod.options.sliders.smoothcamMult"),.1)
-			smoothcamMult = UiMultiplier(smoothcamMult, 30, 0, 1, .1, "Smooth Camera Intensity")
-			SetFloat("savegame.mod.options.sliders.smoothcamMult", smoothcamMult)
-
-			UiTranslate(0,40)
-			bodyCamToggle = UiTickBox(bodyCamToggle, 30, "Body Camera Overlay", LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/misc/axon-beep.ogg"))
-			
-			UiTranslate(300, 0)
-			local tracerfires = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires)
-			tracerfires = UiTickBox(tracerfires, 30, "Tracers Start Fires")
-			SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires)
-			
-			UiTranslate(-300, 50)
-			battleToggle = UiTickBox(battleToggle, 30, "Toggle Battle Environment")
-
-			UiTranslate(300, 0)
-			artilleryToggle = UiTickBox(artilleryToggle, 30, "Toggle Shelling")
-			
-			
-			
-			if GetBool('level.TABS.Game') then
-				UiTranslate(-300, 60)
-				local currency = GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod')
-				currency = UiTickBox(currency, 30, "Wave Mod Currency System")
-				SetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod',currency)
-					
-			end
-		UiPop()
-		local enabledWeapons = ListKeys("savegame.mod.weapons")
-		if #enabledWeapons > 0 then
-		UiPush()
-			UiAlign("center middle")
-			UiTranslate(UiCenter()*1.5,UiMiddle())
-			UiTranslate(0,1200*(1-inGameMenuTimer))
-
-			local ww, wh = 120, 120
-			if not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-				UiPush()
-					UiTranslate(-100,-45)
-					if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Enable All") and not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-						for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
-							local name = enabledWeapons[i]
-							local toolID = "tabs-"..name
-							SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true)
-							SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", true)
-							CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
-						end
-						
-					end
-					UiTranslate(0,45)
-					if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Disable All") and not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-						for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
-							local name = enabledWeapons[i]
-							local toolID = "tabs-"..name
-							SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", false)
-							SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", false)
-							CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
-							
-						end
-						
-					end
-				UiPop()
-			end
-			UiPush()
-				UiCustomColor("white")
-
-				for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
-					UiPush()
-
-					local mx, my = UiGetMousePos()
-					-- DebugPrint(mx.."   "..my)
-
-					local fraction = i/#enabledWeapons-inGameMenuTimer
-					local r = 400
-					if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then 
-						r = 300
-					end
-					local tx, ty = r*math.cos(2*math.pi*fraction), r*math.sin(2*math.pi*fraction)
-
-					local dot = (-ty*mx + tx*my)/(r^2)
-					-- DebugPrint(dot)
-					fraction = fraction - .1*dot
-
-					tx, ty = r*math.cos(2*math.pi*fraction), r*math.sin(2*math.pi*fraction)
-					UiTranslate(tx, ty)
-
-					local dtm = ((tx-mx)^2+(ty-my)^2)^.5
-					-- DebugPrint(dtm)
-					local sf = 1-.5*((math.min(dtm,800)/800)^.25)
-
-					local name = enabledWeapons[i]
-					local toolID = "tabs-"..name
-					-- If tool is enabled
-					local enabled = GetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled") or false
-					if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and not enabled then
-						SetString("game.player.tool", "none")
-					end
-					UiAlign("top left")
-					UiTranslate(-ww*sf/2,-wh*sf/2)
-					if enabled then
-						UiPush()
-							UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
-							UiRect(ww*sf,wh*sf)
-						UiPop()
-					end
-					local path = ''
-					if HasKey('savegame.mod.weapons.'..name..'.image') then 
-						path = GetString('savegame.mod.weapons.'..name..'.image')
-					else
-						path = "MOD/TABS/icon/weapon-icons/"..name..".png"
-					end
-					local pri2 = Prices[enabledWeapons[i]] or 0
-					local price = GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money') >= pri2 or false
-					UiCustomImageBoxText(path,ww*sf,wh*sf,string.upper(name),12,true,price,false,pri2)
-					CurrentAmountWeapons = 0
-					if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-						for j = 1, #enabledWeapons do
-							local toolID = "tabs-"..enabledWeapons[j]
-							if GetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled") then
-								CurrentAmountWeapons = CurrentAmountWeapons + 1
-							end
-						end
-					end
-					
-					if UiIsMouseInRect(ww*sf, wh*sf) and InputPressed("lmb") then
-						if price and (CurrentAmountWeapons < 2 or enabled) or not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-							
-							SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", not enabled)
-							SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", not enabled)
-							CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
-							if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-								SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money',GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money')-Prices[enabledWeapons[i]])
-								Prices[enabledWeapons[i]] = 0
-							end
-						end
-					end
-
-					UiPop()
-				end
-
-			UiPop()
-		UiPop()
-		end
-	end
-

-	-------------------
-	-- Vehicle Debug --
-	-------------------
-
-	if drawVehicleDebug then
-		
-		if vehicleDebugPath == nil then
-			if InputPressed("lmb") then
-				local pcT = GetCameraTransform()
-				local dir = TransformToParentVec(pcT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-				local hit, dist, norm, shape = QueryRaycast(pcT.pos,dir,500)
-				local v = GetBodyVehicle(GetShapeBody(shape))
-				if TABSVehicles[v] then
-					local vInfo = TABSVehicles[v]
-					vehicleDebugPath = {vInfo}
-				end
-			end
-		end
-
-		if vehicleDebugPath == nil then
-			UiPush()
-				UiAlign("top left")
-
-				UiTranslate(0,50)
-				UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 40)
-				UiText("Click on a vehicle to select it")
-			UiPop()
-		else
-			local vInfo = vehicleDebugPath[1]
-			if vInfo == nil then vehicleDebugPath = nil end
-			UiPush()
-				if vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
-					UiMakeInteractive()
-				end
-
-				UiAlign("top left")
-
-				UiTranslate(0,50)
-				if vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
-					UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 40)
-					UiText(vInfo.displayName.." [Press R to deselect]")
-					UiTranslate(0,40)
-				end
-
-				UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 20)
-
-				for i, I in ipairs(vehicleDebugPath) do
-					if I ~= nil then
-						local valsAtCurDepth = I
-
-						UiPush()
-							local valsOrder={}
-							local cnt=1
-							for j, J in pairs(valsAtCurDepth) do
-								valsOrder[cnt]={k=j,type=type(J)}
-								cnt=cnt+1
-							end
-							cnt=nil
-
-							table.sort(valsOrder, function(a,b)
-								local tOrder={
-									["function"]=2,
-									["table"]=1,
-								}
-								local aW = tOrder[a.type] or 0
-								local bW = tOrder[b.type] or 0
-								if aW == bW then
-									return tostring(a.k):lower() < tostring(b.k):lower()
-								end
-								return aW < bW
-							end)
-							
-							for _, val in ipairs(valsOrder) do
-								local j=val.k
-								local J=valsAtCurDepth[j]
-								local type = type(J)
-								local w,h = 200, 20
-
-									UiPush()
-										if UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) then
-											UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
-
-											UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf", 20)
-											UiPush()
-												UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight",.3)
-												UiRect(w,h)
-											UiPop()
-
-											if type == "table" then
-												if InputPressed("lmb") then
-													table.insert(vehicleDebugPath,i+1,J)
-
-													if #vehicleDebugPath>i+1 then
-														for k = #vehicleDebugPath, i+2, -1 do
-															table.remove(vehicleDebugPath,k)
-														end
-													end
-												end
-											end
-										else
-											UiPush()
-												UiCustomColor("dark_gray",.3)
-												UiRect(w,h)
-											UiPop()
-											if type == "function" then
-												UiColor(.6,.3,.9)
-											elseif type == "table" then
-												UiColor(.2,.9,.5)
-											end
-										end
-
-										UiTranslate(2)
-										if type == "table" or type == "function" then
-											UiText(j.." - "..type)
-										else
-											UiText(j.." - "..tostring(J))
-										end
-									UiPop()
-									UiTranslate(0,20)
-								end
-						UiPop()
-
-						UiTranslate(200)
-					end
-				end
-			UiPop()
-
-			if InputPressed("r") and vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
-				vehicleDebugPath = nil
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-
-	-----------------------
-	-- Drawing Weapon UI --
-	-----------------------
-
-	UiPush()
-		local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle()
-		if TABSVehicles[playerV] then
-			local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
-			if #vInfo.parts.weapons > 0 and vInfo.criticalErrorVehicle == false then
-
-				local Weapon = vInfo:getWeapon()
-				local Turret = Weapon:getTurret()
-
-				if Weapon ~= nil and Weapon:getCurShell() ~= nil then
-
-				UiPush()
-
-					-- Dynamic ammo and weapon UI (using SOS functions)
-
-					local wippt = math.clamp(weaponUIPopupTimerSOS,0,1)
-					if weaponUIPopupTimer > 0 then weaponUIPopupTimer = weaponUIPopupTimer - dt end
-					weaponUIPopupTimerSOS = weaponUIPopupTimerSOS + dt*(weaponUIPopupTimer - weaponUIPopupTimerSOS)
-
-					UiAlign("center middle")
-					UiTranslate(UiWidth()-100*wippt,100)
-					UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf", 30)
-
-
-					local shellOrder = {}
-					for i = 1,#Weapon.shelltypes do
-						shellOrder[i] = i
-					end
-					table.remove(shellOrder,Weapon.curShell)
-					table.insert(shellOrder,#Weapon.shelltypes,Weapon.curShell)
-					
-					local shellInfo = Weapon:getCurShell()
-					local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-
-					-----------------------
-					-- Weapon info popup --
-					-----------------------
-
-					UiPush()
-						UiAlign("top right")
-						UiTranslate(240,-100)
-						UiPush()

---must be in tick or draw due to relying on player inputs
---was put in draw to draw sights. Maybe tick for controls and draw for sights would make more sense but I can't see a good reason to actually implement
---Well now there was a good reason to implement: The AttachCameraTo function for less shaky camera doesn't work in draw()
---Update: draw was better. Technically tick makes more sense, but all the other camera mods are in tick.
---if we put HandleAimingPlus in draw then TABS can work fine in draw and the other mods can set the camera later in tick and also work
 function HandleAiming(vInfo,dt)
 	if vInfo.criticalErrorVehicle then return end
 	local sense = 0.0015*GetFloat("options.input.sensitivity")
 	fixedAiming = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fixedAiming")

 				elseif newaimOX < 0 then newaimOX = newaimOX + 360 gry = gry + 360
 				end
 				if newaimOX-gry > 350-limit and newaimOX < 360 then gry = gry + 360
-				elseif gry-newaimOX > 350-limit and gry > 0 then gry = gry - 360
```
