```diff
+function server.init()
+    ConfigSettings()
+    InitialiseOptions()
+    InitTracks()
+    InitOptions()
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitAiming()
+    InitTrailersLightSpamDisable()
+    print("------------------------------")
+    print("      TABS Early Testing")
+    print("         Version 0.1")
+    print("------------------------------")
+    print("<<Made by>>")
+    print("Tesseractahedron")
+    print("Laz")
+    print("PleasePickAName")
+    print("JacobMario")
+    print("Spexta")
+    print("Deffcolony")
+    print("OzJackaroo")
+    print("SnakeyWakey")
+    print("------------------------------")
+    InitUIDebugSettings()
+    InitDebug()
+    InitInternalVariables()
+    SplosionInit()
+    ListenerSounds = {}
+    -- Tools
+    InitWeapons()
+    InitArtillery()
+    InitDrone()
+    InitAC130()
+    TABS_TAK_INIT()
+    InitPlayerMovement()
+    HandleNewVehicles()
+    WAR_THUNDER_AIMING = false
+    InitCompleted = true
+    RegisterListenerTo("Tabs Vehicle Framework Listener", "RecieveEvent")
+    --if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    	Prices = {}
+    --end
+    local modKeys = ListKeys('mods.available')
+    Mods = {}
+    SightMods = {}
+    for i=1,#modKeys do
+    	if HasFile('RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Spawn_Main.lua') or Split(modKeys[i], '-')[2] == '3148143301' then
+    		table.insert(Mods, {
+    			ScriptPath = 'RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Spawn_Main.lua',
+    			Key = modKeys[i],
+    			Author = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".author"),
+    			Name = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".name"),
+    		})
+    	end
+
+    	if HasFile('RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Sights_Edit.lua') then
+    		table.insert(SightMods, {
+    			ScriptPath = ''..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Sights_Edit.lua',
+    			Key = modKeys[i],
+    			Path =  'RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path"),
+    			Name = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".name"),
+    			Description = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".description"),
+    			Author = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".author"),
+    		})
+    		end
+
+    end
+    local CurMod = 'nil'
+    for i=1,#Mods do
+    	if CurMod == 'nil' and Mods[i].Author == 'TABS Dev Team' then
+    		CurMod = Mods[i]
+    	end
+    	if Split(Mods[i].Key,'-')[1] == 'local' and Mods[i].Author == 'TABS Dev Team'  then
+    		CurMod = Mods[i]
+    	end
+
+    end
+    --[[for i=1,#SightMods do
+    	CustomSightScript, Error = loadfile(SightMods[i].ScriptPath)
+    	if not Error then
+    		CustomSightScript()	
+    	end
+    	for k, v in pairs(SightTable) do
+    		if not opticPrefabs[k] then
+    			opticPrefabs[k] = v
+    		end
+    		for k2, v2 in pairs(opticPrefabs[k]) do
+    			if type(v2) == 'table' then
+    				for k3, v3 in pairs(v2) do
+    					if v3.Image then
+    						if string.sub(v3.Image,1,3) == 'MOD' then
+    							local file = string.sub(v3.Image,4)
+    							opticPrefabs[k][k2][k3].Image = ''..SightMods[i].Path..''..file..''
+    						elseif string.sub(v3.Image, 1, 5) == 'TABS/' then
+    							local file = string.sub(v3.Image,5)
+    							opticPrefabs[k][k2][k3].Image = 'MOD/'..file..''						
+    						end
+
+    					end
+    				end	
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+    end]]
+    local entity = Spawn('<script file="'..CurMod.ScriptPath..'"/>')
+    if #entity == 0 then
+
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InitCompleted ~= true then if not FatalErrorMsgSent then DebugPrint("A fatal error occurred while initializing the TABS framework.") FatalErrorMsgSent = true end return end
+
+    HandleProjectiles()
+
+    TickInitTrailersHandler()
+
+    CalcFrameTime(dt)
+
+    SplosionTick(dt)
+
+    ManageVehicleDoors()
+
+    ----------------------
+    -- Tools and extras --
+    ----------------------
+
+    TABS_TAK_TICK(dt)
+    ArtilleryTick(dt)
+    DroneTick(dt)
+    AC130Tick(dt)
+
+    if TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam then
+    	PlayerCameraTick(dt,ENV_sat,ENV_bloom,ENV_gamma,bodyCamToggle,smoothcamMult)
+    end
+    if TABSSettings.toggle.playercontroller then
+    	PlayerMovementTick(dt)
+    end
+
+    if sightGlitchTimer ~= 0 then sightGlitchTimer = sightGlitchTimer - dt end
+
+    --DebugPosition()
+
+    if drawdebug then
+    	DebugShooting()
+    end
+
+    -- if InputPressed("j") then
+    -- 	enableAI = not enableAI
+    -- end
+    if InputPressed("f1") then
+    	drawInGameMenu = not drawInGameMenu
+    	PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    end
+    if InputPressed("f2") then
+    	if not drawVehicleDebug then
+    		vehicleDebugMode = "fixed"
+    		drawVehicleDebug = true
+    	elseif drawVehicleDebug and vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" and vehicleDebugPath ~= nil then
+    		vehicleDebugMode = "free"
+    	else
+    		drawVehicleDebug = false
+    	end
+    	PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    end
+
+    -----------------------------
+    -- Vehicle AI and features --
+    -----------------------------
+
+    local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle(playerId)
+
+    current_ai_sighting_group = (current_ai_sighting_group %ai_sighting_groups )+1
+
+    for v,vInfo in pairs(TABSVehicles)do
+    	if IsHandleValid(v)then
+
+    		if vInfo.initialisedColFilters==false then
+    			if InputPressed("usetool") then
+    				InitialiseVehicleCollisionFilters(vInfo)
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		HandleComponentDamage(vInfo,dt)
+
+    		if enableAI and not (GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == vInfo.vehiclehandle) then
+    			HandleTankAI(vInfo,dt)
+    		end
+
+    		if playerV==0 then
+    			HandleHitchInteract(vInfo)
+    		end
+    		HandleHitchLightSpamDisable(vInfo)
+
+    		-- Crew sounds
+    		if vInfo.hittaken and not vInfo.ammorack.bail then
+    			if vInfo.hittakentimer then
+    				if vInfo.hittakentimer <= 0 then
+    					VOICELINES.Play.HitReaction(vInfo)
+    					if math.random() < .2 then
+    						VOICELINES.Play.Cough_A(vInfo)
+    					end
+    					vInfo.hittaken = false
+    					vInfo.hittakentimer = math.random(4,8)
+    				else
+    					vInfo.hittaken = false
+    				end
+    			else
+    				VOICELINES.Play.HitReaction(vInfo)
+    				if math.random() < .2 then
+    					VOICELINES.Play.Cough_A(vInfo)
+    				end
+    				vInfo.hittaken = false
+    				vInfo.hittakentimer = math.random(4,8)
+    			end
+    		end
+    		if vInfo.hittakentimer then
+    			if vInfo.hittakentimer ~= 0 then
+    				vInfo.hittakentimer = vInfo.hittakentimer - dt
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		-- Experimental crew shapes
+    		for cB, cInfo in pairs(vInfo.crew) do
+    			if HighlightShapes then
+    				local hp = GetBodyMass(cB)/cInfo.initialmass
+    				local threshold = .75
+    				local c = math.clamp((hp-threshold)/(1-threshold),0,1)
+    				for i = 1, #cInfo.shapes do
+    					DrawShapeOutline(cInfo.shapes[i],(1-c),c^.5,c*.5,1)
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		ApplyTankMovement(vInfo)
+    		--AnimateSuspension(vInfo)
+
+    		playTrackSounds(vInfo)
+
+    		if TABSSettings.toggle.trackparticle then
+    			HandleTrackParticles(vInfo)
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+
+    ---------------------------------
+    -- Vehicle Inputs and controls --
+    ---------------------------------
+
+    if TABSVehicles[playerV] then
+
+    	local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
+    	if vInfo.criticalErrorVehicle == false then
+
+    		for k,m in pairs(vInfo.parts) do
+    			QueryRejectBody(m)
+    		end
+    		QueryRejectVehicle(playerV)
+
+    		local Weapon = vInfo:getWeapon()
+    		local Turret = Weapon:getTurret()
+    		local Optic = Weapon:getOptic()
+    		local sightTrans = Optic:getTransform()
+
+    		local brt = Weapon:getTransform()
+    		local dir = Weapon:getDir()
+
+    		vInfo.controls.aimpos = VecCopy(brt.pos)
+    		if vInfo.controls.aimDownSight then
+    			vInfo.controls.aimpos = VecCopy(sightTrans.pos)
+    		end
+    		vInfo.controls.aimdir = QuatRotateVec(QuatEuler(vInfo.controls.aimOY + Optic.computer_OY, vInfo.controls.aimOX + Optic.computer_OX, 0), Vec(0,0,-1)) 
+    		aimperp = TransformToParentVec(brt,Vec(1,0,0))
+    		aimvert = TransformToParentVec(brt,Vec(0,1,0))
+
+    		--------------------------
+    		-- Main Weapon Controls --
+    		--------------------------
+    		---@CycleShells Player input cycles through shells
+    		---@CycleWeapon Player input cycles through weapons
+    		---@CycleSight Player input cycles through sights
+    		---@ManageLaunchers Player input controls smoke and mine launchers
+
+    		if not drawInGameMenu then
+    			if WAR_THUNDER_AIMING then
+    				for i, wInfo in ipairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
+    					wInfo.spin.triggerHeld = false
+    					if #wInfo.shelltypes ~= 0 then -- Error handling
+    						if not wInfo.broken and weaponCycleHoldTimer < WEAPON_CYCLE_HOLD_TIME then
+    							if (InputDown(TABSControls.vehicles.shoot) and vInfo.controls.curWeapon==i or wInfo.caliber<15 and InputDown("space")) and ShowOptions == false then
+    								wInfo.spin.triggerHeld = true
+
+    								if wInfo.shoottimer <= 0 and wInfo.reloadtimer <= 0 and wInfo:getCurShell().ammo > 0 and (not IsJointBroken(wInfo.joints.turretJointY) or wInfo.noElevation) then
+    									if wInfo.triggerdelay == 0 then
+    										PlayShootSound(vInfo,wInfo)
+    										if wInfo.group.nostagger == false then
+    											ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
+    										else
+    											for i = 1,wInfo.group.count,1 do
+    												ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
+    											end
+    										end
+    									elseif wInfo.triggertimer == 0 then
+    										wInfo.triggertimer = wInfo.triggerdelay
+    										PlayShootSound(vInfo,wInfo)
+    									end
+    								end
+
+    							end
+    						end
+
+    						CycleShells(vInfo,wInfo)
+
+    					end
+    					if wInfo.spin.triggerHeld == false then
+    						wInfo.lastPos = nil
+    						wInfo.lastDir = nil
+    					end
+
+    				end
+    			else
+    				Weapon.spin.triggerHeld = false
+    				if #Weapon.shelltypes ~= 0 then -- Error handling
+    					if not Weapon.broken and weaponCycleHoldTimer < WEAPON_CYCLE_HOLD_TIME then
+    						if InputDown(TABSControls.vehicles.shoot) and ShowOptions == false then
+    							Weapon.spin.triggerHeld = true
+
+    							if Weapon.reloadtimer <= 0 and Weapon:getCurShell().ammo > 0 and (not IsJointBroken(Weapon.joints.turretJointY) or Weapon.noElevation) then
+
+    								PlayShootLoop(vInfo,Weapon)
+
+    								if Weapon.shoottimer <= 0 then
+    									if Weapon.triggerdelay == 0 then
+    										PlayShootSound(vInfo,Weapon)
+    										if Weapon.group.nostagger == false then
+    											ShootWeapon(vInfo, Weapon, dt)
+    										else
+    											for i = 1,Weapon.group.count,1 do
+    												ShootWeapon(vInfo, Weapon, dt)
+    											end
+    										end
+    									elseif Weapon.triggertimer == 0 then
+    										Weapon.triggertimer = Weapon.triggerdelay
+    										PlayShootSound(vInfo,Weapon)
+    									end
+    								end
+    							end
+
+    						end
+    					end
+
+    					CycleShells(vInfo,Weapon)
+
+    				end
+    				if Weapon.spin.triggerHeld == false then
+    					Weapon.lastPos = nil
+    					Weapon.lastDir = nil
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		CycleWeapon(vInfo,dt)
+
+    		CycleSight(vInfo)
+
+    		RadarActivate(vInfo,dt)		
+    		Suspension_tick(vInfo,dt)
+
+    		ManageLaunchers(vInfo,dt)
+
+    		local updateRange = false
+    		if InputDown("pgup") then
+    			vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment = vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment + 1
+    			updateRange = true
+    		end
+    		if InputDown("pgdown") then
+    			vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment = vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment - 1
+    			updateRange = true
+    		end
+    		vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment = math.clamp(vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment, 0, 20000)
+    		if updateRange then vInfo.controls.range = vInfo.controls.rangeAdjustment end
+
+    		if InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.tool_tip) then
+    			showKeys = not showKeys
+    			PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    		end
+
+    		-- Sound effects
+    		-- Play greeting
+    		if InputReleased("interact") and not vInfo.greeted then
+    			vInfo.greeted = true
+    			VOICELINES.Play.Greeting(vInfo)
+    			-- VOICELINES.Play.Moveout(vInfo)
+    			vInfo.moveoutTimer = 0
+    			local hrx, hry = GetQuatEuler(GetBodyTransform(vInfo.parts.hull).rot)
+    			vInfo.controls.aimOX = hry
+    			vInfo.controls.aimOY = hrx
+    		end
+    		-- Play greeting response
+    		if vInfo.greeted and not vInfo.moveout then
+    			vInfo.moveoutTimer = vInfo.moveoutTimer + dt
+    			if vInfo.moveoutTimer > GREETING_DELAY then
+    				VOICELINES.Play.Moveout(vInfo)
+    				vInfo.moveout = true
+    			end
+    		end
+    		if playDestSound then
+    			VOICELINES.Play.VehicleDestroyed(vInfo)
+    			playDestSound = false
+    		end
+    		if GetEnvironmentProperty("rain") > 0 then
+    			if vInfo.controls.aimDownSight then
+    				local vol = GetEnvironmentProperty("rain")
+    				PlayLoop(SOUNDS.Interior_Rain_Loop,GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId).pos,vol)
+    			elseif camTimer ~= 0 then
+    				local vol = (.5*camTimer+.5)*GetEnvironmentProperty("rain")
+    				PlayLoop(SOUNDS.Interior_Rain_Loop,GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId).pos,vol)
+    			else
+    				local vol = 0.05*(10-zoomCa)*GetEnvironmentProperty("rain")
+    				PlayLoop(SOUNDS.Interior_Rain_Loop,GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId).pos,vol)
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+    else
+
+    	if InputPressed("interact") then
+    		ChangeENV("Default",TABSVehicles[lastPlayerVehicle])
+    	end
+    	GetEnv()
+
+    end
+
+    ----------------------
+    -- Cinematic camera --
+    ----------------------
+
+    if playerV == 0 or not CinematicCam then CinematicCamLastTrans = nil CinematicCamTimer = 0 CinematicCamReturnTimer = 0 end
+    if CinematicCamLastTrans ~= nil and CinematicCam and playerV ~= 0 then
+    	local nT = Transform(VecAdd(CinematicCamLastPTrans.pos,Vec(0,8,0)),QuatEuler(-90,0,0))
+    	local cT = TransformLerp(CinematicCamLastTrans,nT,1-math.exp(-3*CinematicCamTimer))
+    	SetCameraTransform(cT)
+    	CinematicCamTimer = CinematicCamTimer + dt
+    	-- if CinematicCamTimer > 1.5 then HighlightShapes = true end
+    	if CinematicCamTimer > 3 and CinematicCamReturnTimer <= 0 then
+    		CinematicCamReturnTimer = 1
+    		-- HighlightShapes = false
+    	end
+    	if CinematicCamReturnTimer ~= 0 then
+    		local t = CinematicCamReturnTimer^2
+
+    		local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
+    		local Weapon = vInfo:getWeapon()
+    		local Turret = Weapon:getTurret()
+    		local fov = GetInt("options.gfx.fov")
+
+    		local camTrans = Optic:getTransform()
+    		if vInfo.controls.aimDownSight then
+    			local stype = "analogue"
+    			local grx,gry,grz=GetQuatEuler(GetBodyTransform(Weapon.body).rot)
+    			if #Optic:getPresets() > 0 then
+    				stype = Optic.presets[Optic.curSight].type
+    			end
+
+    			if Weapon.ballJoint then
+    				camTrans = GetBodyTransform(Weapon.body)
+    			end
+    			if stype == "artillery" then
+    				camTrans:getTransform()
+    			else
+    				camTrans.pos = VecAdd(camTrans.pos, VecScale(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId),GetTimeStep()))
+    				camTrans.rot = QuatEuler(vInfo.controls.aimOY, vInfo.controls.aimOX, grz)
+    			end
+    			fov = t*GetInt("options.gfx.fov")+(1-t)*zoomS
+    		else
+    			camTrans = TransformCopy(freeCamTrans)
+    		end
+
+    		local ncT = TransformLerp(cT,camTrans,1-t)
+    		SetCameraTransform(ncT, fov)
+    		CinematicCamReturnTimer = CinematicCamReturnTimer - dt
+    	end
+    	if CinematicCamReturnTimer < 0 then
+    		CinematicCamLastTrans = nil
+    		CinematicCamLastPTrans = nil
+    		CinematicCamTimer = 0
+    		CinematicCamReturnTimer = 0
+    	end
+    	for shape, timer in pairs(CinematicCamHitShapes) do
+    		if timer ~= 0 then
+    			-- DrawShapeOutline(shape,timer*4,0,0,timer^.5)
+    			-- DrawShapeHighlight(shape,timer)
+    			if CinematicCamTimer > 1.5 then
+    				CinematicCamHitShapes[shape] = CinematicCamHitShapes[shape] - dt
+    			end
+    		else
+    			CinematicCamHitShapes[shape] = nil
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+
+    TickTrailersHandler()
+
+    -- General controls
+    if InputDown("ctrl") and InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.toggle_debug) then
+    	debuglines = {}
+    	debugholes = {}
+    end
+    if InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.toggle_debug) and not InputDown("ctrl") then
+    	drawdebug = not drawdebug
+    	PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    end
+    if InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.parts_overlay) then
+    	HighlightShapes = not HighlightShapes
+    	PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    end
+
+    -- Need a message to tell players they can press M to clear
+    --[[if InputPressed("m") then
+    	for i = 1, 20 do
+    		DebugPrint("")
+    	end
+    end]]
+
+    FreeLook()
+
+    vehicleExitCheck = inVehicle and playerV == 0
+    vehicleEnterCheck = not inVehicle and playerV ~= 0
+    inVehicle = playerV ~= 0
+
+    -- Used to reset IR and NV effects, can be source of weirdness on maps like Mors Longa
+    if vehicleExitCheck then
+    	ChangeENV("Default",TABSVehicles[lastPlayerVehicle])
+       end
+       if vehicleEnterCheck then weaponUIPopupTimer = 4 end
+
+       customCamShakeTimer = math.clamp(customCamShakeTimer-dt, 0, customCamShakeTimer)
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InitCompleted ~= true then if not FatalErrorMsgSent then DebugPrint("A fatal error occurred while initializing the TABS framework.") FatalErrorMsgSent = true end return end
+
+    -------------------------------------------
+    -- General vehicle handling and features --
+    -------------------------------------------
+
+    ManageSpinningWeapons(dt)
+
+    HandleNewVehicles()
+
+    IsSpawningLastUpdate = IsSpawning
+
+    for v,vInfo in pairs(TABSVehicles) do
+
+    	if IsHandleValid(v) then
+
+    		----------------------
+    		-- Managing Weapons --
+    		----------------------
+
+    		for k, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
+
+    			local shellInfo = wInfo.shelltypes[wInfo.curShell]
+    			--DebugPrint(wInfo.shelltypes[wInfo.curShell])
+    			--DebugPrint(shellInfo)
+    			--local shellInfo = Weapon:getCurShell()
+    			local shellAmmo = shellInfo.ammo
+    			local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
+
+    			if wInfo.reloadtimer ~= nil then
+    				if wInfo.reloadtimer ~= 0 then
+    					-- Loader won't load if the crew has evacuated
+    					if not vInfo.ammorack.bail then
+    						wInfo.reloadtimer = wInfo.reloadtimer - dt
+    					end
+
+    					-- Emitting casings
+    					local Turret = wInfo:getTurret()
+    					local casingEmitionTransform = nil
+    					local casingEmitterJoint = nil
+    					local casingEmitterJointTimer = 1 --default of 0.5 will be set later
+    					if #Turret.locations.casingEmitters ~= 0 then
+    						for i = 1, #Turret.locations.casingEmitters do
+    							if Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].id == wInfo.id then
+    								casingEmitionTransform = TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(Turret.body), Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].transform)
+    								casingEmitterJoint = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint
+    								casingEmitterJointTimer = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint_timer or 0.5
+    								break
+    							end
+    						end
+    					end
+
+    					if casingEmitterJoint ~= nil then
+    						local t = wInfo.reloadtimer/wInfo.reloadtime
+    						if t > casingEmitterJointTimer then
+    							SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,-3,10)
+    						else
+    							SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,3,10)
+    						end
+
+    						if casingEmitionTransform ~= nil and t < .8 and not wInfo.casingEmitted then
+    							wInfo.casingEmitted = true
+
+    							if wInfo.caliber < 50 then
+    								local dir = TransformToParentVec(casingEmitionTransform,Vec(0,0,1))
+    								local casingsound = SOUNDS.casings.lmg
+    								if wInfo.caliber >= 30 then
+    									casingsound = SOUNDS.casings["40mm"]
+    								elseif wInfo.caliber >= 20 then
+    									casingsound = SOUNDS.casings["20mm"]
+    								elseif wInfo.caliber > 7.62 then
+    									casingsound = SOUNDS.casings.hmg
+    								end
+    								SpentCasing(casingEmitionTransform,dir,6,2,.2,wInfo.caliber,"rifle",casingsound)
+    							else
+    								local dir = TransformToParentVec(casingEmitionTransform,Vec(0,0,-1))
+    								local len = math.clamp(2+round(wInfo.caliber/40,1),3,10)
+    								casingEmitionTransform.pos = VecAdd(casingEmitionTransform.pos,VecScale(dir,-.2*len))
+    								local e = Spawn('<voxbox pos="-0.05 0.05 0.0" rot="0.0 0.0 0.0" size="1 1 '..tostring(len)..'" color=".8 .65 .5" texture="17 .7"/>', casingEmitionTransform)
+    								SetBodyVelocity(e[1],VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(Turret.body),VecScale(dir,80)))
+    							end
+    						end
+    					end
+
+    				elseif wInfo.reloadtimer < 0 then
+
+    					----------------
+    					-- End Reload --
+    					----------------
+    					wInfo.reloadtimer = 0
+
+    					if not wInfo.autoloader then -- shellInfo.magsize == 1 and
+    						VOICELINES.Play.ReloadFinished(vInfo)
+    					end
+
+    					wInfo.casingEmitted = false
+    					local Turret = wInfo:getTurret()
+    					local casingEmitterJoint = nil
+    					if #Turret.locations.casingEmitters ~= 0 then
+    						for i = 1, #Turret.locations.casingEmitters do
+    							if Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].id == wInfo.id then
+    								casingEmitterJoint = Turret.locations.casingEmitters[i].joint
+    								break
+    							end
+    						end
+    					end
+    					if casingEmitterJoint ~= nil then
+    						SetJointMotor(casingEmitterJoint,3,10)
+    					end
+
+    				end
+    			elseif wInfo.reloadtimer == nil then
+    				wInfo.reloadtimer = 0
+    			end
+
+    			if wInfo.shoottimer ~= nil then wInfo.shoottimer = wInfo.shoottimer - dt end
+
+    			ManageWeaponRecoil(wInfo)
+
+    			ManageFumeExtraction(wInfo, shellInfo, selected_shell)
+
+    			if wInfo.triggerReload then
+    				wInfo.reloadtimer = wInfo.reloadtime
+    				PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/"..wInfo.reloadsound..".ogg"), wInfo:getTransform().pos, 2)
+    				wInfo.triggerReload = false
+    			end
+    			if wInfo.triggertimer then
+    				if wInfo.triggertimer ~= 0 then
+    					wInfo.triggertimer = wInfo.triggertimer - dt
+    				end
+    			else wInfo.triggertimer = 0 end
+
+    			if wInfo.triggertimer < 0 then
+    				wInfo.triggertimer = 0
+    				if wInfo.shoottimer <= 0 then
+    					if wInfo.group.nostagger == false then
+    						ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
+    					else
+    						for i = 1,wInfo.group.count,1 do
+    							ShootWeapon(vInfo, wInfo, dt)
+    						end
+    					end
+    				end
+    			end
+
+    			if wInfo.ballJoint then
+    				local rotspeedY = wInfo.rotspeed*math.max(wInfo.breech.hp^.5,.4)
+    				HandleBallRot(k==vInfo.controls.curWeapon, vInfo, wInfo, rotspeedY)
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		----------------------
+    		-- Managing Turrets --
+    		----------------------
+
+    		for k, tInfo in ipairs(vInfo.parts.turrets) do
+    			if tInfo.active then
+    				SetJointMotor(tInfo.joints.turretJointX,0,GetBodyMass(tInfo.body)*1.2)
+    				tInfo.active = false
+    			end
+    			local jBs = GetJointedBodies(tInfo.body)
+    			if (IsJointBroken(tInfo.joints.turretJointX) or not table.contains(jBs, vInfo.parts.hull)) and not tInfo.broken then
+    				local shapes = GetBodyShapes(tInfo.body)
+    				for i = 1, #shapes do
+    					SetShapeCollisionFilter(shapes[i],1,255-BREECH_COL_FILTER)
+    				end
+    				tInfo.broken = true -- workaround before removing turret is implemented
+    				tInfo.active = false
+
+    				for l, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
+    					if wInfo.index==k then
+    						wInfo.broken = true
+    					end
+    				end
+    				-- RemoveTurret() --should remove the turret so the collision filters arent constantly set
+    			end
+    		end
+    		for k, wInfo in pairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
+    			if wInfo.active then
+    				SetJointMotor(wInfo.joints.turretJointY,0,wInfo.mass*3)
+    				wInfo.active = false
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		HandleAmmo(vInfo,dt)
+
+    		HandleTracks(vInfo)
+
+    		AnimateSuspension(vInfo)
+
+    		HandleVehicleHitch(vInfo)
+
+    		if vInfo.amphibious.amphibious and GetVehicleHealth(v) > .9 then
+    			ManageBuoancy(vInfo)
+    		end
+    	else
+    		removeVehicle(v)
+    	end
+    end
+
+    ------------------------------
+    -- Managing Turret Rotation --
+    ------------------------------
+
+    TurretControlledThisUpdate = false
+    local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle(playerId)
+    if TABSVehicles[playerV] then
+    	local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
+
+    	if #vInfo.parts.weapons ~= 0 then
+    		local Weapon = vInfo:getWeapon()
+    		local Turret = Weapon:getTurret()
+
+    		if WAR_THUNDER_AIMING then
+    			for i, wInfo in ipairs(vInfo.parts.weapons) do
+    				if wInfo ~= nil then
+    					local tInfo = wInfo:getTurret()
+
+    					local ADS = TABSVehicles[playerV].controls.aimDownSight
+    					local rotspeedX = tInfo.rotspeed
+    					local rotspeedY = wInfo.rotspeed*math.max(wInfo.breech.hp^.5,.4)
+
+    					if tInfo.turretring.broken then
+    						rotspeedX = 0
+    					else
+    						rotspeedX = rotspeedX*math.max(tInfo.turretring.hp^.5,.3)
+    					end
+
+    					if (not IsJointBroken(wInfo.joints.turretJointY) or wInfo.noElevation) and not Turret.broken then
+    						HandleTurretRotation(vInfo, ADS, wInfo, tInfo, offsetY, rotspeedX, rotspeedY, TurretControlledLastUpdate, tInfo.rotxsound)
+    						TurretControlledThisUpdate = true
+    					end
+    				end
+    			end
+    		else
+    			if Weapon ~= nil then
+    				local tInfo = Turret
+    				if tInfo ~= nil then
+    					local ADS = TABSVehicles[playerV].controls.aimDownSight
+    					local rotspeedX = tInfo.rotspeed
+    					local rotspeedY = Weapon.rotspeed*math.max(Weapon.breech.hp^.5,.4)
+
+    					if tInfo.turretring.broken then
+    						rotspeedX = 0
+    					else
+    						rotspeedX = rotspeedX*math.max(tInfo.turretring.hp^.5,.3)
+    					end
+
+    					if (not IsJointBroken(Weapon.joints.turretJointY) or Weapon.noElevation) and not Turret.broken then
+    						HandleTurretRotation(vInfo, ADS, Weapon, tInfo, offsetY, rotspeedX, rotspeedY, TurretControlledLastUpdate, tInfo.rotxsound)
+    						TurretControlledThisUpdate = true
+    					end
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		--[[local weight = 0
+    		local body = GetVehicleBody(playerV)
+    		local bodies = GetJointedBodies(body)
+    		for qwe = 1, #bodies do
+    			local m = GetBodyMass(bodies[qwe])
+    			weight = weight + m
+    			DebugWatch("Weight of "..vInfo.displayName, weight)
+    		end]]
+    	end
+    end
+
+    trailersHandlerUpdate()
+    TurretControlledLastUpdate = TurretControlledThisUpdate
+
+    if TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam then
+    	PlayerCameraUpdate(dt)
+    end
+    if TABSSettings.toggle.playercontroller then
+    	PlayerMovementUpdate(dt)
+    end
+
+    ArtilleryUpdate(dt)
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if InitCompleted ~= true then return end
+    local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle(playerId)
+
+    HandleAimingPlus(dt)
+
+    -- pirates beware
+    UiPush()
+    	UiColor(0,0,0,0)
+    	UiCircle(1)
+    UiPop()
+
+    if false then
+    UiPush()
+    	local crx,cry,crz = GetQuatEuler(GetCameraTransform().rot)
+    	UiAlign("center middle")
+    	local ww,wh = 200,500
+    	UiTranslate(UiCenter(),UiMiddle())
+    	UiRotate(-crz)
+    	UiWindow(ww,wh,true)
+    	for i = 1, 180 do
+    		local x = ww/2
+    		local y = wh/2+30*(i-90)+UiMiddle()*crx*.048
+    		local aw = 0
+    		if (i+1)%5 == 0 then aw = 20 end
+    		UiColor(0,1,0)
+    		UiLine(x-80-aw,y,x-40,y,1)
+    		UiLine(x+40,y,x+80+aw,y,1)
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+    end
+
+    ----------------------
+    -- Body-cam overlay --
+    ----------------------
+
+    if bodyCamToggle then
+    UiPush()
+    	UiAlign("top right")
+    	UiTranslate(UiWidth(),0)
+    	UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/AXON Logo.png", UiWidth()*.04, UiWidth()*.04)
+
+    	local fs = UiWidth()*.015
+    	UiTranslate(-fs*16,fs*.1)
+    	UiAlign("top left")
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf",fs)
+    	UiTextOutline(0,0,0,1,.3)
+    	UiColor(1,1,1)
+    	local t = math.floor(GetTime())
+    	local s = t%60
+    	local m = math.floor(t/60)
+    	local h = math.floor(t/3600)
+    	if s < 10 then s = "0"..tostring(s) end
+    	if m < 10 then m = "0"..tostring(m) end
+    	if h < 10 then h = "0"..tostring(h) end
+    	UiText("2023-07-19 "..h..":"..m..":"..s.." +0000")
+    	UiTranslate(0,fs)
+    	UiText("AXON BODY 3 X6033496M")
+    UiPop()
+    UiPush()
+    	UiColor(1,1,1,.04)
+    	UiAlign("top left")
+    	UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/noise"..math.random(1,5)..".png", UiWidth(), UiWidth())
+    UiPop()
+    UiPush()
+    	UiColor(1,1,1,.04)
+    	UiTranslate(0,GetTime()*1000%UiHeight())
+    	UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/glitchlines.png", UiWidth(), UiHeight())
+    	UiTranslate(0,-UiHeight())
+    	UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/glitchlines.png", UiWidth(), UiHeight())
+    UiPop()
+    end
+
+    ---------------------------------------------
+    -- Cinematic camera that follows the shell --
+    ---------------------------------------------
+
+    if CinematicCamControlledLastTick or CinematicCamLastTrans ~= nil or CinematicCamReturnTimer ~= 0 then
+    	UiPush()
+    		local t = CinematicCamReturnTimer^2
+    		if t == 0 then t = 1 end
+    		UiAlign("top left")
+    		UiColor(0,0,0)
+    		UiRect(UiWidth(),UiHeight()*0.1*t)
+    		UiTranslate(0,UiHeight())
+    		UiAlign("bottom left")
+    		UiRect(UiWidth(),UiHeight()*0.1*t)
+    	UiPop()
+    	if CinematicCamReturnTimer ~= 0 then
+    		UiScale(1+5*CinematicCamReturnTimer^2)
+    	else
+    		return
+    	end
+    end
+
+    --------------------------
+    -- Aiming UI and sights --
+    --------------------------
+    ---@HandleAiming Handles camera transform 
+    ---@DrawSights Handles rendering gun sight
+    ---@DebugPIDAdjustment Developer tool for adjusting aiming script
+    ---@DebugTracks Developer tool for track script
+    UiPush()
+    	UiPush()
+    		if GraphVelocityDifference then
+    			GraphValue(GraphValTest,30)
+    			GraphValue(GraphValTest2,30,"blue",false)
+    		end
+
+    		DebugPIDAdjustment()
+    	UiPop()
+
+    	UiPush()
+    		if TABSVehicles[playerV] then
+    			local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
+    			DrawSights(vInfo)
+    			DebugTracks(vInfo.parts.hull,vInfo.tracks.left.locations,vInfo.tracks.left.isDynamic,vInfo)
+    			-- VisualizeComponentDamage(vInfo)
+    		end
+    	UiPop()
+    UiPop()
+
+    --------------------------
+    -- AI Team Selection UI --
+    --------------------------
+
+    -- if GetString("game.player.tool") == "spraycan" and playerV == 0 and false then
+    -- 	UiPush()
+    -- 		UiAlign("top left")
+    -- 		UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf", 30)
+    -- 		if enableAI then
+    -- 			UiText("[J] AI Enabled")
+    -- 		else
+    -- 			UiText("[J] AI Disabled")
+    -- 		end
+
+    -- 		for id, vInfo in pairs(TABSVehicles) do
+    -- 			UiPush()
+    -- 				local pos = VecAdd(GetBodyTransform(vInfo.parts.hull).pos,Vec(0,3,0))
+    -- 				if TransformToLocalPoint(GetCameraTransform(), pos)[3] < 0 then
+    -- 					local x,y = UiWorldToPixel(pos)
+    -- 					UiTranslate(x,y)
+    -- 					UiAlign("center middle")
+
+    -- 					UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf", 20)
+    -- 					UiText(vInfo.displayName)
+
+    -- 					UiTranslate(0,20)
+    -- 					UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 20)
+    -- 					UiText("[LMB/RMB] Team: "..vInfo.ai.team)
+
+    -- 					UiTranslate(0,20)
+    -- 					if vInfo.ai.active then
+    -- 						UiText("[MMB] AI Enabled")
+    -- 					else
+    -- 						UiText("[MMB] AI Disabled")
+    -- 					end
+    -- 				end
+    -- 			UiPop()
+    -- 		end
+    -- 	UiPop()
+    -- end
+    do 
+
+    	if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveHandler.NewWave') then 
+    		local enabledWeapons = ListKeys("savegame.mod.weapons")
+    		for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
+    			Prices[enabledWeapons[i]] = math.random(950,6500)
+    			local name = enabledWeapons[i]
+    			local toolID = "tabs-"..name
+    			SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", false, true)
+    			SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", false, true)
+    		end
+    		local enabledWeapons = {'m1911', 'm9a1', 'g17','aps', 'makarov'}
+
+    		local weapon = math.random(1,#enabledWeapons)
+    		Prices[enabledWeapons[weapon]] = 0
+    		SetBool("game.tool.".."tabs-"..enabledWeapons[weapon]..".enabled", not enabled, true)
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[weapon]..".enabled", not enabled, true)
+    		CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[weapon])
+    		SetString("game.player.tool","tabs-"..enabledWeapons[weapon].."", true)
+    		SetBool('level.TABS.WaveHandler.NewWave',false, true)
+
+    		PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
+    	end
+    end
+    ------------------
+    -- In-game Menu --
+    ------------------
+
+    local target = 0
+    if drawInGameMenu then target = 1 UiMakeInteractive() end
+    inGameMenuTimer = math.clamp(inGameMenuTimer-.1*(inGameMenuTimer-target),0,1)
+
+    if drawInGameMenu or inGameMenuTimer > .05 then
+    	UiPush()
+    		UiBlur(.2*inGameMenuTimer)
+
+    		local wsx, wsy = 600, 650
+    		if not GetBool('level.TABS.Game') then
+    			wsx, wsy = 600, 650
+    		else
+    			wsx, wsy = 600, 900
+    		end
+    		UiTranslate(UiCenter()*.5-wsx/2,UiMiddle()-wsy/2)
+    		UiTranslate(0,1200*(1-inGameMenuTimer))
+    		UiBackground(wsx, wsy, "[TABS] Options Menu")
+
+    		-- Options
+    		UiTranslate(5,5)
+    		drawdebug = UiTickBox(drawdebug, 30, "Balistics Debug")
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Clear Debug") then
+    			debuglines = {}
+    			debugholes = {}
+    			TriggerEvent("ClearTabsDebug")
+    		end
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		local fastcalc = TABSSettings.toggle.fastcalc
+    		fastcalc = UiTickBox(fastcalc, 30, "Fast Spall Calculations")
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fastcalc", fastcalc, true)
+    		TABSSettings.toggle.fastcalc = fastcalc
+
+    		local perfSettings = {"explosionparticlemult","spallamountmult","ammorackparticlemult"}
+    		local perfSettingsText = {"Explosion Particle Multiplier","Spall Amount Multiplier","Ammorack Particle Multiplier"}
+    		for i = 1, #perfSettings do
+    			UiTranslate(0,40)
+    			local setting = perfSettings[i]
+    			local value = TABSSettings.sliders[setting]
+    			value = UiMultiplier(value, 30, 0.1, 2, .1, perfSettingsText[i])
+    			SetFloat("savegame.mod.options.sliders."..setting, value, true)
+    			TABSSettings.sliders[setting] = value
+    		end
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		HighlightShapes = UiTickBox(HighlightShapes, 30, "Vehicle Parts Overlay")
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		local fixedAiming = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fixedAiming")
+    		fixedAiming = UiTickBox(fixedAiming, 30, "Fixed Aiming")
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.fixedAiming", fixedAiming, true)
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,50)
+
+    		enableAI = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.enableAI")
+    		enableAI = UiTickBox(enableAI, 30,  "[WIP] Toggle Battlespace Management System (BMS)")
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.enableAI", enableAI, true)
+    		SetBool("game.tool.TABS_tak.enabled", enableAI, true)
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,50)
+    		CinematicCam = UiTickBox(CinematicCam, 30, "[PLANNED FEATURE] Cinematic Projectile Camera")
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		local smoothCam = TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam
+    		smoothCam = UiTickBox(smoothCam, 30, "Smooth Camera")
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.smoothcam", smoothCam, true)
+    		TABSSettings.toggle.smoothcam = smoothCam
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		smoothcamMult = round(GetFloat("savegame.mod.options.sliders.smoothcamMult"),.1)
+    		smoothcamMult = UiMultiplier(smoothcamMult, 30, 0, 1, .1, "Smooth Camera Intensity")
+    		SetFloat("savegame.mod.options.sliders.smoothcamMult", smoothcamMult, true)
+
+    		UiTranslate(0,40)
+    		bodyCamToggle = UiTickBox(bodyCamToggle, 30, "Body Camera Overlay", LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/misc/axon-beep.ogg"))
+
+    		UiTranslate(300, 0)
+    		local tracerfires = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires)
+    		tracerfires = UiTickBox(tracerfires, 30, "Tracers Start Fires")
+    		SetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires, true)
+
+    		UiTranslate(-300, 50)
+    		battleToggle = UiTickBox(battleToggle, 30, "Toggle Battle Environment")
+
+    		UiTranslate(300, 0)
+    		artilleryToggle = UiTickBox(artilleryToggle, 30, "Toggle Shelling")
+
+    		if GetBool('level.TABS.Game') then
+    			UiTranslate(-300, 60)
+    			local currency = GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod')
+    			currency = UiTickBox(currency, 30, "Wave Mod Currency System")
+    			SetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod',currency, true)
+
+    		end
+    	UiPop()
+    	local enabledWeapons = ListKeys("savegame.mod.weapons")
+    	if #enabledWeapons ~= 0 then
+    	UiPush()
+    		UiAlign("center middle")
+    		UiTranslate(UiCenter()*1.5,UiMiddle())
+    		UiTranslate(0,1200*(1-inGameMenuTimer))
+
+    		local ww, wh = 120, 120
+    		if not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    			UiPush()
+    				UiTranslate(-100,-45)
+    				if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Enable All") and not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    					for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
+    						local name = enabledWeapons[i]
+    						local toolID = "tabs-"..name
+    						SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    						SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", true, true)
+    						CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
+    					end
+
+    				end
+    				UiTranslate(0,45)
+    				if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, "Disable All") and not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    					for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
+    						local name = enabledWeapons[i]
+    						local toolID = "tabs-"..name
+    						SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", false, true)
+    						SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", false, true)
+    						CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
+
+    					end
+
+    				end
+    			UiPop()
+    		end
+    		UiPush()
+    			UiCustomColor("white")
+
+    			for i = 1, #enabledWeapons do
+    				UiPush()
+
+    				local mx, my = UiGetMousePos()
+    				-- DebugPrint(mx.."   "..my)
+
+    				local fraction = i/#enabledWeapons-inGameMenuTimer
+    				local r = 400
+    				if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then 
+    					r = 300
+    				end
+    				local tx, ty = r*math.cos(2*math.pi*fraction), r*math.sin(2*math.pi*fraction)
+
+    				local dot = (-ty*mx + tx*my)/(r^2)
+    				-- DebugPrint(dot)
+    				fraction = fraction - .1*dot
+
+    				tx, ty = r*math.cos(2*math.pi*fraction), r*math.sin(2*math.pi*fraction)
+    				UiTranslate(tx, ty)
+
+    				local dtm = ((tx-mx)^2+(ty-my)^2)^.5
+    				-- DebugPrint(dtm)
+    				local sf = 1-.5*((math.min(dtm,800)/800)^.25)
+
+    				local name = enabledWeapons[i]
+    				local toolID = "tabs-"..name
+    				-- If tool is enabled
+    				local enabled = GetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled") or false
+    				if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and not enabled then
+    					SetString("game.player.tool", "none", true)
+    				end
+    				UiAlign("top left")
+    				UiTranslate(-ww*sf/2,-wh*sf/2)
+    				if enabled then
+    					UiPush()
+    						UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
+    						UiRect(ww*sf,wh*sf)
+    					UiPop()
+    				end
+    				local path = ''
+    				if HasKey('savegame.mod.weapons.'..name..'.image') then 
+    					path = GetString('savegame.mod.weapons.'..name..'.image')
+    				else
+    					path = "MOD/TABS/icon/weapon-icons/"..name..".png"
+    				end
+    				local pri2 = Prices[enabledWeapons[i]] or 0
+    				local price = GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money') >= pri2 or false
+    				UiCustomImageBoxText(path,ww*sf,wh*sf,string.upper(name),12,true,price,false,pri2)
+    				CurrentAmountWeapons = 0
+    				if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    					for j = 1, #enabledWeapons do
+    						local toolID = "tabs-"..enabledWeapons[j]
+    						if GetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled") then
+    							CurrentAmountWeapons = CurrentAmountWeapons + 1
+    						end
+    					end
+    				end
+
+    				if UiIsMouseInRect(ww*sf, wh*sf) and InputPressed("lmb") then
+    					if price and (CurrentAmountWeapons < 2 or enabled) or not GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+
+    						SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", not enabled, true)
+    						SetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..enabledWeapons[i]..".enabled", not enabled, true)
+    						CreateSpecificWeapon(enabledWeapons[i])
+    						if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    							SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money',GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money')-Prices[enabledWeapons[i]], true)
+    							Prices[enabledWeapons[i]] = 0
+    						end
+    					end
+    				end
+
+    				UiPop()
+    			end
+
+    		UiPop()
+    	UiPop()
+    	end
+    end
+
+    -------------------
+    -- Vehicle Debug --
+    -------------------
+
+    if drawVehicleDebug then
+
+    	if vehicleDebugPath == nil then
+    		if InputPressed("lmb") then
+    			local pcT = GetCameraTransform()
+    			local dir = TransformToParentVec(pcT,Vec(0,0,-1))
+    			local hit, dist, norm, shape = QueryRaycast(pcT.pos,dir,500)
+    			local v = GetBodyVehicle(GetShapeBody(shape))
+    			if TABSVehicles[v] then
+    				local vInfo = TABSVehicles[v]
+    				vehicleDebugPath = {vInfo}
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if vehicleDebugPath == nil then
+    		UiPush()
+    			UiAlign("top left")
+
+    			UiTranslate(0,50)
+    			UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 40)
+    			UiText("Click on a vehicle to select it")
+    		UiPop()
+    	else
+    		local vInfo = vehicleDebugPath[1]
+    		if vInfo == nil then vehicleDebugPath = nil end
+    		UiPush()
+    			if vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
+    				UiMakeInteractive()
+    			end
+
+    			UiAlign("top left")
+
+    			UiTranslate(0,50)
+    			if vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
+    				UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 40)
+    				UiText(vInfo.displayName.." [Press R to deselect]")
+    				UiTranslate(0,40)
+    			end
+
+    			UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 20)
+
+    			for i, I in ipairs(vehicleDebugPath) do
+    				if I ~= nil then
+    					local valsAtCurDepth = I
+
+    					UiPush()
+    						local valsOrder={}
+    						local cnt=1
+    						for j, J in pairs(valsAtCurDepth) do
+    							valsOrder[cnt]={k=j,type=type(J)}
+    							cnt=cnt+1
+    						end
+    						cnt=nil
+
+    						table.sort(valsOrder, function(a,b)
+    							local tOrder={
+    								["function"]=2,
+    								["table"]=1,
+    							}
+    							local aW = tOrder[a.type] or 0
+    							local bW = tOrder[b.type] or 0
+    							if aW == bW then
+    								return tostring(a.k):lower() < tostring(b.k):lower()
+    							end
+    							return aW < bW
+    						end)
+
+    						for _, val in ipairs(valsOrder) do
+    							local j=val.k
+    							local J=valsAtCurDepth[j]
+    							local type = type(J)
+    							local w,h = 200, 20
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									if UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) then
+    										UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+
+    										UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf", 20)
+    										UiPush()
+    											UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight",.3)
+    											UiRect(w,h)
+    										UiPop()
+
+    										if type == "table" then
+    											if InputPressed("lmb") then
+    												table.insert(vehicleDebugPath,i+1,J)
+
+    												if #vehicleDebugPath>i+1 then
+    													for k = #vehicleDebugPath, i+2, -1 do
+    														table.remove(vehicleDebugPath,k)
+    													end
+    												end
+    											end
+    										end
+    									else
+    										UiPush()
+    											UiCustomColor("dark_gray",.3)
+    											UiRect(w,h)
+    										UiPop()
+    										if type == "function" then
+    											UiColor(.6,.3,.9)
+    										elseif type == "table" then
+    											UiColor(.2,.9,.5)
+    										end
+    									end
+
+    									UiTranslate(2)
+    									if type == "table" or type == "function" then
+    										UiText(j.." - "..type)
+    									else
+    										UiText(j.." - "..tostring(J))
+    									end
+    								UiPop()
+    								UiTranslate(0,20)
+    							end
+    					UiPop()
+
+    					UiTranslate(200)
+    				end
+    			end
+    		UiPop()
+
+    		if InputPressed("r") and vehicleDebugMode == "fixed" then
+    			vehicleDebugPath = nil
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+
+    -----------------------
+    -- Drawing Weapon UI --
+    -----------------------
+
+    UiPush()
+    	local playerV = GetPlayerVehicle(playerId)
+    	if TABSVehicles[playerV] then
+    		local vInfo = TABSVehicles[playerV]
+    		if #vInfo.parts.weapons > 0 and vInfo.criticalErrorVehicle == false then
+
+    			local Weapon = vInfo:getWeapon()
+    			local Turret = Weapon:getTurret()
+
+    			if Weapon ~= nil and Weapon:getCurShell() ~= nil then
+
+    			UiPush()
+
+    				-- Dynamic ammo and weapon UI (using SOS functions)
+
+    				local wippt = math.clamp(weaponUIPopupTimerSOS,0,1)
+    				if weaponUIPopupTimer ~= 0 then weaponUIPopupTimer = weaponUIPopupTimer - dt end
+    				weaponUIPopupTimerSOS = weaponUIPopupTimerSOS + dt*(weaponUIPopupTimer - weaponUIPopupTimerSOS)
+
+    				UiAlign("center middle")
+    				UiTranslate(UiWidth()-100*wippt,100)
+    				UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf", 30)
+
+    				local shellOrder = {}
+    				for i = 1,#Weapon.shelltypes do
+    					shellOrder[i] = i
+    				end
+    				table.remove(shellOrder,Weapon.curShell)
+    				table.insert(shellOrder,#Weapon.shelltypes,Weapon.curShell)
+
+    				local shellInfo = Weapon:getCurShell()
+    				local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
+
+    				-----------------------
+    				-- Weapon info popup --
+    				-----------------------
+
+    				UiPush()
+    					UiAlign("top right")
+    					UiTranslate(240,-100)
+    					UiPush()
+    						UiPush()
+    							UiTranslate(-2,2)
+    							UiCustomColor("dark_gray")
+    							UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/UI Weapon Background.png",400,200)
+    						UiPop()
+
+    						UiCustomColorLerp("dark_gray","dark_gray_highlight",wippt)
+    						UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/UI Weapon Background.png",400,200)
+
+    						UiCustomColorLerp("dark_gray","orange_highlight",wippt)
+    						UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/UI Weapon Background Title.png",400,60)
+    					UiPop()
+
+    					UiTranslate(-140)
+    					UiCustomColorLerp("dark_gray","white_highlight",wippt)
+    					UiText(Weapon.name)
+    					UiTranslate(0,30)
+    					UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf",30)
+    					UiText(Weapon.caliber.."mm")
+
+    					UiTranslate(0,30)
+    					if Weapon:getCurShell().magsize == 1 then
+    						UiText(math.floor(60/Weapon.reloadtime).."RPM")
+    					else
+    						UiText(Weapon.firerate.."RPM")
+    					end
+    					UiTranslate(0,30)
+    					UiText(round(60*Weapon.accuracy*90,0.0001).."MOA")
+
+    					UiTranslate(0,50)
+    					local BHP = 1
+    					if Weapon.breech.brshape ~= 0 then
+    						local bhp = GetShapeVoxelCount(Weapon.breech.brshape)/Weapon.breech.brinitialvoxcount
+    						local threshold = .85 -- Engine will be disabled under this amount
+    						BHP = math.clamp((bhp-threshold)/(1-threshold),0,1)
+    					end
+    					UiText("Breach: "..round(100*BHP,1).."%")
+
+    					UiTranslate(0,30)
+    					local THP = 1
+    					if #Turret.turretring.shapes ~= 0 then
+    						local totalVox = 0
+    						local initVox = 0
+    						for i = 1, #Turret.turretring.shapes do
+    							totalVox = totalVox + GetShapeVoxelCount(Turret.turretring.shapes[i].shape)
+    							initVox = initVox + Turret.turretring.shapes[i].initialvoxcount
+    						end
+    						local thp = totalVox/initVox
+    						local threshold = .9
+    						THP = math.clamp((thp-threshold)/(1-threshold),0,1)
+    					end
+    					UiText("Turret: "..round(100*THP,1).."%")
+    				UiPop()
+
+    				---------------------
+    				-- Shelltype wheel --
+    				---------------------
+
+    				if #Weapon.shelltypes ~= 0 then
+    					UiPush()
+    						UiTranslate(-115,0)
+    						if #Weapon.shelltypes > 1 then
+    							UiPush()
+    								local cycleAmmoText = "["..string.upper(TABSControls.vehicles.cycle_ammo).."]"
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiTranslate(1,-1)
+    									UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
+    									UiText(cycleAmmoText)
+    								UiPop()
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiTranslate(-1,1)
+    									UiCustomColor("dark_gray")
+    									UiText(cycleAmmoText)
+    								UiPop()
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiText(cycleAmmoText)
+    								UiPop()
+    							UiPop()
+    						end
+
+    						for i = 1, #Weapon.shelltypes do
+    							UiPush()
+
+    								local index = shellOrder[i]
+    								-- local index = i
+    								local uihandler = Weapon.shelluihandler[index]
+
+    								local r = 60
+    								local ta = 2*math.pi*(index-Weapon.curShell)/(#Weapon.shelltypes)
+
+    								if ta-uihandler.rot > math.pi then
+    									uihandler.rot = uihandler.rot + 2*math.pi
+    								elseif ta-uihandler.rot < -math.pi then
+    									uihandler.rot = uihandler.rot - 2*math.pi
+    								end
+
+    								uihandler.rot = uihandler.rot - math.abs(.1*(ta-uihandler.rot))
+
+    								UiTranslate(-r*math.cos(uihandler.rot),r*math.sin(uihandler.rot))
+
+    								local selected = false
+    								local ts = 1
+    								if index == Weapon.curShell then ts = 1.5 selected = true end
+    								uihandler.scale = uihandler.scale + .1*(ts-uihandler.scale)
+    								UiScale(uihandler.scale)
+
+    								local ppt = 0
+    								if selected then ppt = 1 end
+    								uihandler.popup = uihandler.popup + .1*(ppt-uihandler.popup)
+
+    								if uihandler.popup > 0.01 then
+    									UiPush()
+    										UiAlign("top right")
+
+    										UiTranslate(-30,-30)
+    										UiWindow(200,60,true)
+
+    										UiTranslate(400-200*uihandler.popup,0)
+
+    										-- Shell info popup
+    										UiPush()
+    											UiPush()
+    												UiCustomColorLerp("dark_gray","white",uihandler.popup)
+    												UiRect(200,15)
+    												UiTranslate(0,15)
+    												UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    												UiRect(200,15)
+    											UiPop()
+
+    											UiTranslate(-2,-2)
+    											UiPush()
+    												UiAlign("top left")
+    												UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf",16)
+    												UiTranslate(-196,1)
+
+    												UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    												if shellInfo.beltname ~= nil then
+    													UiText(shellInfo.beltname)
+    												else
+    													UiText(shellInfo.name[selected_shell])
+    												end
+    												UiTranslate(0,15)
+    												UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+    												UiText(string.upper(getShellType(Weapon:getCurShell().type, Weapon:getCurShell(), true)))
+    											UiPop()
+    											UiPush()
+    												UiAlign("top right")
+    												UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf",16)
+
+    												UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    												UiText(round(shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]*math.max(Weapon.barrel.hp^.5,.4), 1).."m/s")
+    												UiTranslate(0,15)
+    												UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+    												UiText(shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell].."mm RHA")
+    											UiPop()
+    										UiPop()
+
+    										-- Reserve ammo
+    										UiPush()
+    											UiTranslate(-3,33)
+    											UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+
+    											if Weapon.shelltypes[index].magsize == 1 then
+
+    												for i = 1, Weapon.shelltypes[index].reserveammo do
+    													UiRect(4,10)
+    													UiTranslate(-8,0)
+    												end
+
+    											else
+
+    												for i = 1, Weapon.shelltypes[index].reserveammo/Weapon.shelltypes[index].magsize do
+    													UiRect(10,10)
+    													UiTranslate(-15,0)
+    												end
+
+    											end
+    										UiPop()
+
+    										-- Loaded ammo
+    										UiPush()
+    											UiTranslate(-3,47)
+
+    											local outOfAmmo = Weapon.shelltypes[index].reserveammo and Weapon.shelltypes[index].ammo==0
+    											local reloadFraction = Weapon.reloadtimer/Weapon.reloadtime
+    											if Weapon.reloadtime==0 then reloadFraction = 0 end
+
+    											if reloadFraction > 0 or outOfAmmo then
+    												UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    											else
+    												UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
+    											end
+
+    											-- Ammo reload UI animation
+    											if Weapon.shelltypes[index].magsize == 1 then
+    												if outOfAmmo then
+    													UiRect(4,10)
+    												else
+    													UiPush()
+    														UiRect(4,10)
+    														UiWindow(4,10,true,true)
+    														if Weapon.reloadtimer ~= 0 then
+    															UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+    															UiTranslate(4,10*reloadFraction)
+    															UiRect(4,10)
+    														end
+    													UiPop()
+    												end
+    											else
+    												UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf",20)
+    												UiTranslate(0,-5)
+    												if outOfAmmo then
+    													UiText("0")
+    												else
+    													UiPush()
+    														if reloadFraction > 0 or outOfAmmo then
+    															UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+    															UiAlign("top right")
+    															UiText(Weapon.shelltypes[index].ammo)
+
+    															UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    															UiWindow(50,20*reloadFraction,true,true)
+    															UiTranslate(50,0)
+    															UiText(Weapon.shelltypes[index].ammo)
+    														else
+    															UiAlign("top right")
+    															UiText(Weapon.shelltypes[index].ammo)
+    														end
+    													UiPop()
+    												end
+    											end
+    										UiPop()
+    									UiPop()
+    								end
+
+    								-- Shell Icon
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiTranslate(1,-1)
+    									if selected then
+    										UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
+    									else
+    										UiCustomColor("orange")
+    									end
+    									UiRect(60,60)
+    								UiPop()
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiTranslate(-1,1)
+    									UiCustomColor("dark_gray")
+    									UiRect(60,60)
+    								UiPop()
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiCustomColor("dark_gray_highlight")
+    									UiRect(60,60)
+
+    									if uihandler.popup > 0.01 then
+    										UiAlign("top left")
+    										UiTranslate(-30,-30)
+    										local reloadFraction = Weapon.reloadtimer/Weapon.reloadtime
+    										if Weapon.reloadtime==0 then reloadFraction = 0 end
+    										UiWindow(60*(1-reloadFraction),60,true)
+
+    										UiCustomColor("white",uihandler.popup^2)
+    										UiRect(60,60)
+
+    										-- Instead of UiDrawHighlightedText
+    										UiTranslate(47,-3)
+    										UiCustomColor("orange_highlight")
+    										UiText(index)
+    										UiTranslate(-1,1)
+    										UiCustomColor("dark_gray")
+    										UiText(index)
+    									end
+    								UiPop()
+    								UiPush()
+    									if not selected then UiCustomColor("white_highlight",.5) end
+    									local shellInfo = Weapon.shelltypes[index]
+    									if shellInfo.belttype ~= nil then
+    										local beltShells = #shellInfo.ammo_types
+    										if beltShells > 48 then beltShells = 48 end
+    										local layerShells = beltShells
+    										local iconHeight = 60
+    										local iconWidth = 20
+    										local offsetHeight = 60
+    										local offsetWidth = 60
+
+    										if beltShells > 3 and beltShells <= 7 then
+    											iconWidth = 60/beltShells
+    											iconHeight = iconWidth*3
+    											offsetWidth = offsetWidth/(60/iconWidth)
+    											offsetHeight = (60-iconHeight)/2
+    											UiTranslate(0, offsetHeight)
+    										elseif beltShells > 7 and beltShells <= 12 then
+    											iconHeight = 30
+    											iconWidth = iconHeight/3
+    											layerShells = math.ceil(beltShells/2)
+    											offsetWidth = offsetWidth/math.ceil(beltShells/2)
+    											offsetHeight = 30
+    										elseif beltShells > 12 and beltShells <= 21 then
+    											iconHeight = 20
+    											iconWidth = iconHeight/3
+    											layerShells = math.ceil(beltShells/3)
+    											offsetWidth = offsetWidth/math.ceil(beltShells/3)
+    											offsetHeight = 20
+    										elseif beltShells > 21 then
+    											iconHeight = 15
+    											iconWidth = 5
+    											layerShells = math.ceil(layerShells/4)
+    											offsetWidth = offsetWidth/math.ceil(beltShells/4)
+    											offsetHeight = 15
+    										else
+    											offsetWidth = offsetWidth/beltShells
+    										end
+
+    										local offsetTick = 1
+
+    										UiTranslate(-30, -30)
+    										UiAlign("top left")
+    										local iconHeightAdjusted = 0
+    										for i = 1, beltShells do
+    											local noband = false
+    											if shellInfo.ammo_types[i] == "apfsds" or shellInfo.ammo_types[i] == "rocket" or shellInfo.ammo_types[i] == "atgm" or shellInfo.ammo_types[i] == "t-atgm" or shellInfo.ammo_types[i] == "napalm" then noband = true end
+    											UiResetColor()
+    											if not selected then UiColorFilter(1 ,1 ,1 , .5) end
+    											--DebugPrint("Drawn Shell No." ..i)
+    											if i > 1 then
+    												UiTranslate(offsetWidth, 0)
+    											end
+    											if beltShells > 7 and i-(layerShells*iconHeightAdjusted) > layerShells then 
+    												UiTranslate(-offsetWidth*(layerShells), offsetHeight)
+    												iconHeightAdjusted = iconHeightAdjusted + 1
+    											elseif beltShells > 4 and beltShells <=7 then
+    												if i == 1 then UiTranslate(0, -offsetHeight*0.5) end
+    												if offsetTick == 1 then
+    													UiTranslate(0, offsetHeight)
+    													offsetTick = 2
+    												elseif offsetTick == 2 then
+    													UiTranslate(0, -offsetHeight)
+    													offsetTick = 1
+    												end
+    											end
+    											UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/"..shellInfo.ammo_types[i]..".png", iconWidth, iconHeight)
+    											if shellInfo.type[i] == "bullet" then
+    												if shellInfo.incendiary[i] then
+    													UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/bullet_incendiary.png", iconWidth, iconHeight) 
+    												end
+    												if shellInfo.momentum[i] > 10 then	
+    													UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/bullet_ap.png", iconWidth, iconHeight)
+    												end
+    												if shellInfo.tracer[i] then
+
+    													UiColor(shellInfo.tracercolorr[i], shellInfo.tracercolorg[i], shellInfo.tracercolorb[i])
+
+    													UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/bullet_tracer.png", iconWidth, iconHeight)
+    													UiColor(1, 1, 1)
+    												end
+    											else
+    												if shellInfo.incendiary[i] and not noband then
+    													UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/incendiary.png", iconWidth, iconHeight) 
+    												end
+    												if shellInfo.tracer[i] and not noband then
+
+    													UiColor(shellInfo.tracercolorr[i], shellInfo.tracercolorg[i], shellInfo.tracercolorb[i])
+
+    													UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/belt-icons/tracer.png", iconWidth, iconHeight)
+    													UiColor(1, 1, 1)
+    												end
+    											end
+    										end
+    									else
+    										local shellID = getShellType(Weapon.shelltypes[index].type, Weapon.shelltypes[index])
+    										UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/icon/shell-icons/"..shellID..".png",60,60)
+    									end
+    								UiPop()
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiTranslate(20,-18)
+    									UiText(index)
+    								UiPop()
+
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiCustomColor("white_highlight",.7)
+    									UiTranslate(20,-18)
+    									UiText(index)
+    								UiPop()
+
+    							UiPop()
+    						end
+    					UiPop()
+    				end
+
+    			UiPop()
+
+    			UiPush()
+
+    				-------------------------------------
+    				-- Weapon Selection Wheel (hold R) --
+    				-------------------------------------
+
+    				if InputDown(TABSControls.vehicles.cycle_weapon) and weaponCycleHoldTimer >= WEAPON_CYCLE_HOLD_TIME then
+    					UiPush()
+    						UiMakeInteractive()
+
+    						weaponLocs = {}
+    						for i = 1, #vInfo.parts.weapons do
+    							local wInfo = vInfo.parts.weapons[i]
+
+    							local lpos = VecCopy(wInfo.locations.emitter.pos)
+    							local bpos = TransformToLocalPoint(wInfo:getTransform(),GetShapeCenter(wInfo.breech.brshape))
+
+    							-- lpos[3]=bpos[3]
+
+    							table.insert(weaponLocs,{wInfo=wInfo,pos=TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(wInfo.body),lpos),index=i})
+    							-- DebugCross(TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(wInfo.body),lpos))
+    						end
+    						local totalWeapons = #vInfo.parts.weapons
+
+    						availableIndices = {}
+    						for i = 1, #weaponLocs do availableIndices[i] = i end
+    						orderdWeaponList = {}
+
+    						for i = 1, #availableIndices do
+    							minIndex = 1000
+    							minDist = 100000
+    							local dx,dy = math.sin((i-1)*math.pi*1.7/totalWeapons)*400, math.cos((i-1)*math.pi*1.7/totalWeapons)*250 -- location where weapon button could be displayed
+    							for j = 1, #weaponLocs do
+    								local lx,ly = UiWorldToPixel(weaponLocs[j].pos) -- location of weapon
+    								local dist = ((lx-dx)^2+(ly-dy)^2)^.5
+    								if dist < minDist then
+    									minDist = dist
+    									minIndex = j
+    								end
+    							end
+    							if weaponLocs[minIndex]~=nil then
+    								table.remove(availableIndices,minIndex)
+    								table.insert(orderdWeaponList,i,weaponLocs[minIndex])
+    								table.remove(weaponLocs,minIndex)
+    							end
+    						end
+
+    						for i = 1, #orderdWeaponList do
+    							local weaponLoc = orderdWeaponList[i]
+    							local lx,ly = UiWorldToPixel(weaponLoc.pos) -- location of weapon
+
+    							local dx,dy = math.sin((i-1)*math.pi*1.7/totalWeapons)*400, math.cos((i-1)*math.pi*1.7/totalWeapons)*250 -- location where weapon button is displayed
+    							UiPush()
+    								UiLine(lx,ly,UiCenter()+dx,UiMiddle()+dy,1)
+
+    								UiTranslate(lx,ly)
+    								UiPush()
+    									UiAlign("center middle")
+    									UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-shadow-50.png",120,120,6,6)
+    								UiPop()
+    							UiPop()
+    							UiPush()
+    								UiTranslate(UiCenter()+dx,UiMiddle()+dy)
+    								UiTranslate(-100,-15)
+    								if UiCustomTextButton(200, 30, weaponLoc.wInfo.name) then
+    									vInfo.controls.curWeapon = weaponLoc.index
+    									weaponUIPopupTimer = 4
+    								end
+    							UiPop()
+    						end
+
+    					UiPop()
+    				end
+
+    			UiPop()
+
+    			end
+
+    		end
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+
+    --------------------
+    -- Misc and debug --
+    --------------------
+
+    ArtilleryDraw(dt)
+
+    DroneDraw()
+
+    AC130Draw()
+    TABS_TAK_DRAW(dt)
+
+    DebugTable()
+
+    if SlowmoDebugLines  then
+    	if InputDown(SlomoRewindButton) then
+    		ShowTimeFading = 5
+    	end
+    end
+    if ShowTimeFading ~= 0 then
+    	ShowTimeFading = ShowTimeFading - dt
+    	UiPush()
+    	local a = 1
+    	if ShowTimeFading<2 then a = ShowTimeFading/2 end
+    	UiColor(1,1,1,a)
+    	UiTranslate(100,200)
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Bold.ttf", 40)
+
+    	UiText(Round(SlowMoFrameTime,0.01))
+    	UiPop()
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: options.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
+#version 2
 function ControlsKeyButton(category, control, key)
 	UiPush()
 		UiAlign("top left")
@@ -798,11 +71,10 @@
 			UiPop()
 		UiPop()
 
-
 		if selected then
 			for i = 1, #allKeys do
 				if InputPressed(allKeys[i]) then
-					SetString(controlPath..category.."."..control, allKeys[i])
+					SetString(controlPath..category.."."..control, allKeys[i], true)
 					curControl = ""
 					curCategory = ""
 					PlaySound(SOUNDS.UI_Select)
@@ -822,10 +94,11 @@
 function ResetControls()
 	for k, category in pairs(defaultControls) do
 		for control, key in pairs(category) do
-			SetString(controlPath..k.."."..control, key)
+			SetString(controlPath..k.."."..control, key, true)
 		end
 	end
 end
+
 function ResetSliders()
 	local options = ListKeys("savegame.mod.options")
 	for i = 1, #options do
@@ -842,7 +115,7 @@
 		local enabled = GetBool(path)
 
 		enabled = UiCustomWeaponButton(enabled, w, h, ALL_WEAPONS[ID].name, ALL_WEAPONS[ID].desc, Image, SOUNDS.UI_Select)
-		SetBool(path, enabled)
+		SetBool(path, enabled, true)
 
 	UiPop()
 end
@@ -856,7 +129,7 @@
 		local imgpath = "MOD/TABS/icon/weapon-icons/"..ID..".png"
 
 		enabled = UiCustomWeaponButton(enabled, w, h, ALL_TOOLS[ID].name, ALL_TOOLS[ID].desc, SOUNDS.UI_Select)
-		SetBool(path, enabled)
+		SetBool(path, enabled, true)
 
 	UiPop()
 end
@@ -872,9 +145,9 @@
 		curVal = UiCustomSlider(curVal,size,min,max,step,text)
 
 		if HasKey(path..option) then
-			SetFloat(path..option,curVal)
+			SetFloat(path..option,curVal, true)
 		else
-			SetFloat(path..option,default)
+			SetFloat(path..option,default, true)
 		end
 	UiPop()
 end
@@ -894,7 +167,714 @@
 
 		value = UiTickBox(value, 30, text)
 
-		SetBool(path..option,value)
+		SetBool(path..option,value, true)
 
 	UiPop()
-end+end

+function server.init()
+    ALL_WEAPONS={
+    	-- American
+    	["m1bazooka"]={
+    		name="M1 Bazooka",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["m4a1"]={
+    		name="M4A1",
+    		desc="Based on the AR-15 platform, the M4A1 is an American select-fire assault rifle. The weapon has been used by the US Army since 1994.",
+    	},
+    	["m249"]={
+    		name="M249",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},		
+    	["m240"]={
+    		name="M240",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},			
+    	["m16"]={
+    		name="M16A2",
+    		desc="Based on the AR-15 platform, the M16 is an American select-fire assault rifle. The weapon was adopted by the US Army in 1963, now mostly replaced by the M4.",
+    	},
+    	["m1garand"]={
+    		name="M1-Garand",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},		
+    	["m14"]={
+    		name="M14",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["m870"]={
+    		name="M870",
+    		desc="A versatile pump-action shotgun that has been adapted for hunting, sport, military and law enforcement use around the world.",
+    	},
+    	["auto5"]={
+    		name="auto5",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["m1873"]={
+    		name="Model 1873",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["pb"]={
+    		name="Parker Bros. SxS",
+    		desc="Parker Brothers is a well reputable company that formed in 1867, they were successful designing and manufacturing break-open rifles until they became defunct in 1942. This model in particular was designed in the 1920s, 10 gauge, it's hammerless and features an automatic ejector.",
+    	},
+    	["m72"]={
+    		name="M72A7 LAW",
+    		desc="The M72A7 Light Anti-tank Weapon is a single-use handheld anti-tank rocket launcher which uses a HEAT warhead to defeat lightly armored vehicles.",
+    	},
+    	--[[["fgm-148"]={
+    		name="FGM-148 Javelin",
+    		desc=">:3",
+    	},]]
+    	["m700"]={
+    		name="M700",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["m82a3"]={
+    		name="M82A3",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	--[[["vector"]={
+    		name="Vector",
+    		desc="[PLACEHOLDER]",
+    	},]]
+    	["scar-l"]={
+    		name="SCAR-L MK16",
+    		desc="Manufactured by Belgian company FN, the SCAR-L is a select-fire assault rifle that has seen some use with military forces.",
+    	},
+    	["scar-h"]={
+    		name="SCAR-H MK17",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["msbsgrot"]={
+    		name="MSBS Grot",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["iwitavor"]={
+    		name="IWI Tavor X95",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["m1911"]={
+    		name="M1911",
+    		desc="Manufactured by American company Colt, chambered in .45 acp. This widely known handgun was mostly used by US armed forces since 1911, before it was replaced by the M9 Beretta in 1985. Now it is very popular amongst civilian shooters.",
+    	},
+    	["m9a1"]={
+    		name="M9A1",
+    		desc="Manufactured by Italian company Beretta, this popular semi automatic pistol has seen military use all around the world and is still in use today.",
+    	},
+    	["deagle"]={
+    		name="Desert Eagle XIX",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["lebelm93"]={
+    		name="Lebel Mle 1886 M93",
+    		desc="No description yet.",

+    		desc="No description yet.",

+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    		image="panzerfaust30",

+    		name="Panzerfaust 60",

+    		name="Panzerbuchse 39",
+    		desc="[PLACEHOLDER]",
+    	},]]
+    	["g36"]={
+    		name="G36",
+    		desc="The G36 has been the main service rifle of Germany since 1997. This assault rifle uses the 5.56x45mm cartridge, but takes proprietary HK magazines. However, a special magazine wel can be fitted to adapt the weapon for use with STANAG.",
+    	},
+    	["g3"]={
+    		name="G3",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["mp5"]={
+    		name="MP5",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["aug-a2"]={
+    		name="AUG A2",
+    		desc="Manufactured by Austrian company Steyr Arms. The AUG is a select-fire bullpup rifle, used widely by many militaries and police forces.",
+    	},
+    	["hk416"]={
+    		name="hk416",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["g17"]={
+    		name="G17",
+    		desc="Manufactured by Austrian company Glock, this ubiquitous semi-automatic pistol has seen use by military, law enforcement and civilian shooters around the world.",
+    	},
+    	["mp-40"]={
+    		name="MP-40",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
```
