```diff
+    	--[[["lee-enfield"]={
+    		name="Lee-Enfield",
+    		desc="[PLACEHOLDER]",
+    	},]]
+    	-- Swedish
+    	["ak-5c"]={
+    		name="AK-5C",
+    		desc="The AK-5C is a modern service rifle for the Swedish army, adopted in 1986. It uses 5.56x45mm and is compatible with STANAG magazines.",
+    	},
+    	-- Russian
+    	["makarov"]={
+    		name="Makarov",
+    		desc="An iconic service pistol of the Soviet Union, the Makarov is a small-profile semi-automatic pistol that uses the 9x18 Makarov cartridge.",
+    	},
+    	["aps"]={
+    		name="APS",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["svd"]={
+    		name="SVD Dragunov",
+    		desc="SVD",
+    	},
+    	["svu"]={
+    		name="SVU Dragunov",
+    		desc="SVU",
+    	},
+    	["vz61"]={
+    		name="VZ.61 Skorpion",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["pp19bizon"]={
+    		name="PP-19 Bizon",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["pp91kedr"]={
+    		name="PP-91 Kedr",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["pp19-01vityaz"]={
+    		name="PP-19-01 Vityaz",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["akm"]={
+    		name="AKM",
+    		desc="This rifle is one of the first mass-produced assault rifles, and has been widely used in armed conflict around the world since the 1950s. The rifle is a successor to the AK-47, with a cheaper stamped receiver, but is still chambered in 7.62x39.",
+    	},
+    	["ak-74"]={
+    		name="AK-74",
+    		desc="A successor to the AKM, the AK-74 is a select-fire assault rifle chambered in 5.45x39. This rifle replaced the AKM for the Russian Army in 1974 and has been in service ever since.",
+    	},
+    	["ak-12"]={
+    		name="AK-12",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},			
+    	["aks-74u"]={
+    		name="AKS-74U",
+    		desc="Being a shortened version of the AKS-74, the AKS-74U is a select-fire assault rifle chambered in 5.45x39. This rifle was mainly intended for special forces, airborne infantry, helicopter and armored vehicle crews and is loosely in service to this day.",
+    	},
+    	["pkm"]={
+    		name="PKM",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["sks"]={
+    		name="SKS",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["ppsh41"]={
+    		name="PPSH-41",
+    		desc="The PPSH-41 is a select-fire open bolt submachine gun chambered in 7.62x25 Tokerev, the PPSH-41 has seen extensive combat since its introduction in 1941. It was dropped by the USSR in 1950, but still shows up in combat today.",
+    	},
+    	["rpg7"]={
+    		name="RPG-7",
+    		desc="The RPG-7 is an incredibly popular man-portable anti-tank weapon system from Russia that has seen many upgrades and much use since its introduction in 1961.",
+    	},
+    	["rpg26"]={
+    		name="RPG-26",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},		
+    	["rshg-2"]={
+    		name="RShG-2",
+    		desc="No description yet",
+    	},
+    	["rgm40"]={
+    		name="RGM-40",
+    		desc="The RGM-40 is a standalone version of the underbarrel GP-30. It is a 40mm muzzle loaded grenade launcher designed pimarily for police use.",
+    	},
+    	["saiga-12"]={
+    		name="Saiga-12",
+    		desc="The Saiga 12 is a Russian semi-automatic shotgun based on the AK platform. Chambered in 12 gauge, this weapon is used in various tactical and law enforcement roles, known for its reliability and compatibility with AK-style attachments.",
+    	},
+    	["ks-23"]={
+    		name="KS-23",
+    		desc="Originally developed for prison riot control, the KS-23 is a Russian pump-action shotgun chambered in 23mm. With its large-bore size, it has been adapted for military and police use, particularly in situations where high stopping power is needed.",
+    	},
+    	["as-val"]={
+    		name="AS VAL",
+    		desc="An integrally suppressed special assault rifle used by russian special forces. The Val uses the subsonic 9x39 caliber to achieve excellent sound suppression at the cost of engagement range.",
+    	},
+    	["oc14-groza"]={
+    		name="OC-14 Groza",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["sr-3"]={
+    		name="SR-3M",
+    		desc="A derrivative of the AS Val special assault rifle which aims to fill a PDW role. The SR-3M has a detachable suppressor which allows it to have a shorter profile when unsuppressed.",
+    	},
+    	["sv98"]={
+    		name="SV-98",
+    		desc="A precision bolt-action sniper rifle chambered in 7.62x54R. It was adopted by the FSB and other Russian counter-terrorism agencies in 2003.",
+    	},
+    	["dvl10"]={
+    		name="DVL-10",
+    		desc="A long range light weight precision bolt-action sniper rifle chambered in 7.62x51.",
+    	},
+    	["mosin"]={
+    		name="Mosin-Nagant",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["nagant"]={
+    		name="Nagant M1895",
+    		desc="No description yet.",
+    	},
+    	["ptrs-41"]={
+    		name="PTRS-41",
+    		desc="Designed during World War II, the PTRS-41 is a Soviet anti-tank rifle chambered in 14.5mm. Although heavy, it proved effective against early armored vehicles and remains notable for its powerful rounds and rugged design.",
+    	},
+    }
+    local modKeys = ListKeys('mods.available')
+    GunMods = {}
+    for i=1,#modKeys do
+    	if HasFile('RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Guns_Custom.lua') then
+    		table.insert(GunMods, {
+    			ScriptPath = ''..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path")..'/TABS_Guns_Custom.lua',
+    			Key = modKeys[i],
+    			Path =  'RAW:'..GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".path"),
+    			Name = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".name"),
+    			Description = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".description"),
+    			Author = GetString("mods.available."..modKeys[i]..".author"),
+    		})
+    		end
+
+    end
+    for i=1,#GunMods do
+    	CustomSightScript, Error = loadfile(GunMods[i].ScriptPath)
+    	if not Error then
+    		CustomSightScript()	
+    	end
+    	for k, v in pairs(Guns) do
+    		local newimage = ''
+    		if string.sub(v.img,1,3) == 'MOD' then
+    			v.img = string.sub(v.img,4)
+    			newfile = ''..GunMods[i].Path..''..v.img..''
+    		elseif string.sub(v.img,1,4) == 'TABS' then
+    			v.img = string.sub(v.img,5)
+    			newfile = 'MOD/'..v.img..''
+    		end
+    		local newscript = ''
+    		if string.sub(v.script,1,3) == 'MOD' then
+    			v.script = string.sub(v.script,4)
+    			newscript = ''..GunMods[i].Path..''..v.script..''
+    		elseif string.sub(v.script,1,4) == 'TABS' then
+    			v.script = string.sub(v.script,5)
+    			newscript = 'MOD/'..v.script..''
+    		end
+    		ALL_WEAPONS[k] = {
+    			name = v.name,
+    			desc = v.desc,
+    			img = newfile,
+    			script = newscript,
+    			nogunfunctions = v.nogunfunctions or false,
+    			prefix = GunMods[i].Key
+    		}
+
+    	end
+
+    end
+    for ID, wInfo in pairs(ALL_WEAPONS) do
+    	wInfo.Enabled = GetBool("savegame.mod.weapons."..ID..".enabled") or false
+    end
+    ClearKey('savegame.mod.weapons')
+    for ID, wInfo in pairs(ALL_WEAPONS) do
+    	local path = "savegame.mod.weapons."..ID
+    	SetBool(path..".enabled", wInfo.Enabled, true)
+    	if wInfo.img then
+    		SetString(path..".image", wInfo.img, true)
+    	end
+    	if wInfo.script then
+    		SetString(path..".script", wInfo.script, true)
+    	end
+    	if wInfo.prefix then
+    		SetString(path..".prefix", wInfo.prefix, true)
+    	end
+    	if wInfo.nogunfunctions then
+    		SetString(path..".nogunfunctions", wInfo.nogunfunctions, true)
+    	end
+    end
+    ALL_TOOLS = {
+    	["drone"]={
+    		name="Drone",
+    		desc="A drone tool used to designate targets and drop small munitions.",
+    	},
+    	["artillery"]={
+    		name="Laser Designator",
+    		desc="A tool that lets you call artillery strikes with different munitions.",
+    	},
+    	--[[["ac130"]={
+    		name="AC130",
+    		desc="[PLACEHOLDER]",
+    	},]]
+    }
+    for ID, wInfo in pairs(ALL_TOOLS) do
+    	local path = "savegame.mod.tools."..ID
+    	if not HasKey(path) then
+    		SetBool(path, false, true)
+    	end
+    end
+    allMenus = {"Vehicles","Weapons","Settings","Extra Tools"}
+    curMenu = "Vehicles"
+    UIOffset = 2
+    ScrollPos_Weapons = { value = 0, last = 0 }
+    vs = { header = 0.1, items = 0.8, slider = 0.1 }
+    defaultControls={
+    	["vehicles"]={
+    		["shoot"]="lmb",
+    		["commander_view"]="rmb",
+    		["aim"]="shift",
+    		["cycle_weapon"]="r",
+    		["cycle_ammo"]="b",
+    		["toggle_debug"]="q",
+    		["rewind_debug"]="p",
+    		["fastforward_debug"]="v",
+    		["parts_overlay"]="o",
+    		["smoke_grenades"]="g",
+    		["smine_launchers"]="v",
+    		["toggle_ess"]="h",
+    		["toggle_ir"]="n",
+    		["rangefind"]="t",
+    		["radar_lock"]="alt",
+    		-- ["tooltip"]="h",
+    		["headlights"]="m",
+    		["irlights"]="k",
+    	},
+    	["weapons"]={
+    		["shoot"]="lmb",
+    		["aim"]="rmb",
+    		["sprint"]="shift",
+    		["reload"]="r",
+    		["select_attachments"]="t",
+    		["select_fire"]="v",
+    	},
+    }
+    curControl = ""
+    curCategory = ""
+    controlPath = "savegame.mod.controls."
+    for k, category in pairs(defaultControls) do
+    	for control, key in pairs(category) do
+    		if not HasKey(controlPath..k.."."..control) then
+    			SetString(controlPath..k.."."..control, key, true)
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+    allKeys = {"q","w","e","r","t","y","u","i","o","p","a","s","d","f","g","h","j","k","l","z","x","c","v","b","n","m","shift","alt","control","lmb","rmb","mmb",",",".","/",";","'","[","]"}
+    SOUNDS = LoadTABSSounds()
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    PlayLoop(SOUNDS.UI_Amb)
+
+    UiAlign("top left")
+    UiPush()
+    	UiColor(1,1,1)
+    	UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/ui-background.png",UiWidth(),UiHeight())
+    	UiColor(0,0,0)
+    	UiImageBox("ui/common/hgradient-left-64.png",UiWidth(),UiHeight())
+    UiPop()
+    local contentHeightRemain = UiHeight() - UiBackground(UiWidth(),UiHeight(),"[TABS] Options",.3)
+
+    UiPush()
+    	local w,h = 250, 50
+    	UiTranslate(w*(#allMenus-1))
+    	for i = #allMenus, 1, -1 do
+    		if UiCustomTabButton(w, h, allMenus[i], curMenu==allMenus[i], SOUNDS.UI_Select) then
+    			curMenu = allMenus[i]
+    		end
+    		UiTranslate(-w,0)
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(0, 50)
+    	UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
+    	UiImageBox("ui/common/hgradient-left-64.png",UiWidth(),5)
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(10,contentHeightRemain-40)
+    	UiAlign("top left")
+    	UiFont("regular.ttf", 20)
+    	local w,h=124,30
+
+    	if UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) and InputReleased("lmb") then
+    		UiColor(.2,.2,.2,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    		ResetControls()
+    	elseif UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) and not InputDown("lmb") then
+    		UiColor(.5,.5,.5,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	elseif UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) then
+    		UiColor(.3,.3,.3,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	else
+    		UiColor(.2,.2,.2,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	end
+    	UiTranslate(4,4)
+    	UiColor(1,1,1)
+    	UiText("Reset Controls")
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(150,contentHeightRemain-40)
+    	UiAlign("top left")
+    	UiFont("regular.ttf", 20)
+    	local w,h=108,30
+
+    	if UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) and InputReleased("lmb") then
+    		UiColor(.2,.2,.2,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    		ResetSliders()
+    	elseif UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) and not InputDown("lmb") then
+    		UiColor(.5,.5,.5,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	elseif UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) then
+    		UiColor(.3,.3,.3,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	else
+    		UiColor(.2,.2,.2,.5)
+    		UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w, h, 6, 6)
+    	end
+    	UiTranslate(4,4)
+    	UiColor(1,1,1)
+    	UiText("Reset Sliders")
+    UiPop()
+    contentHeightRemain = contentHeightRemain-50
+
+    UiTranslate(UIOffset*UiWidth(),60)
+    contentHeightRemain = contentHeightRemain-60
+    if curMenu == "Vehicles" then
+    	UIOffset = UIOffset - 6*dt*(UIOffset)
+    elseif curMenu == "Weapons" then
+    	UIOffset = UIOffset - 6*dt*(UIOffset+1)
+    elseif curMenu == "Settings" then
+    	UIOffset = UIOffset - 6*dt*(UIOffset+2)
+    elseif curMenu == "Extra Tools" then
+    	UIOffset = UIOffset - 6*dt*(UIOffset+3)
+    end
+
+    -- Vehicles menu
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(10,0)
+
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Controls")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+
+    	local maxperline = 6
+    	local count = 0
+    	for control, key in pairs(defaultControls["vehicles"]) do
+    		count = count + 1
+    		local key = GetString(controlPath.."vehicles."..control)
+    		local w,h = ControlsKeyButton("vehicles", control, key)
+    		if count%maxperline == 0 then
+    			UiTranslate(-(maxperline-1)*w, h)
+    		else
+    			UiTranslate(w,0)
+    		end
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiTranslate(UiWidth(),0)
+
+    -- Weapons menu
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(10,0)
+
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Controls")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+    	local heightRemain = contentHeightRemain-50
+
+    	UiPush()
+    		local maxperline = 6
+    		local count = 0
+    		local avgw, avgh = 0, 0
+    		for control, key in pairs(defaultControls["weapons"]) do
+    			count = count + 1
+    			local key = GetString(controlPath.."weapons."..control)
+    			local w,h = ControlsKeyButton("weapons", control, key)
+    			avgw, avgh = w, h
+    			if count%maxperline == 0 then
+    				UiTranslate(-(maxperline-1)*w, h)
+    			else
+    				UiTranslate(w,0)
+    			end
+    		end
+    	UiPop()
+
+    	local controlsContentHeight = math.ceil(count/maxperline) * avgh
+    	UiTranslate(0, controlsContentHeight)
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Tool Selection")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+    	heightRemain = heightRemain-50-controlsContentHeight
+
+    	UiPush()
+    		local maxperline = 5
+    		local wbw, wbh = 360, 100
+    		local wbs = 10
+    		local totalKeyedWeapons = 0
+
+    		UiWindow((wbw+wbs)*maxperline, heightRemain, true)
+    		UiTranslate(0, -ScrollPos_Weapons.value)
+
+    		for ID, wInfo in pairs(ALL_WEAPONS) do
+    			if HasKey("savegame.mod.weapons."..ID..".enabled") then
+    				totalKeyedWeapons = totalKeyedWeapons+1
+    				WeaponButton(wbw, wbh, ID, "Test", wInfo.img)
+    				if totalKeyedWeapons%maxperline == 0 then
+    					UiTranslate(-(maxperline-1)*(wbw+wbs), wbh+wbs)
+    				else
+    					UiTranslate(wbw+wbs,0)
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+    	UiPop()
+
+    	local totalWeaponButtonHeight = math.ceil(totalKeyedWeapons/maxperline)*(wbh+wbs)-wbs
+
+    	-- ITEMS UI SCROLLER
+    	if totalWeaponButtonHeight > heightRemain then
+    		local sliderHeight = totalWeaponButtonHeight - heightRemain
+    		UiPush()
+    			UiPush()
+    				UiTranslate(UiWidth()+30, -heightRemain/5) -- fix deranged alignment issue
+    				UiRotate(270)
+    				local sliderSize = {x = (heightRemain-20)/5, y = 100}
+    				ScrollPos_Weapons.value = UiCustomScroller(ScrollPos_Weapons.value, sliderSize, 0, sliderHeight, 1)
+    			UiPop()
+    			if UiIsMouseInRect(UiWidth()-10, heightRemain) then
+    				ScrollPos_Weapons.value = ScrollPos_Weapons.value - InputValue("mousewheel")*20
+    			end
+    			ScrollPos_Weapons.value = math.clamp(ScrollPos_Weapons.value, 0, sliderHeight)
+    		UiPop()
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiTranslate(UiWidth(),0)
+
+    -- Settings menu
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(10,0)
+
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Performance")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+
+    	OptionsSlider("sliders.spallamountmult", "Spall and Shrapnel Amount Multiplier", .1, 2, 1)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsSlider("sliders.explosionparticlemult", "Explosion Particle Multiplier", .1, 2, 1)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsSlider("sliders.ammorackparticlemult", "Ammo Cookoff Particle Multiplier", .1, 2, 1)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.fastcalc", "Fast spall calculations", false)
+    	UiTranslate(0,40)
+
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Options")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.smoothcam", "Smooth Player Camera - Can be configured in-game using the F1 menu", false)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.trackparticle", "Track Particles", true)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.tracerfires", "Tracers Start Fires", true)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.tanksteer", "Experimental Tank Steering", false)
+
+    	UiTranslate(0,40)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.playercontroller", "Player Controller - Adds sprinting and goofy sliding", false)
+    	UiTranslate(0,32)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.playerleaning", "Q/E Leaning - Requires Player Controller", false)
+
+    	UiTranslate(0,40)
+    	OptionsButton("toggle.crewvoices", "Enable Crew Voices", true)
+
+    UiPop()
+
+    UiTranslate(UiWidth(),0)
+
+    -- Extra tools menu
+    UiPush()
+    	UiTranslate(10,0)
+
+    	UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Medium.ttf",48)
+    	UiText("Tool Selection")
+    	UiTranslate(0,50)
+
+    	UiPush()
+    		maxperline = 5
+    		wbw, wbh = 370, 100
+    		local wbs = 10
+    		local totalKeyedWeapons = 0
+    		for ID, wInfo in pairs(ALL_TOOLS) do
+    			if HasKey("savegame.mod.tools."..ID) then
+    				totalKeyedWeapons = totalKeyedWeapons+1
+    				ToolButton(wbw, wbh, ID, "Test")
+    				if totalKeyedWeapons%maxperline == 0 then
+    					UiTranslate(-(maxperline-1)*(wbw+wbs), wbh+wbs)
+    				else
+    					UiTranslate(wbw+wbs,0)
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+    	UiPop()
+    UiPop()
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: S-Bombs\Splosions.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
@@ -79,7 +65,7 @@

+		if GetPlayerInteractBody(playerId) == Splosive and InputPressed("interact") then IsArmed = true end
 	else
 		IsArmed = true
 	end
@@ -133,8 +119,7 @@

-

+	local iB = GetPlayerInteractBody(playerId)

 		table.insert(Splosives,iB)
 	end
@@ -163,7 +148,7 @@

-						local playerpos = GetPlayerCameraTransform().pos

@@ -306,7 +291,7 @@

-					if (hit or VecLength(VecSub(GetPlayerTransform().pos,sT.pos))<.2) and not HasTag(Splosive, "DetDelay") then

 end
```

```diff
----Checks if AI can be considered to be "alive" and updates variable accordingly 
----@param vInfo Vehicle info
-
 function check_ai_alive(vInfo) 
 	vInfo.ai.active = vInfo.ai.active and check_vehicle_functional(vInfo)
 	return vInfo.ai.active
 end
 
-
----Checks conditionals set for an autonomous tabs vehicle to be "usable" by AI and returns accordingly 
----@param vInfo Vehicle info
-
 function check_vehicle_usable(vInfo)
 	return GetVehicleHealth(vInfo.vehiclehandle)>=min_ai_health and check_vehicle_functional(vInfo)
 end
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\ammo.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
-	},
-	["shrapnel"] = {
-		eraresist = 0,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 0,
-		drag = 0.35,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-		
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(Shrapnel) SimulatePenetration Called")
-			end
-			SimulatePenetration(projectile, info)
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(Shrapnel) SimulateCanister Called")
-			end
-			SimulateCanister(projectile, info)
-			
-		end
-	},
-	["thermobaric"] = {
-		eraresist = 0,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 0,
-		drag = 0.45,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info) 
-			if info.mat.hitPosMat == "glass" and info.RHA < projectile.fuzesense and projectile.forcedetonate<2 then
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(projectile.caliber/1000,.5))
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(randomFloat(.9,1.3)*projectile.caliber/100,.5))
-				info.newpos = VecAdd(info.newpos,VecScale(dir,.1))
-				projectile.forcedetonate = projectile.forcedetonate+1
-			else
-				-- Explosion effects and shrapnel
-				RealisticExplosion(info.newpos, info.dir, projectile.explosivepayload*2, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.shrapnelamount, projectile.spallangle, projectile.momentum, .1, info.RHA, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration)
-				ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, info.newpos, VecScale(VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity),400*projectile.explosivepayload))
-				for i = 1, math.clamp(projectile.explosivepayload^2*50,50,300) do
-					local fpos = VecAdd(info.hitPos, RSV(2.5*projectile.explosivepayload^.5))
-					SpawnFire(fpos)
-				end
-				projectile.active = false
-			end
-		end
-	},
-	["smoke"] = {
-		eraresist = 1,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 0.8,
-		drag = 0.4,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-			if info.mat.hitPosMat == "glass" and info.RHA < projectile.fuzesense and projectile.forcedetonate<2 then
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(projectile.caliber/1000,.5))
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(randomFloat(.9,1.3)*projectile.caliber/100,.5))
-				info.newpos = VecAdd(info.newpos,VecScale(dir,.1))
-				projectile.forcedetonate = projectile.forcedetonate+1
-			else
-				-- Smoke
-				VisualizeSmoke(info.newpos, projectile.smokeradius, projectile.smokeradius*2, projectile.smoketime, info.normal)
-
-				projectile.active = false
-				VisualizeExplosion(info.newpos, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload*2, 1, true)
-				PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Small, info.newpos, projectile.smokeradius^.5*5,VecLength(VecSub(GetCameraTransform().pos,info.newpos)))
-			end
-		end
-	},
-	["smoke-wp"] = {
-		eraresist = 1,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 0.8,
-		drag = 0.4,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-			if info.mat.hitPosMat == "glass" and info.RHA < projectile.fuzesense and projectile.forcedetonate<2 then
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(projectile.caliber/1000,.5))
-				MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(randomFloat(.9,1.3)*projectile.caliber/300,.5))
-				info.newpos = VecAdd(info.newpos,VecScale(dir,.1))
-				projectile.forcedetonate = projectile.forcedetonate+1
-			else
-				-- White Phosphorous
-				local shellInfo = GetShellInfoFromRegistry("wp")
-				shellInfo.velocity[1] = projectile.smokeradius
-				shellInfo.timer[1] = projectile.smoketime
-				shellInfo.smoketime[1] = projectile.smoketime
-				shellInfo.fuzetype[1] = "instant"
-				shellInfo.smokeradius[1] = projectile.smokeradius
-				shellInfo.momentum[1] = 5
-				for i = 1,2*projectile.smokeradius do
-					local dir2 = VecNormalize(RSV(1))
-					dir2[2] = 5*math.abs(dir[2])
-					Shoot(VecAdd(Vec(0,.1,0),VecAdd(VecScale(dir,-0.1),VecAdd(info.newpos,RSV(.05)))), dir2, shellInfo, {}, false, 0)
-				end
-
-				projectile.active = false
-				VisualizeExplosion(info.newpos, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload*2, 1, true)
-				PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Smoke, projectile.pos, projectile.smokeradius^.5*5,VecLength(VecSub(GetCameraTransform().pos,info.newpos)))
-			end
-		end
-	},
-	["bullet"] = {
-		eraresist = 0.5,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 1,
-		drag = 0.8,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(Bullet) SimulatePenetration Called")
-			end
-			SimulatePenetration(projectile, info) 
-		end
-	},
-	["spall"] = {
-		eraresist = 0.5,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 2.5,
-		drag = 5,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(Spall) SimulatePenetration Called")
-			end
-			SimulatePenetration(projectile, info) 
-		end
-	},
-	-- Fluids
-	["napalm"] = {
-		eraresist = 0,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 10,
-		drag = 0.6,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			if projectile.stuck == nil or projectile.stuck == "" or projectile.stuck == false then
-				projectile.stuck = true
-				local _, nPos, _, nShape = QueryClosestPoint(info.hitPos, 0.1)
-				projectile.stuckTo = nShape
-				projectile.stuckPos = TransformToLocalPoint(GetShapeWorldTransform(nShape), info.hitPos)
-			end
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(Napalm) SpawnFire Called at position " ..VecStr(info.hitPos))
-			end
-			SpawnFire(info.hitPos)
-		end
-	},
-	["wp"] = {
-		eraresist = 0,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 10,
-		drag = 0.6,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			if math.random() < 0.2 then
-				if ammoDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(Ammo)(WP) VisualiseSmoke Called")
-				end
-				VisualizeSmoke(info.newpos, 0.5, projectile.smokeradius*0.005, projectile.smoketime/10, info.normal)
-			end
-			if ammoDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(Ammo)(WP) SpawnFire Called")
-			end
-			SpawnFire(info.hitPos)
-			--if ammoDebugLines then
-			--	DebugPrint("(Ammo)(WP) SimulateWP Called")
-			--end
-			-- SimulateWP will set fire to stuff within the smoke radius, as well as damage players and enemies within the cloud
-			-- It can be laggy though, so it's disabled
-			--SimulateWP(projectile, info)
-		end
-	},
-	["paint"] = {
-		eraresist = 0,
-		ricochetmultiplier = 0,
-		drag = 0.6,
-
-		SimulateImpact = function (projectile, info)
-			if info.mat.hitPosMat == "glass" and projectile.failsafe < 2 then
-				if projectile.failsafe == 0 then
-					MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(projectile.caliber/1000,.5))
-					MakeHole(info.newpos,math.min(randomFloat(.9,1.3)*projectile.caliber/100,.5))
-				end
-				info.newpos = VecAdd(info.newpos,VecScale(dir,.1))
-				projectile.failsafe = projectile.failsafe + 1
-			else
-				for i = 1, 4 do
-					PaintRGBA(VecAdd(info.hitPos, RSV(projectile.explosivepayload*.2)), projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.tracercolorr, projectile.tracercolorg, projectile.tracercolorb, 1, .8)
-				end
-				projectile.active = false
-			end
-		end
-	},
-}
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\animated_suspension.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\animated_suspension.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\animated_suspension.lua
@@ -1,20 +1,4 @@
---[[
-#include "TABS/scripts/tankmovement.lua"
-]]
-
---How to use this script
---Place a body near the wheel that you want it to snap to
---Add the "Suspension_arm" tag to the body/vox
---position the body paralell to the wheel for best effect. example=
--- w = wheel center, b = body origin point
---     -
---   | w-|-------b
---     - 
---The body will always want to be pointed towards the rear of the vehicle, I think its because of directional quaternions but I don't know how to properly detect and invert it. 
---in the meantime just make sure that all the bodies are pointed towards the rear of your vehicle. the vox can point wherever you want, but the body its inside of must always point rearwards
---
---For best effects place the body as close to the point of rotation as possible, but keep its height the same as the wheel's center otherwise it doesn't work/look as good. Do not overlap the body's center with the wheel's center or it'll spaz out since its trying to point at itself
-
+#version 2
 function InitTankWheels(vInfo)
 	--v = FindVehicle("tanksteertest", true)
 	local ws = bruteGetVehicleWheels(vInfo.vehiclehandle)
@@ -98,8 +82,6 @@
 		end
 	end
 end
-	
-
 
 function AnimateSuspension(vInfo)
 	local handles = vInfo.AnimatedSuspension.handles

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\ballistics.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\ballistics.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\ballistics.lua
@@ -1,5622 +1,4 @@
---option for slowmo not to fade over time, getting the advantage of the more permanent debug setting
---fading faster as the new method of slowmo needs it (probably should )
---fading dependent on real time while playing rather than original time before slowmo
---fading bugs fixed and controls are clearer
---fixing bug where shooting without hitting anything there would be no debug lines
-
-#include "ammo.lua"
-#include "common.lua"
-#include "settings.lua"
-
-GRAVITY = GetGravity() or Vec(0,-10,0) -- Teardown's approximation of gravity
-AIRDENSITY = 1.293 -- kg/m^3
-MACH = 343 -- m/s
-wBA, wBB = GetBodyBounds(GetWorldBody())
-wBA[2] = 0
-wBB[2] = 0
-wBmD = math.max(VecLength(VecSub(wBA,wBB)),500)
-
-PROJECTILE_LIMIT = 20000
-
-
-function RecieveEvent(String)
-	
-	
-	local Keys = {
-		Main = {
-			Primary = "~MainSeperation~",
-			Type = "~TypeSeperation~",
-			Arguments = "~ArgSeperation~",
-			ArgumentType = "~ArgTypeSeperation~",
-		},
-		Transform = {
-			Value = "~TransformValueSeperator~",
-			TransformSeperator = "~TransformTypeSeperator~",
-			Type = "~TransformVecSeperator~",
-		},
-		Table = {
-			Type = "~TableTypeSeperator~",
-			Values = "~TableValueSeperator~",
-		
-		},
-	}
-	local Parts = Split(String, Keys.Main.Primary)
-	for i=1,#Parts do 
-		if Parts[i] ~= "" then
-			if #Split(Parts[i], Keys.Main.Type) > 1 then
-				local FunctionName = Split(Parts[i], Keys.Main.Type)[1]
-				local Arguments = Split(Split(Parts[i], Keys.Main.Type)[2], Keys.Main.Arguments)
-				local FunctionArguments = {}
-				for j=1,#Arguments do		
-					local Type = Split(Arguments[j], Keys.Main.ArgumentType)[1]
-					local Value = Split(Arguments[j], Keys.Main.ArgumentType)[2]
-					
-					if Type == "String" then
-						Value = tostring(Value)
-					
-					elseif Type == "Number" then
-						Value = tonumber(Value)
-					
-					elseif Type == "Bool" then
-						Value = tobool(Value)
-					
-					elseif Type == "Transform" then
-						
-						local TransformValues = Split(Value, Keys.Transform.TransformSeperator)
-						local Position = Split(Split(TransformValues[1],Keys.Transform.Type)[2], Keys.Transform.Value)
-						local Rotation = Split(Split(TransformValues[2],Keys.Transform.Type)[2], Keys.Transform.Value)
-					
-						Value = Transform(Vec(tonumber(Position[1]),tonumber(Position[2]),tonumber(Position[3])),QuatEuler(tonumber(Rotation[1]),tonumber(Rotation[2]),tonumber(Rotation[3])))
-					
-					elseif Type == "Vec" then
-						local VecValues = Split(Value, Keys.Transform.Value)
-						Value = Vec(VecValues[1],VecValues[2],VecValues[3])	
-					
-					elseif Type == "Euler" then
-						local EulerValues = Split(Value, Keys.Transform.Value)
-						Value = QuatEuler(EulerValues[1],EulerValues[2],EulerValues[3])
-					
-					elseif Type == "Table" then
-						local WillBeTable = {}
-						local Values = Split(Value, Keys.Table.Values)
-						for k=1,#Values do
-							local NewType = Split(Values[k], Keys.Table.Type)[1]
-							local NewValue = Split(Values[k], Keys.Table.Type)[2]
-							
-							if NewType == "String" then
-								NewValue = tostring(NewValue)
-							
-							elseif NewType == "Number" then
-								NewValue = tonumber(NewValue)
-							
-							elseif NewType == "Bool" then
-								NewValue = tobool(NewValue)
-							
-							elseif NewType == "Vec" then
-								local VecValues = Split(NewValue, Keys.Transform.Value)
-								NewValue = Vec(VecValues[1],VecValues[2],VecValues[3])
-							
-							elseif NewType == "Transform" then
-								local TransformValues = Split(NewValue, Keys.Transform.TransformSeperator)
-								
-								local Position = Split(Split(TransformValues[1],Keys.Transform.Type)[1], Keys.Transform.Value)
-								local Rotation = Split(Split(TransformValues[1],Keys.Transform.Type)[2], Keys.Transform.Value)
-								NewValue = Transform(Vec(tonumber(Position[1]),tonumber(Position[2]),tonumber(Position[3])),QuatEuler(tonumber(Rotation[1]),tonumber(Rotation[2]),tonumber(Rotation[3])))
-							end
-							table.insert(WillBeTable, NewValue)
-						end
-						Value = WillBeTable
-					end
-					if Type ~= nil then
-						table.insert(FunctionArguments, Value)
-					end	
-				end
-				_G[FunctionName](unpack(FunctionArguments))
-			else	
-				local FunctionName = Split(Parts[i], Keys.Main.Type)[1]
-				_G[FunctionName]()
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function AssembleShell(...)
-	local ShellTable = {}
-	local ShellName = ""
-	local Arguments = { ... }
-	for i=1,#Arguments do
-		local Variables = Split(Arguments[i],"-")
-		local Type = Variables[2] 
-		local Value = Variables[3]
-		local Key = Variables[1]
-		if Type == "Number" then
-			Value = tonumber(Value)
-		elseif Type == "String" then
-			Value = tostring(Value)
-		elseif Type == "Bool" then
-			Value = tobool(Value)
-		end	
-		if Key ~= "ShellName" then
-			ShellTable[Key] = Value
-		else
-			ShellName = Value
-		end
-	end
-	if not shellTypes[ShellName] then
-		shellTypes[ShellName] = ShellTable
-	else
-	
-	end
-end
-
-function tobool(str)
-	if string.upper(str) == "TRUE" then
-		return true
-	elseif string.upper(str) == "FALSE" then
-		return false
-	end
-end
-
-function deepcopy(orig)
-    local orig_type = type(orig)
-    local copy
-    if orig_type == 'table' then
-        copy = {}
-        for orig_key, orig_value in next, orig, nil do
-            copy[deepcopy(orig_key)] = deepcopy(orig_value)
-        end
-        setmetatable(copy, deepcopy(getmetatable(orig)))
-    else
-        copy = orig
-    end
-    return copy
-end
-
-function InitBallistics()
-	-- Init projectile handlers
-	NoProjectileLimit = true
-	TABSProjectileHandler = {
-		shellNum = 1,
-		shells = {},
-		defaultShell = {active = false}
-	}
-	if not NoProjectileLimit then
-		for i=1, PROJECTILE_LIMIT do
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i] = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-		end
-	end
-	TABSSoundHandler = {
-		shellNum = 1,
-		shells = {},
-		defaultShell = {active = false}
-	}
-	for i=1,5000 do
-		TABSSoundHandler.shells[i] = {}
-	end
-	spentCasings = {
-		shellNum = 1,
-		shells = {},
-		defaultShell = {active = false}
-	}
-	for i=1,100 do
-		spentCasings.shells[i] = {}
-	end
-	TABSFlashHandler = {
-		flashNum = 1,
-		flashes = {},
-	}
-	for i=1,100 do
-		TABSFlashHandler.flashes[i] = {}
-	end
-
-	-- Init debug
-	debuglines = {}
-	debugholes = {}
-	drawdebug = false
-	curShell = 1
-	DebugCounter = 0
-
-	-- Init tank
-	aimpos, aimdir = nil, nil
-
-	-- Init sounds
-	SOUNDS = LoadTABSSounds()
-
-	-- Constants
-	RICOCHET_CAL_THRESHOLD = 30
-	ERA_MOMENTUM_THRESHOLD = 80
-	AP_RICOCHET_AFTER_PENETRATION_MULT = .2
-	RANDOM_SPALL_POS_VARIATION = .02
-	PASS_BY_SOUND_MIN_TOTALDIST = 20
-	APHE_CONE_ANGLE = .7
-	APS_MOMENTUM_REDUCTION_FRACTION = .85
-	MIN_RICOCHET_FRAG_MOMENTUM = 8
-	RICOCHET_COUNT_MAX = 6
-	MAX_SPALL_PEN = 50
-	
-	HULL_COL_FILTER = 2^2
-	TURRET_COL_FILTER = 2^3
-	BREECH_COL_FILTER = 2^4
-
-	InitOptions()
-
-	InitSlowMoDebug()
-	-- InitOptions()
-	OtherInit()
-end
-
-function DebugBallisticsConfig()
-	SlowmoDebugLines = true
-	SlowDownFactor = 50 --How much slower the slow mo is compared to physical speed.
-	SlowMoFading = true --if disabled all the lines, makehole positions remain rather than fading over time
-
-	SlowMoRepeatTime = 0 --after this many seconds of real time the slowmo loops back to the beginniing, if 0 it goes until there's no more spall is created
-	SlowMoInputSeconds = 5 --maximum this many seconds of debuglines are saved for the slowmo to repeat. Slowmo doesn't start until this many seconds passed
-	SlowMoStartSlowFrames = 1 --max time spent before a hit (original frame)
-	SlomoRewindButton = TABSControls.vehicles.rewind_debug
-	SlomoFastForwardButton = TABSControls.vehicles.fastforward_debug
-end
-
-function OtherInit()
-	if AlwaysSaveDebugLines == nil then AlwaysSaveDebugLines = true end
-	ShowTimeFading = 0
-	
-	
-end
-
-function InitSlowMoDebug()
-	DebugBallisticsConfig()
-	DebugCounter = 0
-	MaxDebugCount = SlowMoInputSeconds*60
-	SlowMoWaitCount = 1.2*60
-	ShowSlowMoCounter = 0
-	SlowMoTime = 0
-	ImpactSprite = LoadSprite("MOD/TABS/img/impact-point.png")
-	SlowMoTimeLimit = 0 --last frame where something was actually happening
-	SlowMoFrameTime = 0
-	SlowMoRewindSpeed = 0
-	SlowMoRewindSpeedMin = 1.2/SlowDownFactor
-	SlowMoRewindSpeedMax = 3/SlowDownFactor
-	SlowMoStartSlowTime = 0 -- before this time it's faster so you don't need to wait long for the first hit
-	totalSpall = 0
-end
-
----- Projectile Handling ----
-
---projectiles remain in tick because they need to be drawn each frame.
---relying on tick dt probably makes them sligtly less predictable / accurate but no one will notice
-function HandleProjectiles()
-	-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Called")
-	CinematicCamControlledLastTick = false
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		if MaxDebugCount~=nil then
-		if DebugCounter<MaxDebugCount or DebugCounter<SlowMoWaitCount then
-			DebugCounter = DebugCounter + 1
-		end
-		---- DebugPrint(DebugCounter .. "/" .. MaxDebugCount)
-		end
-	end
-
-	totalSpall = 0
-
-	if NoProjectileLimit then
-		local i = 1
-		local projectileRemoved=0
-		while i < TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum do
-			local shell=TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i-projectileRemoved]
-			if shell.active then
-				if shell.type == "spall" then
-					-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls SpallOperations")
-					SpallOperations(shell)
-					totalSpall = totalSpall + 1
-				elseif shell.stuck == true then
-					StickyOperations(shell)
-				else
-					-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls ProjectileOperations")
-					ProjectileOperations(shell)
-				end
-			else
-				TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i-projectileRemoved]=nil
-				projectileRemoved=projectileRemoved+1
-			end
-			if projectileRemoved>0 then
-				TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i-projectileRemoved+1],TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i+1] = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i+1],TABSProjectileHandler.shells[i-projectileRemoved+1]
-			end
-			i=i+1
-		end
-		TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum=TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum-projectileRemoved
-	else
-		for key, shell in ipairs(TABSProjectileHandler.shells) do
-			if shell.active then
-				if shell.type == "spall" then
-					-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls SpallOperations (1)")
-					SpallOperations(shell)
-					totalSpall = totalSpall + 1
-				elseif shell.stuck == true then
-					StickyOperations(shell)
-				else
-					-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls ProjectileOperations (1)")
-					ProjectileOperations(shell)
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	for key, sound in ipairs(TABSSoundHandler.shells) do
-		if sound.active then
-			-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls SoundOperations")
-			SoundOperations(sound)
-		end
-	end
-
-	for index, casing in pairs(spentCasings.shells) do
-		if casing.active then
-			-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls CasingOperations")
-			CasingOperations(casing)
-		end
-	end
-
-	for key, flash in ipairs(TABSFlashHandler.flashes) do
-		if flash.active then
-			-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Calls FlashOperations")
-			FlashOperations(flash)
-		end
-	end
-	-- DebugPrint("HandleProjectiles Ended")
-end
-
-
-
---showing path of projectiles
---drawing lines to frame, must be in tick
-function DebugShooting()
-	--original version of static lines
-	if SlowmoDebugLines == false then
-		for i = 1, #debuglines do
-			local line = debuglines[i]
-			local type = line.color or "normal"
-			--[[if type == "normal" then
-				DebugLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos)
-			else
-				DebugLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,0,0)
-			end--]]
-			DebugLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-			DrawLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-		end
-		for i = 1, #debugholes do
-			DebugCross(debugholes[i].pos)
-		end
-	else
-		--new slow moving lines
-		--should take into account actual speed and reliance on previous line, not sure how to take into account whether prior finished, well what is prior?
-		--could keep a counter of pos where to save hole and line. keep a note of last line for projectile / spall.
-		--would need to note for each spall what created it.
-		--need to understand how the code works to show more properly is spall the same as projectile just created by projectile? how is spall operation different?
-		--prior finishing: every time one finishes, note next to all the others that use it as prior that they are now ready
-
-		--could have a timeline where you can go back
-		if MaxDebugCount == nil then return end
-
-		-- Rewind back to start
-		if SlowMoFrameTime<0 then SlowMoFrameTime = SlowMoTimeLimit end
-
-		if DebugCounter >=SlowMoWaitCount then
-			camrot = GetCameraTransform().rot
-			if SlowMoFrameTime == nil then 
-				SlowMoFrameTime = 0 
-				--DebugPrint("was nil")
-			end
-			local timestep = 1/SlowDownFactor
-			if SlowMoFrameTime<SlowMoStartSlowTime and ShowTimeFading<=0 then
-				local slowstep = SlowMoStartSlowTime/SlowMoStartSlowFrames/60
-				if slowstep>timestep then timestep = slowstep end
-			end
-			SlowMoFrameTime = SlowMoFrameTime+timestep --How many frames elapsed in the original data
-			
-
-			if SlowMoFrameTime>SlowMoTime+7 then SlowMoFrameTime = 0 end
-			if SlowMoRepeatTime > 0 then
-				if ShowSlowMoCounter>SlowMoRepeatTime*60 then 
-					SlowMoFrameTime = 0 
-					--DebugPrint("repeattime")
-				end
-			end
-
-			--DebugPrint(SlowMoFrameTime .. " " .. SlowMoTimeLimit)
-			if SlowMoFrameTime>SlowMoTimeLimit+2 then 
-				SlowMoFrameTime = 0 
-				--DebugPrint("timelimit ran out")
-			end
-
-			if InputDown(SlomoRewindButton) then
-				SlowMoRewindSpeed = SlowMoRewindSpeed + (SlowMoRewindSpeedMax-SlowMoRewindSpeedMin)/60/2
-
-				SlowMoFrameTime = SlowMoFrameTime-SlowMoRewindSpeed
-			elseif InputDown(SlomoFastForwardButton) then
-				SlowMoFrameTime = SlowMoFrameTime+0.1
-			else
-				SlowMoRewindSpeed = SlowMoRewindSpeedMin
-			end
-
-			DrawSlowMoProjectilePaths(SlowMoFrameTime)
-		end
-	
-		--initialise values
-		if DebugCounter ==SlowMoWaitCount-1 then
-
-			SlowMoTimeLimit = 0
-			for i = 1, #debuglines,1 do
-				--assuming time = frame but first one starts at time 0
-				SlowMoTimeLimit = math.max(SlowMoTimeLimit, debuglines[i].time+debuglines[i].duration)
-			end
-				
-			SlowMoFrameTime = 0
-			local firsthole = 10000
-			SlowMoStartSlowTime = 0
-			local found = false
-			for i = 1,#debugholes,1 do
-				if debugholes[i].time<firsthole then 
-					firsthole = debugholes[i].time 
-					found = true
-				end
-			end
-			if firsthole>SlowMoStartSlowTime and found then
-				SlowMoStartSlowTime = firsthole-0.2
-			end
-			
-		end
-	end
-
-end
-
-
-
-function DrawSlowMoProjectilePaths(FrameTime)
-	for i = 1, #debuglines do
-		local line = debuglines[i]
-		local time = line.time
-		local fadelinesafterseconds = 2
-		local fadelinesoverseconds = 15
-		
-		local framestravelled = line.duration
-		local finishtime = time+framestravelled
-		local a = 1-math.clamp(((FrameTime-finishtime)*SlowDownFactor/60-fadelinesafterseconds)/fadelinesoverseconds,0,1)
-
-		
-		if finishtime<FrameTime then -- if it's already timed past current point full line
-			if SlowMoFading == false then a = 1 end
-			if a >0 then
-				DebugLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2,a)
-				DrawLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2,a)
-			end
-			--DebugPrint("past" .. FrameTime .. " " .. time)
-		elseif time<FrameTime then
-			local f = (FrameTime-time)/framestravelled
-			local d = VecSub(line.hitpos,line.startpos)
-			local p2 = VecAdd(line.startpos,VecScale(d,f))
-			--DebugPrint("current " .. FrameTime .. " " .. time .. " " .. f)
-
-			DebugLine(line.startpos,p2,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-			DrawLine(line.startpos,p2,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-		end
-	end
-	for i = 1, #debugholes do
-		local time = debugholes[i].time
-		local age = (FrameTime-time)/100*SlowDownFactor
-				
-		if age>0 then
-			local a = 1
-			if age>0.1 then
-				a = 1-math.clamp((age-0.1)/5,0,1)
-			else
-				a = math.clamp((age)/0.1,0,1)
-			end
-
-			if a>0 then
-				local size = 0.14*a
-				if size<0.05 then size = 0.05 end
-				DrawSprite(ImpactSprite, Transform(debugholes[i].pos,camrot),size,size,1,0,0,a/3)
-			else
-				if SlowMoFading == false then
-					DebugCross(debugholes[i].pos,1,0,0)
-				end
-			end
-			
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-
-
-function SaveDebugInfo(time, pos,hitpos, color, frameduration)
-	--DebugPrint("SaveDebugInfo Called")
-	--SlowMo version
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		if DebugCounter<MaxDebugCount then
-			if hitpos == nil then
-				local hole = {}
-				hole.pos = pos
-				hole.time = time
-
-				table.insert(debugholes, hole) --pos, hitpos, color (momentum / lastmomentum)
-			else
-				local line = {}
-				line.startpos = pos
-				line.hitpos = hitpos
-				line.color = math.max(color,0)
-				line.time = time
-				line.duration = frameduration
-				table.insert(debuglines,line)
-			end
-			if time>SlowMoTime then SlowMoTime = time end
-			if time and frameduration then SlowMoTimeLimit = math.max(SlowMoTimeLimit, time+frameduration) end
-		end
-	else
-		--default old version
-		if AlwaysSaveDebugLines or drawdebug then
-			if hitpos == nil then
-				local hole = {}
-				hole.pos = pos
-				table.insert(debugholes, hole) --pos, hitpos, color (momentum / lastmomentum)
-			else
-				local line = {}
-				line.startpos = pos
-				line.hitpos = hitpos
-				line.color = color
-				table.insert(debuglines,line)
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("SaveDebugInfo Ended")
-end
-
-function Shoot(pos, dir, shellInfo, rejectedbodies, ADS, accuracy, range, muzzletype, rocketsize, rocketSmokeAmount, IsSecond, vehicleTarget, selected_shell)
-	--DebugPrint("Shoot Function Called")
-	if type(shellInfo) == "string" then
-		shellInfo = GetShellInfoFromRegistry(shellInfo)
-	end
-	if shellInfo == nil then return end
-	if IsSecond == nil then IsSecond = false end
-	dir = VecLerp(dir,VecNormalize(RSV(math.random()^2)),accuracy*.25)
-	local morebodies = FindBodies('TABSNPCGUNACTIVE', true)
-	for i=1,#morebodies do
-		table.insert(rejectedbodies, morebodies[i])
-	end
-	
-	local selected_shell = selected_shell or 1
-	
-	if selected_shell == nil or selected_shell == "" then selected_shell = 1 end
-	
-	--DebugPrint("Shooting Shell Count = " ..tostring(shellInfo.count[selected_shell]).. " Selected Shell = " ..tostring(selected_shell))
-	--DebugPrint("ShellInfo = " ..tostring(shellInfo).. " Shell Name = " ..tostring(shellInfo.name[selected_shell]).. " Shell Type = " ..tostring(shellInfo.type[selected_shell]))
-	
-	for i=1,shellInfo.count[selected_shell] do
-		--DebugPrint("Shoot Shells Loop Start")
-		local thisDir = VecLerp(dir,VecNormalize(RSV(math.random()^2)),shellInfo.spread[selected_shell]*.25)
-
-		local barrelBody = rejectedbodies[1]
-		-- Initializing shell
-		
-		local nextShell = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-		
-		nextShell.pos = pos
-		--DebugPrint("Shellinfo Name = " ..tostring(shellInfo.name[selected_shell]))
-		nextShell.projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[shellInfo.type[selected_shell] or "ap"]) or deepcopy(shellStats.ap)
-
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecScale(thisDir, shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell])
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(nextShell.predictedVelocity, GetBodyVelocity(barrelBody))
-		nextShell.propulsion = (shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] or nil or "ballistic")
-		nextShell.propulsionforce = shellInfo.propulsionforce[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.maxdist = shellInfo.maxrange[selected_shell] or 5000
-		if shellInfo.navconst ~= nil then 
-			nextShell.navconst = shellInfo.navconst[selected_shell]
-		else
-			nextShell.navconst = .5
-		end
-		
-		if shellInfo.splashrange ~= nil then 
-			nextShell.splashrange = shellInfo.splashrange[selected_shell]
-		else
-			nextShell.splashrange = 2
-		end
-
-		nextShell.totaldist = 0
-
-		nextShell.rejectedbodies = rejectedbodies
-
-		-- General shell info
-		nextShell.type = string.lower(shellInfo.type[selected_shell])
-
-		nextShell.mass = shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.momentum = shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.maxmomentum = shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.caliber = shellInfo.projectilecaliber[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.shellcaliber = shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.drag = nextShell.projStats.drag or 0.35
-
-		-- Tracer
-		nextShell.tracer = shellInfo.tracer[selected_shell] or false
-		nextShell.tracercolorr = shellInfo.tracercolorr[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.tracercolorg = shellInfo.tracercolorg[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.tracercolorb = shellInfo.tracercolorb[selected_shell]
-
-		-- Spall and shrapnel
-		nextShell.canistertype = shellInfo.canistertype[selected_shell] or "spall"
-		nextShell.canisterpen = shellInfo.canisterpen[selected_shell] or 5
-		nextShell.canisterangle = shellInfo.canisterangle[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.canisteramount = shellInfo.canisteramount[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.canistercaliber = shellInfo.canistercaliber[selected_shell] or 0
-		
-		
-		nextShell.spallamount = shellInfo.spallamount[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.spallangle = shellInfo.spallangle[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.shrapnelamount = shellInfo.shrapnelamount[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.explosivepayload = shellInfo.explosivepayload[selected_shell] or 0
-
-		-- Shell-specific stats
-		nextShell.timer = (shellInfo.timer[selected_shell] or nil or 20)
-		nextShell.impacted = false
-		nextShell.fuzetype = shellInfo.fuzetype[selected_shell] or "impact"
-		nextShell.fuzedist = shellInfo.fuzedist[selected_shell] or 1
-		nextShell.fuzesense = shellInfo.fuzesense[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.minarmdist = shellInfo.minarmdist[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.incendiary = shellInfo.incendiary[selected_shell] or false
-		nextShell.forcedetonate = 0 -- Used for HE shells
-		nextShell.range = 5000
-		if range~=nil and range~=0 then nextShell.range = math.max(range,20) end
-
-		nextShell.smokeradius = shellInfo.smokeradius[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.smoketime = shellInfo.smoketime[selected_shell] or 0
-
-		nextShell.frametime = 0
-
-		nextShell.APSlights = FindAPSLights()
-		nextShell.vehicletarget = vehicleTarget
-
-		if (shellInfo.projectilecaliber[selected_shell] > 15 or shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell] > 40) and shellInfo.count[selected_shell]==1 then -- Stops shotgun pellet collisions
-			local vox = shellInfo.voxobject[selected_shell] or shellInfo.type[selected_shell]
-			local e = Spawn('<body tags="visualShellBody"><vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/shellvox/shells.vox" object="'..vox..'" scale="'..tostring(nextShell.caliber/1000)..'"/></>',Transform(pos,QuatLookAt(pos,VecAdd(pos,dir))))
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = e[1]
-		else
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = 0
-		end
-
-		nextShell.cinematiccam = shellInfo.cinematiccam
-		if nextShell.cinematiccam then
-			nextShell.ccrx = randomFloat(-30,10)
-			nextShell.ccry = randomFloat(-60,60)
-			nextShell.ccrz = randomFloat(-15,15)
-		end
-
-		nextShell.ricochetCount = 0
-		nextShell.active = true
-		
-		TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum] = deepcopy(nextShell)
-		loadedShell = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum]
-		
-		--loadedShell.active = true
-		if NoProjectileLimit then
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = (TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum % PROJECTILE_LIMIT) + 1
-		else
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum + 1
-		end
-		if TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()] then
-			loadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()]
-		elseif(TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]) then 
-			loadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]
-		end
-		
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Shoot Shell Active")
-	end
-
-	if IsSecond == false then
-		-- local amount = .0025*shellInfo.shellcaliber*shellInfo.velocity^.5*math.log(shellInfo.recoil)
-		
-		VisualizeShooting(loadedShell.pos, dir, shellInfo, muzzletype, rejectedbodies, rocketsize, rocketSmokeAmount, selected_shell)
-		
-		local barrelBody = rejectedbodies[1]
-		ApplyBodyImpulse(barrelBody, pos, VecScale(dir, -shellInfo.recoil[selected_shell]))
-	end
-
-
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		DebugCounter = 0
-		ShowSlowMoCounter = 0
-		SlowMoTime = 0
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("Shoot Function Ended")
-end
-
-function FindAPSLights()
-	local lights = FindLights("APS", true)
-	local APSlist = {}
-
-	for i = 1, #lights do
-		local light = lights[i]
-		lInfo = {}
-		lInfo.light = light
-
-		lInfo.type = "HardKill"
-		if HasTag(light, "type") then lInfo.type = GetTagValue(light, "type") end
-
-		lInfo.angle = 150
-		lInfo.range = 10
-		lInfo.minVel = 100
-		lInfo.maxVel = 1200
-		lInfo.minCal = 25
-		if HasTag(light, "angle") then lInfo.range = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "angle")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "range") then lInfo.range = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "range")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "minVel") then lInfo.minVel = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "minVel")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "maxVel") then lInfo.maxVel = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "maxVel")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "minCal") then lInfo.minCal = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "minCal")) end
-
-		table.insert(APSlist,lInfo)
-	end
-
-	return APSlist
-end
-
-
-
-function HandlePropulsion(projectile)
-	--DebugPrint("HandlePropulsion Started")
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local rWV = VecSub(projectile.predictedVelocity, GetWindVelocity(projectile.pos)) -- Relative wind velocity
-
-	-- Drag
-	local p = AIRDENSITY
-	if IsPointInWater(projectile.pos) then p = 997 end
-	local v = VecLength(rWV)
-	local Cd = projectile.drag
-	local A = math.pi*(projectile.caliber/2000)^2
-	local Fd = .5*p*v^2*Cd*A
-	local Ad = Fd/projectile.mass
-	local dragForce = math.clamp(Ad*dt,0,projectileSpeed*.1) -- Temp fix for 8mm Mauser having a stupidly high drag force
-	local oldSpeed = projectileSpeed
-	
-	projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(VecNormalize(rWV), math.abs(dragForce)*-1)) -- Air drag
-	if projectile.propulsion ~= "guided" and projectile.propulsion ~= "radar-guided" then projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(GRAVITY, dt)) end -- Gravity drop
-	projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		
-	-- Propulsion
-	if string.sub(ptype,1,2) == "ap" or ptype == "bullet" then
-		-- Decreases penetrating power of kinetic projectiles with air resistance
-		-- **Note that ^.5 might account for kinetic energy loss rather than just basing it solely on speed? May not be entirely realistic, but it seems like a good general approximation
-		projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*math.clamp((projectileSpeed/oldSpeed)^.5,0,1)
-	end
-	-- DebugPrint("MTM: "..projectile.momentum)
-	-- DebugPrint("DST: "..projectile.totaldist)
-	-- DebugPrint("POS: " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-	-- DebugPrint("SPD: "..projectileSpeed)
-	-- DebugPrint("DIR: " ..VecStr(dir))
-	-- DebugPrint("PREDICTEDVELOCITY: " ..VecStr(predictedVelocity))
-	-- DebugPrint("PROP: "..projectile.propulsion)
-	-- DebugPrint("PROPFORCE: "..projectile.propulsionforce)
-	-- DebugPrint("FRC: "..(projectileSpeed/oldSpeed)^2)
-	-- DebugPrint()
-	if projectile.propulsionforce > 0 then -- projectile.propulsion == "guided" or projectile.propulsion == "rocket" or projectile.propulsion == "radar-guided"
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(dir, projectileSpeed + dt*projectile.propulsionforce/projectile.mass)
-		projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.totaldist >= projectile.maxdist then
-		projectile.detonate = true
-	end
-
-	local aimpos, aimdir
-	if projectile.vInfo ~= nil then
-		aimpos, aimdir = VecCopy(projectile.vInfo.controls.aimpos), VecCopy(projectile.vInfo.controls.aimdir)
-	end
-
-
-	if projectile.propulsion == "guided" and aimpos ~= nil and aimdir ~= nil and not projectile.detonate then
-	-- ATGM guidance
-		local projection = VecScale(aimdir, VecDot(VecSub(projectile.pos,aimpos),aimdir))
-		local projrelpos = VecSub(projectile.pos, aimpos)
-		local perpdiff = VecSub(projection, VecAdd(projrelpos,VecScale(aimdir,-.5*projectileSpeed)))
-		if projectile.fuzetype == "top-down" then perpdiff = VecAdd(perpdiff, Vec(0,projectile.fuzedist*.8,0)) end
-
-		local pdl = math.clamp(VecLength(perpdiff),0,.02*projectileSpeed)
-		local pdn = VecNormalize(perpdiff)
-
-		local velprojectionlen = math.clamp(VecDot(projectile.predictedVelocity, pdn),0,.02*projectileSpeed)
-
-		-- DebugLine(VecAdd(projrelpos,aimpos),VecAdd(projection,aimpos))
-		pda = VecAdd(VecAdd(VecScale(pdn, .004*pdl), VecScale(VecSub(perpdiff,VecScale(pdn,velprojectionlen)),.002)), VecScale(pdn,-.0015*velprojectionlen))
-		pda = VecScale(pda, math.max(projectile.propulsionforce/projectile.mass, 10*projectile.mass))
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(VecNormalize(VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, pda)), projectileSpeed)
-
-	elseif projectile.propulsion == "radar-guided" then
-	-- Missile guidance (the missile knows where it is)
-
-		local VB = GetVehicleBody(projectile.vehicletarget)
-		local tpos = GetBodyTransform(VB)
-		local tdir = VecNormalize(VecSub(tpos,projectile.pos))
-		local tvel = GetBodyVelocity(VB)
-		local dist = VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos,tpos))
-		local N = projectile.navconst
-		local v = VecLength(VecSub(projectile.predictedVelocity,tvel))
-		local splashdist = projectile.splashrange
-
-		local missileT = Transform(projectile.pos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,VecAdd(projectile.pos,dir)))
-		local dirperp = TransformToParentVec(missileT,Vec(1,0,0))
-		local dirvert = TransformToParentVec(missileT,Vec(0,1,0))
-		local spdH = VecScale(dirperp,VecDot(dirperp,tvel)/dist)
-		local spdV = VecScale(dirvert,VecDot(dirvert,tvel)/dist)
-
-		local dLOS = VecAdd(spdH,spdV)
-
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(dLOS,N*v*dt))
-		dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-		if dist <= splashdist then
-			projectile.detonate = true
-		end
-
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("HandlePropulsion Ended")
-end
-
-function GetQueryDist(projectile)
-	--DebugPrint("GetQueryDist Started")
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local minArmDist = projectile.minarmdist or 20
-
-	local qdist = projectileSpeed*dt
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist qDist = " ..tostring(qdist))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist projectileSpeed = " ..tostring(projectileSpeed))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist time step = " ..tostring(dt))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist Velocity = " ..VecStr(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	if string.sub(ptype,1,2)=="ap"and projectile.explosivepayload>0 then -- APHE
-		if projectile.momentum > 0 then
-			if projectile.posAtImpact ~= nil then
-				qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0) - VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos, projectile.posAtImpact))
-				-- DebugPrint(VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos, projectile.posAtImpact)))
-				if qdist <= 0 then
-					projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-					qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0)
-				end
-			elseif projectile.fuzeTripped then
-				qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0)
-			end
-		else
-			qdist = 0.01
-		end
-		if projectile.posAtImpact == nil and projectile.fuzeTripped == true then
-			projectile.posAtImpact = VecCopy(projectile.pos)
-		end
-	elseif projectile.fuzetype == "timed" then
-		local targetDist = projectile.range+projectile.fuzedist
-		qdist = math.clamp(qdist, targetDist-projectile.totaldist, minArmDist-projectile.totaldist)
-		if projectile.totaldist+projectileSpeed*dt > targetDist and projectile.totaldist >= minArmDist then
-			qdist = targetDist-projectile.totaldist
-			projectile.detonate = true
-		end
-	end
-	projectile.totaldist = projectile.totaldist + qdist
-	--DebugPrint("GetQueryDist Ended")
-	return qdist
-end
-
-function ManageAPS(projectile, info)
-	--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Called")
-	if #projectile.APSlights == 0 then return info.newpos end
-	
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-	-- Active Protection Systems (APS)
-	for i, APSlight in pairs(projectile.APSlights) do
-
-		local lT = GetLightTransform(APSlight.light)
-		local APSdir = TransformToParentVec(lT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-		local dot = VecDot(APSdir,dir)
-		local angle = math.acos(dot)*180/math.pi
-		local APSpos = lT.pos
-
-		-- Needs to detect is a projectile is coming towards the APS, because projectiles moving away behave weirdly
-		if APSlight.type == "HardKill" then
-			if angle < APSlight.angle/2 then
-
-				local passed, passdist, passpos = GetProjectilePassInfo(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, APSpos, APSlight.range)
-				
-				temptotaldist = projectile.totaldist + VecLength(VecSub(passpos,APSpos))
-				
-				d2p = VecNormalize(VecSub(VecAdd(passpos, VecScale(dir,-APSlight.range)),APSpos))
-
-				if projectileSpeed >= APSlight.minVel and projectileSpeed <= APSlight.maxVel and projectile.caliber >= APSlight.minCal then
-					if VecLength(VecAdd(d2p,dir)) < .2 then
-						if passed then
-
-							local APSamount = tonumber(GetTagValue(APSlight.light, "APS"))
-							if APSamount == nil then APSamount = 0 end
-
-							if APSamount > 0 then
-								if passdist < APSlight.range then -- and VecLength(VecAdd(VecNormalize(VecSub(projectile.pos,APSpos)),dir))<.5
-									local newpos = VecAdd(passpos, VecScale(dir,-math.min(APSlight.range,temptotaldist)))
-									projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*APS_MOMENTUM_REDUCTION_FRACTION
-									SetTag(APSlight, "APS", APSamount-1)
-
-									-- Visuals
-									local shootDir = VecNormalize(VecSub(newpos, APSpos))
-									VisualizeShooting(APSpos, shootDir, GetShellInfoFromRegistry("50bmg"), "mg", {}, 0, 1, 1)
-									PlayDistantSound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/grenade_launcher_0.ogg"), APSpos, 2)
-									VisualizeExplosion(newpos, .1, .2, 1)
-
-									if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then
-										projectile.detonate = true
-										--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-										return newpos
-									else
-										--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-										return info.newpos
-									end
-									
-								end
-							else
-								table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-							end
-
-						end
-					end
-				else
-					table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-				end
-			end
-		elseif APSlight.type == "Dazzler" then
-			if projectile.propulsion == "guided" then
-
-				local lT = GetLightTransform(APSlight.light)
-				local APSdir = TransformToParentVec(lT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-				local dot = VecDot(APSdir,dir)
-				local angle = math.acos(dot)*180/math.pi
-
-				if angle < APSlight.angle/2 and (VecLength(VecSub(info.newpos,APSpos)) < APSlight.range or VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos,APSpos)) < APSlight.range) then
-					local t1 = GetTime()*5.7
-					local t2 = GetTime()*2.1
-					local adjust = 0.0001/GetTimeStep()
-
-					local atgmTrans = Transform(projectile.pos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,VecAdd(projectile.pos,dir)))
-					local jamDir = TransformToParentVec(atgmTrans,Vec((math.sin(t1)+math.sin(t2))*adjust,(math.cos(t1)+math.cos(t2))*adjust,0))
-					projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(VecAdd(dir,jamDir),projectileSpeed)
-				end
-
-			else
-				table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-	return info.newpos
-
-end
-
-function CheckArmourValue(Shape, hitCos)
-	--DebugPrint("CheckArmourValue Called")
-	local rawRHA = 0
-	local nRHA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "RHA") then
-		rawRHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "RHA")) or 0
-		nRHA = rawRHA/hitCos or 0
-	end
-	-- CHA (cast homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-	local nCHA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "CHA") then
-		nCHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "CHA")) or 0
-	end
-	-- CA (composite armor) value from shape tag
-	local rawCA = 0
-	local nCA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "CA") then
-		rawCA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "CA")) or 0
-		nCA = rawCA/hitCos or 0
-		--DebugPrint("rawCA = " ..tostring(rawCA).. " nCA = " ..tostring(nCA))
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("CheckArmourValue Ended")
-	return rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA, nCA
-end
-
-function checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, maxRadius, rejectedShapes)
-	--DebugPrint("checkHoleRadius Called")
-	-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-	-- Check for a new shape with an expanding radius. if it finds something then set that as the radius.
-	-- It checks every 0.001 units, which is a 10th of a voxel 
-	-- This is sensitive enough at the moment, but it can be made more sensitive
-	local searchIncrement = searchIncrement
-	local searchRadius = searchIncrement
-	local hasHitShape = false
-	local hasHitDist = 0
-	local localUp = Vec(0, 0, -1)
-	
-	QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-	local qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, maxRadius*4)
-	local lookAtQuat = QuatLookAt(pos, qPoint)
-	local pointVec = QuatRotateVec(lookAtQuat, localUp)
-						
-	while hasHitShape == false and searchRadius < maxRadius do
-	
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		hasHitShape, hasHitDist, _, hasHitHandle = QueryRaycast(pos, pointVec, searchRadius, searchRadius)
-		if hasHitShape == false then
-			searchRadius = searchRadius + searchIncrement
-		end
-	end
-						
-	searchRadius = math.max(searchRadius - searchIncrement, 0)
-	--DebugPrint("checkHoleRadius Ended")
-	return searchRadius
-end
-
-function MakeHardMetalHoles(rejectedShapes, projRadius, holes)
-	local hardMetalHolesDebugLines = false
-	SetBrush("sphere", projRadius*10, 0)
-	if hardMetalHolesDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Number of holes to make = " ..tostring(h))
-	end
-	if rejectedShapes == "" or rejectedShapes == nil then return end
-	for i = 1, #rejectedShapes do
-	
-		local shape = rejectedShapes[i]
-
-		
-		local shapeTransform = GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)
-		local startPosition = TransformToLocalPoint(shapeTransform, VecAdd(holes[1], VecScale(dir, projRadius*-0.5)))
-		local endPosition = TransformToLocalPoint(shapeTransform, holes[#holes])
-		local setMask = false
-		startPosition = VecScale(startPosition, 10)
-		endPosition = VecScale(endPosition, 10)
-		if GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape))) ~= "wheel" and HasTag(shape, "unbreakable") == false and HasTag(shape, "invisible") == false then
-			local layer, mask = GetShapeCollisionFilter(shape)
-			if mask ~= 255 or layer ~= 1 then
-				setMask = true
-			end
-			if HasTag(shape, "Ammo_Size") or HasTag(shape, "Barrel") or HasTag(shape, "On_Barrel") or HasTag(shape, "component") or HasTag(shape, "fxbreak") or HasTag(shape, "Part") or (#GetShapeJoints(shape) ~= 0 and GetShapeVoxelCount(shape) < 5) then
-				DrawShapeLine(shape, startPosition[1], startPosition[2], startPosition[3], endPosition[1], endPosition[2], endPosition[3])
-				local shapelets = SplitShape(shape)
-				if setMask then
-					SetShapeCollisionFilter(shape, layer, mask)
-					for s = 1, #shapelets do
-						SetShapeCollisionFilter(shapelets[s], layer, mask)
-					end
-				end
-				if GetShapeVoxelCount(shape) == 0 then Delete(shape) end
-			else
-				DrawShapeLine(shape, startPosition[1], startPosition[2], startPosition[3], endPosition[1], endPosition[2], endPosition[3])
-				if setMask then
-					SetShapeCollisionFilter(shape, layer, mask)
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		if hardMetalHolesDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Is Shape Unbreakable? = " ..tostring(HasTag(shape, "unbreakable")).. " What is the shapes bodies parent? " ..tostring(GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape)))))
-		end
-	end
-
-end
-
-function SimulatePenetration(projectile, info)
-
-	local simulatePenDebugLines = false
-	if simulatePenDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Called")
-		DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Projectile Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-	end
-	local projectileSpeed = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local projStats = projectile.projStats
-	local dir = info.dir
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, info.hitPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-
-	--------------------
-	-- Armor Pen Loop --
-	--------------------
-
-	local expended = 0
-	local playedHitSound = false
-	if projectile.momentum > 0 and projectile.active == true then
-	if simulatePenDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("PenLoop Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-	end
-
-		-- Initialize armor depth calculation (iterates through armor until the other side)
-		local air = false
-		local pos = VecCopy(info.newpos)
-		local lastHitshapes = {info.shape}
-		local holes = {}
-		local holeMaterials = {}
-		local pennedShapes = {}
-		local rejectedShapes = {}
-		local maxDepth = projectileSpeed*GetTimeStep()
-		if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then maxDepth = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0) end
-		local qdist = maxDepth
-		local holeIncrement = .01
-		local exitedArmorBlockDist = .1
-		local lastExpendedVal = 0
-		local lastHitPos = VecCopy(info.newpos)
-		local lastNormal = VecCopy(info.normal)
-		local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(lastNormal,dir))
-		if VecLength(lastNormal)==0 then hitCos = 1 end
-		if simulatePenDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("qdist (0) = " ..tostring(qdist))
-			DebugPrint("Pre Pen Loop")
-		end
-		while projectile.momentum > expended and qdist > 0 and projectile.active and air == false do
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Pen Loop Start with parameters: Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " Expended = " ..tostring(expended).. " MaxMomentum = " ..tostring(projectile.maxmomentum))
-				DebugPrint("qdist (1) = " ..tostring(qdist))
-				DebugPrint("Penned Shapes = ")
-				DebugPrint(pennedShapes)
-			end
-			
-			rejectedShapes = pennedShapes
-			
-			local curShape = lastHitshapes[#lastHitshapes]
-			local _, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(curShape, pos)
-			hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-			if VecLength(normal)==0 then hitCos = 1 end
-			local armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos, true))*10)/hitCos
-			if GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(curShape))) == "wheel" and armorval > 10000 then armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hardmetal)*10)/hitCos end
-			-- RHA (rolled homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-			local rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Starting Direction = " ..VecStr(dir))
-				DebugPrint("nRHA   (1): "..nRHA)
-				DebugPrint("rawRHA (1): "..rawRHA)
-				DebugPrint("nCHA   (1): "..nCHA)
-				DebugPrint("hitCos (1): "..hitCos)
-				DebugPrint("curShape (1): "..curShape)
-				DebugPrint("Hit Material   (1): "..tostring(info.mat.hitPosMat))
-			end
-
-			-- Only used for calculating ricochet
-			armorval = math.max(math.max(nRHA, armorval), nCHA) -- Thickness is not calculated here unfortunately, so assumption of at least 1 vox is made
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("ARMORVAL: "..armorval)
-			end
-			
-			
-			-- Impact Angle
-			local dot = VecDot(lastNormal, VecScale(dir, projectileSpeed))
-			local hitangle = 180-math.acos(dot/projectileSpeed)*57.3
-			-- if math.abs(dot)>0 and VecLength(lastNormal)>0 then
-				-- hitCos = math.abs(dot/projectileSpeed)
-			-- --else
-				-- -- DebugPrint("Some weird shit with hitCos calc")
-				-- -- DebugPrint(VecLength(lastNormal))
-				-- -- DebugPrint(math.abs(dot))
-				-- -- DebugPrint(VecLength(dir))
-				-- -- DebugPrint(projectileSpeed)
-			-- end
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("hitCos = " ..tostring(hitCos))
-				DebugPrint("hit angle = " ..tostring(hitangle))
-				DebugPrint("armorval = " ..tostring(armorval))
-			end
-			
-			 -- Redirect projectile based on penetrative ability and angle of impact
-			local momentum = math.max((projectile.momentum-expended),1)
-			
-			if lastHitshapes[#lastHitshapes-1] ~= curShape or #lastHitshapes < 2 then
-				
-				local a = 2 + 40*math.exp(-.002*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass-40)^2) -- Fudge coefficient (higher = higher bounce chance)
-
-				local f = a*(1-hitCos^2)*projStats.ricochetmultiplier*(armorval/momentum)^2
-				local bouncecoef = math.clamp((1-math.exp(-f))^2   +   .002*projStats.ricochetmultiplier^2/hitCos^2, 0, 1)
-				-- DebugPrint("F:    "..f)
-				-- DebugPrint("BCF:  "..bouncecoef)
-				-- DebugPrint("SPD:  "..projectileSpeed)
-				-- DebugPrint("MTM:  "..momentum)
-				local randomizedNormal = VecNormalize(VecAdd(info.normal,RSV(bouncecoef*.4)))
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(randomizedNormal, -2*dot*bouncecoef))
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, 1 - .2 * bouncecoef^2)
-				-- SETTING NEW DIR
-				local ricdir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-				local ricProjectileSpeed = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Bounce Coefficient: "..bouncecoef)
-				end
-				DevPrint("Angle of Impact: "..hitangle)
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Cosine of Impact: "..hitCos)
-				end
-				local hitcheck = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(lastHitPos, VecScale(dir, -.01)), ricdir, 4*exitedArmorBlockDist)
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Ricochet Calculation")
-					DebugPrint("Ricochet Dot = " ..tostring(math.abs(VecDot(dir, ricdir))).. " Ricochet Shatter Threshold = " ..tostring(0.7).. " Projectile Mass = " ..tostring(projectile.mass).. " Bouncecoef = " ..tostring(bouncecoef).. " Proj Speed = " ..ricProjectileSpeed)
-				end
-				if math.abs(VecDot(dir, ricdir)) < 0.7 and ptype ~= "hesh" then -- Fragment rounds that get redirected too violently
-					DevPrint("\nROUND FRAGMENTED")
-					DevPrint("Expended (equivalent RHA): "..expended)
-					DevPrint("RHA Value of plate that caused frag: "..nRHA.."\n")
-					local fpos = VecCopy(lastHitPos)
-					-- Applying force to impact body
-					ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, fpos, VecScale(dir, math.min(35*(momentum/projectile.maxmomentum)*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5)))
-					-- DebugPrint(info.hitbody)
-					-- DebugPrint(math.min(35*(momentum*projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 5*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.8))
-
-					dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("Ricochet (1)")
-					end
-					if momentum > MIN_RICOCHET_FRAG_MOMENTUM then
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Fragmented")
-						end
-						local fragVel = VecScale(VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(lastNormal, -2*dot)), .5)
-						local spallamount = math.random(5,math.clamp(2*projectile.caliber^.5,5,30))
-						local minpen = .5
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Spall Function Called 1164")
-						end
-						Spall(pos, fragVel, spallamount, .7, math.clamp(.1*momentum/spallamount, minpen, MAX_SPALL_PEN/5), projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Ricochet (2)")
-						end
-					end
-					
-					projectile.pos = VecCopy(lastHitPos)
-					projectile.detonate = true
-					projectile.active = false
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, lastHitPos, pos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-					break
-				end
-				if not hitcheck and projectile.ricochetCount < RICOCHET_COUNT_MAX then
-					DevPrint("\nROUND RICOCHETED")
-					projectile.ricochetCount = projectile.ricochetCount + 1
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("Ricochet (3)")
-					end
-					local fpos = VecCopy(lastHitPos)
-					if(fpos==nil) then 
-						-- DebugPrint("fpos undefined")
-						
-					end
-					-- Applying force to impact body
-					ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, fpos, VecScale(dir, math.min(15*((projectile.momentum*dot/projectileSpeed)/projectile.maxmomentum)*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5)))
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint(info.hitbody)
-						DebugPrint(math.min(15*(momentum*projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 5*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.8))
-					end
-
-					dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-					-- Subtract momentum proportional to change in angle
-					--DebugPrint("Fraction expended in ricochet: "..math.abs(math.acos(VecDot(lastNormal,dir))).."\n")
-					projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*math.abs(1-math.abs(math.acos(VecDot(lastNormal,dir))))
-					--DebugPrint("Ricochet 3 Projectile Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-
-					-- Armor impact sound
-					-- if RHA > 0 then -- and hitvehicle
-					if projectile.caliber >= RICOCHET_CAL_THRESHOLD then
-						PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Impact_Shell_Ricochet_Close, info.newpos, 20)
-						PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Impact_Shell_Ricochet_Dist, nil, 5, VecLength(VecSub(info.newpos),GetPlayerCameraTransform().pos))
-						-- DebugPrint("Ricochet Sound (1)")
-					else
-						PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Impact_Bullet_Ricochet_Close, info.newpos, 5)
-						-- DebugPrint("Ricochet Sound (2)")
-					end
-					
-					projectile.pos = VecCopy(lastHitPos)
-					
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, lastHitPos, pos, (projectile.momentum-expended)/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-					break
-				-- elseif projectile.ricochetCount < RICOCHET_COUNT_MAX then
-					-- -- Only copies ricochet direction if the limit on ricochets is not reached, otherwise it would ricochet regardless of the previous check
-					-- dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-					-- if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						-- DebugPrint("Ricochet (4)")
-					-- end
-				end
-				
-				-- Set new direction as "Ricochet Direction"
-				-- This code only runs if something was found in the direction of the ricochet within 4 voxels
-				-- Previously this was gated behind the ricochet limit, but that doesn't make sense due to it not being a true ricochet
-				
-				dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Ricochet Direction (5) = " ..VecStr(dir))
-				end
-			end
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Ricochet Calculation End")
-			end
-			
-			-- Set the radius of HardMetal penetration
-			-- This was originally done in the MakeHole() loop, but I moved it here so that it could be used for radius finding functions
-			local projRadius = math.max(projectile.caliber*0.001,.1)
-			if projectileSpeed*projectile.mass < 10 or ptype == "bullet" then
-				projRadius = math.max(projectile.caliber*0.001,.003)
-			end
-			
-			
-			-- Sets the hole increment to the projectiles smallest radius
-			-- This should ensure that the holes mostly overlap and dont lead to a beaded effect
-			holeIncrement = math.max(projRadius/2, 0.1)
-			
-			local hitp, hitd, norm, hitshape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-			
-			pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, hitd))
-			qdist = qdist - hitd
-			
-			if not hitp then
-				air = true
-			end
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("hit distance = " ..tostring(hitd).. " hit shape = " ..tostring(hitshape))
-				DebugPrint("new position = " ..VecStr(pos))
-			end
-			
-			-- Calculates the Cosine of the hit using the normal vector and shell direction
-			_, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(curShape, pos)
-			hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-			
-			-- If the normal is 0, 0, 0 then that means that it is a direct perpendicular hit and the cosine should be 1
-			-- That basically means that the ratio of rawRHA to nRHA is 1:1
```
