-			-- We divide by the cosine to get the Hypotenuse, and use the rawRHA value as the adjacent
-			-- This gives us the proper ratio for the hit angle
-			
-			if VecLength(normal)==0 then hitCos = 1 end
-			-- Calculates armour of unarmoured parts via the strength of the material
-			armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos, true))*10)/hitCos
-			if GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(curShape))) == "wheel" and armorval > 10000 then armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hardmetal)*10)/hitCos end
-			-- RHA (rolled homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-			rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-			--DebugPrint("Length of Normal Vector = " ..VecLength(lastNormal))
-			--DebugPrint("Normal Vector = " ..VecStr(lastNormal))
-			DevPrint("nRHA   (2): "..nRHA)
-			DevPrint("rawRHA (2): "..rawRHA)
-			-- DevPrint("hitCos (2): "..hitCos)
-			-- Calculates the hitangle
-			hitangle = math.acos(hitCos)*57.3
-			DevPrint("Angle of Impact After Redirect: "..hitangle)
-			
-			-- Gets the highest armour value out of RHA, CHA, and the base material value
-			-- The base material value is multiplied by 10x because the base value is too low for a full voxel
-			-- this is then divided by the cosine of the hit angle to give the line-of-sight thickness
-			-- the line below gets the highest number out of the three and sets that as the new armour value
-			-- overmatchArmorval only takes the raw non angled values, with exception of the material strength
-			
-			overmatchArmorval = math.max(math.max(rawRHA, armorval), nCHA)
-			armorval = math.max(math.max(nRHA, armorval), nCHA)
-			local distToAir = 0
-			local penPos = VecCopy(pos)
-			local thickness = 0
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("New Direction = " ..VecStr(dir))
-				DebugPrint("nRHA         (2): "..nRHA)
-				DebugPrint("rawRHA       (2): "..rawRHA)
-				DebugPrint("nCHA         (2): "..nCHA)
-				DebugPrint("hitCos       (2): "..hitCos)
-				DebugPrint("curShape     (2): "..curShape)
-				DebugPrint("Hit Material (2): "..tostring(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos, true)))
-				DebugPrint("HitCos       (2):" ..tostring(hitCos))
-				DebugPrint("Hit angle    (2):" ..tostring(hitangle))
-				DebugPrint("Armorval     (2):" ..tostring(armorval))
-				DebugPrint("Momentum     (2):" ..tostring(projectile.momentum-expended))
-			end
-			
-			local penetration = false
-			local nERA = 0
-			local nERAep = 0
-			if projectile.momentum > ERA_MOMENTUM_THRESHOLD then
-				if HasTag(curShape, "ERA") then
-					nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "ERA")) or 0
-					nERA = nERAep/hitCos
-				elseif GetTagValue(curShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-					nERA = 250
-				end
-				DevPrint("nERA   (2): "..nERA)
-			end
-			if nERA > 0 then
-				local holeamount = 0.1
-				MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-				VisualizeExplosion(pos, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-				RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-				RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-				expended = expended + nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)
-			end
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Penetration Calculation")
-			end
-			-- If the projectile can penetrate the shape, overmatch the shape, or has already penetrated the shape, then let it pass through
-			if projectile.momentum >= armorval or (projectile.caliber > (overmatchArmorval*3.5) and nRHA > 0) or table.contains(pennedShapes, curShape) then
-				local overmatchCheck = false
-				if projectile.caliber > (overmatchArmorval*3.5) and nRHA > 0 then
-					overmatchCheck = true
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("Plate Overmatched! Caliber = " ..tostring(projectile.caliber).. " Armour value * 3.5 = " ..tostring(overmatchArmorval*3.5))
-					end
-				end
-				penetration = true
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Penetrated")
-				end
-				
-				-- Get the distance until another shape is found. if no shapes are found it returns the max query dist (qdist)
-				-- This function ignores all penetrated shapes, as they are also being penetrated with this loop
-				
-				RejectBodies(projectile)
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-				distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-				if distShape == curShape then
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), dir, qdist)
-				end
-				
-				-- Get the distance to the hit shape from the distance value in the previous function.
-				-- This is to ensure that we are only measuring the thickness of the hit shape, whilst ignoring all other shapes around it
-				local distHit2 = 0 
-				local distDist2 = 0
-				local distShape = 0
-				if distHit and distShape ~= curShape then
-					QueryRejectShape(distShape)
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					distHit2, distDist2, _, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-				end
-				
-				-- Set the maximum theoretical distance to the difference between the two previous raycasts.
-				-- This distance is used for non RHA calculations
-				local maxDist = distDist - distDist2
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("maxDist/Thickness set to " ..tostring(maxDist).. " dist1 = " ..tostring(distDist).. " dist2 = " ..tostring(distDist2))
-				end
-				
-				-- Calculate the theoretical thickness for the distance detected, this is for CHA and unarmoured parts
-				local armourThickness = armorval*(maxDist*10)
-				
-				-- If 0 RHA was detected then rawRHA will equal 0
-				-- If that is the case then it means that either CHA was used, or the shape is unarmoured
-				-- Either way the armourThickness is used to calculate the max distance that the projectile can actually penetrate into the shape
-				-- CHA and Unarmoured shapes use true line-of-sight thickness 
-				-- Whereas RHA uses a single armour value for the entire plate and uses the angle to determine angular thickness
-				
-				if nRHA == 0 then
-					thickness = math.min(((projectile.momentum - expended)/armorval)/10, maxDist)
-					if thickness > 0 then
-						table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-						table.insert(rejectedShapes, curShape)
-					end
-					
-					-- Calculate the max amount of armour that the shell can go through, set the thickness to this
-					-- Then remove the penned armour from the penetration. any inaccuracies are remedied later
-					expended = expended + ((thickness*10)*armorval)
-					
-				else
-					thickness = maxDist
-					-- Check that this isnt the same shape that we penned last pass
-					if not table.contains(pennedShapes, curShape) then
-						table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-						if overmatchCheck then
-							expended = expended + overmatchArmorval
-						else
-							expended = expended + armorval
-						end
-					end
-					table.insert(rejectedShapes, curShape)
-				end
-				
-				-- Checking around the hit area for weaker shapes
-				-- If the found shapes are less than or equal to the penetrated armour value then they are rejected as penetrated
-				-- This ensures that hitting an area with lots of overlapping parts wont sap all of the pen from the round instantly
-				-- Hitting where two plates join should also be more consistent,
-				-- as if you hit the thicker plate then you won't get caught by the weaker one.
-				
-				RejectBodies(projectile)
-				QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-				QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-				local topArmorVal = armorval
-				local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-				while qHit do
-					QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-					local qHitCos = math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir))
-					local _, qRHA, qCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, qHitCos)
-					local holearmorval1 = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/qHitCos or 0
-					if holearmorval1 == 1000 then holearmorval1 = 0.4 end
-					holearmorval1 = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval1, qCHA*math.max(thickness*10, 1)))
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval1).. " Penned Armour Value = " ..tostring(armorval).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-						DebugPrint("Holearmorval = " ..tostring(holearmorval1).. " qRHA= " ..tostring(qRHA).. " qCHA = " ..tostring(qCHA).. " qCHA Modified for Thickness = " ..tostring(qCHA*math.max(thickness*10, 1)))
-					end
-					if topArmorVal >= holearmorval1 then
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Added shape " ..tostring(qShape).. " to hole thickness puncher")
-						end
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-					elseif (projectile.momentum - expended) > holearmorval1 then
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-						pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-						expended = expended + (holearmorval1 - topArmorVal)
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Added shape " ..tostring(qShape).. " to hole thickness puncher and added " ..tostring(holearmorval1 - topArmorVal).. " to expended for a total of " ..tostring(expended))
-						end
-						topArmorVal = holearmorval1
-					else
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("Hole Thickness Nonpen!")
-						end
-						break
-					end
-				end
-				
-				
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Ended Hole Thickness Shape Checker")
-					DebugPrint("Calculated Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Penetration = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum - (expended - ((thickness*10)*armorval))).. " ArmourThickness = " ..tostring(armourThickness).. " qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " armorval = " ..tostring(armorval).. " dist1 = " ..tostring(distDist).. " dist2 = " ..tostring(distDist2).. " maxDist = " ..tostring(maxDist))
-				end
-				
-				local nHoles = math.max(thickness/holeIncrement, 0)
-				
-				nHoles = math.ceil(nHoles)
-				if nHoles == 1 then nHoles = 2 end
-				-- Rounding the number of holes up
-				-- This may cause problems due to unintentional hole creation, but this should be mitigated by other changes
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Set Holes to " ..nHoles.. " Thickess = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Hole Increment = " ..holeIncrement)
-				end
-				
-				holes = {}
-				holeMaterials = {}
-				-- The Hole Puncher --
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Penetration check passed")
-				end
-				for i = 1, nHoles do
-					-- If the hole is the first one then hardcode it to the hit position to prevent unintended consequences
-					local hPos=VecCopy(pos)
-					if i > 1 then
-						if holeIncrement*(i-1) > thickness then
-							hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, thickness))
-						else
-							hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, holeIncrement*(i-1)))
-						end
-					end
-					
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("HoleGen No." ..tostring(#holes+1).. " Hole Position = " ..VecStr(hPos).. " Proj Radius = " ..projRadius)
-					end
-
-					-- The Radius Checker --
-					
-					-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-					-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-					
-					
-					rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = curShape
-					QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-					local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-					local topArmorVal = armorval
-					while qHit do
-						QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-						qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-						local qHitCos = math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir))
-						local _, qRHA, qCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, qHitCos)
-						local holearmorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/qHitCos or 0
-						if holearmorval == 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-						holearmorval = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval, qCHA*math.max((thickness-(#holes*holeIncrement))*10, 1)))
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(momentum - expended).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-							DebugPrint("Holearmorval = " ..tostring(holearmorval1).. " qRHA= " ..tostring(qRHA).. " qCHA = " ..tostring(qCHA).. " qCHA Modified for Thickness = " ..tostring(qCHA*math.max((thickness-(#holes*holeIncrement))*10, 1)))
-						end
-						if topArmorVal >= holearmorval then
-							if simulatePenDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("Added shape " ..tostring(qShape).. " to hole thickness puncher")
-							end
-							rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-						elseif (projectile.momentum - expended) > holearmorval then
-							rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-							pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-							expended = expended + (holearmorval - topArmorVal)
-							if simulatePenDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("Added shape " ..tostring(qShape).. " to hole thickness puncher and added " ..tostring(holearmorval - topArmorVal).. " to expended for a total of " ..tostring(expended))
-							end
-							topArmorVal = holearmorval
-						else
-							if simulatePenDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("Hole Thickness Nonpen!")
-							end
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					-- DebugPrint("Ended Hole Radius Shape Checker")
-					local matShape = curShape
-					local mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, hPos, true)
-					if mat == "" or mat == nil then
-						local matHit, _, _, matShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-						if simulatePenDebugLines and matHit then
-							DebugPrint("Hole Puncher found nil material and hit shape " ..tostring(matShape).. " instead")
-						end
-						if table.contains(rejectedShapes, matShape) or matShape == curShape then
-							mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(matShape, hPos, true)
-							if simulatePenDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("Hole Puncher found shape '" ..matShape.. "' was penned/rejected and was of material " ..tostring(mat))
-							end
-						else
-							thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-							if simulatePenDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("Hole Puncher found material '" ..tostring(mat).. "' and no hit shapes within radius")
-								DebugPrint("Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-							end
-							if nCHA ~= 0 then
-								expended = expended - nCHA*(nHoles - #holes)
-								if simulatePenDebugLines then
-									DebugPrint("Hit air or non-penned shape. Invalid CHA recovered of amount " ..tostring(nCHA*(nholes - #holes)))
-								end
-							end
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					
-					
-					
-					if (mat == "heavymetal" and GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(curShape))) ~= "wheel" and GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(matShape))) ~= "wheel") or mat == "rock" or mat == "" or tostring(mat) == "none" then
-						thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-						if simulatePenDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(1) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-						end
-						break
-					-- elseif nRHA == 0 and nCHA == 0 then
-						-- local matArmourVal = ((GetMaterialStrength(mat)*10)/hitCos)/(holeIncrement*10)
-						-- --DebugPrint("Hole Hit Material " ..tostring(mat).. " with armour value of " ..tostring(matArmourVal).. " and penetration of " ..tostring(momentum - expended))
-						-- if (momentum - expended) > matArmourVal then
-							-- expended = expended + matArmourVal
-						-- else
-							-- thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-							-- --DebugPrint("(2) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-							-- break
-						-- end
-					end
-					
-					table.insert(holes, hPos)
-					table.insert(holeMaterials, mat)
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("nHole Generated " ..tostring(#holes).. " / " ..tostring(nHoles))
-						DebugPrint("Hole Material = " ..tostring(mat))
-					end
-					
-					-- The HoleMaterials variable used to be used to make sure that Hardmetal wasnt broken by non hardmetal shapes being impacted
-					-- However the new system does not require it
-					-- It may still be useful though, so it remains
-				end
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Penetration check ended")
-				end
-				local Holecount = 0
-				local h = #holes
-				local holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.13+math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0,.04),.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m for weak materials
-				local holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.12,.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m for medium materials
-				if projectileSpeed*projectile.mass < 10 then
-					holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.07,.5)
-					holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.065,.5)
-				end
-				
-				-- DrawShapeLine Hole Puncher
-				-- This puts holes through HardMetal, replaces the older system due to being more reliable and performance friendly
-				-- Has its annoying quirks, but is undeniably better than the older system in terms of reliability
-				
-				-- Sets the brush as a sphere with material 0. this material removes voxels
-				-- The radius is set to 10x the projRadius variable due to the brush being in voxels, but the radius being in meters.
-				-- 1 Voxel = 0.1m or 1m = 10 Voxels. So to convert to voxels you multiply the meters by 10
-				
-				MakeHardMetalHoles(rejectedShapes, projRadius, holes)
-				
-				-- Hole Puncher --
-				-- Iterates through all marked holes, using MakeHole at each point and then painting where the hole was made
-				-- Cannot break HardMetal, that is handled by the DrawShapeLine Holepuncher
-				
-				for k = 1,h do
-					
-					Holecount = MakeHole(holes[k], holeamount, holeamount2, _, true)
-					
-					local holePaintRadius = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0.09,0.7)
-					local holePaintChance = 1
-					if ptype == "bullet" then
-						holePaintRadius = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0.05,0.7)
-						holePaintChance = 0.5
-					end
-					local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-					
-					if not HasTag(info.hitbody, 'bone') then
-						if holeMaterials[k]=="metal" or holeMaterials[k]=="hardmetal" or holeMaterials[k]=="heavymetal" then
-							CustomPaintRGBA(holes[k], holePaintRadius, c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), holePaintChance)
-						elseif holeMaterials[k]=="glass" then
-							CustomPaintRGBA(holes[k], holePaintRadius, .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), holePaintChance)
-						else
-							Paint(holes[k], holePaintRadius, "explosion", holePaintChance)
-						end
-					end
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3))
-					end
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+info.frameduration,holes[k],nil,nil)
-				end
-			else
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Non Penetrated due to armorval of " ..tostring(armorval).. " exceeding penetration of " ..tostring(projectile.momentum-expended))
-				end
-				thickness = 0
-				expended = expended + armorval
-				-- Sets the "hole position" to the penetration position to initialise it just in case
-				-- The old system from Tess always ran the hole puncher regardless of penetration so this variable was initialised there originally
-				local hPos = VecCopy(pos)
-				projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-			end
-			
-			penPos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-			
-			local redirectedDir = VecCopy(dir)
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Dir = " ..VecStr(dir))
-				DebugPrint("RedirectedDir = " ..VecStr(redirectedDir))
-			end
-			
-			-- Post penetration checks --
-			
-			-- Set the new penetration position to be at the end of the thickness
-			local oldPos = VecCopy(pos)
-			pos = VecCopy(penPos)
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("qdist (2) = " ..tostring(qdist).. " qdist - thickness = " ..tostring(qdist - thickness))
-			end
-			if thickness <= 0 then qdist = 0 end
-			qdist = qdist - thickness
-			
-			dir = VecCopy(redirectedDir)
-			
-			-- Check for a post penetration hit
-			--QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-			local checkHit, checkDist, checkNorm, checkShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, exitedArmorBlockDist/hitCos)
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("curShape = " ..tostring(curShape).. " checkShape = " ..tostring(checkShape).. " thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " penetration = " ..tostring(penetration))
-			end
-			-- If it finds something, then set that as the new next shape
-			-- else, its hit air and the data can be sent back to the projectile handler
-			
-			table.insert(lastHitshapes, curShape)
-			
-			-- If the distance to the shape detected at the start was greater than 0.1 then assume that the previous plate was exited
-			
-			if checkHit then
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Original Shape = " ..tostring(curShape).. " Hit Shape = " ..tostring(checkShape))
-				end
-				if (checkShape == curShape and thickness < 0.01) or (penetration == false and checkShape == curShape) then
-					if simulatePenDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("Break projectile due to thickness of " ..tostring(thickness).. " and Checkshape/CurrentShape = " ..tostring(checkShape).. " / " ..tostring(curShape).. " or penetration = false? " ..tostring(penetration))
-					end
-					projectile.detonate = true
-					projectile.active = false
-				end
-				curShape = checkShape
-				_, _, checkNorm = GetShapeClosestPoint(curShape, pos)
-				hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(checkNorm, dir))
-				rejectedShapes = {}
-			else
-				air = true
-				pennedShapes = {}
-				rejectedShapes = {}
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Found Air Post Penetration")
-				end
-			end
-			
-			if table.contains(rejectedShapes, checkShape) == false or air == true then
-				local expendedDuringThisPen = expended - lastExpendedVal
-				lastExpendedVal = expended
-
-				local oldDir = VecCopy(dir)
-				redirectedDir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir, VecScale(randomizedNormal,-1), AP_RICOCHET_AFTER_PENETRATION_MULT*expendedDuringThisPen/projectile.momentum))
-				local dotWithOldDir = math.abs(VecDot(redirectedDir, oldDir))
-				projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*math.abs(dotWithOldDir)
-				if simulatePenDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Exited armour block momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-					DebugPrint(dotWithOldDir)
-					DebugPrint("Dir (1) = " ..VecStr(oldDir))
-					DebugPrint("RedirectedDir (1) = " ..VecStr(redirectedDir))
-				end
-
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(redirectedDir, VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)*dotWithOldDir)
-				projStats.drag = projStats.drag/math.clamp(dotWithOldDir,.1,1)
-			end
-			
-			--DebugPrint("Insert " ..tostring(lastHitshapes[#lastHitshapes]).. " as next hit shape")
-			
-			-- DebugPrint("Copying Position Vector")
-			info.newpos = VecCopy(pos)
-			-- DebugPrint("Copy Projectile Position Vector")
-			projectile.pos = VecCopy(pos)
-			--DebugPrint("Projectile Pos = " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-			-- DebugPrint("Logging Expended")
-			info.expended = expended
-			-- DebugPrint("Setting Scaled Impulse")
-			info.normal = checkNorm
-			local scaled_impulse = math.min(35*(expended/projectile.maxmomentum)*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5)
-			
-			local tracerfires = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires)
-			
-			if projectile.tracer == true and randomFloat(0, 100) == 1 and projectile.mass < 0.3 and tracerfires then
-				SpawnFire(projectile.pos)
-			end
-			-- Spall Spawning --
-			
-			-- Set the spall spawn position to the end of the thickness
-			-- Since the thickness is recalculated if it hits an air pocket then this will always spawn at the end of penetration
-			local spallPos = VecCopy(pos)
-			
-			-- if the shell runs out of momentum, and there is nothing in front of it, then spawn spall
-			
-			if expended >= projectile.momentum then
-				--DebugPrint("Ran out of momentum")
-				--DevPrint("\nRAN OUT OF MOMENTUM")
-				--DevPrint("Expended (equivalent RHA): "..expended.."\n")
-
-				if momentum > MIN_RICOCHET_FRAG_MOMENTUM then
-					--DebugPrint("Fragmented")
-					local spallamount = math.min(math.random(5,math.clamp(2*projectile.caliber^.5,5,30)), projectile.spallamount)
-					local minpen = .5
-					--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called 1618")
-					Spall(spallPos, VecScale(VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(lastNormal, -2*dot)), .5), spallamount, .5, math.clamp(.1*momentum/spallamount, minpen, MAX_SPALL_PEN/5), projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-				end
-
-			-- SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, lastHitPos, pos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-				projectile.detonate = true
-				projectile.active = false
-				projectile.momentum = 0
-				break
-			elseif projectile.momentum > expended then
-			
-				-- Clamps the spall amount to a minimum of 2, and a maximum of the projectiles set spall amount
-				-- The pre-clamp value is 3% of the set spall amount, multiplied by the amount of armour penetrated in total, multiplied by the sum of the remaining penetration divided by the max pen of the shell
-				-- The minimum pen of the spall is set to the remaining penetration, or 2, whichever is greater.
-				
-				local spallamount = math.clamp(0.03*projectile.spallamount*expended*momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, 2, projectile.spallamount)
-				local minpen = math.max((projectile.momentum-expended)/10, 2)
-			
-				-- If the projectile has not yet run out of momentum then spawn spall
-				
-				--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called 1642")
-				Spall(spallPos, VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity,.4), spallamount, projectile.spallangle, math.clamp(1.5*expended/spallamount, minpen, MAX_SPALL_PEN),projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-			end
-
-			-- DebugPrint("Setting Last hit pos")
-			lastHitPos = VecCopy(pos)
-			-- DebugPrint("End Dir = " ..VecStr(dir))
-	
-			-- Applying force to impact body
-			-- DebugPrint("Applying Force to Impact Body")
-			ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, pos, VecScale(info.dir,scaled_impulse))
-			-- DebugPrint(math.min(35*(expended*projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5))
-
-			-- Simulating damaged penetrator - mainly for subcaliber projectiles
-			--DebugPrint("Pre Damaged Penetrator = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-			-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 1st part = " ..tostring(1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber))
-			-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 2nd part = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0)))
-			-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 3rd part = " ..tostring(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75))
-			-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 4th part = " ..tostring(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum)
-			-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator Complete = " ..tostring((1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber)*(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum))
-			if air then
-				projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum - (1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber)*(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum
-				--DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, math.max((projectile.momentum-expended)/projectile.momentum, 0.01))
-			end
-			projectile.momentum = math.max(projectile.momentum - expended, 0)
-			--DebugPrint("Final Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-			
-			momentum = projectile.momentum
-			expended = 0
-			
-			if simulatePenDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("End SimulatePenetration Pen Loop. Final Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " projectile active? " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-			end
-		end
-	elseif not projectile.detonate then
-		projectile.active = false
-		if simulatePenDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Projectile Inactive, qdist= " ..tostring(qdist).. " Hit air? " ..tostring(air).. " Projectile momentum = " ..projectile.momentum)
-		end
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.type == "hesh" or projectile.type == "he" then
-		projectile.detonate = true
-		projectile.active = true
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.incendiary == true and randomFloat() >= 0.5 then SpawnFire(projectile.pos) end
-	if simulatePenDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("End pencheck, active = " ..tostring(projectile.active).. " qdist= " ..tostring(qdist).. " Hit air? " ..tostring(air).. " Projectile momentum = " ..projectile.momentum)
-	end
-	if not HasTag(info.hitbody, 'bone') then
-		VisualizeImpact(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, ptype, .1*projectile.caliber^.5*(.1*projectileSpeed)^.5, info.mat.hitPosMat, info.mat.r, info.mat.g, info.mat.b, info.mat.a)
-	else
-		VisualizeImpact(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, ptype, .1*projectile.caliber^.5*(.1*projectileSpeed)^.5, info.mat.hitPosMat, .55, .10, .10, info.mat.a)
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.caliber < RICOCHET_CAL_THRESHOLD then
-		if HasTag(curShape, "RHA") or HasTag(curShape, "CHA")then 
-			local RHA = 10
-		end
-		PlayMaterialHitSound(info.mat.hitPosMat, projectile.pos, projectile.momentum, RHA)
-	end
-	local scaled_impulse = math.min(35*(1*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5), 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5)
-	ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, projectile.pos, VecScale(info.dir,scaled_impulse))
-	
-	if not HasTag(info.hitbody, 'bone') then
-		if info.mat.hitPosMat=="metal" or info.mat.hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or info.mat.hitPosMat=="heavymetal" then
-			local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-			CustomPaintRGBA(projectile.pos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.09,0.7), c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-		elseif info.mat.hitPosMat=="glass" then
-			CustomPaintRGBA(projectile.pos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.09,0.7), .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-		else
-			Paint(projectile.pos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.09,0.7), "explosion")
-		end
-	end
-	if simulatePenDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Ended")
-	end
-end
-
-function CalcCrushFactor(projectile, info)
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-	-- Impact Angle
-	local dot = VecDot(info.normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local hitCos = math.abs(dot/projectileSpeed)
-
-	local f = math.exp((1.25-hitCos)^6)
-	f = 1+(f-1)*math.clamp(info.RHA/40,0,1)
-
-	--DebugPrint("Crush Factor = " ..tostring(f))
-
-	return f
-end
-
-function getHEATmaxdist(projectile, material)
-
-	-- Calculate Coefficient for Maximum projectile depth
-	
-	local projCoef = 8
-	
-	if projectile.caliber < 70 then
-		projCoef = 8
-	elseif projectile.caliber < 110 then
-		if projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-			projCoef = 12
-		elseif projectile.type == "t-heat" then
-			projCoef = 16
-		else
-			projCoef = 8
-		end
-	
-	else
-		if projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-			projCoef = 12
-		elseif projectile.type == "t-heat" then
-			projCoef = 16
-		else
-			projCoef = 12
-		end
-	end
-	
-	--Get Material Coefficient
-	
-	local matCoef = 1
-	
-	if material == "" or material == nil or material == "air" then
-		matCoef = 0.1
-	elseif material == "hardmetal" then
-		matCoef = 0.45 -- Guessed Coefficient, as there isnt a listed one for armour
-	else
-		matCoef = (1 - GetMaterialStrength(material))
-	end
-	
-	local jetDensity = 8950 --kg/m3. This stat is for copper
-	
-	local matDensity = GetMaterialDensity(material)
-	
-	if material == nil or material == "air" or material == "" then matDensity = 1.27 end
-	
-	
-	-- Hard Setting the material to air. this is so that the jet can travel the maximum length possible
-	matCoef = 0.1
-	matDensity = 1.27
-
-	
-	qdist = (projectile.caliber*projCoef*matCoef*math.sqrt(jetDensity/matDensity))*0.001
-	
-	-- DebugPrint("Heat MaxDist Calculated as " ..tostring(qdist).. " Caliber = " ..tostring(projectile.caliber).. " Projectile Coefficient = " ..tostring(projCoef).. " Material Coefficient = " ..tostring(matCoef).. " Material Density = " ..tostring(matDensity).. " Material = " ..tostring(material))
-	
-	return qdist
-end
-
-function SimulateHEAT(initPos, info, projectile, caliber, explosivepayload, spallamount, spallangle, shrapnelamount, fuzetype, frametime, frameduration)
-	local HEATDebugLines = false -- Enables or Disables DebugPrint text for SimulateHeat
-	local dir = info.dir or Vec(0, 1, 0)
-	dir = VecNormalize(dir)
-	if HEATDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateHEAT Called!")
-		DebugPrint("heatDist         : " ..tostring(projectile.heatdist))
-		DebugPrint("maxDist          : " ..tostring(projectile.maxdist))
-		DebugPrint("maxmomentum      : " ..tostring(projectile.maxmomentum))
-		DebugPrint("momentum         : " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-		DebugPrint("caliber          : " ..tostring(caliber))
-		DebugPrint("explosivepayload : " ..tostring(explosivepayload))
-		DebugPrint("active?          : " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-		DebugPrint("info.shape       : " ..tostring(info.shape))
-		DebugPrint("info.RHA         : " ..tostring(info.RHA))
-	end
-	
-		
-	if projectile.lasthitpos ~= nil and projectile.lasthitpos ~= "" then
-		local airDist = math.sqrt((projectile.lasthitpos[1] - initPos[1])^2 + (projectile.lasthitpos[2] - initPos[2])^2 + (projectile.lasthitpos[3] - initPos[3])^2)
-		projectile.heatdist = math.max(projectile.heatdist - airDist, 0)
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("HEAT distance set to " ..tostring(projectile.heatdist))
-			DebugPrint("HEAT distance from last hit calculated at " ..airDist)
-		end
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.heatdist <= 0 then
-		SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, initPos, initPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-		projectile.active = false
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("SimulateHEAT returned due to projectile.heatdist being less than 1")
-		end
-		return
-	end
-	
-	if not projectile.active then
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("SimulateHEAT returned due to projectile.active = false")
-		end
-		return 
-	end
-	
-	local normal = info.normal
-	local curShape = info.shape
-	
-	local maxmomentum = projectile.maxmomentum
-	local momentum = projectile.momentum
-	local projectileSpeed = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	local projStats = deepcopy(shellStats["heat"])
-	local expended = 0
-	local pos = VecCopy(initPos)
-	local heatdropoff = math.max(.3+(2*maxmomentum)/(180+maxmomentum),maxmomentum*0.0015)
-	local forceBreak = false
-	local qdist = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))*GetTimeStep()
-	if qdist > projectile.heatdist then qdist = projectile.heatdist end
-	local totalDist = 0
-	
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, initPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-	
-	local shrapAmt = math.max(explosivepayload*30,(momentum/maxmomentum)*25) -- Shrap sent forward to recreate visual effect of HEAT on armor
-	for i = 1, shrapAmt do
-		local sDir = VecNormalize(VecCross(dir,RSV(1)))
-		sDir = VecNormalize(VecAdd(sPos,VecScale(dir,randomFloat(0,.2))))
-		
-		local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(initPos, sDir, caliber*20)
-
-		local hitPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-		if hit and not HasTag(GetShapeBody(shape), "bone") then
-			local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, hitPos, true)
-			if hitPosMat=="metal" or hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or hitPosMat=="heavymetal" then
-				local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-				CustomPaintRGBA(pos, 0.0015, c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-			elseif hitPosMat=="glass" then
-				CustomPaintRGBA(pos, 0.0015, .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-			else
-				Paint(pos, 0.0015, "explosion")
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .5, .7, .7, .7, 1, .3)
-	-- CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .2, .6, .6, .6, 1, .7)
-	-- CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .2, .7, .7, .7, 1, .7)
-	
-	
-	
-	if HEATDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Start SimulateHEAT with Parameters: maxMomentum = " ..tostring(maxmomentum).. " momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " Expended = " ..tostring(expended).. " ShrapAmount = " ..tostring(shrapAmt).. " Direction = " ..VecStr(dir).. " Position = " ..VecStr(pos)) 
-	end
-	--local totalDist = math.abs(VecLength(VecSub(initPos, projectile.pos)))
-	
-	if projectile.momentum - expended > 0 then
-	
-	
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("HEAT Pen loop starting parameters: momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " Expended = " ..tostring(expended).. " Direction = " ..VecStr(dir).. " Position = " ..VecStr(pos)) 
-		end
-		
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		local hit, dist, normal, curShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, 0.1)
-		_, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(curShape, pos)
-		local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-		
-		if hit then
-			pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-		else
-			hitCos = 1
-		end
-		
-		local armorval = 0
-		
-		local air = false
-		
-		local projRadius = math.max(caliber*0.001,.09)
-		local holeIncrement = math.min(projRadius/2, 0.1)
-		
-		local thickness = 0
-		
-		local shapesInRange = {}
-		local pennedShapes = {}
-		local holes = {}
-		local holeMaterials = {}
-		local holeRadius = {}
-		
-		local holepos = {}
-		local holeshape = {}
-		local holematerial = {}
-		
-		while qdist > 0 and momentum > expended and projectile.active == true and not air do
-			
-			if HEATDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Heat Penetration Loop Start. qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " projectile momentum / expended = " ..tostring(momentum).. " / " ..tostring(expended))
-			end
-				
-			local rawRHA, RHA, CHA, CA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-			
-			if HEATDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(HEAT)Raw RHA = " ..tostring(rawRHA).. " nRHA = " ..tostring(RHA).. " CHA = " ..tostring(CHA).. " Composite = " ..tostring(CA).. " HitCos = " ..tostring(hitCos))
-			end
-			
-			if CA > 0 then 
-				armorval = CA
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT) Armour is Composite of thickness " ..tostring(CA))
-				end
-			else
-				armorval = GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos ,true))/hitCos or 0
-				if GetEntityType(GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(curShape))) == "wheel" and armorval > 10000 then armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hardmetal)*10)/hitCos end
-				
-				armorval = math.max(RHA, math.max(armorval, CHA))
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT) Armour is Non Composite of thickness " ..tostring(armorval))
-				end
-			end
-			
-			local nERA = 0
-			local nERAep = 0
-			if HasTag(curShape, "ERA") then
-				nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "ERA")) or 0
-				nERA = nERAep/hitCos
-			elseif GetTagValue(curShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-				nERA = 250
-			end
-			if nERA > 0 then
-				local holeamount = 0.1
-				MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-				VisualizeExplosion(pos, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-				RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-				RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-				expended = expended + nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)ERA of thickness " ..tostring(nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)).. " hit. Added to expended value to total " ..tostring(expended))
-				end
-			end
-			
-			if HEATDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(HEAT)ERA encountered = " ..tostring(nERA))
-				DebugPrint("(HEAT)Armorval = " ..tostring(armorval).. " projectile momentum = "..tostring(momentum).. " expended = " ..tostring(expended))
-				DebugPrint("(HEAT)Current Shape = " ..tostring(curShape).. " Current Material = " ..tostring(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos, true)))
-			end
-			local penetration = false
-			if momentum - expended > armorval then
-				penetration = true
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)Penetrated Shape " ..tostring(curShape).. " last penned shape = " ..tostring(pennedShapes[#pennedShapes]).. " Thickness == " ..tostring(thickness))
-				end
-				
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				RejectBodies(projectile)
-				local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-				while qHit do
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-					local qrawRHA, qRHA, qCHA, qCA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir)))
-					local holearmorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/hitCos or 0
-					if holearmorval >= 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-					if qCA > 0 then 
-						holearmorval = qCA
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)Armour is Composite of thickness " ..tostring(CA))
-						end
-					else
-						holearmorval = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval, qCHA))
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)Armour is Non Composite of thickness " ..tostring(holearmorval))
-						end
-					end
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Penned Armour Value = " ..tostring(armorval).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-					end
-					if armorval >= holearmorval then
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)Added shape to hole thickness puncher")
-						end
-						pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-					elseif armorval < holearmorval and momentum - expended > holearmorval then
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)Penned new shape in hole puncher, set as new armorval")
-						end
-						pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-						--expended = expended + holearmorval
-						armorval = holearmorval
-					else
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Radius Checker)Hole Thickness Nonpen!")
-						end
-						break
-					end
-				end
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)Ended Hole Thickness Shape Checker")
-				end
-				
-				local thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup = {}
-				for i = 1, #pennedShapes do
-					if pennedShapes[i] ~= curShape then
-						thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup[#thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup+1] = pennedShapes[i]
-					end
-				end
-				
-				-- Get the distance until another shape is found. if no shapes are found it returns the max query dist (qdist)
-				-- This function ignores all penetrated shapes, as they are also being penetrated with this loop
-				RejectBodies(projectile)
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-				distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-				if distShape == curShape then
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), dir, qdist)
-				end
-				
-				-- Get the distance to the hit shape from the distance value in the previous function.
-				-- This is to ensure that we are only measuring the thickness of the hit shape, whilst ignoring all other shapes around it
-				local distHit2 = 0 
-				local distDist2 = 0
-				local distShape = 0
-				if distHit and distShape ~= curShape then
-					QueryRejectShape(distShape)
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					distHit2, distDist2, _, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-				end
-				
-				-- Set the maximum theoretical distance to the difference between the two previous raycasts.
-				-- This distance is used for non RHA calculations
-				local maxDist = distDist - distDist2
-
-				
-				if maxDist <= 0 then
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("HEAT made inactive due to maxDist being less than 0. maxDist = " ..tostring(maxDist).. " distDist = " ..tostring(distDist).. " distDist2 = " ..tostring(distDist2).. " DistShape = " ..tostring(distShape).. " DistShape2 = " ..tostring(distShape2).. " curShape = " ..tostring(curShape))
-						DebugPrint("HEAT Direction = " ..VecStr(dir).. " Inverse Direction = " ..VecStr(VecScale(dir, -1)))
-					end
-					projectile.active = false 
-					break
-				end
-
-				local armourThickness = armorval*(maxDist*10)
-				
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)armourThickness = " ..tostring(armourThickness).. " distDist = " ..tostring(distDist).. " distDist2 = " ..tostring(distDist2).. " MaxDist = " ..tostring(maxDist))
-				end
-				
-				-- If 0 RHA was detected then rawRHA will equal 0
-				-- If that is the case then it means that either CHA was used, or the shape is unarmoured
-				-- Either way the armourThickness is used to calculate the max distance that the projectile can actually penetrate into the shape
-				-- CHA and Unarmoured shapes use true line-of-sight thickness 
-				-- Whereas RHA uses a single armour value for the entire plate and uses the angle to determine angular thickness
-			
-				if RHA == 0 and CA == 0 then
-					thickness = math.min(((momentum - expended)/armorval)/10, maxDist)
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("Momentum - Expended = " ..tostring(momentum-expended).. " armorval = " ..tostring(armorval).. " product = " ..tostring(((momentum - expended)/armorval)/10))
-					end
-					if thickness > 0 then
-						table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-					end
-					-- Calculate the max amount of armour that the shell can go through, set the thickness to this
-					-- Then remove the penned armour from the penetration. any inaccuracies are remedied later
-					expended = expended + ((thickness*10)*armorval)
-				else
-					thickness = maxDist
-					-- Check that this isnt the same shape that we penned last pass
-					expended = expended + armorval
-				end
-				
-				
-				
-				local nHoles = math.max(thickness/holeIncrement, 0)
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)holeIncrement = " ..tostring(holeIncrement).. " projRadius = " ..tostring(projRadius).. " thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " nHoles = " ..tostring(nHoles))
-				end
-				
-				if thickness <= 0 then
-					nHoles = 0
-					break
-				end
-				
-				nHoles = math.ceil(nHoles)
-				if nHoles == 1 then nHoles = 2 end
-				if thickness <= 0 then nHoles = 0 end
-				
-				for i = 1, nHoles do
-					-- If the hole is the first one then hardcode it to the hit position to prevent unintended consequences
-					local hPos=VecCopy(pos)
-					if i > 1 then
-						if holeIncrement*(i-1) > thickness then
-							hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, thickness))
-						else
-							hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, holeIncrement*(i-1)))
-						end
-					end
-
-					-- The Radius Checker --
-					
-					-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-					-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, pennedShapes) is the full function
-					
-					pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = curShape
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					RejectBodies(projectile)
-					local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-					while qHit do
-						QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-						QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-						RejectBodies(projectile)
-						qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-						local _, qRHA, qCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir)))
-						local holearmorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/hitCos or 0
-						if holearmorval == 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-						holearmorval = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval, qCHA*math.max((thickness-(#holes*holeIncrement))*10, 1)))
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Hole Radius Checker)hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(momentum - expended).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-						end
-						if armorval >= holearmorval then
-							if HEATDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Hole Radius Checker)Added shape to hole radius puncher")
-							end
-							pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-						elseif armorval < holearmorval and momentum - expended > holearmorval then
-							if HEATDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Hole Radius Checker)Penned new shape in hole puncher, set as new armorval")
-							end
-							pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-							expended = expended + holearmorval
-							armorval = holearmorval
-						else
-							if HEATDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(HEAT)(Hole Radius Checker)Hole Radius Nonpen!")
-							end
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					
-					local mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, hPos, true)
-					if mat == "" or mat == nil then
-						local matHit, _, _, matShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, math.max(projRadius, 0.1))
-						if table.contains(pennedShapes, matShape) or matShape == curShape then
-							mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(matShape, hPos, true)
-						else
-							thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-							if HEATDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(HEAT)Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-							end
-							if CHA ~= 0 then
-								expended = expended - CHA*(nHoles - #holes)
-								if HEATDebugLines then
-									DebugPrint("(HEAT)Hit air or non-penned shape. Invalid CHA recovered of amount " ..tostring(CHA*(nHoles - #holes)))
-								end
-							end
-							air = true
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					
-					
-					
-					if mat == "heavymetal" or mat == "rock" or mat == "" or tostring(mat) == "none" then
-						thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-						if HEATDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(HEAT)(1) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-						end
-						break
-					-- elseif RHA == 0 and CHA == 0 and CA == 0 then
-						-- local matArmourVal = ((GetMaterialStrength(mat)*10)/hitCos)/(holeIncrement*10)
-						-- --DebugPrint("Hole Hit Material " ..tostring(mat).. " with armour value of " ..tostring(matArmourVal).. " and penetration of " ..tostring(momentum - expended))
-						-- if (momentum - expended) > matArmourVal then
-							-- expended = expended + matArmourVal
-						-- else
-							-- thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-							-- --DebugPrint("(2) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-							-- break
-						-- end
-					end
-					
-					--DebugPrint("Ended Hole Radius Shape Checker")
-					table.insert(holes, hPos)
-					--DebugPrint("HoleGen No." ..tostring(#holes).. " Hole Position = " ..VecStr(hPos).. " Hole Radius = " ..holeRadius[#holeRadius].. " Proj Radius = " ..projRadius.. " Distance to detected shape = " ..tostring(searchRadius))
-					--DebugPrint("nHole Generated " ..tostring(#holes).. " / " ..tostring(nHoles))
-					--DebugPrint("Hole Material = " ..tostring(mat))
-					table.insert(holeMaterials, mat)
-					
-					-- The HoleMaterials variable used to be used to make sure that Hardmetal wasnt broken by non hardmetal shapes being impacted
-					-- However the new system does not require it
-					-- It may still be useful though, so it remains
-					
-					if not HasTag(GetShapeBody(curShape), 'bone') then
-						if mat=="metal" or mat=="hardmetal" or mat=="heavymetal" then
-							local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-							CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-						elseif mat=="glass" then
-							CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-						else
-							Paint(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.1,0.7), "explosion")
-						end
-					end
-				end
-				
-				local Holecount = 0
-				local TotalHoleCount = 0
-				local h = #holes
-				-- Sets the brush as a sphere with material 0. this material removes voxels
-				MakeHardMetalHoles(pennedShapes, projRadius, holes)
-				
-				-- DebugPrint("Number of holes to make = " ..tostring(h))
-				for k = 1,h do
-					local holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.13+math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0,.04),.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m adjusted for material strength
-					local holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.12,.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-					
-					Holecount = MakeHole(holes[k], holeamount, holeamount2, _, true)
-					TotalHoleCount = TotalHoleCount + Holecount
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]))
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3))
-					end
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+frameduration,holes[k],nil,nil)
-				end
-				
-				pos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-				if expended > 0 then
-					--Spall amount calculation taken from SimulatePenetration
-					local spallamount = math.clamp(0.03*(projectile.spallamount*(expended*(momentum/projectile.maxmomentum))), 2, projectile.spallamount)
-					
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)Spall Amount = " ..tostring(spallamount).. " Expended = " ..tostring(expended))
-					end
-					
-					Spall(pos, VecScale(dir,math.max(300*explosivepayload,250)), spallamount*0.25, 0.8*spallangle, math.random(10,math.clamp(20*explosivepayload,25,MAX_SPALL_PEN)),frametime)
-					Spall(pos, VecScale(dir,math.max(300*explosivepayload,250)), spallamount*0.25, 0.8*spallangle, math.random(10,math.clamp(20*explosivepayload,25,MAX_SPALL_PEN)),frametime, true)
-					Spall(pos, VecScale(dir,math.max(300*explosivepayload,250)), spallamount*0.50, 0.8*spallangle, math.random(10,math.clamp(20*explosivepayload,25,MAX_SPALL_PEN)),frametime, true, true)
-				end
-				totalDist = totalDist + thickness
-				
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(HEAT)unmodified qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " modified qdist = " ..tostring(qdist - thickness).. " totalDist = " ..tostring(totalDist).. " Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-				end
-				qdist = qdist - thickness
-
-				
-				--QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				local checkHit, checkDist, checkNorm, checkShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, 0.1)
-				
-				-- If it finds something, then set that as the new next shape
-				-- else, its hit air and the data can be sent back to the projectile handler
-				if #holes == 0 and checkHit == true then
-					qdist = 0
-					projectile.active = false
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)qdist set to 0 due to making 0 holes")
-					end
-				end
-				
-				if checkHit == false then 
-					air = true 
-					if HEATDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(HEAT)found air after penetration. Is Projectile Active? " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-					end
-				else
-					if penetration then
-						pennedShapes = {curShape}
-					else
-						pennedShapes = {}
-					end
-					curShape = checkShape
-					_, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(curShape, pos)
-					hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-					pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, checkDist))
-				end
-				
-				-- if qdist == 0 or qdist < 0.001 then
-					-- if qdist <= 0 then projectile.active = false DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive In Loop (0)") end
-					-- DebugPrint("HEAT Loop Broken")
-					-- break
-				-- end
-				
-			else
-				expended = expended + armorval
-				totaldist = projectile.heatdist
-				qdist = 0
-				projectile.active = false
-				if HEATDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive In Loop Due to Non Penetration (1)")
-				end
-				break
-				
-			end
-			
-			if HEATDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Heat Penetration Loop End. qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " projectile momentum / expended = " ..tostring(momentum).. " / " ..tostring(expended))
-			end
-			
-			end
-		end
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Exit Heat Pen Loop")
-		end
-		
-		projectile.momentum = math.max(momentum - expended, 0)
-		projectile.pos = VecCopy(pos)
-		projectile.lasthitpos = VecCopy(pos)
-		
-		projectile.heatdist = projectile.heatdist - totalDist
-		
-		if HEATDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("End HEAT Simulation with Parameters. Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " Position = " ..VecStr(pos))
-		end
-		
-		VisualizeHEATJet(initPos, pos)
-		
-		SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, initPos, pos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-		
-		if projectile.heatdist <= 0 or projectile.momentum <= 0 then
-			projectile.active = false
-			if HEATDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive (1)")
-			end
-		end
-	if HEATDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("End SimulateHEAT. Projectile.active? " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-	end
-	
-end
-
-function SimulateCanister(projectile, info)
-
-	projectile.fuzeTripped = projectile.fuzeTripped or (projectile.maxmomentum-projectile.momentum > projectile.fuzesense) or (projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum < .9)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.fuzeTripped)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.active)
-	if not projectile.fuzeTripped and projectile.active then return end
-	
-	local SpallCount = projectile.canisteramount or 1
-	local vel = projectile.predictedVelocity
-	local spallType = projectile.canistertype
-	
-	if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then 
-		RealisticExplosion(info.newpos, info.dir, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.shrapnelamount, projectile.spallangle, projectile.momentum, 1, info.RHA, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration)
-		ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, info.newpos, VecScale(VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity),400*projectile.explosivepayload))
-	end
-	
-	for i = 1, SpallCount do
-		
-		local nextShell = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-		
-		nextShell.pos = projectile.pos
-		
-		nextShell.projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[spallType]) or deepcopy(shellStats.ap)
-
-		local len = VecLength(vel)
-		local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-		dir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir,RSV(1),projectile.canisterangle))
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecScale(dir, len)
-		
-		nextShell.totaldist = 0
-
-		nextShell.rejectedbodies = projectile.rejectedbodies
-		
-		
-		nextShell.type = string.lower(spallType)
-		
-		nextShell.propulsion = "ballistic"
-		nextShell.propulsionforce = 0
-		
-		nextShell.maxdist = projectile.maxrange or 5000
-		
-		nextShell.momentum = projectile.canisterpen or 5
-		nextShell.maxmomentum = projectile.canisterpen or 5
-		nextShell.caliber = projectile.canistercaliber
-		nextShell.shellcaliber = projectile.canistercaliber
-		nextShell.drag = nextShell.projStats.drag or 0.35
-		nextShell.mass = projectile.mass/SpallCount or 0.08
-		
-		nextShell.splashrange = 2
-		
-		nextShell.tracer = false
-		
-		nextShell.navconst = .5
-
-		nextShell.spallamount = 0
-		nextShell.spallangle = 0
-		nextShell.shrapnelamount = 0
-		nextShell.explosivepayload = 0
-
-		nextShell.timer = 20
-		nextShell.impacted = false
-		nextShell.fuzetype = "impact"
-		nextShell.fuzedist = 5000
-		nextShell.fuzesense = projectile.fuzesense or 5
-		nextShell.forcedetonate = 0
-		
-		nextShell.range = 5000
-		
-		nextShell.incendiary = false
-		
-		nextShell.smokeradius = 0
-		nextShell.smoketime = 0
-
-		nextShell.frametime = 0
-		
-		nextShell.APSlights = FindAPSLights()
-		nextShell.vehicletarget = projectile.vehicletarget
-		
-		if (nextShell.caliber > 15 or nextShell.momentum > 40) then -- Stops shotgun pellet collisions
-			local vox = shellInfo.voxobject[selected_shell] or shellInfo.type[selected_shell]
-			local e = Spawn('<body tags="visualShellBody"><vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/shellvox/shells.vox" object="'..vox..'" scale="'..tostring(nextShell.caliber/1000)..'"/></>',Transform(pos,QuatLookAt(pos,VecAdd(pos,dir))))
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = e[1]
-		else
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = 0
-		end
-		
-		nextShell.cinematiccam = false
-		if nextShell.cinematiccam then
-			nextShell.ccrx = randomFloat(-30,10)
-			nextShell.ccry = randomFloat(-60,60)
-			nextShell.ccrz = randomFloat(-15,15)
-		end
-		
-		nextShell.ricochetCount = 0
-		
-		nextShell.active = true
-		
-		TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum] = deepcopy(nextShell)
-		
-		LoadedShell = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum]
-		-- VisualizeShrap(loadedShell.pos, loadedShell.predictedVelocity)
-		
-		
-	
-		if NoProjectileLimit then
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = (TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum % PROJECTILE_LIMIT) + 1
-		else
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum + 1
-		end
-		
-		if TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()] then
-			LoadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()]
-		elseif(TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]) then 
-			LoadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]
-		end
-	
-	end
-	
-	projectile.active = false
-
-end
-
-function SimulateAPHE(projectile, info)
-	local SimulateAPHEDebugLines = false
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Called")
-	end
-	if projectile.explosivepayload <= 0 then
-		if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Returned due to 0 explosive mass")
-		end
-		return 
-	end
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("APHE Pos = " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-	end
-	projectile.fuzeTripped = projectile.fuzeTripped or (projectile.maxmomentum-projectile.momentum > projectile.fuzesense) or (projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum < .9)
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile.fuzetripped : " ..tostring(projectile.fuzeTripped))
-		DebugPrint("Projectile.active      : " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-	end
-	if not projectile.fuzeTripped and projectile.active then
-		if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Returned due to not fuzetripped and active")
-		end
-		return 
-	end
-
-	DevPrint("APHE Filler Exploded\n")
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local pos = VecCopy(projectile.pos)
-
-	-- Check that fuze distance has actually been achieved
-	if (VecLength(VecSub(pos, projectile.posAtImpact)) < .9*projectile.fuzedist and projectile.posAtImpact ~= nil) and projectile.active then return end
-	if projectile.posAtImpact == nil and projectile.active then
-		if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Fuze position set to " ..VecStr(pos).. " due to no impact pos set")
-		end
-		projectile.posAtImpact = VecCopy(pos)
-		return
-	end
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint(VecLength(VecSub(pos, projectile.posAtImpact)).." / "..projectile.fuzedist)
-		DebugPrint("sploder")
-	end
-	--local APHE_MOMENTUM = math.max(math.max(5*projectile.explosivepayload^.5,15), projectile.momentum)
-	local APHE_MOMENTUM = math.max(randomFloat(.8,1.2)*math.clamp(5*projectile.explosivepayload^.5, 15, projectile.momentum), 15)
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE calls RealisticExplosion with parameters :")
-		DebugPrint("Pos              : " ..VecStr(pos))
-		DebugPrint("Dir              : " ..VecStr(dir))
-		DebugPrint("explosivepayload : " ..tostring(projectile.explosivepayload))
-		DebugPrint("shrapnelamount   : " ..tostring(projectile.shrapnelamount))
-		DebugPrint("APHE_CONE_ANGLE  : " ..tostring(APHE_CONE_ANGLE))
-		DebugPrint("APHE_MOMENTUM    : " ..tostring(APHE_MOMENTUM))
-	end
-	RealisticExplosion(pos, dir, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.shrapnelamount, APHE_CONE_ANGLE, APHE_MOMENTUM, .5, nil, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration)
-	--if projectile.momentum > 0 then MakeHole(pos,.02,.02,.02) end
-	-- Disabled this check because it put holes in stuff that it shouldn't have
-	projectile.active = false
-	if SimulateAPHEDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Ended")
-	end
-
-end
-
-function SimulateHESH(projectile,info)
-	--DebugPrint("Hesh Active! momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-	projectile.active = false
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[ptype or "hesh"])
-	local dir = info.dir
-
-	-- Impact Angle
-	local dot = VecDot(info.normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local hitangle = 180-math.acos(dot/projectileSpeed)*57.3
-	local hitCos = math.abs(dot/projectileSpeed)
-
-	-- Warhead crushing at high angle of attack
-	local f = math.exp((1-hitCos)^10)
-	projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*f
-
-	-- Amor impact sound
-	if info.RHA > 0 and info.hitvehicle then
-		PlayArmorImpactSound(projectile.caliber, info.newpos)
-	end
-
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, info.hitPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-
-	--------------------
-	-- Armor Pen Loop --
-	--------------------
-
-	
-
-	--if projectile.momentum > 0 then
-	
-		
-		
-		-- Initialize armor depth calculation (iterates through armor until the other side)
-		--local air = false
-		local pos = info.newpos
-		--local lastHitshapes = {info.shape}
-		local maxDepth = projectileSpeed*GetTimeStep()
-		local qdist = maxDepth
-		local holeIncrement = .01
-		local airThreshold = .05
-		local spallPos = VecCopy(pos)
-		local spallNormal = nil
-		
-		local initHit, initDist, initNorm = QueryRaycast(VecSub(pos, VecScale(dir, 0.1)), dir, qdist*2)
-		
-		if not initHit then
-			-- _, _, initNorm = QueryRaycast(pos, qdist*2)
-			initNorm = VecCopy(info.normal)
-		else
-			pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, initDist))
-		end
-		
-		local curShape = info.shape
-		QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-		local hitp, hitd, norm, hitshape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-
-
-		-- Determine thickness of the shape that was hit (distance travelled through it to next shape)
-		local fpos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, hitd))
-		local fhitp, fhitd = QueryRaycast(fpos, VecScale(dir,-1), qdist)
-		local thickness = math.max(hitd - fhitd, 0)
-		
-		local spallNorm = VecScale(VecNormalize(initNorm), -1)
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-		
-		local distToAir = 0
-		while QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(initNorm, distToAir)), initNorm, airThreshold) and distToAir < qdist do
-			distToAir = distToAir + airThreshold
-		end
-		local airHit, airDist = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(initNorm, distToAir)), VecScale(initNorm, -1), distToAir+airThreshold)
-		if airHit then
-			distToAir = distToAir - airDist
-		end
-		
-		
-		-- if thickness > 0.1 then
-			--spallPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(spallNorm, 0.15))
-		-- else
-			-- spallPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(spallNorm, (thickness/2)))
-		-- end
-
-		
-		local nRHA = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "RHA") then
-			nRHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "RHA")) or 0
-		end
-		-- CHA (cast homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-		local nCHA = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "CHA") then
-			nCHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "CHA"))*thickness or 0
-		end
-		-- ERA (explosive reactive armor) value from shape tag
-		local nERA = 0
-		local nERAep = 0
-		if projectile.momentum > ERA_MOMENTUM_THRESHOLD then
-			if HasTag(curShape, "ERA") then
-				nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "ERA")) or 0
-				nERA = nERAep
-			elseif GetTagValue(curShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-				nERA = 250
-			end
-		end
-		if nERA > 0 then
-			projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum - nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)
-			local holeamount = 0.1
-			MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-			ClearShape(curShape)
-			VisualizeExplosion(pos, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-			RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-			RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-		end
-		
-		local matstrength = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "matStrength") then matstrength = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "matStrength")) end
-		
-		local armorval = math.max(math.max(nRHA,matstrength), nCHA)
-		
-		local expended = 0
-		
-		local rejectedShapes = {}
-		local pennedRHAValues = {}
-		local penetration = false
-		local penDepth = distToAir
-		if projectile.momentum - expended > armorval then
-		
-			penetration = true
-		
-			local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, distToAir)
-			while projectile.momentum > expended and qHit do
-				local momentumOvermatch = false
-				QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-				qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, distToAir)
-				local qhitCos = math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir))
-				nrawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, qhitCos)
-				Carmorval = math.max(nrawRHA, nCHA)
-				if projectile.momentum - expended > Carmorval or pennedRHAValues[#pennedRHAValues] == nrawRHA then
-					if nCHA == 0 and nrawRHA ~= 0 and not pennedRHAValues[#pennedRHAValues] == nrawRHA then
-						pennedRHAValues[#pennedRHAValues+1] = nrawRHA
-						if momentumOvermatch then
-							expended = expended + overmatchArmorval
-						else
-							expended = expended + Carmorval
-						end
-					else
-						expended = expended + Carmorval
-					end
-					rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-				else
-					expended = expended + Carmorval
-					break
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		
-		
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-		QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-		local distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, distToAir)
-		
-		-- Get the distance to the hit shape from the distance value in the previous function.
-		-- Since this is HESH, we only ignore the shape from the previous function, as we want the depth to be the entire depth of the penetrated shapes
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		QueryRejectShape(distShape)
-		local distHit2, distDist2, _, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-		
-		-- Set the maximum theoretical distance to the difference between the two previous raycasts.
-		-- This distance is used for non RHA calculations
-		penDepth = distDist - distDist2
-		
-		spallPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(spallNorm, penDepth))
-		--DebugPrint("HESH Pen Depth = " ..tostring(penDepth).. " Distance to Air = " ..tostring(distToAir).. " HESH Spall Normal = " ..VecStr(spallNorm))
-		
-		RealisticExplosion(pos, spallNorm, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload*.6, projectile.shrapnelamount, 1, math.clamp(projectile.momentum/2, 15, 40), 0.4, armorval, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration) -- Limit internal spall to 25mm of pen so it can mainly damage crew & weak components
-		ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, info.newpos, VecScale(dir,math.min(10*math.min(expended,projectile.momentum)*projectile.caliber^.5, 10000)))
-		
-		if penetration == true then
-			MakeHole(spallPos, 0.08, 0.08, 0.08, true)
-		
-			--DebugPrint("Spawning HESH Spall! Spall Pos = " ..VecStr(spallPos).. " Hit Pos = " ..VecStr(pos))
-			Spall(spallPos, VecScale(spallNorm, 2), math.min(projectile.spallamount, (expended*0.8)), projectile.spallangle, projectile.momentum, projectile.frametime+info.frameduration, true)
-			Spall(spallPos, VecScale(spallNorm, 400), math.min(projectile.spallamount, (expended*1.5)), projectile.spallangle, math.clamp(projectile.momentum*0.5, 15, armorval/5), projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-			Spall(spallPos, VecScale(spallNorm, 400), 1, 0, math.clamp(projectile.momentum*0.9, 15, expended/2), projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-		
-		end
-
-end
-
-function VisualizeProjectile(projectile,newpos)
-	--DebugPrint("VisualizeProjectile Called")
-
-	if projectile.tracer then
-		local r, g, b = projectile.tracercolorr or 1, projectile.tracercolorg or .4, projectile.tracercolorb or .3
-		PointLight(projectile.pos, r*2, g*2, b*2, 1)
-		PointLight(VecLerp(projectile.pos, newpos, math.max(0.5, math.random())), r, g, b, 1)
-		Tracer(VecLerp(projectile.pos, newpos, .4), projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.caliber, r, g, b)
-		DrawLine(projectile.pos,VecLerp(projectile.pos, newpos, math.max(0.5, math.random())),r,g,b,0.65)
-	end
-	if projectile.type == "napalm" then
-		VisualizeFire(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.caliber)
-	elseif projectile.type == "wp" then
-		VisualizeWP(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.caliber)
-	end
-	if projectile.propulsion == "rocket" or projectile.propulsion == "guided" or projectile.propulsion == "radar-guided" then
-		VisualizeRocketMotor(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.caliber)
-	end
-	SetBodyTransform(projectile.visualshellbody,TransformToParentTransform(Transform(Vec(0,-projectile.caliber/5000,0),QuatEuler()),Transform(newpos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,newpos)))) -- Add shell rifling
-	--DebugPrint("VisualizeProjectile Ended")
-end
-
-function PlayPassbySound(projectile)
-	--DebugPrint("PlayPassbySound Called")
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	if not projectile.passed then
-		local passed, passdist, passpos, artypassed = GetProjectilePassInfo(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, GetCameraTransform().pos, 160)
-		if passed then
-			if passdist < 20 and projectile.type ~= "napalm" then
-				if projectileSpeed > MACH and projectile.mass > 3 then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/large_0.ogg"),passpos,(20-passdist))
-				elseif projectileSpeed > MACH and projectile.caliber >= 7.62 and projectile.totaldist > PASS_BY_SOUND_MIN_TOTALDIST*60*GetTimeStep() then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/fast_0.ogg"),passpos,(15-passdist))
-				elseif projectileSpeed > MACH and projectile.totaldist > PASS_BY_SOUND_MIN_TOTALDIST*60*GetTimeStep() then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/medium_0.ogg"),passpos,(10-passdist))
-				else
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/slow_0.ogg"),passpos,(10-passdist))
-				end
-			end
-			projectile.passed = true
-			SetFloat("level.tabs.suppression",GetFloat("level.tabs.suppression")+50*projectile.mass)
-		elseif artypassed then
-			if projectileSpeed > 150 and projectile.mass > 3 and passdist < 40 then
-				PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/large_0.ogg"),GetCameraTransform().pos,1-passdist/120)
-				projectile.passed = true
-			else
-				if projectile.mass > 15 then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/artillery_large_0.ogg"),GetCameraTransform().pos,1-passdist/240)
-					projectile.passed = true
-				elseif projectile.mass > 4 then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/artillery_small_0.ogg"),GetCameraTransform().pos,1-passdist/160)
-					projectile.passed = true
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("PlayPassbySound Ended")
-end
-
-function RejectBodies(projectile)
-	QueryRejectBodies(projectile.rejectedbodies)
-	QueryRejectBody(projectile.visualshellbody)
-end
-
-function SerializeSpecialTable(Table)
-    local Keys = {
-        Main = {
-            Primary = "~MainSeperation~",
-            Type = "~TypeSeperation~",
-            Arguments = "~ArgSeperation~",
-            ArgumentType = "~ArgTypeSeperation~",
-        },
-        Transform = {
-            Value = "~TransformValueSeperator~",
-            TransformSeperator = "~TransformTypeSeperator~",
-            Type = "~TransformVecSeperator~",
-        },
-        Table = {
-            Type = "~TableTypeSeperator~",
-            Values = "~TableValueSeperator~",
-            
-        },
-    }
-        
-    local Strings = {}
-    for i=1,#Table do
-        local ArgTable = {}
-        for j=1,#Table[i].Arguments do
-                
-            if Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Bool" or Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "String" or Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Number" then
-                table.insert(ArgTable, ""..Table[i].Arguments[j][1]..Keys.Main.ArgumentType..tostring(Table[i].Arguments[j][2]).."")
-        
-            elseif Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Vec" or Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Euler" then
-                table.insert(ArgTable, ""..Table[i].Arguments[j][1]..Keys.Main.ArgumentType..table.concat(Table[i].Arguments[j][2],Keys.Transform.Value).."")
-                
-            elseif Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Transform" then
-                local TransformTable = {}
-                for k=1,#Table[i].Arguments[j][2] do
-                    local Type = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][1]
-                    local Value = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][2]
-                    table.insert(TransformTable, ""..Type..Keys.Transform.Type..table.concat(Value, Keys.Transform.Value).."")
-                end
-                table.insert(ArgTable, ""..Table[i].Arguments[j][1]..Keys.Main.ArgumentType..table.concat(TransformTable, Keys.Transform.TransformSeperator).."")
-                
-            elseif Table[i].Arguments[j][1] == "Table" then
-                local NewTable = {}
-                for k=1,#Table[i].Arguments[j][2] do
-                    local Type = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][1]
-                    local Value = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][2]
-                    CoolString = ""
-                        
-                    if Type == "Bool" or Type == "String" or Type == "Number" then
-                        CoolString = ""..Type..Keys.Table.Type..tostring(Value)..""
-                    
-                    elseif Type == "Vec" then
-                        CoolString = ""..Type..Keys.Table.Type..table.concat(Value, Keys.Transform.Value)..""
-                        
-                    elseif Type == "Euler" then
-                        CoolString = ""..Type..Keys.Table.Type..table.concat(Value, Keys.Transform.Value)..""
-                        
-                    elseif Type == "Transform" then
-                        local TransformTable = {}
-                        for g=1,#Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][2] do
-                            local NewType = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][2][g][1]
-                            local NewValue = Table[i].Arguments[j][2][k][2][g][2]
-                            table.insert(TransformTable, ""..NewType..Keys.Transform.Type..table.concat(NewValue, Keys.Transform.Value).."")
-                        end
-                            
-                        CoolString = ""..Type..Keys.Table.Type..table.concat(TransformTable, Keys.Transform.TransformSeperator)..""
-                    end
-                    table.insert(NewTable, CoolString)
-                end
-                table.insert(ArgTable, ""..Table[i].Arguments[j][1]..Keys.Main.ArgumentType..table.concat(NewTable,Keys.Table.Values).."")
-            end    
-        end
-        local String = ''..Table[i].FunctionName..Keys.Main.Type..table.concat(ArgTable, Keys.Main.Arguments)..''
-        table.insert(Strings, String)
-    end
-    
-    return table.concat(Strings, Keys.Main.Primary)
-end
-
-function SendToListener(TBL, Listener)
-    TriggerEvent(Listener, SerializeSpecialTable(TBL))
-end
-
-function StickyOperations(projectile)
-	local stickyDebugLines = false
-	if stickyDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Sticky Operations called!")
-	end
-	if projectile.stuckPos == "" or projectile.stuckPos == nil then return end
-	local stuckShape = projectile.stuckTo
-	local stuckPos = VecCopy(projectile.stuckPos)
-	
-	if stickyDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("(StickyOps) Stuck Body : " ..tostring(stuckShape))
-		DebugPrint("(StickyOps) Stuck Pos  : " ..VecStr(stuckPos))
-	end
-
