-	local relativePos = TransformToParentPoint(GetShapeWorldTransform(stuckShape), stuckPos)
-	
-	projectile.predictedVelocity = GetBodyVelocityAtPos(GetShapeBody(stuckShape), relativePos)
-	
-	--DebugCross(GetShapeWorldTransform(projectile.stuckTo).pos, 1)
-	--DebugCross(relativePos, 0, 1)
-	--DebugCross(stuckPos, 0, 0, 1)
-	
-	projectile.pos = VecCopy(relativePos)
-	
-	local hit, point, norm, shape = QueryClosestPoint(relativePos, 0.1)
-	
-	local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, relativePos ,true)
-	
-	_, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(shape, projectile.pos)
-	local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-	local rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA, nCA = CheckArmourValue(shape, hitCos)
-	local armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hitPosMat)*10)
-	
-	if nCA > 0 and projectile.type == "heat" or projectile.type == "t-heat" or projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-		armorval = nCA
-	else
-		armorval = math.max(nRHA, math.max(armorval, nCHA))
-	end
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local frameduration = CalcFrameDuration(projectile.pos,relativePos,projectileSpeed,hit)
-	
-	local hitvehicle = false
-	if TABSVehicles ~= nil then
-		local v = GetBodyVehicle(GetShapeBody(shape))
-		if v~=0 and TABSVehicles[v] and projectile.caliber > 15 then
-			TABSVehicles[v].hittaken = true
-			-- hitvehicle = true
-		end
-		if v == GetPlayerVehicle() and TABSVehicles[v] then hitvehicle = true end
-	end
-	
-	local info = {}
-	info.hitPos = VecCopy(projectile.pos)
-	info.dist = 0
-	info.normal = VecCopy(norm)
-	info.RHA = armorval
-	info.shape = shape
-	info.expended = 0
-	info.hitbody = GetShapeBody(shape)
-	info.mat = {}
-	info.mat.hitPosMat = hitPosMat
-	info.mat.r = r
-	info.mat.g = g
-	info.mat.b = b
-	info.mat.a = a
-	info.frameduration = frameduration
-	info.hitvehicle = hitvehicle
-	
-	if hit then
-	
-		projectile.projStats.SimulateImpact(projectile, info)
-		
-	else
-		
-		projectile.stuck = false
-		
-	end
-	
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	
-	projectile.timer = projectile.timer - dt
-	
-	if stickyDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("(StickyOps) ProjTimer : " ..tostring(projectile.timer))
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.timer <= 0 then projectile.active = false end
-	
-	
-	if stickyDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("StickyOps Called VisualiseProjectile")
-	end
-	VisualizeProjectile(projectile, projectile.pos)
-end
-	
-
-function ProjectileOperations(projectile)
-	local ProjOpDebugLines = false
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Called")
-	end
-	if not projectile.active then
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Returned due to projectile being inactive")
-		end
-		return 
-	end
-	
-	if tostring(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)) == "-nan(ind)" then
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = Vec(0, 0, 0)
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Velocity Nil, set to " ..VecStr(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-		end
-	end
-	
-	-- Projectile fundamentals
-
-	HandlePropulsion(projectile)
-
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Has Projectile detonated? " ..tostring(projectile.detonate))
-	end
-	
-
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local projStats = projectile.projStats -- deepcopy(shellStats[ptype or "ap"])
-	local info = {}
-
-	
-	-- Checking for a hit (!!!! replace fully with custom function later !!!!)
-	local rejectedShapes = {}
-	local qdist = GetQueryDist(projectile)
-	RejectBodies(projectile)
-	QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody)
-	QueryInclude("player")
-	local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(projectile.pos, dir, qdist)
-	while HasTag(shape, "invisible") and not GetShapeBody(shape) == "player" and hit do
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Invisible Shape Loop Start")
-		end
-		rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = shape
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody)
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		QueryInclude("player")
-		hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(projectile.pos, dir, qdist)
-		-- This check ignores invisible shapes
-		-- Invisible shapes are often used to hold turrets when their basket does not reach the ground
-		-- This check does not need to be run for the other checks, since those should detect the turrets first
-	end
-	
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Invisible Shape Loop End")
-	end
-	if projectile.fuzetype == "top-down" and projectile.totaldist > projectile.minarmdist then
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody)
-		QueryInclude("player")
-		local tdhit, tddist, tdnormal, tdshape = QueryRaycast(projectile.pos, Vec(0,-1,0), projectile.fuzesense)
-		if tdhit then
-			hit, dist, normal, shape = tdhit, tddist, tdnormal, tdshape
-			projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-			if ProjOpDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Top-Down Fuze Hit")
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if projectile.fuzetype == "proximity" and projectile.totaldist > projectile.minarmdist then
-		RejectBodies(projectile)
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody)
-		QueryInclude("player")
-		local prxhit, prxpoint, prxnormal, prxshape = QueryClosestPoint(projectile.pos, projectile.fuzesense)
-		if prxhit then
-			hit, dist, normal, shape = prxhit, VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos, prxpoint)), prxnormal, prxshape
-			projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-			if ProjOpDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Proximity Fuze Hit")
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Fuze Check Ended")
-	end
-
-	local newpos = VecAdd(projectile.pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-	
-	if projectile.fuzetype == "instant" and not projectile.fuzeTripped then
-		newpos = VecAdd(projectile.pos, VecScale(dir, 0.1))
-		projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-		projectile.detonate = true
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Instant Fuze Triggered")
-		end
-	elseif dist > projectile.maxdist then
-		dist = projectile.maxdist
-		newpos = VecAdd(projectile.pos, VecScale(dir, projectile.maxdist))
-		projectile.active = false
-		projectile.detonate = true
-		projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Projectile exceeded max distance, clamping to maxdist")
-		end
-	end
-	info.newpos = VecCopy(newpos)
-	
-	if ProjOpDebugLines and hit then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Hit something, distance = " ..tostring(dist))
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Hit something, Maxdistance = " ..tostring(projectile.maxdist))
-	end
-	
-	newpos = ManageAPS(projectile, info)
-	
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp Dist = " ..tostring(dist))
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp NewPos = " ..VecStr(newpos))
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp ProjSpeed = " ..tostring(projectileSpeed))
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp Velocity = " ..VecStr(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp Dir = " ..VecStr(dir))
-	end
-	-- Player Damage
-	--[[local passed, passdist, passpos = GetProjectilePassInfo(projectile.pos, VecSub(newpos,projectile.pos), VecAdd(GetPlayerTransform().pos,Vec(0,1,0)), 10)
-	if passed and passdist < 1.5  or GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape), '', 'animator') == GetPlayerAnimator() and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth()-randomFloat(.8,1.2)*0.00002*projectile.caliber*projectileSpeed)
-		if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then projectile.detonate = true end
-		newpos = VecCopy(passpos) --VecAdd(GetPlayerTransform().pos,Vec(0,1,0))
-	end]]
-
-
-	-- Debug
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Calculating Frame Duration")
-	end
-	local frameduration = CalcFrameDuration(projectile.pos,newpos,projectileSpeed,hit)
-
-	-- Armor penetration
-	if hit or projectile.detonate or projectile.fuzeTripped then
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Projectile Operations Hit")
-		end
-		local hitPos = VecCopy(newpos)
-		local hitbody = GetShapeBody(shape)
-		local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, newpos ,true)
-		local commandLine = "shot "..(projectile.momentum/3).." "..(hitPos[1].." "..hitPos[2].." "..hitPos[3]).." "..(projectile.predictedVelocity[1].." "..projectile.predictedVelocity[2].." "..projectile.predictedVelocity[3])
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) TABS_Command: "..commandLine)
-		end
-		
-		TriggerEvent("TABS_Command", commandLine)
-		
-		_, _, normal = GetShapeClosestPoint(shape, hitPos)
-		local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-		local rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA, nCA = CheckArmourValue(shape, hitCos)
-		local armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hitPosMat)*10)
-		
-		if nCA > 0 and projectile.type == "heat" or projectile.type == "t-heat" or projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-			armorval = nCA
-		else
-			armorval = math.max(nRHA, math.max(armorval, nCHA))
-		end
-		
-		CheckPlayerHit(projectile, hitbody, shape, hitPos, armorval)
-		
-		-- Unbreakable/impenetrable materials
-		--[[if (HasTag(shape, "unbreakable") or HasTag(hitbody, "unbreakable") or hitPosMat == "heavymetal" or hitPosMat == "rock") and projectile.type ~= "he" and projectile.explosivepayload == 0 and projectile.propulsion ~= "fluid" then
-			ApplyBodyImpulse(hitbody, newpos, VecScale(dir,math.min(10*projectile.momentum*projectile.caliber^.5, 10000)))
-			VisualizeImpact(hitPos, projectile.predictedVelocity, ptype, 0.00001*projectileSpeed*projectile.caliber*projectile.momentum, hitPosMat, r, g, b, a)
-			projectile.active = false
-			Delete(projectile.visualshellbody)
-			return
-		end--]]
-		-- Prevents shrapnel from hitting the shell body
-		if projectile.detonate then
-			if ProjOpDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Projectile Detonated")
-			end
-			Delete(projectile.visualshellbody)
-		end
-		
-		if hitPosMat=="metal" or hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or hitPosMat=="heavymetal" then
-			local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-			CustomPaintRGBA(newpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.09,0.7), c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-		elseif mat=="glass" then
-			CustomPaintRGBA(pos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-		else
-			Paint(newpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.09,0.7), "explosion")
-		end
-		
-
-		local hitvehicle = false
-		if TABSVehicles ~= nil then
-			local v = GetBodyVehicle(GetShapeBody(shape))
-			if v~=0 and TABSVehicles[v] and projectile.caliber > 15 then
-				TABSVehicles[v].hittaken = true
-				-- hitvehicle = true
-			end
-			if v == GetPlayerVehicle() and TABSVehicles[v] then hitvehicle = true end
-		end
-		
-		if projectile.fuzetype == "top-down" and projectile.fuzeTripped == true then 
-			dir = Vec(0, -1, 0) 
-			projectile.predictedVelocity = Vec(0, -projectileSpeed, 0)
-		end
-
-		----------------------------------
-		-- Simulating projectile impact --
-		----------------------------------
-		info.dir = VecCopy(dir)
-		info.dist = dist
-		info.normal = normal
-		info.shape = shape
-		info.RHA = armorval
-		info.expended = 0
-		info.newpos = VecCopy(hitPos)
-		info.hitPos = hitPos
-		info.hitbody = hitbody
-		info.mat = {}
-		info.mat.hitPosMat = hitPosMat
-		info.mat.r = r
-		info.mat.g = g
-		info.mat.b = b
-		info.mat.a = a
-		info.frameduration = frameduration
-		info.hitvehicle = hitvehicle
-
-		if projStats.SimulateImpact ~= nil then
-			if ProjOpDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Simulate Impact called for projectile of type " ..tostring(projectile.type))
-			end
-			projStats.SimulateImpact(projectile,info)
-		else
-			DebugPrint("Couldn't simulate impact for type "..ptype..".")
-		end
-	
-	elseif ProjOpDebugLines and hit == false then
-		DebugPrint("ProjectileOperations No Hit")
-	end
-	
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjectileOperations Post HitCheck")
-		DebugPrint("Projectile Stats. Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " projectile active? " ..tostring(projectile.active))
-	end
-
-
-	-- Extras
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile SaveDebugInfo")
-	end
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, newpos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile SaveDebugInfo Ended")
-	end
-	if projectile.cinematiccam and CinematicCam and GetPlayerVehicle() ~= 0 then
-		--DebugPrint("Projectile Cinematic Cam Called")
-		if projectile.camtimer == nil then projectile.camtimer = 0 end
-		local pT = Transform(newpos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,newpos))
-		SetTimeScale(math.clamp(0.3-projectile.camtimer*.05,0,.4))
-		local t = (1-math.exp(-0.5*math.max(projectile.camtimer,.1)))
-		local cT = TransformToParentTransform(pT,Transform(Vec(5*math.sin(math.rad(projectile.ccry))*t,-2*math.sin(math.rad(projectile.ccrx)),2+3*projectile.camtimer^.5),QuatEuler(projectile.ccrx*t,projectile.ccry*t,projectile.ccrz*t)))
-		SetCameraTransform(cT)
-		if projectile.active == false then
-			CinematicCamLastTrans = TransformCopy(cT)
-			CinematicCamLastPTrans = TransformCopy(pT)
-		end
-		CinematicCamControlledLastTick = true
-		projectile.camtimer = projectile.camtimer + dt
-	end
-	
-
-
-	-- General projectile operations
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("Projectile general operations")
-	end
-	VisualizeProjectile(projectile, newpos)
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp VisualiseProjectile Called")
-	end
-	PlayPassbySound(projectile)
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp PlayPassbySound Called")
-	end
-
-	-- Checking if projectile is out of bounds
-	local prpos = VecCopy(newpos)
-	local plpos = GetCameraTransform().pos
-	prpos[2] = 0
-	plpos[2] = 0
-	if VecLength(VecSub(plpos,prpos)) > 1.5*wBmD and (VecLength(VecSub(wBA,prpos)) > wBmD or VecLength(VecSub(wBB,prpos)) > wBmD) then
-		-- Out of bounds
-		projectile.active = false
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Shell made inactive due to being Out of Bounds")
-		end
-	end
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Shell Stats")
-			DebugPrint("Momentum   : " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-			DebugPrint("ptype      : " ..tostring(ptype))
-			DebugPrint("propulsion : " ..tostring(projectile.propulsion))
-			DebugPrint("pos[2]     : " ..tostring(projectile.pos[2]))
-			DebugPrint("timer      : " ..tostring(projectile.timer))
-			DebugPrint("detonated? : " ..tostring(projectile.detonate))
-			local ProjOpInactive1 = true
-			local ProjOpInactive2 = true
-			local ProjOpInactive3 = true
-			local ProjOpInactive4 = true
-			if (projectile.momentum <= .1 and ptype ~= "smoke" and ptype ~= "smoke-wp" and projectile.propulsion ~= "fluid") then 
-				ProjOpInactive1 = true
-			else
-				ProjOpInactive1 = false
-			end
-			if projectile.pos[2] < -50 then 
-				ProjOpInactive2 = true
-			else
-				ProjOpInactive2 = false
-			end
-			if projectile.timer <= 0 and projectile.detonate == false then 
-				ProjOpInactive3 = true
-			else
-				ProjOpInactive3 = false
-			end
-			if (projectile.timer <= 0 and ptype == "wp") then
-				ProjOpInactive4 = true
-			else
-				ProjOpInactive4 = false
-			end
-			DebugPrint("Inactive Requirement 1 : " ..tostring(ProjOpInactive1))
-			DebugPrint("Inactive Requirement 2 : " ..tostring(ProjOpInactive2))
-			DebugPrint("Inactive Requirement 3 : " ..tostring(ProjOpInactive3))
-			DebugPrint("Inactive Requirement 4 : " ..tostring(ProjOpInactive4))
-		end
-	if (projectile.momentum <= .1 and ptype ~= "smoke" and ptype ~= "smoke-wp" and projectile.propulsion ~= "fluid") or projectile.pos[2] < -50 or projectile.timer <= 0 and projectile.detonate ~= true or (projectile.timer <= 0 and ptype == "wp") then -- Disable projectile under specific conditions
-		projectile.active = false
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Shell Made Inactive due to low penetration")
-		end
-	end
-
-	projectile.pos = VecCopy(info.newpos)
-	projectile.timer = projectile.timer - dt
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjOp Update position and timer")
-	end
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		projectile.frametime = projectile.frametime + frameduration
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("ProjOp Update Frametime")
-		end
-	end
-	if not projectile.active then
-		if ProjOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(ProjectileOperations) Deleted Shell Body Due to being inactive")
-		end
-		Delete(projectile.visualshellbody)
-	end
-	if ProjOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("ProjectileOperations Ended")
-	end
-end
-
-function Spall(pos, vel, n, angle, pen, time, forcefastcalc, nopaint)
-	if nopaint == "" or nopaint == nil then nopaint = false end
-	--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called")
-	n = n*TABSSettings.sliders.spallamountmult
-	local momentum = pen or 10
-	if n<=0 then return end
-
-	local visualShellBodies = FindBodies("visualShellBody",true)
-	if TABSSettings.toggle.fastcalc or forcefastcalc then
-		local maxDepth = VecLength(vel)*GetTimeStep()
-		for i = 1, n*2 or 1 do
-			local len = VecLength(vel)*0.1
-			if IsPointInWater(pos) then len=len/5 end
-			local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-			dir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir,RSV(randomFloat(0.9,1.1)),angle))
-
-			if IsPointInWater(pos) then len = .5*len^.5 end
-			for j, body in ipairs(visualShellBodies) do
-				QueryRejectBody(body)
-			end
-			QueryInclude("player")
-			hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, RANDOM_SPALL_POS_VARIATION)), dir, len)
-
-			local hitPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-			if hit then
-				local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, hitPos, true)
-				local matstrength = GetMaterialStrength(mat)*10
-				local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-				local commandLine = "shot "..(pen/7).." "..(hitPos[1].." "..hitPos[2].." "..hitPos[3]).." "..(vel[1].." "..vel[2].." "..vel[3])
-				--DebugPrint("TABS_Command - SPALL(): "..commandLine)
-				TriggerEvent("TABS_Command", commandLine)
-				if HasTag(GetShapeBody(shape), 'bone') then
-					if GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape), '', 'animator') ~= GetPlayerAnimator() then
-						SendToListener({
-							{
-								FunctionName = "RecieveHitData",
-								Arguments = {
-									{"Number", GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape), '', 'animator')},
-									{"Vec", hitPos},
-									{"String", GetTagValue(GetShapeBody(shape), 'bone')},
-									{"Number",math.random(1,3)},
-								}
-							},
-						}, 'TABS NPC Listener' )
-						CustomPaintRGBA(hitPos, math.random()/3, .55, .10, .10, randomFloat(.8,1), randomFloat(0.2,0.35))
-					else
-						SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth()-0.1)					
-					end
-				end
-				local armorval = matstrength/hitCos
-				-- RHA (rolled homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-				local RHA = 0
-				local rawRHA = 0
-				if HasTag(shape, "RHA") then
-					rawRHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(shape, "RHA")) or 0
-					RHA = rawRHA/hitCos
-				end
-				-- CHA (cast homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-				local CHA = 0
-				if HasTag(shape, "CHA") then
-					CHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(shape, "CHA")) or 0
-				end
-
-				armorval = math.max(math.max(RHA, armorval), CHA)
-
-				if HasTag(shape, "matStrength") then matstrength = tonumber(GetTagValue(shape, "matStrength")) end
-				
-					-- local caliber = math.random(10,25*math.max(math.log10(n),1))
-				local hitDist = VecLength(VecSub(hitPos, pos))
-				-- momentum = (pen^(1-math.abs(hitDist/maxDepth)))-1 -- Old Penetration Calculation
-				local currentVelocity = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(vel))
-				momentum = pen-(hitDist*((hitDist*(12000/currentVelocity))/pen)) -- New Penetration Calculation
-				--DebugPrint("Hit Dist of Spall = " ..tostring(hitDist).. " Resulting Momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(shape))))
-				-- local hsM = randomFloat((momentum/100),(momentum/50))
-				local hitbody = GetShapeBody(shape)
-				local hsM = randomFloat(.1, .14)
-				
-				local projectile = {}
-				projectile.momentum = momentum
-				projectile.caliber = hsM*10
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecCopy(vel)
-				projectile.type = "spall"
-				
-				--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called CheckPlayerHit (1)")
-				--DebugPrint("Momentum : " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				--DebugPrint("Armorval : " ..tostring(armorval))
-				CheckPlayerHit(projectile, hitbody, shape, hitPos, armorval)
-				
-					-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-					-- Check for a new shape with an expanding radius. if it finds something then set that as the radius.
-					-- It checks every 0.001 units, which is a 10th of a voxel 
-					-- This is sensitive enough at the moment, but it can be made more sensitive
-						
-					-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-					-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-					-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-				local searchRadius = 0
-				local rejectedShapes = {}
-				
-				--DebugPrint("Fast Spall Momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " Percentage of maxdist remaining = " ..tostring(1-math.abs(hitDist/maxDepth)))
-				expended = 0
-				local unbreakableShapes = {}
-				local loop = 0
-				local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hitPos, hsM)
-				while expended < momentum and qHit and loop < 6 do
-					local momentumOvermatch = false
-					QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-					QueryRejectShapes(unbreakableShapes)
-					qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hitPos, hsM)
-					local qhitCos = math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir))
-					nrawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, qhitCos)
-					armorval = math.max(nRHA, nCHA)
-					local mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true)	
-					local overmatchArmorval = math.max(nrawRHA, nCHA)
-					--DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(armorval).. " Overmatcharmourval = " ..tostring(overmatchArmorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(momentum-expended).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-					if mat == "rock" or mat == "heavymetal" or mat == "" then
-						unbreakableShapes[#unbreakableShapes+1] = qShape
-					elseif momentum - expended > armorval then
-						expended = expended + armorval
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-					else
-						expended = expended + armorval
-						loop = 5
-					end
-					loop = loop + 1
-				end
-				if #rejectedShapes > 0 then
-					MakeHardMetalHoles(rejectedShapes, hsM, {hitPos})
-				end
-				
-				--DebugPrint("Fast Spall Radius = " ..tostring(hsM))
-
-				if totalSpall < 1500 then
-					VisualizeImpact(hitPos, vel, "spall", math.random(5,15)/math.log(totalSpall), hitPosMat, r, g, b, a)
-				end
-
-				PlayMaterialHitSound(hitPosMat, hitPos, nil, armorval)
-				if nopaint == false and i < 50 and not HasTag(hitbody, 'bone') then
-					if hitPosMat=="metal" or hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or hitPosMat=="heavymetal" then
-						local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-						CustomPaintRGBA(hitPos, 0.1*hsM, c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), math.abs(1-(i/n)))
-						--DebugPrint("Spall PaintRGBA Metal")
-					elseif hitPosMat=="glass" then
-						CustomPaintRGBA(hitPos, 0.1*hsM, .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), math.abs(1-(i/n)))
-						--DebugPrint("Spall PaintRGBA Glass")
-					else
-						Paint(hitPos, .1*hsM, "explosion", math.abs(1-(i/n)))
-						--DebugPrint("Spall PaintRGBA Explosion")
-					end
-				end
-
-			end
-
-			local frameduration = CalcFrameDuration(pos,hitPos,600,hit)
-			SaveDebugInfo(time+frameduration, hitPos,nil,nil)
-			SaveDebugInfo(time, pos, hitPos,1, frameduration)
-
-		end
-	else
-		for i = 1, n or 1 do
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum] = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-			loadedShell = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum]
-			loadedShell.active = true
-			loadedShell.pos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, RANDOM_SPALL_POS_VARIATION))
-			if NoProjectileLimit then
-				TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = (TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum % PROJECTILE_LIMIT) + 1
-			else
-				TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum + 1
-			end
-
-			local len = VecLength(vel)
-			local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-			dir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir,RSV(1),angle))
-			loadedShell.predictedVelocity = VecScale(dir, len)
-
-			loadedShell.type = "spall"
-
-			loadedShell.momentum = momentum
-			loadedShell.maxmomentum = loadedShell.momentum
-			loadedShell.caliber = math.random(2,25*math.max(math.log10(n),.7))
-			loadedShell.drag = shellStats.spall.drag
-			loadedShell.mass = loadedShell.caliber*0.002
-
-			loadedShell.spallamount = 0
-			loadedShell.spallangle = 0
-			loadedShell.shrapnelamount = 0
-			loadedShell.explosivepayload = 0
-
-			loadedShell.timer = randomFloat(.7,1.3)
-			loadedShell.impacted = false
-			loadedShell.fuzedist = 100
-
-			loadedShell.frametime = time
-			-- VisualizeShrap(loadedShell.pos, loadedShell.predictedVelocity)
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function CalcFrameDuration(pos,newpos,speed,hit)
-	--DebugPrint("CalcFrameDuration Called")
-	local d = 0
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		if hit then
-			local l = VecLength(VecSub(newpos,pos))
-			d = l/speed*60
-		else
-			d = 1
-		end
-	else
-		d = 1
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("CalcFrameDuration Ended")
-	return d
-end
-
-function SimulateWP(projectile, info)
-	local simulateWPDebugLines = false
-	if simulateWPDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateWP Called!")
-	end
-	local rejectedBodies = {}
-	QueryInclude("player")
-	local wpHit, wpPoint, _, wpShape = QueryClosestPoint(info.hitPos, projectile.smokeradius*0.7)
-	rejectedBodies[#rejectedBodies+1] = GetShapeBody(wpShape)
-	while wpHit do
-		rejectedBodies[#rejectedBodies+1] = GetShapeBody(wpShape)
-		if math.random() > 0.5 then
-			SpawnFire(wpPoint)
-			if simulateWPDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(SimulateWP) SpawnFire Called on shape in proxy")
-			end
-		end
-		projectile.momentum = projectile.timer
-		local damage = 1
-		if GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(wpShape), '', 'animator') == GetPlayerAnimator() then damage = 0.01*GetPlayerHealth() end
-		if simulateWPDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(SimulateWP) CheckPlayerHit Called!")
-		end
-		
-		CheckPlayerHit(projectile, GetShapeBody(wpShape), wpShape, wpPoint, 0, damage)
-		
-		QueryRejectBodies(rejectedBodies)
-		QueryInclude("player")
-		wpHit, wpPoint, _, wpShape = QueryClosestPoint(info.hitPos, projectile.smokeradius*0.7)
-	end
-	if simulateWPDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("SimulateWP Ended!")
-	end
-end
-
-function CheckPlayerHit(projectile, hitbody, shape, hitPos, armorval, overrideDamage)
-	projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local checkPlayerHitDebugLines = false
-	if checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("CheckPlayerHit Called!")
-	end
-	local damage = overrideDamage or 0
-	if projectile.momentum >= 5 and damage <= 0 then
-		damage = randomFloat(.8,1.2)*randomFloat(0.02,0.03)*projectile.caliber*(projectileSpeed/1.05)
-	elseif damage <= 0 then
-		damage = randomFloat(.6,0.9)*randomFloat(0.01,0.02)*projectile.caliber*(projectileSpeed/1.5)
-	end
-	if (HasTag(hitbody, 'bone') or (HasTag(hitbody, "gore_id") or HasTag(shape, "jaw") or HasTag(hitbody, "bodypart"))) and projectile.momentum > armorval then
-		if HasTag(hitbody, 'bone') then
-			if GetEntityParent(hitbody, '', 'animator') ~= GetPlayerAnimator() then
-				SendToListener({
-					{
-						FunctionName = "RecieveHitData",
-						Arguments = {
-							{"Number", GetEntityParent(hitbody, '', 'animator')},
-							{"Vec", hitPos},
-							{"String", GetTagValue(hitbody, 'bone')},
-							{"Number",damage},
-						}
-					},
-				}, 'TABS NPC Listener' )
-				CustomPaintRGBA(hitPos, 1.4*math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), .55, .10, .10, randomFloat(.8,1), randomFloat(0.2,0.35))
-			else
-				SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth()-(damage/400))
-				if checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Hit and damaged Player. Projectile Momentum / Armour = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(armorval))
-					DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Dealt Damage of amount : " ..tostring(damage))
-				end
-			end
-		-- Mors Longa Compatability
-		elseif HasTag(hitbody, "gore_id") or HasTag(shape, "jaw") or HasTag(hitbody, "bodypart") then
-			damage = damage*0.12 --TABS damage is almost 10x the damage of Mors Longa stuff by default
-			local path_damage = "level.goreai.body_damage_player." .. hitbody
-			local MorsDamage = GetFloat(path_damage) + damage
-			
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_x", hitPos[1])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_y", hitPos[2])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_z", hitPos[3])
-
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_x", projectile.predictedVelocity[1])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_y", projectile.predictedVelocity[2])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_z", projectile.predictedVelocity[3])
-			
-			SetFloat(path_damage, MorsDamage) -- Specific damage to each body by handle.
-			if checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Hit and damaged Mors Longa Ragdoll. Projectile Momentum / Armour = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(armorval))
-				DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Dealt Damage of amount : " ..tostring(damage))
-			end
-		end
-	elseif HasTag(hitbody, 'bone') or (HasTag(hitbody, "gore_id") or HasTag(shape, "jaw") or HasTag(hitbody, "bodypart"))then
-		local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, hitPos, true)
-		PlayMaterialHitSound(hitPosMat, hitPos, projectile.momentum, armorval)
-		VisualizeImpact(hitPos, projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.type, .1*projectile.caliber^.5*(.1*projectileSpeed)^.5, hitPosMat, r, g, b, a)
-		if GetEntityParent(hitbody, '', 'animator') == GetPlayerAnimator() and checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Hit and non penned Player. Projectile Momentum / Armour = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(armorval))
-		end
-		if HasTag(hitbody, "gore_id") or HasTag(shape, "jaw") or HasTag(hitbody, "bodypart") then
-			local path_damage = "level.goreai.body_damage_player." .. hitbody
-			local MorsDamage = GetFloat(path_damage)
-			
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_x", hitPos[1])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_y", hitPos[2])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_z", hitPos[3])
-
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_x", projectile.predictedVelocity[1])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_y", projectile.predictedVelocity[2])
-			SetFloat("level.goreai.body_damage_player_vel_z", projectile.predictedVelocity[3])
-			
-			SetFloat(path_damage, MorsDamage) -- Specific damage to each body by handle.
-			if checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Hit and non-penetrated Mors Longa Ragdoll. Projectile Momentum / Armour = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(armorval))
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if GetEntityParent(hitbody, '', 'animator') == GetPlayerAnimator() and checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("(CheckPlayerHit) Hit Player. Projectile Momentum / Armour = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(armorval))
-	end
-	if checkPlayerHitDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("CheckPlayerHit ended")
-	end
-end
-function SpallOperations(projectile)
-	-- DebugPrint("SpallOperations Called")
-	if not projectile.active then return end
-	local SpallOpDebugLines = false --Toggle for SpallOperations Debug Lines
-	
-	
-	-- Projectile trajectory
-	local dt=GetTimeStep()
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local w = 1
-	if IsPointInWater(projectile.pos) then w = 5 end
-
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	QueryInclude("player")
-	local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(projectile.pos, dir, projectileSpeed*dt)
-	local newpos = VecAdd(projectile.pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-
-	local frameduration = CalcFrameDuration(projectile.pos,newpos,projectileSpeed,hit)
-	local projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[ptype])
-	
-	local playHitSound = true
-	--[[if VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos,VecAdd(GetPlayerTransform().pos,Vec(0,1,0)))) < 1 or GetEntityParent(GetShapeBody(shape), '', 'animator') == GetPlayerAnimator() and GetPlayerVehicle()==0 then
-		SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth()-randomFloat(.8,1.2)*0.0001*projectile.caliber*projectileSpeed)
-	end]]
-	
-	-- Armor penetration
-	if hit then
-
-		local hitPos = VecCopy(newpos)
-		local hitbody = GetShapeBody(shape)
-		local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, newpos ,true)
-		if (HasTag(shape, "unbreakable") or HasTag(hitbody, "unbreakable") or hitPosMat == "heavymetal" or hitPosMat == "rock") then
-			projectile.active = false
-			return
-		end
-		local curShape = shape
-
-		-- Impact angle
-		local dot = VecDot(normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		local hitangle = 180-math.acos(dot/projectileSpeed)*57.3
-		local hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-		local rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-				
-		armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hitPosMat)*10)/hitCos
-		armorval = math.max(nRHA, math.max(armorval, nCHA))
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Spall Operations Called CheckPlayerHit!")
-		--DebugPrint("Momentum : " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-		--DebugPrint("Armorval : " ..tostring(armorval))
-		CheckPlayerHit(projectile, hitbody, shape, hitPos, armorval)
-		
-		
-		if SpallOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Spall Direction (1) = " ..VecStr(dir))
-		end
-	
-		local a = 2 + 40*math.exp(-.002*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass-40)^2) -- Fudge coefficient (higher = higher bounce chance)
-
-		local f = a*(1-hitCos^2)*projStats.ricochetmultiplier*(armorval/projectile.momentum)^2
-		local bouncecoef = math.clamp((1-math.exp(-f))^2   +   .002*projStats.ricochetmultiplier^2/hitCos^2, 0, 1)
-		local randomizedNormal = VecNormalize(VecAdd(normal,RSV(bouncecoef*.4)))
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(randomizedNormal, -2*dot*bouncecoef))
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, 1 - .2 * bouncecoef^2)
-		ricdir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		QueryInclude("player")
-		local hitcheck = QueryRaycast(newpos, ricdir, 0.1)
-
-
-		if not hitcheck then
-		
-			--dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-			
-			projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*(1-math.clamp(projectile.drag*dt*w,0,1)) -- Decreases penetrating power of kinetic projectiles with air resistance
-			projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, 1-math.clamp(projectile.drag*dt*w,0,1))
-			projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(GRAVITY, dt)) -- Gravity drop
-
-			newpos = VecAdd(projectile.pos, VecScale(dir, dist*.99))
-			projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*bouncecoef^2
-			projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, bouncecoef)
-
-			--DebugPrint("Spall Direction (2) = " ..VecStr(dir))
-
-		else
-			
-			--dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-			
-			--DebugPrint("Spall Direction (3) = " ..VecStr(dir))
-
-			-- Armor Pen Loop
-
-			-- Initialize armor depth calculation (iterates through armor until the other side)
-			local holeIncrement = 0.1 -- 10mm of armor per iteration (.1 vox)
-			local air = false
-			local maxdepth = projectileSpeed*GetTimeStep()
-			local pos = VecCopy(newpos)
-			local momentum = projectile.momentum
-			local expended = 0
-			local hitshapes = {shape}
-			local holes = {}
-			local holeMaterials = {}
-			local holeRadius = {}
-			local pennedShapes = {}
-			local loop = 0
-			local penPos = VecCopy(pos)
-			local qdist = maxdepth
-			while qdist > 0 and loop < 6 and not air and momentum > expended do
-				curShape = hitshapes[#hitshapes]
-				dot = VecDot(normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-				hitangle = 180-math.acos(dot/projectileSpeed)*57.3
-				hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(normal, dir))
-				
-				
-				local qsize = 0.1
-				local hitp, hitd, normal, curShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qsize)
-				
-				
-				SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+frameduration, pos,nil,nil)
-				
-				local rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-				
-				armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(hitPosMat)*10)/hitCos
-				armorval = math.max(nRHA, math.max(armorval, nCHA))
-				overmatchArmorval = math.max(math.max(rawRHA, armorval), nCHA)
-				if SpallOpDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("Spall Momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " Armour value = " ..tostring(armorval).. " Hit Material = " ..tostring(hitPosMat).. " Hit Shape Tags = ")
-					DebugPrint(ListTags(curShape))
-				end
-				local projRadius = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.09,.5)
-				
-				holeIncrement = math.min(projRadius/2, 0.1)
-				
-				local thickness = 0
-				local penetration = false
-				if momentum >= armorval or pennedShapes[#pennedShapes] == curShape then
-					penetration = true
-					
-					-- Ignore the hit shape, search for the next shape along the path
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					local distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-					if HasTag(distShape, "invisible") and not GetShapeBody(distShape) == "player" then
-						table.insert(pennedShapes, distShape)
-						QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-						QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-						distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-						if SpallOpDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Hit invisible shape, ignoring")
-						end
-						-- This check ignores invisible shapes
-						-- Invisible shapes are often used to hold turrets when their basket does not reach the ground
-					end
-					
-					-- Checking around the hit area for weaker shapes
-					-- If the found shapes are less than or equal to the penetrated armour value then they are rejected as penetrated
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-					while qHit do
-						QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-						qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-						local _, qRHA, qCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir)))
-						local holearmorval1 = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/hitCos or 0
-						if holearmorval1 == 1000 then holearmorval1 = 0.4 end
-						holearmorval1 = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval1, qCHA))
-						if SpallOpDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval1).. " Penned Armour Value = " ..tostring(armorval).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-						end
-						if armorval > holearmorval1 then
-							if SpallOpDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Added shape to hole thickness puncher")
-							end
-							pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-						else
-							if SpallOpDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Hole Thickness Nonpen!")
-							end
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Ended Hole Thickness Shape Checker")
-					end
-					
-					-- Sets up a group that explictly does not contain the original hit shape
-					-- This group is used to determine the thickness of the hit shape whilst ignoring all penetrated shapes
-					
-					local thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup = {}
-					for i = 1, #pennedShapes do
-						if pennedShapes[i] ~= curShape then
-							thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup[#thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup+1] = pennedShapes[i]
-						end
-					end
-					
-					-- Get the distance until another shape is found. if no shapes are found it returns the max query dist (qdist)
-					-- This function ignores all penetrated shapes, as they are also being penetrated with this loop
-					QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-					
-					-- Get the distance to the hit shape from the distance value in the previous function.
-					-- This is to ensure that we are only measuring the thickness of the hit shape, whilst ignoring all other shapes around it
-					QueryRejectShapes(thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup)
-					QueryRejectShape(distShape)
-					local distHit2, distDist2, _, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-					
-					-- Set the maximum theoretical distance to the difference between the two previous raycasts.
-					-- This distance is used for non RHA calculations
-					local maxDist = distDist - distDist2
-					
-					-- Calculate the armour thickness for the distance detected, this is for CHA and unarmoured parts
-					
-					local armourThickness = armorval*(maxDist*10)
-				
-					-- If 0 RHA was detected then rawRHA will equal 0
-					-- If that is the case then it means that either CHA was used, or the shape is unarmoured
-					-- Either way the armourThickness is used to calculate the max distance that the projectile can actually penetrate into the shape
-					-- CHA and Unarmoured shapes use true line-of-sight thickness 
-					-- Whereas RHA uses a single armour value for the entire plate and uses the angle to determine angular thickness
-					
-					if nRHA == 0 then
-						thickness = math.min(((momentum - expended)/armorval)/10, maxDist)
-						if momentum - expended >= armourThickness then
-							table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-						end
-						-- Calculate the max amount of armour that the shell can go through, set the thickness to this
-						-- Then remove the penned armour from the penetration. any inaccuracies are remedied later
-						expended = expended + ((thickness*10)*armorval)
-					else
-						thickness = maxDist
-						-- Check that this isnt the same shape that we penned last pass
-						expended = expended + armorval
-					end
-					
-					if thickness <= 0 then
-						penetrated = false
-						expended = momentum
-					end
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Calculated Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " maxDist = " ..tostring(maxDist).. " armourThickness = " ..tostring(armourThickness).. " qdist = " ..tostring(qdist)) end
-				else
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Non Penetrated")
-					end
-					thickness = 0
-					expended = expended + armorval
-					penetration = false
-					pennedShapes = {}
-				end	
-				
-				
-				
-				local nHoles = math.max(thickness/holeIncrement,0)
-				
-				if thickness <= 0 then
-					nHoles = 0
-
-				end
-				
-				nHoles = math.ceil(nHoles)
-				if nHoles == 1 then nHoles = 2 end
-				
-				if SpallOpDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Set Holes to " ..nHoles.. " Thickess = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Hole Increment = " ..holeIncrement)
-				end
-				
-				-- Rounding the number of holes up
-				-- This may cause problems due to unintentional hole creation, but this should be mitigated by other changes
-				
-				holes = {}
-				holeMaterials = {}
-				
-				-- The Hole Puncher --
-				local rejectedShapes = pennedShapes
-				if penetration == true then
-					
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Penetration check passed")
-					end
-					for i = 1, nHoles do
-						-- If the hole is the first one then hardcode it to the hit position to prevent unintended consequences
-						local hPos=VecCopy(pos)
-						if i > 1 then
-							if holeIncrement*(i-1) > thickness then
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, thickness))
-							else
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, holeIncrement*(i-1)))
-							end
-						end
-
-						-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-						-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-						-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-						
-						
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = curShape
-						QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-						local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-						while qHit do
-							QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-							qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-							local _, qRHA, qCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, math.abs(VecDot(qNormal, dir)))
-							local holearmorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10)/hitCos or 0
-							if holearmorval == 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-							holearmorval = math.max(qRHA, math.max(holearmorval, qCHA))
-							if SpallOpDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(SpallOp)(Hole Radius Checker)hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(momentum - expended).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-							end
-							if momentum - expended > holearmorval or armorval > holearmorval then
-								if SpallOpDebugLines then
-									DebugPrint("(SpallOp)(Hole Radius Checker)Added shape to hole radius puncher")
-								end
-								rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = qShape
-							else
-								if SpallOpDebugLines then
-									DebugPrint("(SpallOp)(Hole Radius Checker)Hole Radius Nonpen!")
-								end
-								break
-							end
-						end
-						if SpallOpDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Ended Hole Radius Shape Checker")
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Hole No." ..tostring(i).. " Projectile Radius = " ..tostring(projRadius).. " Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Adjusted Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness-((i-1)*holeIncrement)).. " HitShape/curShape/qShape = " ..tostring(hasHitHandle).. " / " ..tostring(curShape).. " / " ..tostring(qShape))
-						end
-						-- Run a material check, failure to find any material means that we have either hit air or left the current shape
-						-- either way that is bad and leads to the penetration being cancelled prematurely
-						-- due to the way that thickness is calculated this means that it is always an air pocket
-						local mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, hPos, true)
-						if mat == "" or mat == nil then
-							local matHit, _, _, matShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-							if table.contains(rejectedShapes, matShape) or matShape == curShape then
-								mat = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(matShape, hPos, true)
-							else
-								thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-								if SpallOpDebugLines then
-									DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-								end
-								if nCHA ~= 0 then
-									expended = expended - nCHA*(nHoles - #holes)
-									if SpallOpDebugLines then
-										DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Hit air or non-penned shape. Invalid CHA recovered of amount " ..tostring(nCHA*(nholes - #holes)))
-									end
-								end
-								break
-							end
-						end
-						
-						
-						
-						if mat == "heavymetal" or mat == "rock" or mat == "" or tostring(mat) == "none" then
-							thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-							if SpallOpDebugLines then
-								DebugPrint("(SpallOP)(1) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-							end
-							break
-						-- elseif nRHA == 0 and nCHA == 0 then
-							-- local matArmourVal = ((GetMaterialStrength(mat)*10)/hitCos)/(holeIncrement*10)
-							-- --DebugPrint("Hole Hit Material " ..tostring(mat).. " with armour value of " ..tostring(matArmourVal).. " and penetration of " ..tostring(momentum - expended))
-							-- if (momentum - expended) > matArmourVal then
-								-- expended = expended + matArmourVal
-							-- else
-								-- thickness = #holes * holeIncrement
-								-- --DebugPrint("(2) Thickness recalculated to " ..thickness.. " due to making holes " ..#holes.. " with an increment of " ..holeIncrement)
-								-- break
-							-- end
-						end
-						table.insert(holes, hPos)
-						if SpallOpDebugLines then
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)HoleGen No." ..tostring(#holes).. " Hole Position = " ..VecStr(hPos).. " Proj Radius = " ..projRadius.. " Distance to detected shape = " ..tostring(searchRadius))
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)nHole Generated " ..tostring(#holes).. " / " ..tostring(nHoles))
-							DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Hole Material = " ..tostring(mat))
-						end
-						table.insert(holeMaterials, mat)
-						
-						-- The HoleMaterials variable used to be used to make sure that Hardmetal wasnt broken by non hardmetal shapes being impacted
-						-- However the new system does not require it
-						-- It may still be useful though, so it remains
-					end
-				else
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Penetration check failed")
-					end
-					--expended = expended + armorval
-					dir = VecCopy(ricdir)
-					thickness = 0
-					--expended = momentum
-				end
-				
-				if SpallOpDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Penetration check ended")
-				end
-				local Holecount = 0
-				local h = #holes
-				local holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.002,.13,.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-				local holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.11,.5)
-				
-				if SpallOpDebugLines then
-					DebugPrint("(SpallOp)Number of holes to make = " ..tostring(h))
-				end
-				
-				MakeHardMetalHoles(rejectedShapes, projRadius, holes)
-
-				for k = 1,h do
-					Holecount = MakeHole(holes[k], holeamount, holeamount2, 0, true)
-					if SpallOpDebugLines then
-						DebugPrint("HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3))
-					end
-
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+frameduration,holes[k],nil,nil)
-				end
-				
-				if thickness < 0.1 then 
-					playHitSound = false 
-				else 
-					playHitSound = true
-				end
-				
-				penPos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-				pos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-				qdist = qdist - thickness
-				
-				if not HasTag(hitbody, 'bone')then
-					if math.random() > 0.1 and hitPosMat=="metal" or hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or hitPosMat=="heavymetal"then
-						local c = randomFloat(.35,.7)
-						CustomPaintRGBA(pos, .15*holeamount, c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-						--DebugPrint("SpallOperations PaintRGBA Metal")
-					elseif hitPosMat=="glass" then
-						CustomPaintRGBA(pos, .15*holeamount, .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-						--DebugPrint("SpallOperations PaintRGBA Glass")
-					else
-						Paint(pos, .15*holeamount, "explosion")
-						--DebugPrint("SpallOperations PaintRGBA Explosion")
-					end
-				end
-				
-				loop = loop + 1
-				if thickness < 0.1 or not penetration then
-					local checkHit, _, _, checkShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, 0.1)), dir, holeIncrement)
-					
-					if checkShape == curShape and checkHit then
-						loop = 6 
-						qdist = 0
-						expended = momentum
-						projectile.active = false
-					end
-				end
-			end
-			if SpallOpDebugLines then
-				DebugPrint("Spall Direction (4) = " ..VecStr(dir))
-			end
-			
-			newpos = VecCopy(pos)
-			if math.max(qdist, 0) == 0 then projectile.active = false end
-			projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, math.max((projectile.momentum-expended)/projectile.momentum, 0.05))
-			projectile.momentum = momentum - expended
-			
-
-		end
-
-		if playHitSound then
-			-- Particles, sounds etc.
-			if projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum > 0.4 then
-				if totalSpall < 1500 then
-					VisualizeImpact(hitPos, projectile.predictedVelocity, "spall", math.random(5,15)/math.log(totalSpall), hitPosMat, r, g, b, a)
-				end
-			end
-		
-			PlayMaterialHitSound(hitPosMat, newpos, nil, RHA)
-		end
-	else
-	
-		projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*(1-math.clamp(projectile.drag*dt*w,0,1)) -- Decreases penetrating power of kinetic projectiles with air resistance
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, 1-math.clamp(projectile.drag*dt*w,0,1))
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(GRAVITY, dt)) -- Gravity drop
-	
-	end
-
-	-- Draw sprites for projectile trails and projectiles
-	PointLight(projectile.pos, randomFloat(.9,1), randomFloat(.4,.5), randomFloat(.2,.3), randomFloat(.025,.05))
-	VisualizeSpall(VecLerp(projectile.pos, newpos, .4), projectile.predictedVelocity, projectile.caliber*2)
-
-	if not projectile.passed then
-		local passed, passdist, passpos = GetProjectilePassInfo(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, GetCameraTransform().pos, 20)
-		if passed then
-			if projectile.type ~= "napalm" then
-				if projectileSpeed > 1050 then
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/medium_0.ogg"),passpos,(20-passdist))
-				else
-					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/flybys/slow_0.ogg"),passpos,(15-passdist))
-				end
-			end
-			projectile.passed = true
-			SetFloat("level.tabs.suppression",GetFloat("level.tabs.suppression")+50*projectile.mass)
-		end
-	end
-
-
-	-- General projectile operations
-	if (projectile.momentum <= 0 or projectile.timer <= 0 or projectileSpeed < 15) and not projectile.detonate then -- Disable projectile under specific conditions
-		projectile.active = false
-		if SpallOpDebugLines then
-			DebugPrint("Spall Operations projectile made inactive")
-		end
-	end
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, newpos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-	projectile.pos = newpos
-	projectile.timer = projectile.timer - dt
-
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		projectile.frametime = projectile.frametime + frameduration
-	end
-	if SpallOpDebugLines then
-		DebugPrint("End Spall Operations")
-	end
-end
-
-function PredictTrajectory(vInfo, Weapon, dt, Debug, maxDist)
-	-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Called")
-	local brt = TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(Weapon.body), Weapon.locations.emitter)
-	if Weapon.group.count>1 then
-		brt = TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(Weapon.body), Weapon.group.transforms[Weapon.group.nextpos])
-	end
-	local dir = TransformToParentVec(brt,Vec(0,0,1))
-
-	local rejectedbodies = {}
-	rejectedbodies[1] = Weapon.body
-	-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Get Current Shell")
-	local shellInfo = deepcopy(Weapon:getCurShell())
-	local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-	
-	-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Got Current Shell = " ..tostring(selected_shell).. " Shell Info = ")
-	-- DebugPrint(shellInfo)
-	
-	if shellInfo == nil then
-		-- DebugPrint("Shell info is nil! (incorrect identifier used)")
-		return Vec()
-	else
-		-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory shellInfo is not nil")
-		local step = dt -- seconds
-		local ppos = brt.pos
-		local nextpos = brt.pos
-		local vel = VecAdd(VecScale(dir,shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]),GetBodyVelocity(Weapon.body))
-		local totalDist = 0
-		if shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "guided" then vel = VecScale(vInfo.controls.aimdir,shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]) end
-		
-		for i = 1,1000/shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]/dt do
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Start Loop")
-			local newSpeed = VecLength(vel)
-
-			-- Drag
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Start Drag")
-			local p = AIRDENSITY
-			if IsPointInWater(ppos) then p = 997 end
-			local v = VecLength(VecSub(shellInfo.predictedVelocity[selected_shell], GetWindVelocity(brt.pos)))
-			local Cd = (shellStats[shellInfo.type[selected_shell]] or shellStats.ap).drag or 0.4
-			local A = 3.1416*(shellInfo.projectilecaliber[selected_shell]/2000)^2
-			local Fd = .5*p*v^2*Cd*A
-			local Ad = Fd/shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]
-			local dragForce = math.clamp(Ad*dt,0,newSpeed*.1) -- Temp fix for 8mm Mauser having a stupidly high drag force
-			local newSpeed = newSpeed - dragForce
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory End Drag Calc")
-			
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Start Propulsion Check")
-			local rocket = shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "guided" or shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "rocket" or shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "radar-guided"
-			if rocket then
-				vel = VecAdd(vel, VecAdd(VecScale(VecNormalize(vel),dt*shellInfo.propulsionforce[selected_shell]/shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]), VecScale(VecNormalize(VecSub(vel, GetWindVelocity(brt.pos))),-dragForce))) -- Air drag
-			else
-				vel = VecAdd(vel, VecScale(VecNormalize(VecSub(vel, GetWindVelocity(brt.pos))),-dragForce)) -- Air drag
-			end
-
-			if not (shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "guided" or shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] == "radar-guided") then
-				vel = VecAdd(vel,VecScale(GRAVITY,dt))
-			end
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory End Propulsion Check")
-
-			if maxDist~=nil and totalDist + VecLength(vel)*step > maxDist then
-				local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-				local len = math.clamp(VecLength(vel)*step, 0, maxDist-totalDist)
-				-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Ended (2)")
-				return VecAdd(ppos,VecScale(dir,len))
-			else
-				-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Update TotalDist")
-				totalDist = totalDist + VecLength(vel)*step
-			end
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Set Next Pos")
-			nextpos = VecAdd(ppos,VecScale(vel,step))
-			
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Find HitPos. Vel = " ..VecStr(vel))
-			local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-			local hit, dist = QueryRaycast(ppos,dir,VecLength(vel)*dt)
-			if hit then local hitpos = VecAdd(ppos,VecScale(dir,dist)) if Debug then DrawLine(ppos,hitpos,1,1,1,.5) end return hitpos end
-			
-			if Debug then
-				-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Draw Debug line")
-				DrawLine(ppos,nextpos,1,1,1,.5)
-			end
-			
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Set npos")
-			local npos = VecCopy(nextpos)
-			npos[2] = 0
-			if VecLength(VecSub(wBA,npos)) > wBmD or VecLength(VecSub(wBB,npos)) > wBmD then
-				-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Ended (1)")
-				return ppos
-			end
-			-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory End Loop")
-			ppos = nextpos
-		end
-		-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Ended")
-		return VecAdd(brt.pos,VecScale(dir,1000))
-	end
-	-- DebugPrint("PredictTrajectory Ended (4)")
-end
-
---------------------
--- Visual Effects --
---------------------
-
-function RealisticExplosion(pos, dir, size, mass, shrap, angle, momentum, smokemultiplier, RHA, time)
-	--DebugPrint("Realistic Explosion Called")
-	if RHA == nil then RHA = 0 end
-	if momentum == nil then momentum = 10 end
-	local pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(VecNormalize(dir), -0.1))
-
-	-- Calculating size
-	local hs = mass
-	local h1 = math.clamp(   (math.max(hs-.1,0))^.5*1.2,   0,70) --  +  (math.max(hs-.5,0))^1.6*.015
-	if hs < 2 then h1 = 1.1*hs end
-	local h2 = math.clamp(   (math.max(hs-.5,0))^.5*.8,   0,35) --  +  (math.max(hs-1,0))^1.6*.01
-	local h3 = math.clamp(   (math.max(hs-1.4,0))^.5*.6,   0,10)
-
-
-	-- Makehole
-	
-	-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-	-- Check for a new shape with an expanding radius. if it finds something then set that as the radius.
-	-- It checks every "searchIncrement" units. with 0.1 being 1 voxel
-	-- This is sensitive enough at the moment, but it can be made more sensitive
-		
-	-- The Radius Checker --
-		
-	-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-	-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-					
-	-- local holeRad = checkHoleRadius(pos, 0.1, h1, rejectedShapes)
-	
-	local holeRadMax = math.max(h3, math.max(h1, h2))
-	local blastMomentum = momentum
-	local rejectedShapes = {}
-	local pennedRHAValues = {}
-	local breakEarly = false
-	local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, holeRadMax)
-	while qHit do
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, holeRadMax)
-		--DebugPrint("Distance to detected point/Max Distance = " ..tostring(VecLength(VecSub(pos, qPoint))).. " / " ..tostring(holeRadMax))
-		blastMomentum = momentum*math.abs((VecLength(VecSub(pos, qPoint))/holeRadMax)-1)
-		--DebugPrint("Blast Distance Modifier = " ..tostring(math.abs(VecLength(VecSub(pos, qPoint))/holeRadMax)-1))
-		--DebugPrint("Blast Momentum/InitialMomentum = " ..tostring(blastMomentum).. " / " ..tostring(momentum))
-		local nrawRHA, _, nCHA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, 1)
-		local armorval = GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint, true))*10 or 0
-		if armorval == 10000 then armorval = 4 end
-		armorval = math.max(armorval, math.max(nrawRHA, nCHA))
-		--DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(armorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(blastMomentum).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-		if blastMomentum > (ERA_MOMENTUM_THRESHOLD/2) and HasTag(qShape, "ERA") or GetTagValue(qShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-			nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(qShape, "ERA")) or 0
-			nERA = nERAep
-			if GetTagValue(qShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-				nERA = 250
-			end
-			local holeamount = 0.1
-			MakeHole(qPoint, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-			VisualizeExplosion(qPoint, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-			ClearShape(qShape)
-			RemoveTag(qShape, "component")
-			RemoveTag(qShape, "ERA")
-			--DebugPrint("HE Hit and detonated ERA!")
-			table.insert(rejectedShapes, qShape)
-		elseif blastMomentum > armorval then
-			table.insert(rejectedShapes, qShape)
-			--DebugPrint("Add Shape to HE Radius")
-		else
-			--DebugPrint("HE Nonpen!")
-			breakEarly = true
-			break
-		end
-	end
-	local holeRad = 0
-	if #rejectedShapes ~= 0 and breakEarly == true then
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		local qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, holeRadMax) 
-		-- local lookAtQuat = QuatLookAt(pos, qPoint)
-		-- local localUp = Vec(0, 0, -1)
-		-- local pointVec = QuatRotateVec(lookAtQuat, localUp)
-		
-		-- QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		-- local dHit, dDist, _, _ = QueryRaycast(pos, pointVec, holeRadMax)
-		-- local dPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(pointVec, dDist))
-		
-		local DistToNewShape = VecLength(VecSub(pos, qPoint))
-		holeRad = DistToNewShape - 0.1
-	elseif #rejectedShapes ~= 0 and breakEarly == false then
-		holeRad = holeRadMax
-	end
-	
-	--DebugPrint("HE Radius 1 = " ..tostring(h1).. " Radius 2 = " ..tostring(h2).. " Radius 3 = " ..tostring(h3).. " Hole Radius = " ..holeRad.. " Max Hole Rad = " ..tostring(holeRadMax))
-	
-	h1 = math.min(h1, holeRad)
-	h2 = math.min(h2, holeRad)
-	h3 = math.min(h3, holeRad)
-	
-	MakeHole(pos,h1,h2,h3)
-	-- Makehole
-	-- if momentum >= RHA and 25*mass^.5 > RHA then
-		-- MakeHole(pos,h1,h2,h3)
-	-- else
-		-- MakeHole(pos,h1,h2,0)
-	-- end
-
-	if mass > 20 or h1 > 1 or h2 > 1 then
-		for i = 1, math.clamp(.5*(h1^2.5),5,250) do
-			local hPos = VecAdd(pos,RSV(randomFloat(0,h1)))
-			MakeHole(hPos,math.clamp(h1^.6, 0, holeRad),math.clamp(h2^.6, 0, holeRad),0)
-			Paint(hPos, 1.2*h1^.6, "explosion")
-		end
-	end
-	local commandLine = "explosion "..size.." "..(pos[1].." "..pos[2].." "..pos[3])
-	--DebugPrint("TABS_Command: "..commandLine)
-	TriggerEvent("TABS_Command", commandLine)
-	Paint(pos, math.min(holeRad*2, holeRadMax*1.4), "explosion")
-	
-	local heAngle = angle
-	
-	--DebugPrint("Angle = " ..tostring(heAngle))
-
-	-- Shrapnel
-	local mix = math.min(.05*shrap^.5,.9) -- Ratio of 'fast-calc' spall to normal spall
-	Spall(pos, VecScale(dir, math.clamp(mass*400,600,1200)), (1-mix)*shrap, heAngle, momentum,time)
-	Spall(pos, VecScale(dir, math.clamp(mass*400,600,1200)), mix*shrap*math.max(math.log10(mass),1), heAngle, momentum,time,true)
-	
-	--DebugPrint("Spall Spawned from Explosion = " ..tostring(((1-mix)*shrap)+(mix*shrap*math.max(math.log10(mass),1))))
-	
-	-- Fire
-	if mass > 1.5 and math.random() < .3*mass or mass > 5 then
-		for i = 1, math.clamp(mass*2,1,15) do
-			local fpos = VecAdd(pos, RSV(mass^.5))
-			SpawnFire(fpos)
-		end
-	end
-
-	-- Visuals and effects
-	smokemultiplier = smokemultiplier or 1
-	VisualizeExplosion(pos, size, size*2, smokemultiplier, true) -- Visual effects
-	CreateFlash(pos, size*50, math.clamp(0.2*size^.5,.3,2), mass) -- Flash and pushing bodies
-
-	local distToExp = VecLength(VecSub(pos, GetPlayerCameraTransform().pos))
-	ShakeCamera(math.min(10*size/distToExp,1))
-	--[[if distToExp < 10*size^.5 and GetPlayerVehicle()==0 then
-		SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth()-2.5*size/distToExp^2)
-	end]]
-	local distToCam = VecLength(VecSub(pos, GetCameraTransform().pos))
-	SetFloat("level.tabs.suppression",GetFloat("level.tabs.suppression")+math.max(size^.5-.2*distToCam,0))
-
-	local closeVol = math.max(20*size^.5,2)
-	if size > 30 then
-		-- if size > 100 then
-		-- 	PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Large, pos, 32*size^.5, distToCam, true)	
-		-- else
-			PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Large, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		-- end
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Large_MidDist, pos, 60*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Large_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_CoreBass, nil, 16*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("LARGE")
-	elseif size > 5 then
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_MedLarge, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_MedLarge_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Medium_MidDist, pos, 64*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_CoreBass, pos, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("MED-LARGE")
-	elseif size > 1.7 then
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Medium, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_MedLarge_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed, pos, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_CoreBass, pos, 8*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("MED-MED")
-	elseif size > 1 then
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Medium, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Medium_MidDist, pos, 64*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed, pos, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("MED")
-	elseif size >= .05 then -- .15
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed_MidDist, pos, 60*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("SMALL-MED")
-	--[[elseif size > .05 then
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Tiny, pos, closeVol)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed_MidDist, pos, 48*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_SmallMed_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("SMALL")]]
-	else
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Small, pos, closeVol, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Small_MidDist, pos, 40*size^.5, distToCam)
-		PlayDistantSound(SOUNDS.Explosion_Small_Dist, nil, 12*size^.5, distToCam)
-		-- DebugPrint("TINY")
-	end
-end
-
-function RealisticFire(pos, basesize, baseintensity, hash, tr)
-	if pos == Vec(0,0,0) or VecLength(pos) < .1 or pos == nil then return end
-	if hash == nil then hash = 0 end
-	tr = tr or Transform()
-
-	local offset = (hash%223)/17
-	local mult = .5+(hash%29)/29
-
-	local fac = (1+.2*math.sin(3.7*GetTime()*mult+offset)+.2*math.sin(5.3*GetTime()*mult+offset))
-	local amount = baseintensity*fac
-	local size = basesize*fac
-	local maxlife = 30
-	local minlife = math.min(math.max(.2, 2*baseintensity), .7)
-	local minchance = .15
-	local minsize = .2
-
-	-- Commented due to annoying bug
-	--[[local distToPlayer = VecLength(VecSub(GetPlayerTransform().pos,pos))
-	if distToPlayer > 0 and distToPlayer~=nil then
-		local reachMult = 2
-		SetPlayerHealth(GetPlayerHealth() - math.max(.01*(reachMult*amount/distToPlayer-amount^.5),0))
-	end]]
-
-	PlayLoop(SOUNDS.Fire_Loop,pos,4*baseintensity)
-	PointLight(VecAdd(pos,Vec(0,.2*amount^.5,0)), 1,0.5,0.2, 2*amount*(8+math.sin(3*GetTime()/115)+math.sin(7*GetTime()/213)))
-
-	if math.random() < .01*amount then
-		-- Paint(VecAdd(pos,RSV(2*size^.5)), size^.5, "explosion", .4)
-		PaintRGBA(VecAdd(pos,RSV(3*size^.8)), .5*size^.8, 0, 0, 0, .9, .4)
-	end
-	-- Brown rusted/burnt metal color
-	if math.random() < .01*amount then
-		PaintRGBA(VecAdd(pos,RSV(3*size^.8)), .5*size^.8, .3, .2, .15, .9, .4)
-	end
-	-- White ash color
-	--[[if math.random() < .005*amount then
-		PaintRGBA(VecAdd(pos,RSV(1.4*size^.5)), .5*size^.5, .8, .8, .8, .8, .4)
-	end]]
-
-
-	ParticleReset() -- FIRE
-    ParticleType("plain")
-	ParticleColor(randomFloat(.9,1),randomFloat(.6,.8),randomFloat(.4,.5),randomFloat(.9,1),randomFloat(.2,.3),randomFloat(.05,.1))
-    ParticleEmissive(5,2)
-    ParticleAlpha(1,0)
-    ParticleCollide(0)--,1,"linear",nil,.5
-    ParticleGravity(15+3*amount,-5)
-    ParticleSticky(0.5,.8)
-    ParticleStretch(10000*math.min(math.log10(amount+1),1))
-    ParticleTile(5)
-    ParticleRotation(randomFloat(-1,1)*math.clamp(amount-amount^2,.5,5),randomFloat(-.3,.3)*math.clamp(amount-amount^2,.5,5))
-    ParticleRadius(randomFloat(.4,.5)*math.max(size,minsize),randomFloat(.6,.8)*math.max(size,minsize))
-    ParticleDrag(.1,.2)
-    for i = 1, math.ceil(amount) do
-    	if math.random()<.1 then ParticleTile(1) end
-    	local dir = TransformToParentVec(tr, VecAdd(Vec(0,5*math.max(amount,.5),0),RSV(3*amount^(1/3))))
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.5*size)), dir, math.clamp(randomFloat(.3,.5)*amount, minlife, maxlife/20))
-	end
-
-	ParticleRadius(randomFloat(.4,.6)*math.max(size,minsize),randomFloat(1,1.5)*math.max(size,minsize))
-	local dir = TransformToParentVec(tr, VecAdd(Vec(0,5*math.max(amount,.5),0),RSV(3*amount^(1/3))))
-	SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.5*size)), dir, math.clamp(randomFloat(.3,.5)*amount, minlife, maxlife/20))
-
-	ParticleColor(randomFloat(.9,1),randomFloat(.3,.4),randomFloat(.2,.3),randomFloat(.9,1),randomFloat(.25,.35),randomFloat(.1,.2))
-	local dir = TransformToParentVec(tr, VecAdd(Vec(0,5*math.max(amount,.5),0),RSV(3*amount^(1/3))))
-	SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.5*size)), dir, math.clamp(randomFloat(.7,1)*amount, minlife, maxlife/20))
-
-
-	local smokepos = VecAdd(pos,Vec(0,math.clamp(randomFloat(.1,.8)*size,.1,1),0))
-	local smokeposradius = math.clamp(.5*size,.1,1.5)
-	local smokevel = TransformToParentVec(tr, VecAdd(Vec(0,5*amount,0),RSV(2*amount)))

-    ParticleType("smoke")

-

-	RandomParticleChance(math.max(amount*TABSSettings.sliders.ammorackparticlemult,minchance),
-		function()
-			local m = randomFloat(.3-math.min(.05*amount,.2),.7-math.min(.1*amount,.3))
-	    	ParticleColor(m*.7,m*.7,m*.7,m,m,m)
-	    	ParticleRotation(randomFloat(-1,1)*math.clamp(amount^2,.5,5),randomFloat(-.3,.3)*math.clamp(amount^2,.5,5))
-	    	ParticleRadius(.5*math.max(size,minsize), 7*math.max(size,minsize), "easein",nil,.1)
-

-		end
-	)
-	RandomParticleChance(math.max(amount*TABSSettings.sliders.ammorackparticlemult,minchance),
-		function()
-			local m = randomFloat(.3-math.min(.05*amount,.2),.7-math.min(.1*amount,.3))
-	    	ParticleColor(m*.7,m*.7,m*.7,m,m,m)

-

-
-    --[[ParticleReset() -- SPARKS
-	ParticleType("plain")

-		ParticleReset() -- SPIKEY (FLAMEY)

-		ParticleColor(m,m,m)
-		ParticleAlpha(1,0,"easein")

-end

-function RealisticSmoke(pos, basesize, baseintensity, hash, tr)
-	if pos == Vec(0,0,0) or VecLength(pos) < .1 or pos == nil then return end
-	if hash == nil then hash = 0 end
-	tr = tr or Transform()
-
-	local offset = (hash%223)/17
-	local mult = .5+(hash%29)/29
-
-	local fac = (1+.2*math.sin(3.7*GetTime()*mult+offset)+.2*math.sin(5.3*GetTime()*mult+offset))

-function VisualizeImpact(pos, vel, type, amount, mat, r, g, b, a)
-	if amount == 0 or amount ~= amount then return end
-	if type == "spall" or type == "bullet" then
-
-		if mat == "metal" or mat == "hardmetal" or mat == "heavymetal" then
-
-			ParticleReset() -- SPARKS
-			ParticleType("plain")
-			ParticleTile(6)
-			ParticleSticky(0)
-			ParticleRadius(0.01*math.clamp(amount^.5,1,3), 0.01)
-			ParticleAlpha(1, 0)
-			ParticleEmissive(5,0)
-			ParticleGravity(-10)
-			ParticleDrag(0.1)
-			for i = 1, math.random(5, math.clamp(2*amount^.5,5,50)) do
-				ParticleColor(randomFloat(.9,1),randomFloat(.3,.5),randomFloat(.2,.3),randomFloat(.7,.8),randomFloat(.3,.4),randomFloat(.1,.2))
-				SpawnParticle(pos,RSV(5), randomFloat(0.8,2))
-			end
-			PointLight(pos, 1, 0.75, 0.25, 0.01*amount)
-
-		else
-
-			ParticleReset()
-			ParticleType("plain")
-			ParticleTile(6)
-			ParticleSticky(0)
-			ParticleRadius(0.05, 0)
-			ParticleAlpha(a, 0)
-			ParticleEmissive(0)
-			ParticleCollide(0,1,"linear",nil,.3)
-			ParticleDrag(0.1)
-			ParticleGravity(-10)
-			local avg = math.max(((r+g+b)/3)^.5,.4)
-			local rdm = randomFloat(.8,1.2)
-    		if mat == "concrete" or mat == "stone" or mat == "masonry" or mat == "hardmasonry" or math.random() < .5 then
-		    	ParticleColor(r*rdm,g*rdm,b*rdm)
-		    else
-		    	ParticleColor(.84*avg*rdm,.78*avg*rdm,.71*avg*rdm)
-		    end
-		    
-			for i = 1, math.random(5, math.clamp(2*amount^.5,5,50)) do
-				ParticleRadius(math.random()/50+0.025, 0)
-				SpawnParticle(pos, VecAdd(RSV(randomFloat(5,8)),Vec(0,randomFloat(2,4),0)), randomFloat(4,10))
-			end
-
-			ParticleTile(3)
-			ParticleRadius(0.35, 0.5)
-			ParticleAlpha(a, 0)
-			-- for i = 1, math.random(1,3) do
-				SpawnParticle(pos, RSV(2), randomFloat(1,3))
-			-- end
-
-		end
-
-	else
-
-		if mat == "metal" or mat == "hardmetal" or mat == "heavymetal" then
-
-			VisualizeSparks(pos, amount)
-
-		else
-
-			ParticleReset()
-			ParticleType("plain")
-			ParticleTile(6)
-			ParticleSticky(0)
-			ParticleRadius(0.05, 0)
-			ParticleAlpha(a, 0)
-			ParticleEmissive(0)
-			ParticleCollide(0,1,"linear",nil,.3)
-			ParticleDrag(0.1)
-			ParticleGravity(-10)
-			local avg = math.max(((r+g+b)/3)^.5,.4)
-			local rdm = randomFloat(.8,1.2)
-    		if mat == "concrete" or mat == "stone" or mat == "masonry" or mat == "hardmasonry" or math.random() < .5 then
-		    	ParticleColor(r*rdm,g*rdm,b*rdm)
-		    else
-		    	ParticleColor(.84*avg*rdm,.78*avg*rdm,.71*avg*rdm)
-		    end
-		    
-			for i = 1, math.random(5, math.clamp(10*amount^.5,5,50)) do
-				ParticleRadius(randomFloat(.025,.05), 0)
-				local dir = VecAdd(RSV(randomFloat(20,30)),Vec(0,randomFloat(4,8),0))
-				SpawnParticle(pos, dir, randomFloat(4,10))
-			end
-
-			ParticleTile(3)
-			ParticleRadius(0.35, 0.5)
-			ParticleAlpha(a, 0)
-			ParticleDrag(0.4)
-			ParticleGravity(-1)
-			for i = 1, math.random(1,math.max(3*amount^.5,2)) do
-				SpawnParticle(pos, RSV(2*amount^.5), randomFloat(1,3))
-			end
-
-		end
-
-	end
-end
-
-function VisualizeHEATJet(startpos, endpos)
-	local len = VecLength(VecSub(endpos,startpos))
-
-	ParticleReset() -- FIREBALL
-	ParticleType("plain")
-	ParticleColor(1,0.7,0.5,0.3,0.2,0.15,"easeout")
-	ParticleEmissive(5,0)
-	ParticleAlpha(1,0)
-	ParticleCollide(0)
-	ParticleGravity(0)
-	ParticleSticky(0.5)
-	ParticleTile(3)
-	ParticleDrag(.1,.2)
-	for i = 1, 5*len do
-		ParticleRadius(2*randomFloat(0.01,0.02)*i^.5,2*randomFloat(0.1,0.15))
-		SpawnParticle(VecLerp(endpos,startpos,i/len/5),Vec(),randomFloat(.3,1))
-	end
-end
-
-function GetProjectilePassInfo(prjpos, prjvel, tgtpos, range)
-	local passed = false
-	local prjdir = VecNormalize(prjvel)
-	local D = VecSub(tgtpos,prjpos)
-
-	local r = VecScale(prjdir,VecDot(D,prjdir))
-	local passpos, passdist = nil,nil
-	local passdist = VecLength(VecSub(D,r))
-	if passdist <= range and VecLength(r) < VecLength(prjvel)*GetTimeStep() and VecDot(prjdir,r) > 0 then
-		passpos = VecAdd(prjpos,r)
-		passed = true
-	end
-	local artypassed = passdist <= range and VecLength(r) < 2.5*VecLength(prjvel) and VecDot(prjdir,r) > 0
-
-	return passed, passdist, passpos, artypassed
-end
-
-function VisualizeShooting(pos, dir, shellInfo, type, rejectedbodies, rocketsize, rocketSmokeAmount, selected_shell)
-	if selected_shell == nil then selected_shell = 1 end
-	if shellInfo == nil then return end
-	local amount = math.max(0.02*(shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]*shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]^2)^.5*shellInfo.count[selected_shell]^.5,0.25*shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell])
-	local shelltype = shellInfo.type[selected_shell]
-	local propulsion = shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell]
-	local barrelBody = rejectedbodies[1]
-	local brt = GetBodyTransform(barrelBody)
-	if type == "none" then return end
-	if type == nil or type == "" then type = "default" end
-	if not shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell] then shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell] = 10 end
-	-- PointLight(pos, 1,0.5,0.4, 2*amount*math.log10(amount+1))
-	if type=="mg" then
-		CreateFlash(pos, .001*shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]*shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]^2, math.clamp(shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell]*0.002,.05,.25))
-	else
-		CreateFlash(pos, 2*amount*math.log10(amount+1), math.clamp(shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell]*0.002,.05,.25))
-	end
-
-	if propulsion ~= "rocket" then
-		for i = 1,#rejectedbodies,1 do
-			QueryRejectBody(rejectedbodies[i])
-		end
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleType("smoke")
-		ParticleTile(3)
-		ParticleSticky(0.1)
-		ParticleEmissive(0, 0)
-		ParticleGravity(-1,.5, "easeout")
-		ParticleDrag(0.1)
-		ParticleCollide(1)
-		for i = 1, math.min(.5*amount^2,1000) do
-			local dir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(RSV(1),Vec(0,-1,0),.25))
-			QueryInclude("player")
-			local hit, dist, n, shape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.1)), dir, 2*amount^.5)
-			if hit then
-				local hitPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-				local mat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, hitPos, true)
-				if mat == "dirt" or mat == "masonry" and math.random()<.6 or mat == "hardmasonry" and math.random()<.4 or mat == "rock" and math.random()<.3 or mat == "plaster" and math.random()<.4 or mat == "concrete" and math.random()<.3 then
-					if math.random()<.001*dist^4 then
-						for i = 1, math.random(1,math.max(5*dist^.5,5)) do
-							local dir = VecSub(hitPos,pos)
-							local dist = VecLength(dir)
-							dir = VecScale(VecNormalize(dir), 1)
-							ParticleAlpha(a, 0, "easein")
-							ParticleColor(r, g, b)
-							ParticleRadius(randomFloat(.2,.3), .7)
-							SpawnParticle(VecAdd(hitPos,RSV(.2)), dir, randomFloat(3,6))
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	if shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell] < 15 or type == "mg" then -- Bullet
-
-		local energy = shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]*shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell]^2
-		SpawnParticle("smoke", pos, VecScale(dir, 2), 0.15)
-		ParticleType("plain")
-		ParticleTile(5)
-		ParticleColor(1, 0.6, 0.4, 1, 0.3, 0.1)
-		ParticleRadius(.00004*math.clamp(energy,2000,3000))
-		ParticleEmissive(5, 1)
-		ParticleCollide(0)
-		ParticleStretch(100)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.02)), VecScale(dir, amount), 0.15)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos,RSV(.02)), VecScale(dir, 2*amount), 0.15)
-
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleType("plain")
-		ParticleTile(6)
-		ParticleSticky(0)
-		ParticleRadius(randomFloat(.005,0.01), 0.0025)
