```diff
+#version 2
 function VisualizeShrap(pos,dir)
     ParticleReset() -- SPARKS
     ParticleType("plain")
@@ -5751,7 +133,7 @@
 
 	else
 
-		if smokemultiplier > 0 then
+		if smokemultiplier ~= 0 then
 		    ParticleReset() -- SMOKE
 		    ParticleType("smoke")
 		    ParticleEmissive(0)
@@ -6323,10 +705,6 @@
     ParticleReset()
 end
 
--------------
--- Utility --
--------------
-
 function SpentCasing(transform,dir,speed,rotindex,spread,caliber,type,sound)
 	dir = VecNormalize(dir)
 	dir = VecLerp(dir,RSV(1),spread)
@@ -6337,7 +715,7 @@
 	local curCasing = spentCasings.shells[spentCasings.shellNum]
 
 	curCasing.active = true
-	curCasing.vel = VecAdd(TransformToParentVec(GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody()),vel),GetPlayerVelocity())
+	curCasing.vel = VecAdd(TransformToParentVec(GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody()),vel),GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	curCasing.angvel = RSV(250*speed)
 	curCasing.angvel[rotindex] = -math.random(1000,2000)
 	curCasing.body = e[1]
@@ -6418,7 +796,6 @@
 	return materialstrength
 end
 
-
 function GetMaterialDensity(mat) -- Scaling from RHA per unit length
 	local materialdensity = 1900 -- Strength of masonry used as default
 	if mat == "glass" then materialdensity = 2500
@@ -6443,11 +820,11 @@
 	RHA = RHA or 0
 	local sound = SOUNDS.Impact_masonry
 	local vol = 1
-	if mat == "glass" then if momentum>0 then sound=SOUNDS.Impact_glassbreak else sound=SOUNDS.Impact_glass end vol=1.3
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\ballistics_pre_setbrush.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\ballistics_pre_setbrush.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\ballistics_pre_setbrush.lua
@@ -1,4803 +1,4 @@
---option for slowmo not to fade over time, getting the advantage of the more permanent debug setting
---fading faster as the new method of slowmo needs it (probably should )
---fading dependent on real time while playing rather than original time before slowmo
---fading bugs fixed and controls are clearer
---fixing bug where shooting without hitting anything there would be no debug lines

-function deepcopy(orig)
-    local orig_type = type(orig)
-    local copy
-    if orig_type == 'table' then
-        copy = {}
-        for orig_key, orig_value in next, orig, nil do
-            copy[deepcopy(orig_key)] = deepcopy(orig_value)
-        end
-        setmetatable(copy, deepcopy(getmetatable(orig)))
-    else
-        copy = orig
-    end
-    return copy
-end

-function DrawSlowMoProjectilePaths(FrameTime)
-	for i = 1, #debuglines do
-		local line = debuglines[i]
-		local time = line.time
-		local fadelinesafterseconds = 2
-		local fadelinesoverseconds = 15
-		
-		local framestravelled = line.duration
-		local finishtime = time+framestravelled
-		local a = 1-math.clamp(((FrameTime-finishtime)*SlowDownFactor/60-fadelinesafterseconds)/fadelinesoverseconds,0,1)
-
-		
-		if finishtime<FrameTime then -- if it's already timed past current point full line
-			if SlowMoFading == false then a = 1 end
-			if a >0 then
-				DebugLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2,a)
-				DrawLine(line.startpos,line.hitpos,1,line.color,line.color^2,a)
-			end
-			--DebugPrint("past" .. FrameTime .. " " .. time)
-		elseif time<FrameTime then
-			local f = (FrameTime-time)/framestravelled
-			local d = VecSub(line.hitpos,line.startpos)
-			local p2 = VecAdd(line.startpos,VecScale(d,f))
-			--DebugPrint("current " .. FrameTime .. " " .. time .. " " .. f)
-
-			DebugLine(line.startpos,p2,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-			DrawLine(line.startpos,p2,1,line.color,line.color^2)
-		end
-	end
-	for i = 1, #debugholes do
-		local time = debugholes[i].time
-		local age = (FrameTime-time)/100*SlowDownFactor
-				
-		if age>0 then
-			local a = 1
-			if age>0.1 then
-				a = 1-math.clamp((age-0.1)/5,0,1)
-			else
-				a = math.clamp((age)/0.1,0,1)
-			end
-
-			if a>0 then
-				local size = 0.14*a
-				if size<0.05 then size = 0.05 end
-				DrawSprite(ImpactSprite, Transform(debugholes[i].pos,camrot),size,size,1,0,0,a/3)
-			else
-				if SlowMoFading == false then
-					DebugCross(debugholes[i].pos,1,0,0)
-				end
-			end
-			
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-
-
-function SaveDebugInfo(time, pos,hitpos, color, frameduration)
-	--DebugPrint("SaveDebugInfo Called")
-	--SlowMo version
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then

-			if hitpos == nil then
-				local hole = {}
-				hole.pos = pos
-				hole.time = time
-
-				table.insert(debugholes, hole) --pos, hitpos, color (momentum / lastmomentum)
-			else
-				local line = {}
-				line.startpos = pos
-				line.hitpos = hitpos
-				line.color = math.max(color,0)
-				line.time = time
-				line.duration = frameduration
-				table.insert(debuglines,line)
-			end
-			if time>SlowMoTime then SlowMoTime = time end
-			if time and frameduration then SlowMoTimeLimit = math.max(SlowMoTimeLimit, time+frameduration) end
-		end
-	else
-		--default old version
-		if AlwaysSaveDebugLines or drawdebug then
-			if hitpos == nil then
-				local hole = {}
-				hole.pos = pos
-				table.insert(debugholes, hole) --pos, hitpos, color (momentum / lastmomentum)
-			else
-				local line = {}
-				line.startpos = pos
-				line.hitpos = hitpos
-				line.color = color
-				table.insert(debuglines,line)
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("SaveDebugInfo Ended")
-end
-
-function Shoot(pos, dir, shellInfo, rejectedbodies, ADS, accuracy, range, muzzletype, rocketsize, rocketSmokeAmount, IsSecond, vehicleTarget, selected_shell)
-	--DebugPrint("Shoot Function Called")
-	if type(shellInfo) == "string" then
-		shellInfo = GetShellInfoFromRegistry(shellInfo)
-	end
-	if shellInfo == nil then return end
-	if IsSecond == nil then IsSecond = false end
-	dir = VecLerp(dir,VecNormalize(RSV(math.random()^2)),accuracy*.25)
-	local morebodies = FindBodies('TABSNPCGUNACTIVE', true)
-	for i=1,#morebodies do
-		table.insert(rejectedbodies, morebodies[i])
-	end
-	
-	local selected_shell = selected_shell or 1
-	
-	if selected_shell == nil or selected_shell == "" then selected_shell = 1 end
-	
-	--DebugPrint("Shooting Shell Count = " ..tostring(shellInfo.count[selected_shell]).. " Selected Shell = " ..tostring(selected_shell))
-	--DebugPrint("ShellInfo = " ..tostring(shellInfo).. " Shell Name = " ..tostring(shellInfo.name[selected_shell]).. " Shell Type = " ..tostring(shellInfo.type[selected_shell]))
-	
-	for i=1,shellInfo.count[selected_shell] do
-		--DebugPrint("Shoot Shells Loop Start")
-		local thisDir = VecLerp(dir,VecNormalize(RSV(math.random()^2)),shellInfo.spread[selected_shell]*.25)
-
-		local barrelBody = rejectedbodies[1]
-		-- Initializing shell
-		
-		local nextShell = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-		
-		nextShell.pos = pos
-		--DebugPrint("Shellinfo Name = " ..tostring(shellInfo.name[selected_shell]))
-		nextShell.projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[shellInfo.type[selected_shell] or "ap"]) or deepcopy(shellStats.ap)
-
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecScale(thisDir, shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell])
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(nextShell.predictedVelocity, GetBodyVelocity(barrelBody))
-		nextShell.propulsion = (shellInfo.propulsion[selected_shell] or nil or "ballistic")
-		nextShell.propulsionforce = shellInfo.propulsionforce[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.maxdist = shellInfo.maxrange[selected_shell] or 5000
-		if shellInfo.navconst ~= nil then 
-			nextShell.navconst = shellInfo.navconst[selected_shell]
-		else
-			nextShell.navconst = .5
-		end
-		
-		if shellInfo.splashrange ~= nil then 
-			nextShell.splashrange = shellInfo.splashrange[selected_shell]
-		else
-			nextShell.splashrange = 2
-		end
-
-		nextShell.totaldist = 0
-
-		nextShell.rejectedbodies = rejectedbodies
-
-		-- General shell info
-		nextShell.type = string.lower(shellInfo.type[selected_shell])
-
-		nextShell.mass = shellInfo.mass[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.momentum = shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.maxmomentum = shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.caliber = shellInfo.projectilecaliber[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.shellcaliber = shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.drag = nextShell.projStats.drag or 0.35
-
-		-- Tracer
-		nextShell.tracer = shellInfo.tracer[selected_shell] or false
-		nextShell.tracercolorr = shellInfo.tracercolorr[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.tracercolorg = shellInfo.tracercolorg[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.tracercolorb = shellInfo.tracercolorb[selected_shell]
-
-		-- Spall and shrapnel
-		nextShell.canistertype = shellInfo.canistertype[selected_shell] or "spall"
-		nextShell.canisterpen = shellInfo.canisterpen[selected_shell] or 5
-		nextShell.canisterangle = shellInfo.canisterangle[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.canisteramount = shellInfo.canisteramount[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.canistercaliber = shellInfo.canistercaliber[selected_shell] or 0
-		
-		
-		nextShell.spallamount = shellInfo.spallamount[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.spallangle = shellInfo.spallangle[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.shrapnelamount = shellInfo.shrapnelamount[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.explosivepayload = shellInfo.explosivepayload[selected_shell] or 0
-
-		-- Shell-specific stats
-		nextShell.timer = (shellInfo.timer[selected_shell] or nil or 20)
-		nextShell.impacted = false
-		nextShell.fuzetype = shellInfo.fuzetype[selected_shell] or "impact"
-		nextShell.fuzedist = shellInfo.fuzedist[selected_shell] or 1
-		nextShell.fuzesense = shellInfo.fuzesense[selected_shell]
-		nextShell.incendiary = shellInfo.incendiary[selected_shell] or false
-		nextShell.forcedetonate = 0 -- Used for HE shells
-		nextShell.range = 5000
-		if range~=nil and range~=0 then nextShell.range = math.max(range,20) end
-
-		nextShell.smokeradius = shellInfo.smokeradius[selected_shell] or 0
-		nextShell.smoketime = shellInfo.smoketime[selected_shell] or 0
-
-		nextShell.frametime = 0
-
-		nextShell.APSlights = FindAPSLights()
-		nextShell.vehicletarget = vehicleTarget
-
-		if (shellInfo.projectilecaliber[selected_shell] > 15 or shellInfo.momentum[selected_shell] > 40) and shellInfo.count[selected_shell]==1 then -- Stops shotgun pellet collisions
-			local vox = shellInfo.voxobject[selected_shell] or shellInfo.type[selected_shell]
-			local e = Spawn('<body tags="visualShellBody"><vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/shellvox/shells.vox" object="'..vox..'" scale="'..tostring(nextShell.caliber/1000)..'"/></>',Transform(pos,QuatLookAt(pos,VecAdd(pos,dir))))
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = e[1]
-		else
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = 0
-		end
-
-		nextShell.cinematiccam = shellInfo.cinematiccam
-		if nextShell.cinematiccam then
-			nextShell.ccrx = randomFloat(-30,10)
-			nextShell.ccry = randomFloat(-60,60)
-			nextShell.ccrz = randomFloat(-15,15)
-		end
-
-		nextShell.ricochetCount = 0
-		nextShell.active = true
-		
-		TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum] = deepcopy(nextShell)
-		loadedShell = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum]
-		
-		--loadedShell.active = true
-		if NoProjectileLimit then
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = (TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum % PROJECTILE_LIMIT) + 1
-		else
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum + 1
-		end
-		if TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()] then
-			loadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()]
-		elseif(TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]) then 
-			loadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]
-		end
-		
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Shoot Shell Active")
-	end
-
-	if IsSecond == false then
-		-- local amount = .0025*shellInfo.shellcaliber*shellInfo.velocity^.5*math.log(shellInfo.recoil)
-		
-		VisualizeShooting(loadedShell.pos, dir, shellInfo, muzzletype, rejectedbodies, rocketsize, rocketSmokeAmount, selected_shell)
-		
-		local barrelBody = rejectedbodies[1]
-		ApplyBodyImpulse(barrelBody, pos, VecScale(dir, -shellInfo.recoil[selected_shell]))
-	end
-
-
-	if SlowmoDebugLines then
-		DebugCounter = 0
-		ShowSlowMoCounter = 0
-		SlowMoTime = 0
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("Shoot Function Ended")
-end
-
-function FindAPSLights()
-	local lights = FindLights("APS", true)
-	local APSlist = {}
-
-	for i = 1, #lights do
-		local light = lights[i]
-		lInfo = {}
-		lInfo.light = light
-
-		lInfo.type = "HardKill"
-		if HasTag(light, "type") then lInfo.type = GetTagValue(light, "type") end
-
-		lInfo.angle = 150
-		lInfo.range = 10
-		lInfo.minVel = 100
-		lInfo.maxVel = 1200
-		lInfo.minCal = 25
-		if HasTag(light, "angle") then lInfo.range = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "angle")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "range") then lInfo.range = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "range")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "minVel") then lInfo.minVel = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "minVel")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "maxVel") then lInfo.maxVel = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "maxVel")) end
-		if HasTag(light, "minCal") then lInfo.minCal = tonumber(GetTagValue(light, "minCal")) end
-
-		table.insert(APSlist,lInfo)
-	end
-
-	return APSlist
-end
-
-
-
-function HandlePropulsion(projectile)
-	--DebugPrint("HandlePropulsion Started")
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local rWV = VecSub(projectile.predictedVelocity, GetWindVelocity(projectile.pos)) -- Relative wind velocity
-
-	-- Drag
-	local p = AIRDENSITY
-	if IsPointInWater(projectile.pos) then p = 997 end
-	local v = VecLength(rWV)
-	local Cd = projectile.drag
-	local A = math.pi*(projectile.caliber/2000)^2
-	local Fd = .5*p*v^2*Cd*A
-	local Ad = Fd/projectile.mass
-	local dragForce = math.clamp(Ad*dt,0,projectileSpeed*.1) -- Temp fix for 8mm Mauser having a stupidly high drag force
-	local oldSpeed = projectileSpeed
-	
-	projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(VecNormalize(rWV), math.abs(dragForce)*-1)) -- Air drag
-	if projectile.propulsion ~= "guided" and projectile.propulsion ~= "radar-guided" then projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(GRAVITY, dt)) end -- Gravity drop
-	projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		
-	-- Propulsion
-	if string.sub(ptype,1,2) == "ap" or ptype == "bullet" then
-		-- Decreases penetrating power of kinetic projectiles with air resistance
-		-- **Note that ^.5 might account for kinetic energy loss rather than just basing it solely on speed? May not be entirely realistic, but it seems like a good general approximation
-		projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*math.clamp((projectileSpeed/oldSpeed)^.5,0,1)
-	end
-	-- DebugPrint("MTM: "..projectile.momentum)
-	-- DebugPrint("DST: "..projectile.totaldist)
-	-- DebugPrint("POS: " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-	-- DebugPrint("SPD: "..projectileSpeed)
-	-- DebugPrint("DIR: " ..VecStr(dir))
-	-- DebugPrint("PREDICTEDVELOCITY: " ..VecStr(predictedVelocity))
-	-- DebugPrint("PROP: "..projectile.propulsion)
-	-- DebugPrint("PROPFORCE: "..projectile.propulsionforce)
-	-- DebugPrint("FRC: "..(projectileSpeed/oldSpeed)^2)
-	-- DebugPrint()
-	if projectile.propulsionforce > 0 then -- projectile.propulsion == "guided" or projectile.propulsion == "rocket" or projectile.propulsion == "radar-guided"
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(dir, projectileSpeed + dt*projectile.propulsionforce/projectile.mass)
-		projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.totaldist >= projectile.maxdist then
-		projectile.detonate = true
-	end
-
-	local aimpos, aimdir
-	if projectile.vInfo ~= nil then
-		aimpos, aimdir = VecCopy(projectile.vInfo.controls.aimpos), VecCopy(projectile.vInfo.controls.aimdir)
-	end
-
-
-	if projectile.propulsion == "guided" and aimpos ~= nil and aimdir ~= nil and not projectile.detonate then
-	-- ATGM guidance
-		local projection = VecScale(aimdir, VecDot(VecSub(projectile.pos,aimpos),aimdir))
-		local projrelpos = VecSub(projectile.pos, aimpos)
-		local perpdiff = VecSub(projection, VecAdd(projrelpos,VecScale(aimdir,-.5*projectileSpeed)))
-		if projectile.fuzetype == "top-down" then perpdiff = VecAdd(perpdiff, Vec(0,projectile.fuzedist*.8,0)) end
-
-		local pdl = math.clamp(VecLength(perpdiff),0,.02*projectileSpeed)
-		local pdn = VecNormalize(perpdiff)
-
-		local velprojectionlen = math.clamp(VecDot(projectile.predictedVelocity, pdn),0,.02*projectileSpeed)
-
-		-- DebugLine(VecAdd(projrelpos,aimpos),VecAdd(projection,aimpos))
-		pda = VecAdd(VecAdd(VecScale(pdn, .004*pdl), VecScale(VecSub(perpdiff,VecScale(pdn,velprojectionlen)),.002)), VecScale(pdn,-.0015*velprojectionlen))
-		pda = VecScale(pda, math.max(projectile.propulsionforce/projectile.mass, 10*projectile.mass))
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(VecNormalize(VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, pda)), projectileSpeed)
-
-	elseif projectile.propulsion == "radar-guided" then
-	-- Missile guidance (the missile knows where it is)
-
-		local VB = GetVehicleBody(projectile.vehicletarget)
-		local tpos = GetBodyTransform(VB)
-		local tdir = VecNormalize(VecSub(tpos,projectile.pos))
-		local tvel = GetBodyVelocity(VB)
-		local dist = VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos,tpos))
-		local N = projectile.navconst
-		local v = VecLength(VecSub(projectile.predictedVelocity,tvel))
-		local splashdist = projectile.splashrange
-
-		local missileT = Transform(projectile.pos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,VecAdd(projectile.pos,dir)))
-		local dirperp = TransformToParentVec(missileT,Vec(1,0,0))
-		local dirvert = TransformToParentVec(missileT,Vec(0,1,0))
-		local spdH = VecScale(dirperp,VecDot(dirperp,tvel)/dist)
-		local spdV = VecScale(dirvert,VecDot(dirvert,tvel)/dist)
-
-		local dLOS = VecAdd(spdH,spdV)
-
-		projectile.predictedVelocity = VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(dLOS,N*v*dt))
-		dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-		projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-		if dist <= splashdist then
-			projectile.detonate = true
-		end
-
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("HandlePropulsion Ended")
-end
-
-function GetQueryDist(projectile)
-	--DebugPrint("GetQueryDist Started")
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local minArmDist = projectile.minarmdist or 20
-
-	local qdist = projectileSpeed*dt
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist qDist = " ..tostring(qdist))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist projectileSpeed = " ..tostring(projectileSpeed))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist time step = " ..tostring(dt))
-	-- DebugPrint("GetQDist Velocity = " ..VecStr(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	if string.sub(ptype,1,2)=="ap"and projectile.explosivepayload>0 then -- APHE
-		if projectile.momentum > 0 then
-			if projectile.posAtImpact ~= nil then
-				qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0) - VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos, projectile.posAtImpact))
-				-- DebugPrint(VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos, projectile.posAtImpact)))
-				if qdist <= 0 then
-					projectile.fuzeTripped = true
-					qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0)
-				end
-			elseif projectile.fuzeTripped then
-				qdist = math.max(projectile.fuzedist,0)
-			end
-		else
-			qdist = 0.01
-		end
-		if projectile.posAtImpact == nil and projectile.fuzeTripped == true then
-			projectile.posAtImpact = VecCopy(projectile.pos)
-		end
-	elseif projectile.fuzetype == "timed" then
-		local targetDist = projectile.range+projectile.fuzedist
-		qdist = math.clamp(qdist, targetDist-projectile.totaldist, minArmDist-projectile.totaldist)
-		if projectile.totaldist+projectileSpeed*dt > targetDist and projectile.totaldist >= minArmDist then
-			qdist = targetDist-projectile.totaldist
-			projectile.detonate = true
-		end
-	end
-	projectile.totaldist = projectile.totaldist + qdist
-	--DebugPrint("GetQueryDist Ended")
-	return qdist
-end
-
-function ManageAPS(projectile, info)
-	--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Called")
-	if #projectile.APSlights == 0 then return info.newpos end
-	
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-	-- Active Protection Systems (APS)
-	for i, APSlight in pairs(projectile.APSlights) do
-
-		local lT = GetLightTransform(APSlight.light)
-		local APSdir = TransformToParentVec(lT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-		local dot = VecDot(APSdir,dir)
-		local angle = math.acos(dot)*180/math.pi
-		local APSpos = lT.pos
-
-		-- Needs to detect is a projectile is coming towards the APS, because projectiles moving away behave weirdly
-		if APSlight.type == "HardKill" then
-			if angle < APSlight.angle/2 then
-
-				local passed, passdist, passpos = GetProjectilePassInfo(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, APSpos, APSlight.range)
-				
-				temptotaldist = projectile.totaldist + VecLength(VecSub(passpos,APSpos))
-				
-				d2p = VecNormalize(VecSub(VecAdd(passpos, VecScale(dir,-APSlight.range)),APSpos))
-
-				if projectileSpeed >= APSlight.minVel and projectileSpeed <= APSlight.maxVel and projectile.caliber >= APSlight.minCal then
-					if VecLength(VecAdd(d2p,dir)) < .2 then
-						if passed then
-
-							local APSamount = tonumber(GetTagValue(APSlight.light, "APS"))
-							if APSamount == nil then APSamount = 0 end
-
-							if APSamount > 0 then
-								if passdist < APSlight.range then -- and VecLength(VecAdd(VecNormalize(VecSub(projectile.pos,APSpos)),dir))<.5
-									local newpos = VecAdd(passpos, VecScale(dir,-math.min(APSlight.range,temptotaldist)))
-									projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*APS_MOMENTUM_REDUCTION_FRACTION
-									SetTag(APSlight, "APS", APSamount-1)
-
-									-- Visuals
-									local shootDir = VecNormalize(VecSub(newpos, APSpos))
-									VisualizeShooting(APSpos, shootDir, GetShellInfoFromRegistry("50bmg"), "mg", {}, 0, 1, 1)
-									PlayDistantSound(LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/grenade_launcher_0.ogg"), APSpos, 2)
-									VisualizeExplosion(newpos, .1, .2, 1)
-
-									if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then
-										projectile.detonate = true
-										--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-										return newpos
-									else
-										--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-										return info.newpos
-									end
-									
-								end
-							else
-								table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-							end
-
-						end
-					end
-				else
-					table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-				end
-			end
-		elseif APSlight.type == "Dazzler" then
-			if projectile.propulsion == "guided" then
-
-				local lT = GetLightTransform(APSlight.light)
-				local APSdir = TransformToParentVec(lT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-				local dot = VecDot(APSdir,dir)
-				local angle = math.acos(dot)*180/math.pi
-
-				if angle < APSlight.angle/2 and (VecLength(VecSub(info.newpos,APSpos)) < APSlight.range or VecLength(VecSub(projectile.pos,APSpos)) < APSlight.range) then
-					local t1 = GetTime()*5.7
-					local t2 = GetTime()*2.1
-					local adjust = 0.0001/GetTimeStep()
-
-					local atgmTrans = Transform(projectile.pos,QuatLookAt(projectile.pos,VecAdd(projectile.pos,dir)))
-					local jamDir = TransformToParentVec(atgmTrans,Vec((math.sin(t1)+math.sin(t2))*adjust,(math.cos(t1)+math.cos(t2))*adjust,0))
-					projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(VecAdd(dir,jamDir),projectileSpeed)
-				end
-
-			else
-				table.remove(projectile.APSlights, i)
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("ManageAPS Ended")
-	return info.newpos
-
-end
-
-function CheckArmourValue(Shape, hitCos)
-	--DebugPrint("CheckArmourValue Called")
-	local rawRHA = 0
-	local nRHA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "RHA") then
-		rawRHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "RHA")) or 0
-		nRHA = rawRHA/hitCos or 0
-	end
-	-- CHA (cast homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-	local nCHA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "CHA") then
-		nCHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "CHA")) or 0
-	end
-	-- CA (composite armor) value from shape tag
-	local rawCA = 0
-	local nCA = 0
-	if HasTag(Shape, "CA") then
-		rawCA = tonumber(GetTagValue(Shape, "CA")) or 0
-		nCA = rawCA/hitCos or 0
-		--DebugPrint("rawCA = " ..tostring(rawCA).. " nCA = " ..tostring(nCA))
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("CheckArmourValue Ended")
-	return rawRHA, nRHA, nCHA, nCA
-end
-
-function checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, maxRadius, rejectedShapes)
-	--DebugPrint("checkHoleRadius Called")
-	-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-	-- Check for a new shape with an expanding radius. if it finds something then set that as the radius.
-	-- It checks every 0.001 units, which is a 10th of a voxel 
-	-- This is sensitive enough at the moment, but it can be made more sensitive
-	local searchIncrement = searchIncrement
-	local searchRadius = searchIncrement
-	local hasHitShape = false
-	local hasHitDist = 0
-	local localUp = Vec(0, 0, -1)
-	
-	QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-	local qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, maxRadius*4)
-	local lookAtQuat = QuatLookAt(pos, qPoint)
-	local pointVec = QuatRotateVec(lookAtQuat, localUp)
-						
-	while hasHitShape == false and searchRadius < maxRadius do
-	
-		QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-		hasHitShape, hasHitDist, _, hasHitHandle = QueryRaycast(pos, pointVec, searchRadius, searchRadius)
-		if hasHitShape == false then
-			searchRadius = searchRadius + searchIncrement
-		end
-	end
-						
-	searchRadius = math.max(searchRadius - searchIncrement, 0)
-	--DebugPrint("checkHoleRadius Ended")
-	return searchRadius
-end
-
-function SimulatePenetration(projectile, info)
-	--DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Called")
-	--DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Projectile Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-	local projectileSpeed = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local projStats = projectile.projStats
-	local dir = info.dir
-	local penLoopHasRun = false
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, info.hitPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-
-	--------------------
-	-- Armor Pen Loop --
-	--------------------
-
-	local expended = 0
-	local playedHitSound = false
-	if projectile.momentum > 0 then
-	--DebugPrint("PenLoop Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-
-		-- Initialize armor depth calculation (iterates through armor until the other side)
-		local air = false
-		local pos = VecCopy(info.newpos)

-			-- Calculates the Cosine of the hit using the normal vector and shell direction
-			hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(lastNormal, dir))
-			
-			-- If the normal is 0, 0, 0 then that means that it is a direct perpendicular hit and the cosine should be 1
-			-- That basically means that the ratio of rawRHA to nRHA is 1:1
-			-- We divide by the cosine to get the Hypotenuse, and use the rawRHA value as the adjacent
-			-- This gives us the proper ratio
-			if VecLength(lastNormal)==0 then hitCos = 1 end

-			DevPrint("Angle of Impact After Redirect: "..hitangle)
-			
-			local reject = {}
-			local iteration = 0 -- Prevents infinite while loop
-
-			-- Calculates armour of unarmoured parts via the strength of the material
-			armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(info.mat.hitPosMat)*10)/hitCos
-			-- Gets the highest armour value out of RHA, CHA, and the base material value
-			-- Funnily enough this means that sometimes your set RHA or CHA value is overwritten by the higher base material value
-			-- Its unlikely to happen though unless you have an RHA/CHA value of 2, or some other similarly low number
-			-- Even funnier is that the original calculation for the armour value was worse
-			-- It would multiply the base material strength by 100 before accounting for hit angle
-			-- which meant that with the busted cosine it would majorly overestimate thickness of armour
-			-- Now its much more reasonable, since its calculated per penetration iteration it is only the base material value / cosine
-			armorval = math.max(math.max(nRHA, armorval), nCHA)
-			overmatchArmorval = math.max(math.max(rawRHA, armorval), nCHA)

-			local rawRHANew = 0
-			local nRHANew = 0
-			local nCHANew = 0

-			local thickness = 0
-

-			-- DebugPrint("hitCos = " ..tostring(hitCos).. " hit angle = " ..tostring(hitangle).. " armorval = " ..tostring(armorval))

-				--DebugPrint("Penetrated")

-				-- Ignore the hit shape, search for the next shape along the path

-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)

-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-					--DebugPrint("Hit invisible shape, ignoring")
-					-- This check ignores invisible shapes

-				end
-				
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)

-				QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-				
-				QueryRejectShapes(thicknessDetectionShapeRejectGroup)
-				local distHit2, distDist2, _, distShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-				-- Set the max thickness to the distance to the next shape. this defaults to the qdist if no shape is found due to how QueryRaycast works
-				
-				local maxDist = distDist - distDist2
-				--DebugPrint("maxDist/Thickness set to " ..tostring(maxDist).. " dist1 = " ..tostring(distDist).. " dist2 = " ..tostring(distDist2))
-				
-				-- Calculate the armour thickness for the distance detected, this is for CHA and unarmoured parts

-				local armourThickness = maxDist*armorval
-				
-				if rawRHA == 0 then

-						thickness = maxDist

-							table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-						end
-					end
-					-- Calculate the max amount of armour that the shell can go through, set the thickness to this

-					expended = expended + (thickness*armorval)
-					
-				else
-					thickness = maxDist

-						table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)

-						else
-							expended = expended + armorval
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			else
-				--DebugPrint("Non Penetrated")
-				thickness = 0
-				expended = expended + armorval
-				penetration = false
-				pennedShapes = {}
-			end
-			
-			if thickness <= 0 then 
-				penetration = false
-				--DebugPrint("Non Penetrated (1)")
-				pennedShapes = {}
-			end

-			
-			--DebugPrint("Calculated Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " qdist = " ..tostring(qdist))

-			if nERA > 0 then

-				MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)

-				RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-				RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-				expended = expended + nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)

-				
-				local holePunchIncrement = math.min(thickness/2, 0.05)
-				local nHoles = math.max(thickness/holePunchIncrement,0)
-				
-				if thickness <= 0 then
-					nHoles = 0
-				end
-				--DebugPrint("Set Holes to " ..nHoles.. " Thickess = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Hole Punch Increment = " ..holePunchIncrement)
-				
-				nHoles = math.floor(nHoles)
-				-- round the number of holes down, this is because the other functions expect a whole number and would round it down anyway.

-				
-				holes = {}
-				holeMaterials = {}
-				holeRadius = {}
-				
-				-- The Hole Puncher --
-				
-				if penetration == true then
-					
-					--DebugPrint("Penetration check passed")
-					for i = 1, nHoles do
-						-- If the hole is the first one then hardcode it to the hit position to prevent unintended consequences
-						local hPos=VecCopy(pos)
-						if i > 1 then
-							if holePunchIncrement*(i-1) > thickness then
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, thickness))
-							else
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, holePunchIncrement*(i-1)))
-							end
-						end
-
-						-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-						-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-						-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-						
-						local rejectedShapes = pennedShapes
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = curShape
-						QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-						local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)
-						while qHit do
-							QueryRejectShapes(rejectedShapes)
-							qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(hPos, projRadius)

-							local holearmorval = GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint)) or 0
-							if holearmorval == 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-							holearmorval = math.max(holearmorval, math.max(nrawRHA, nCHA))
-							--DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Remaining penetration = " ..tostring(momentum - expended).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-							if momentum - expended > holearmorval or armorval > holearmorval then

-							else
-								--DebugPrint("Hole Radius Nonpen!")
-								break
-							end
-						end
-						--DebugPrint("Ended Hole Radius Shape Checker")
-						
-						local searchRadius = checkHoleRadius(hPos, math.min((holeIncrement/10), projRadius), projRadius, rejectedShapes)
-						
-						-- Set the hole radius to 90% of the search radius from the previous function 
-						-- this ensures that there is no way to break whatever it detected
-						-- Theoretically the radius could also just be walked back by 1, 
-						-- but this works fine at the moment and I dont want to break it
-						
-						--local holeRad = math.clamp(searchRadius, 0, math.min(projRadius, (thickness-(holeIncrement*(i-1)))))
-						local holeRad = searchRadius
-						
-						--DebugPrint("Hole No." ..tostring(i).. " Hole Radius = " ..tostring(holeRad).. " Search Radius = " ..tostring(searchRadius).. " Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Adjusted Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness-((i-1)*holeIncrement)).. " HitShape/curShape/qShape = " ..tostring(hasHitHandle).. " / " ..tostring(curShape).. " / " ..tostring(qShape))
-						
-						if holeRad > 0 then
-							-- Run a material check, failure to find any material means that we have either hit air or left the current shape
-							-- either way that is bad and leads to the penetration being cancelled prematurely
-							-- due to the way that thickness is calculated this means that it is always an air pocket
-							local mat=GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, hPos)
-							if mat == "" or mat == nil then
-								-- DebugPrint("Found Null material. Recalculated to material = " ..tostring(mat))
-								
-								-- If using CHA or no armour then recoup the penetration that was not used
-								-- this is done by using the remaining nHoles
-								-- since they are thickness/holeIncrement if we multiply them by holeIncrement then we get thickness back
-								-- using this leftover thickness we can calculate how much was already calculated
-								-- we can then multiply that by the armorval to get the thickness that remains
-								-- then we simply remove that amount from the expended penetration value
-								local nHoleHit, _, _, nHoleShape = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeRad)
-								if table.contains(pennedShapes, nHoleShape) then
-									mat=GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(nHoleShape, hPos)
-									--DebugPrint("Detected Penned shape during hole generation")
-								else
-									nHoleHit = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeIncrement)
-									if not nHoleHit then
-										--DebugPrint("Detected air during hole generation")
-										air = true
-									end
-									local remainingHoles = thickness - (#holes*holeIncrement)
-									thickness = thickness - remainingHoles
-									if rawRHA == 0 then
-										local remainingDist = remainingHoles*holeIncrement
-										expended = expended - (remainingDist*armorval)
-									end
-									--DebugPrint("Recalculated Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-									break
-								end
-							end
-							table.insert(holes, hPos)
-							table.insert(holeRadius, holeRad)
-							--DebugPrint("HoleGen No." ..tostring(#holes).. " Hole Position = " ..VecStr(hPos).. " Hole Radius = " ..holeRadius[#holeRadius].. " Proj Radius = " ..projRadius.. " Distance to detected shape = " ..tostring(searchRadius))
-							--DebugPrint("nHole Generated " ..tostring(#holes).. " / " ..tostring(nHoles))
-							--DebugPrint("Hole Material = " ..tostring(mat))
-							table.insert(holeMaterials, mat)
-							
-							-- The HoleMaterials variable used to be used to make sure that Hardmetal wasnt broken by non hardmetal shapes being impacted
-							-- However the new system does not require it
-							-- It may still be useful though, so it remains
-							
-							if not HasTag(info.hitbody, 'bone') then
-								if mat=="metal" or mat=="hardmetal" or mat=="heavymetal" then
-									local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-									CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-								elseif mat=="glass" then
-									CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-								else
-									Paint(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.1,0.7), "explosion")
-								end
-							end
-						else
-							local nHoleHit = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeIncrement)
-							if not nHoleHit then
-								--DebugPrint("Detected air during hole generation")
-								air = true
-							else
-								pennedShapes = {}
-								pennedRHAValues = {}
-							end
-							local remainingHoles = thickness - (#holes*holeIncrement)
-							thickness = thickness - remainingHoles
-							if rawRHA == 0 then
-								local remainingDist = remainingHoles*holeIncrement
-								expended = expended - (remainingDist*armorval)
-							end
-							
-							--DebugPrint("Recalculated Thickness (1) = " ..tostring(thickness))
-							break
-						end
-					end
-				else
-					--DebugPrint("Penetration check failed (1)")
-					-- Sets the "hole position" to the penetration position to initialise it just in case
-					-- The old system from Tess always ran the hole puncher regardless of penetration so this variable was initialised there originally
-					local hPos = VecCopy(pos)
-				end
-				--DebugPrint("Penetration check ended")
-				local Holecount = 0
-				local h = #holes
-				--DebugPrint("Number of holes to make = " ..tostring(h))
-				for k = 1,h do
-					local holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.13+math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0,.04),.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m adjusted for material strength
-					local holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.12,.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-					local holeamount3 = holeRadius[k] -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-					if projectileSpeed*projectile.mass < 10 then
-						holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.07,.5)
-						holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.065,.5)
-					end
-					
-					
-					Holecount = MakeHole(holes[k], holeamount, holeamount2, holeamount3, true)
-					--DebugPrint("Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]))
-					--if Holecount > 0 then DebugPrint("HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3)) end
-					SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+info.frameduration,holes[k],nil,nil)
-				end
-				
-				-- Check if there is a new shape in the path post-penetration
-				-- This is used to determine if spall should be spawned in
-				-- If if finds nothing then it spawns in Spall
-				-- pennedShapes is only incremented by RHA shapes, or if the shape was fully penetrated CHA
-				penPos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-				
-				local redirectedDir = VecCopy(dir)
-				-- DebugPrint("Dir = " ..VecStr(dir))
-				-- DebugPrint("RedirectedDir = " ..VecStr(redirectedDir))
-				
-				-- If the distance to the shape detected at the start was greater than 0.1 then assume that the previous plate was exited
-				
-				if hitd > exitedArmorBlockDist then
-					local expendedDuringThisPen = expended - lastExpendedVal
-					lastExpendedVal = expended
-
-					local oldDir = VecCopy(dir)
-					redirectedDir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir, VecScale(randomizedNormal,-1), AP_RICOCHET_AFTER_PENETRATION_MULT*expendedDuringThisPen/projectile.momentum))
-					local dotWithOldDir = math.abs(VecDot(redirectedDir, oldDir))
-					projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*math.abs(dotWithOldDir)
-					--DebugPrint("Exited armour block momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-					-- DebugPrint(dotWithOldDir)
-					-- DebugPrint("Dir (1) = " ..VecStr(oldDir))
-					-- DebugPrint("RedirectedDir (1) = " ..VecStr(redirectedDir))
-
-					projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(redirectedDir, VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)*dotWithOldDir)
-					projStats.drag = projStats.drag/math.clamp(dotWithOldDir,.1,1)
-				end
-				
-				-- Post penetration checks --
-				
-				-- Set the new penetration position to be at the end of the thickness
-				local oldPos = VecCopy(pos)
-				pos = VecCopy(penPos)
-				--DebugPrint("qdist (2) = " ..tostring(qdist))
-				qdist = qdist - thickness
-				--DebugPrint("qdist (3) = " ..tostring(qdist))
-				
-				dir = VecCopy(redirectedDir)
-				
-				-- Check for a post penetration hit
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				local checkHit, _, checkNorm, checkShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-				
-				--DebugPrint("curShape = " ..tostring(curShape).. " checkShape = " ..tostring(checkShape).. " thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " penetration = " ..tostring(penetration))
-				-- If it finds something, then set that as the new next shape
-				-- else, its hit air and the data can be sent back to the projectile handler
-				if checkShape == curShape and thickness < 0.01 or not penetration then
-					--DebugPrint("Break projectile if it cant actually pen")
-					projectile.active = false
-					projectile.detonate = true
-					air = true
-				end
-				
-				if checkHit then
-					--DebugPrint("Original Shape = " ..tostring(curShape))
-					curShape = checkShape
-				else
-					air = true
-					--DebugPrint("Found Air Post Penetration")
-				end
-				
-				if air == true then
-					for i = 1, #pennedShapes do
-						table.remove(pennedShapes, i)
-					end
-				end
-				
-				
-				table.insert(lastHitshapes,curShape)
-				--DebugPrint("Insert " ..tostring(lastHitshapes[#lastHitshapes]).. " as next hit shape")
-				
-				-- DebugPrint("Copying Position Vector")
-				info.newpos = VecCopy(pos)
-				-- DebugPrint("Copy Projectile Position Vector")
-				projectile.pos = VecCopy(pos)
-				--DebugPrint("Projectile Pos = " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-				-- DebugPrint("Logging Expended")
-				info.expended = expended
-				-- DebugPrint("Setting Scaled Impulse")
-				info.normal = checkNorm
-				local scaled_impulse = math.min(35*(expended/projectile.maxmomentum)*(projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5)
-				
-				local tracerfires = GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.tracerfires", tracerfires)
-				
-				if projectile.tracer == true and randomFloat(0,1) < 0.01 and projectile.mass < 0.3 and tracerfires then
-					SpawnFire(projectile.pos)
-				end
-				-- Spall Spawning --
-				
-				-- Set the spall spawn position to the end of the thickness
-				-- Since the thickness is recalculated if it hits an air pocket then this will always spawn at the end of penetration
-				local spallPos = VecCopy(pos)
-				
-				-- if the shell runs out of momentum, and there is nothing in front of it, then spawn spall
-				
-				if expended >= projectile.momentum then
-					--DevPrint("\nRAN OUT OF MOMENTUM")
-					--DevPrint("Expended (equivalent RHA): "..expended.."\n")
-
-					if momentum > MIN_RICOCHET_FRAG_MOMENTUM then
-						-- DebugPrint("Fragmented")
-						local spallamount = math.min(math.random(5,math.clamp(2*projectile.caliber^.5,5,30)), projectile.spallamount)
-						local minpen = .5
-						--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called 1618")
-						Spall(spallPos, VecScale(VecAdd(projectile.predictedVelocity, VecScale(lastNormal, -2*dot)), .5), spallamount, .5, math.clamp(.1*momentum/spallamount, minpen, MAX_SPALL_PEN/5), projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-					end
-
-				-- SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, lastHitPos, pos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-					projectile.detonate = true
-					projectile.active = false
-					break
-				end
-				
-				-- Clamps the spall amount to a minimum of 2, and a maximum of the projectiles set spall amount
-				-- The pre-clamp value is 3% of the set spall amount, multiplied by the amount of armour penetrated in total, multiplied by the sum of the current momentum divided by the max momentum of the shell
-				-- Tess was apparently allergic to using brackets to ensure that shit happens in the right order.
-				-- The minimum pen of the spall is set to the remaining penetration, or 2mm. whichever is greater. I guess this makes sense, but its still weird
-				
-				local spallamount = math.clamp(0.03*projectile.spallamount*expended*momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, 2, projectile.spallamount)
-				local minpen = math.max((projectile.momentum-expended)/10, 2)
-				
-				-- If the projectile has not yet run out of momentum then spawn spall
-				-- This function runs if the other one cannot
-				-- Once again I have clamped it so that it cannot spawn spall if there is another shape in the way
-				
-				if projectile.momentum > expended then
-					--DebugPrint("Spall Function Called 1642")
-					Spall(spallPos, VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity,.4), spallamount, projectile.spallangle, math.clamp(1.5*expended/spallamount, minpen, MAX_SPALL_PEN),projectile.frametime+info.frameduration)
-				end
-
-				-- DebugPrint("Setting Last hit pos")
-				lastHitPos = VecCopy(pos)
-				-- DebugPrint("End Dir = " ..VecStr(dir))
-		
-				-- Applying force to impact body
-				-- DebugPrint("Applying Force to Impact Body")
-				ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, pos, VecScale(info.dir,scaled_impulse))
-				-- DebugPrint(math.min(35*(expended*projectileSpeed*projectile.mass)^.5, 30*GetBodyMass(info.hitbody)^.5))
-
-				-- Simulating damaged penetrator - mainly for subcaliber projectiles
-				--DebugPrint("Pre Damaged Penetrator = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 1st part = " ..tostring(1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber))
-				-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 2nd part = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0)))
-				-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 3rd part = " ..tostring(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75))
-				-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator 4th part = " ..tostring(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum)
-				-- DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator Complete = " ..tostring((1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber)*(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum))
-				
-				projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum - (1-projectile.caliber/projectile.shellcaliber)*(math.abs(projectile.momentum-math.max(expended,0))^1.75)/projectile.momentum
-				--DebugPrint("Damaged Penetrator = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				projectile.predictedVelocity = VecScale(projectile.predictedVelocity, math.max((projectile.momentum-expended)/projectile.momentum, 0.01))
-				projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum - math.max(expended,0)
-				--DebugPrint("Momentum - expended = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				projectile.momentum = math.max(projectile.momentum, 0)
-				--DebugPrint("Final Momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-				penLoopHasRun = true
-				-- DebugPrint("Checking qDist")
-				if qdist == 0 then projectile.active = false end
-				-- DebugPrint("qDist Checked")
-				
-				
-			end
-	elseif not projectile.detonate then
-		projectile.active = false
-		--DebugPrint("Projectile Inactive, qdist= " ..tostring(qdist).. " Hit air? " ..tostring(air).. " Projectile momentum = " ..projectile.momentum)
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.type == "hesh" or projectile.type == "he" then
-		projectile.detonate = true
-		projectile.active = true
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.incendiary == true and randomFloat(0, projectile.mass*5) < projectile.mass then SpawnFire(projectile.pos) end
-	--DebugPrint("End pencheck, active = " ..tostring(projectile.active).. " qdist= " ..tostring(qdist).. " Hit air? " ..tostring(air).. " Projectile momentum = " ..projectile.momentum)
-
-	if not HasTag(info.hitbody, 'bone') then
-		VisualizeImpact(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, ptype, .1*projectile.caliber^.5*(.1*projectileSpeed)^.5, info.mat.hitPosMat, info.mat.r, info.mat.g, info.mat.b, info.mat.a)
-	else
-		VisualizeImpact(projectile.pos, projectile.predictedVelocity, ptype, .1*projectile.caliber^.5*(.1*projectileSpeed)^.5, info.mat.hitPosMat, .55, .10, .10, info.mat.a)
-	end
-	
-	if projectile.caliber < RICOCHET_CAL_THRESHOLD then
-		if HasTag(curShape, "RHA") or HasTag(curShape, "CHA")then 
-			local RHA = 10
-		end
-		PlayMaterialHitSound(info.mat.hitPosMat, projectile.pos, projectile.momentum, RHA)
-	end
-	--DebugPrint("SimulatePenetration Ended")
-end
-
-function CalcCrushFactor(projectile, info)
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-
-	-- Impact Angle
-	local dot = VecDot(info.normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local hitCos = math.abs(dot/projectileSpeed)
-
-	local f = math.exp((1.25-hitCos)^6)
-	f = 1+(f-1)*math.clamp(info.RHA/40,0,1)
-
-	--DebugPrint("Crush Factor = " ..tostring(f))
-
-	return f
-end
-
-function getHEATmaxdist(projectile, material)
-
-	-- Calculate Coefficient for Maximum projectile depth
-	
-	local projCoef = 8
-	
-	if projectile.caliber < 70 then
-		projCoef = 8
-	elseif projectile.caliber < 110 then
-		if projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-			projCoef = 12
-		elseif projectile.type == "t-heat" then
-			projCoef = 16
-		else
-			projCoef = 8
-		end
-	
-	else
-		if projectile.type == "heatfs" then
-			projCoef = 12
-		elseif projectile.type == "t-heat" then
-			projCoef = 16
-		else
-			projCoef = 12
-		end
-	end
-	
-	--Get Material Coefficient
-	
-	local matCoef = 1
-	
-	if material == "" or material == nil or material == "air" then
-		matCoef = 0.1
-	elseif material == "hardmetal" then
-		matCoef = 0.45 -- Guessed Coefficient, as there isnt a listed one for armour
-	else
-		matCoef = (1 - GetMaterialStrength(material))
-	end
-	
-	local jetDensity = 8950 --kg/m3. This stat is for copper
-	
-	local matDensity = GetMaterialDensity(material)
-	
-	if material == nil or material == "air" or material == "" then matDensity = 1.27 end
-	
-	
-	-- Hard Setting the material to air. this is so that the jet can travel the maximum length possible
-	matCoef = 0.1
-	matDensity = 1.27
-
-	
-	qdist = (projectile.caliber*projCoef*matCoef*math.sqrt(jetDensity/matDensity))*0.001
-	
-	-- DebugPrint("Heat MaxDist Calculated as " ..tostring(qdist).. " Caliber = " ..tostring(projectile.caliber).. " Projectile Coefficient = " ..tostring(projCoef).. " Material Coefficient = " ..tostring(matCoef).. " Material Density = " ..tostring(matDensity).. " Material = " ..tostring(material))
-	
-	return qdist
-end
-
-function SimulateHEAT(initPos, dir, projectile, caliber, explosivepayload, spallamount, spallangle, shrapnelamount, fuzetype, frametime, frameduration)
-	local maxmomentum = projectile.maxmomentum
-	local momentum = projectile.momentum
-	local projectileSpeed = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))
-	local projStats = deepcopy(shellStats["heat"])
-	if fuzetype == "top-down" then dir = Vec(0,-1,0) end
-	local expended = 0
-	QueryInclude("player")
-	local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(initPos,VecScale(dir,-.01)),dir,.1)
-	local dot = VecDot(normal, dir)
-	if not hit then dot = 1 end
-	local hitCos = math.abs(dot)
-	local pointerPos = VecCopy(initPos)
-	local pos = VecCopy(initPos)
-	local heatdropoff = math.max(.3+(2*maxmomentum)/(180+maxmomentum),maxmomentum*0.0015)
-	local forceBreak = false
-	local hitShape = shape or nil
-	local qtime = GetOverflowSafeInt(VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity))*GetTimeStep()
-	
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, initPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-	
-	local shrapAmt = math.max(explosivepayload*30,(momentum/maxmomentum)*25) -- Shrap sent forward to recreate visual effect of HEAT on armor
-	for i = 1, shrapAmt do
-		local sDir = VecNormalize(VecCross(dir,RSV(1)))
-		sDir = VecNormalize(VecAdd(sPos,VecScale(dir,randomFloat(0,.2))))
-
-		local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(initPos, sDir, caliber*20)
-
-		local hitPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-		if hit then
-			local hitPosMat, r, g, b, a = GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, hitPos)
-			if hitPosMat=="metal" or hitPosMat=="hardmetal" or hitPosMat=="heavymetal" then
-				local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-				CustomPaintRGBA(pos, 0.0015, c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-			elseif hitPosMat=="glass" then
-				CustomPaintRGBA(pos, 0.0015, .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-			else
-				Paint(pos, 0.0015, "explosion")
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .5, .7, .7, .7, 1, .3)
-	-- CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .2, .6, .6, .6, 1, .7)
-	-- CustomPaintRGBA(initPos, .2, .7, .7, .7, 1, .7)
-	
-	
-	-- DebugPrint("Start SimulateHEAT with Parameters: maxMomentum = " ..tostring(maxmomentum).. " momentum = " ..tostring(momentum).. " qtime = " ..tostring(qtime).. " Expended = " ..tostring(expended).. " ShrapAmount = " ..tostring(shrapAmt))
-	--local totalDist = math.abs(VecLength(VecSub(initPos, projectile.pos)))
-	
-	if momentum - expended > 0 then
-	
-		-- DebugPrint("Heat Penetration Calc Start!")
-	
-		local holeIncrement = 0.01
-		local qdist = getHEATmaxdist(projectile, GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(shape, pos))
-		if projectile.heatqdist ~= nil then qdist = projectile.heatqdist end
-		local initqdist = qdist
-		
-		local pdist = 0
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Calculated Jet Max Depth at " ..tostring(qdist))
-		
-		local armorval = 0
-		
-		local air = false
-		
-		local projRadius = math.clamp(caliber*0.001,.09,.5)
-		
-		local thickness = 0
-		
-		local shapesInRange = {}
-		local pennedShapes = {}
-		if projectile.rejectedShapes ~= nil then pennedShapes = projectile.rejectedShapes end
-		local holes = {}
-		local holeMaterials = {}
-		local holeRadius = {}
-		
-		local holepos = {}
-		local holeshape = {}
-		local holematerial = {}
-		
-		local totalDist = projectile.heattotaldist or 0
-		
-		while qdist > 0.01 and momentum > expended and qtime > 0 do
-		
-			-- DebugPrint("Heat Penetration Loop Start. qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " projectile momentum / expended = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum).. " / " ..tostring(expended))
-			
-			local initHit, initDist, initNorm, curShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-			
-			if initDist > 0 then
-			
-				totalDist = totalDist + initDist
-				
-				pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, initDist))
-				
-			end
-				
-			pdist = getHEATmaxdist(projectile, GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, initDist))))
-		
-			-- DebugPrint("pdist (1) = " ..tostring(pdist).. " pdist - totaldist = " ..tostring(pdist-totalDist).. " unmodified qdist = " ..tostring(qdist))
-		
-			qdist = pdist - totalDist
-			
-			if qdist <= 0 then projectile.active = false 
-				--DebugPrint ("Projectile Made Inactive at start of loop!")
-				break 
-			end
-			
-			if initHit then
-			
-				hitCos = math.abs(VecDot(initNorm, dir))
-				
-				if VecLength(distNorm)==0 then hitCos = 1 end
-				
-				local rawRHA, RHA, CHA, CA = CheckArmourValue(curShape, hitCos)
-				
-				--DebugPrint("Raw RHA = " ..tostring(rawRHA).. " nRHA = " ..tostring(RHA).. " CHA = " ..tostring(CHA).. " Composite = " ..tostring(CA).. " HitCos = " ..tostring(hitCos))
-				
-				if CA > 0 then 
-					armorval = CA
-					--DebugPrint("Armour is Composite of thickness " ..tostring(CA))
-				else
-					armorval = (GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, pos))*10)/hitCos or 0
-					
-					armorval = math.max(RHA, math.max(armorval, CHA))
-					--DebugPrint("Armour is Non Composite of thickness " ..tostring(armorval))
-				end
-			
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				local qHit, _, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-				while qHit do
-					QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					qHit, qPoint, qNormal, qShape = QueryClosestPoint(pos, projRadius)
-					local nrawRHA, nRHA, nCHA, nCA = CheckArmourValue(qShape, 1)
-					local holearmorval = GetMaterialStrength(GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(qShape, qPoint)) or 0
-					if holearmorval >= 1000 then holearmorval = 0.4 end
-					if CA > 0 then 
-						holearmorval = CA
-						--DebugPrint("Armour is Composite of thickness " ..tostring(CA))
-					else
-						holearmorval = math.max(RHA, math.max(holearmorval, CHA))
-						--DebugPrint("Armour is Non Composite of thickness " ..tostring(holearmorval))
-					end
-					--DebugPrint("hit armourval " ..tostring(holearmorval).. " Penned Armour Value = " ..tostring(armorval).. " Hit Thing = " ..tostring(GetDescription(GetShapeBody(qShape))))
-					if armorval > holearmorval then
-						--DebugPrint("Added shape to hole thickness puncher")
-						pennedShapes[#pennedShapes+1] = qShape
-					else
-						--DebugPrint("Hole Thickness Nonpen!")
-						break
-					end
-				end
-				--DebugPrint("Ended Hole Thickness Shape Checker")
-				
-				QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-				QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-				local distHit, distDist, distNorm, distShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-				--local thickHit, thickDist, thickNorm, thickShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, distDist)), VecScale(dir, -1), distDist)
-				
-				--if thickShape == curShape then DebugPrint("Thickness Correctly Measured for shape " ..tostring(curShape)) end
-				
-				local nERA = 0
-				local nERAep = 0
-				if HasTag(curShape, "ERA") then
-					nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "ERA")) or 0
-					nERA = nERAep/hitCos
-				elseif GetTagValue(curShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-					nERA = 250
-				end
-				if nERA > 0 then
-					local holeamount = 0.1
-					MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-					VisualizeExplosion(pos, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-					RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-					RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-					expended = expended + nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)
-					-- DebugPrint("ERA of thickness " ..tostring(nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)).. " hit. Added to expended value to total " ..tostring(expended))
-				end
-				
-				-- DebugPrint("ERA encountered = " ..tostring(nERA))
-				-- DebugPrint("Armorval = " ..tostring(armorval).. " projectile momentum = "..tostring(momentum).. " expended = " ..tostring(expended))
-				-- DebugPrint("Current Shape = " ..tostring(curShape))
-				if momentum - expended > armorval or pennedShapes[#pennedShapes] == curShape then
-					thickness = distDist
-					-- DebugPrint("Penetrated Shape " ..tostring(curShape).. " last penned shape = " ..tostring(pennedShapes[#pennedShapes]).. " Thickness == " ..tostring(thickness))
-					if thickness <= 0 then projectile.active = false break end
-
-					local armourThickness = thickness*armorval
-					
-					if rawRHA == 0 and CA == 0 then
-						if momentum - expended <= armourThickness then
-							thickness = math.abs(armourThickness - (armourThickness - (momentum-expended)))/armorval
-						else
-							if not distHit then
-								table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-							end
-						end
-						-- Calculate the max amount of armour that the shell can go through, set the thickness to this
-						-- Then remove the penned armour from the penetration. any inaccuracies are remedied later
-						expended = expended + (thickness*armorval)
-					else
-						-- Check that this isnt the same shape that we penned last pass
-						if pennedShapes[#pennedShapes] ~= curShape then
-							table.insert(pennedShapes, curShape)
-							expended = expended + armorval
-						end
-					end
-					
-					local holePunchIncrement = math.min(0.05, math.min(projRadius, thickness))
-					local nHoles = math.max(thickness/holePunchIncrement, 0)
-					-- DebugPrint("Holepunchincrement = " ..tostring(holePunchIncrement).. " projRadius = " ..tostring(projRadius).. " thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " nHoles = " ..tostring(nHoles))
-					
-					-- if nHoles == 1 then
-						-- nHoles = 2
-					-- end
-					
-					-- if thickness <= 0 then
-						-- nHoles = 0					
-					-- end
-					
-					for i = 1, nHoles do
-						-- If the hole is the first one then hardcode it to the hit position to prevent unintended consequences
-						local hPos=VecCopy(pos)
-						if i > 1 then
-							if holePunchIncrement*(i-1) > thickness then
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, thickness))
-							else
-								hPos=VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir, holePunchIncrement*(i-1)))
-							end
-						end
-
-						-- The Radius Checker --
-						
-						-- The Radius Checker has been moved to its own function "checkHoleRadius"
-						-- checkHoleRadius(pos, searchIncrement, projRadius, rejectedShapes) is the full function
-						
-						local rejectedShapes = pennedShapes
-						rejectedShapes[#rejectedShapes+1] = curShape
-						
-						local searchRadius = checkHoleRadius(hPos, holeIncrement/10, projRadius, rejectedShapes)
-						
-						-- Set the hole radius to 90% of the search radius from the previous function 
-						-- this ensures that there is no way to break whatever it detected
-						-- Theoretically the radius could also just be walked back by 1, 
-						-- but this works fine at the moment and I dont want to break it
-						
-						local holeRad = math.clamp(searchRadius, 0, math.min(projRadius, (thickness-(holeIncrement*(i-1)))))
-	
-						
-						--DebugPrint("Hole No." ..tostring(i).. " Hole Radius = " ..tostring(holeRad).. " Search Radius = " ..tostring(searchRadius).. " Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness).. " Adjusted Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness-((i-1)*holeIncrement)).. " HitShape/curShape/qShape = " ..tostring(hasHitHandle).. " / " ..tostring(curShape).. " / " ..tostring(qShape))
-						
-						if holeRad > 0 then
-							-- Run a material check, failure to find any material means that we have either hit air or left the current shape
-							-- either way that is bad and leads to the penetration being cancelled prematurely
-							-- due to the way that thickness is calculated this means that it is always an air pocket
-							local mat=GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(curShape, hPos)
-							if mat == "" or mat == nil then
-								-- DebugPrint("Found Null material. Recalculated to material = " ..tostring(mat))
-								
-								-- If using CHA or no armour then recoup the penetration that was not used
-								-- this is done by using the remaining nHoles
-								-- since they are thickness/holeIncrement if we multiply them by holeIncrement then we get thickness back
-								-- using this leftover thickness we can calculate how much was already calculated
-								-- we can then multiply that by the armorval to get the thickness that remains
-								-- then we simply remove that amount from the expended penetration value
-								local nHoleHit, _, _, nHoleShape = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeRad)
-								if table.contains(pennedShapes, nHoleShape) then
-									mat=GetShapeMaterialAtPosition(nHoleShape, hPos)
-									--DebugPrint("Detected Penned shape during hole generation")
-								else
-									nHoleHit = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeIncrement)
-									if not nHoleHit then
-										--DebugPrint("Detected air during hole generation")
-										air = true
-									end
-									local remainingHoles = thickness - (#holes*holeIncrement)
-									thickness = thickness - remainingHoles
-									if rawRHA == 0 then
-										local remainingDist = remainingHoles*holeIncrement
-										expended = expended - (remainingDist*armorval)
-									end
-									--DebugPrint("Recalculated Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-									break
-								end
-							end
-							table.insert(holes, hPos)
-							table.insert(holeRadius, holeRad)
-							--DebugPrint("HoleGen No." ..tostring(#holes).. " Hole Position = " ..VecStr(hPos).. " Hole Radius = " ..holeRadius[#holeRadius].. " Proj Radius = " ..projRadius.. " Distance to detected shape = " ..tostring(searchRadius))
-							--DebugPrint("nHole Generated " ..tostring(#holes).. " / " ..tostring(nHoles))
-							--DebugPrint("Hole Material = " ..tostring(mat))
-							table.insert(holeMaterials, mat)
-							
-							-- The HoleMaterials variable used to be used to make sure that Hardmetal wasnt broken by non hardmetal shapes being impacted
-							-- However the new system does not require it
-							-- It may still be useful though, so it remains
-							
-							if not HasTag(GetShapeBody(curShape), 'bone') then
-								if mat=="metal" or mat=="hardmetal" or mat=="heavymetal" then
-									local c = randomFloat(.35,.45)
-									CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), c, c, c, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-								elseif mat=="glass" then
-									CustomPaintRGBA(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.15,0.7), .85, .85, .85, randomFloat(.8,1), 1)
-								else
-									Paint(hpos, math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.0015,0.1,0.7), "explosion")
-								end
-							end
-						else
-							local nHoleHit = QueryRaycast(hPos, dir, holeIncrement)
-							if not nHoleHit then
-								--DebugPrint("Detected air during hole generation")
-								air = true
-							else
-								pennedShapes = {}
-								pennedRHAValues = {}
-							end
-							local remainingHoles = thickness - (#holes*holeIncrement)
-							thickness = thickness - remainingHoles
-							if rawRHA == 0 then
-								local remainingDist = remainingHoles*holeIncrement
-								expended = expended - (remainingDist*armorval)
-							end
-							
-							--DebugPrint("Recalculated Thickness (1) = " ..tostring(thickness))
-							break
-						end
-					end
-					
-					local Holecount = 0
-					local TotalHoleCount = 0
-					local h = #holes
-					-- DebugPrint("Number of holes to make = " ..tostring(h))
-					for k = 1,h do
-						local holeamount = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.13+math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,0,.04),.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m adjusted for material strength
-						local holeamount2 = math.clamp(projectile.caliber*0.001,.12,.5) -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-						local holeamount3 = holeRadius[k] -- Hole size of projectile caliber in m
-						
-						Holecount = MakeHole(holes[k], holeamount, holeamount2, holeamount3, true)
-						TotalHoleCount = TotalHoleCount + Holecount
-						--DebugPrint("Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]))
-						--if Holecount > 0 then DebugPrint("HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3)) end
-						--DebugPrint("HoleNo. = " ..tostring(k).. " Holes Made = " ..tostring(Holecount).. " Hole position = " ..VecStr(holes[k]).. " Hole Material = " ..tostring(holeMaterials[k]).. " Hole amount 3 = " ..tostring(holeamount3))
-						SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime+frameduration,holes[k],nil,nil)
-						
-						if Holecount > 0 then
-							Spall(pos, VecScale(dir,math.max(300*explosivepayload,250)), math.max((Holecount/10)*spallamount, 5)*0.25, 0.8*spallangle, math.random(10,math.clamp(20*explosivepayload,25,MAX_SPALL_PEN)),frametime)
-							Spall(pos, VecScale(dir,math.max(300*explosivepayload,250)), math.max((Holecount/10)*spallamount, 5)*0.75, 0.8*spallangle, math.random(10,math.clamp(20*explosivepayload,25,MAX_SPALL_PEN)),frametime, true)
-						end
-						
-					end
-					
-					pos = VecAdd(pos,VecScale(dir,thickness))
-					
-					totalDist = totalDist + thickness
-					
-					-- DebugPrint("unmodified qdist = " ..tostring(qdist).. " modified qdist = " ..tostring(qdist - thickness).. " totalDist = " ..tostring(totalDist).. " Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-					qdist = qdist - thickness
-					qtime = qtime - totalDist
-
-					
-					--QueryRejectShapes(pennedShapes)
-					local checkHit, checkDist, checkNorm, checkShape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, 0.1)
-					
-					-- If it finds something, then set that as the new next shape
-					-- else, its hit air and the data can be sent back to the projectile handler
-					if checkShape == curShape and TotalHoleCount == 0 and checkDist == 0 then
-						qdist = 0
-						-- DebugPrint("Qdist set to 0 due to making 0 holes")
-					end
-					
-					-- if qdist == 0 or qdist < 0.001 or qtime <= 0 then
-						-- if qdist <= 0 then projectile.active = false DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive In Loop (0)") end
-						-- DebugPrint("HEAT Loop Broken")
-						-- break
-					-- end
-					
-				else
-					expended = projectile.momentum
-					qdist = 0
-					projectile.active = false
-					-- DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive In Loop Due to Non Penetration (1)")
-					break
-					
-				end
-				
-			end
-			-- DebugPrint("End of HEAT Pen Loop")
-		end
-		-- DebugPrint("Exit Heat Pen Loop")
-		
-		projectile.momentum = momentum - expended
-		
-		projectile.heatqdist = qdist
-		projectile.heattotaldist = totalDist
-		projectile.rejectedShapes = pennedShapes
-		
-		VisualizeHEATJet(initPos,VecAdd(initPos,VecScale(dir,totalDist)))
-		
-		SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, initPos, pos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, frameduration)
-		
-		if qdist <= 0.01 then projectile.active = false 
-			-- DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive (1)") 	
-		end
-
-	else
-		-- DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive (2)")
-		projectile.active = false
-	end
-	
-	if qdist <= 0 then projectile.active = false 
-		-- DebugPrint("HEAT Made inactive (3)")
-	end
-		
-end
-
-function SimulateCanister(projectile, info)
-
-	projectile.fuzeTripped = projectile.fuzeTripped or (projectile.maxmomentum-projectile.momentum > projectile.fuzesense) or (projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum < .9)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.fuzeTripped)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.active)
-	if not projectile.fuzeTripped and projectile.active then return end
-	
-	local SpallCount = projectile.canisteramount or 1
-	local vel = projectile.predictedVelocity
-	local spallType = projectile.canistertype
-	
-	if projectile.explosivepayload > 0 then 
-		RealisticExplosion(info.newpos, info.dir, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.shrapnelamount, projectile.spallangle, projectile.momentum, 1, info.RHA, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration)
-		ApplyBodyImpulse(info.hitbody, info.newpos, VecScale(VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity),400*projectile.explosivepayload))
-	end
-	
-	for i = 1, SpallCount do
-		
-		local nextShell = deepcopy(TABSProjectileHandler.defaultShell)
-		
-		nextShell.pos = projectile.pos
-		
-		nextShell.projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[spallType]) or deepcopy(shellStats.ap)
-
-		local len = VecLength(vel)
-		local dir = VecNormalize(vel)
-		dir = VecNormalize(VecLerp(dir,RSV(1),projectile.canisterangle))
-		nextShell.predictedVelocity = VecScale(dir, len)
-		
-		nextShell.totaldist = 0
-
-		nextShell.rejectedbodies = projectile.rejectedbodies
-		
-		
-		nextShell.type = string.lower(spallType)
-		
-		nextShell.propulsion = "ballistic"
-		nextShell.propulsionforce = 0
-		
-		nextShell.maxdist = projectile.maxrange or 5000
-		
-		nextShell.momentum = projectile.canisterpen or 5
-		nextShell.maxmomentum = projectile.canisterpen or 5
-		nextShell.caliber = projectile.canistercaliber
-		nextShell.shellcaliber = projectile.canistercaliber
-		nextShell.drag = nextShell.projStats.drag or 0.35
-		nextShell.mass = projectile.mass/SpallCount or 0.08
-		
-		nextShell.splashrange = 2
-		
-		nextShell.tracer = false
-		
-		nextShell.navconst = .5
-
-		nextShell.spallamount = 0
-		nextShell.spallangle = 0
-		nextShell.shrapnelamount = 0
-		nextShell.explosivepayload = 0
-
-		nextShell.timer = 20
-		nextShell.impacted = false
-		nextShell.fuzetype = "impact"
-		nextShell.fuzedist = 5000
-		nextShell.fuzesense = projectile.fuzesense or 5
-		nextShell.forcedetonate = 0
-		
-		nextShell.range = 5000
-		
-		nextShell.incendiary = false
-		
-		nextShell.smokeradius = 0
-		nextShell.smoketime = 0
-
-		nextShell.frametime = 0
-		
-		nextShell.APSlights = FindAPSLights()
-		nextShell.vehicletarget = projectile.vehicletarget
-		
-		if (nextShell.caliber > 15 or nextShell.momentum > 40) then -- Stops shotgun pellet collisions
-			local vox = shellInfo.voxobject[selected_shell] or shellInfo.type[selected_shell]
-			local e = Spawn('<body tags="visualShellBody"><vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/shellvox/shells.vox" object="'..vox..'" scale="'..tostring(nextShell.caliber/1000)..'"/></>',Transform(pos,QuatLookAt(pos,VecAdd(pos,dir))))
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = e[1]
-		else
-			nextShell.visualshellbody = 0
-		end
-		
-		nextShell.cinematiccam = false
-		if nextShell.cinematiccam then
-			nextShell.ccrx = randomFloat(-30,10)
-			nextShell.ccry = randomFloat(-60,60)
-			nextShell.ccrz = randomFloat(-15,15)
-		end
-		
-		nextShell.ricochetCount = 0
-		
-		nextShell.active = true
-		
-		TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum] = deepcopy(nextShell)
-		
-		LoadedShell = TABSProjectileHandler.shells[TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum]
-		-- VisualizeShrap(loadedShell.pos, loadedShell.predictedVelocity)
-		
-		
-	
-		if NoProjectileLimit then
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = (TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum % PROJECTILE_LIMIT) + 1
-		else
-			TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum = TABSProjectileHandler.shellNum + 1
-		end
-		
-		if TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()] then
-			LoadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetPlayerVehicle()]
-		elseif(TABSVehicles and TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]) then 
-			LoadedShell.vInfo = TABSVehicles[GetInt("level.tabs.balistics.last_vehicle_fired")]
-		end
-	
-	end
-	
-	projectile.active = false
-
-end
-
-function SimulateAPHE(projectile, info)
-	--DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Called")
-	if projectile.explosivepayload <= 0 then return end
-	--DebugPrint("APHE Pos = " ..VecStr(projectile.pos))
-	projectile.fuzeTripped = projectile.fuzeTripped or (projectile.maxmomentum-projectile.momentum > projectile.fuzesense) or (projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum < .9)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.fuzeTripped)
-	-- DebugPrint(projectile.active)
-	if not projectile.fuzeTripped and projectile.active then return end
-
-	DevPrint("APHE Filler Exploded\n")
-	local dir = VecNormalize(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local pos = VecCopy(projectile.pos)
-
-	-- Check that fuze distance has actually been achieved
-	if (VecLength(VecSub(pos, projectile.posAtImpact)) < .9*projectile.fuzedist and projectile.posAtImpact ~= nil) and projectile.active then return end
-	if projectile.posAtImpact == nil and projectile.active then
-		projectile.posAtImpact = VecCopy(pos)
-		return
-	end
-	-- DebugPrint(VecLength(VecSub(pos, projectile.posAtImpact)).." / "..projectile.fuzedist)
-	-- DebugPrint("sploder")
-	--local APHE_MOMENTUM = math.max(math.max(5*projectile.explosivepayload^.5,15), projectile.momentum)
-	local APHE_MOMENTUM = randomFloat(.8,1.2)*math.clamp(5*projectile.explosivepayload^.5, 15, projectile.momentum)
-	--DebugPrint("APHE Momentum = " ..tostring(APHE_MOMENTUM))
-	RealisticExplosion(pos, dir, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.explosivepayload, projectile.shrapnelamount, APHE_CONE_ANGLE, APHE_MOMENTUM, .5, nil, projectile.frametime + info.frameduration)
-	--if projectile.momentum > 0 then MakeHole(pos,.02,.02,.02) end
-	-- Disabled this check because it put holes in stuff that it shouldn't have
-	projectile.active = false
-	--DebugPrint("SimulateAPHE Ended")
-
-end
-
-function SimulateHESH(projectile,info)
-	--DebugPrint("Hesh Active! momentum = " ..tostring(projectile.momentum))
-	projectile.active = false
-	local projectileSpeed = VecLength(projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local ptype = projectile.type
-	local projStats = deepcopy(shellStats[ptype or "hesh"])
-	local dir = info.dir
-
-	-- Impact Angle
-	local dot = VecDot(info.normal, projectile.predictedVelocity)
-	local hitangle = 180-math.acos(dot/projectileSpeed)*57.3
-	local hitCos = math.abs(dot/projectileSpeed)
-
-	-- Warhead crushing at high angle of attack
-	local f = math.exp((1-hitCos)^10)
-	projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum*f
-
-	-- Amor impact sound
-	if info.RHA > 0 and info.hitvehicle then
-		PlayArmorImpactSound(projectile.caliber, info.newpos)
-	end
-
-	SaveDebugInfo(projectile.frametime, projectile.pos, info.hitPos, projectile.momentum/projectile.maxmomentum, info.frameduration)
-
-
-	--------------------
-	-- Armor Pen Loop --
-	--------------------
-
-	
-
-	--if projectile.momentum > 0 then
-	
-		
-		
-		-- Initialize armor depth calculation (iterates through armor until the other side)
-		--local air = false
-		local pos = info.newpos
-		--local lastHitshapes = {info.shape}
-		local maxDepth = projectileSpeed*GetTimeStep()
-		local qdist = maxDepth
-		local holeIncrement = .01
-		local airThreshold = .05
-		local spallPos = VecCopy(pos)
-		local spallNormal = nil
-		
-		local initHit, initDist, initNorm = QueryRaycast(VecSub(pos, VecScale(dir, 0.1)), dir, qdist*2)
-		
-		if not initHit then
-			-- _, _, initNorm = QueryRaycast(pos, qdist*2)
-			initNorm = VecCopy(info.normal)
-		else
-			pos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, initDist))
-		end
-		
-		local curShape = info.shape
-		QueryRejectShape(curShape)
-		local hitp, hitd, norm, hitshape = QueryRaycast(pos, dir, qdist)
-
-
-		-- Determine thickness of the shape that was hit (distance travelled through it to next shape)
-		local fpos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(dir, hitd))
-		local fhitp, fhitd = QueryRaycast(fpos, VecScale(dir,-1), qdist)
-		local thickness = math.max(hitd - fhitd, 0)
-		
-		local spallNorm = VecScale(VecNormalize(initNorm), -1)
-		
-		--DebugPrint("Thickness = " ..tostring(thickness))
-		
-		local distToAir = 0
-		while QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(initNorm, distToAir)), initNorm, airThreshold) and distToAir < qdist do
-			distToAir = distToAir + airThreshold
-		end
-		local airHit, airDist = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(pos, VecScale(initNorm, distToAir)), VecScale(initNorm, -1), distToAir+airThreshold)
-		if airHit then
-			distToAir = distToAir - airDist
-		end
-		
-		
-		-- if thickness > 0.1 then
-			--spallPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(spallNorm, 0.15))
-		-- else
-			-- spallPos = VecAdd(pos, VecScale(spallNorm, (thickness/2)))
-		-- end
-
-		
-		local nRHA = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "RHA") then
-			nRHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "RHA")) or 0
-		end
-		-- CHA (cast homogeneous armor) value from shape tag
-		local nCHA = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "CHA") then
-			nCHA = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "CHA"))*thickness or 0
-		end
-		-- ERA (explosive reactive armor) value from shape tag
-		local nERA = 0
-		local nERAep = 0
-		if projectile.momentum > ERA_MOMENTUM_THRESHOLD then
-			if HasTag(curShape, "ERA") then
-				nERAep = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "ERA")) or 0
-				nERA = nERAep
-			elseif GetTagValue(curShape, "component") == "ERA" then
-				nERA = 250
-			end
-		end
-		if nERA > 0 then
-			projectile.momentum = projectile.momentum - nERA*(1-projStats.eraresist)
-			local holeamount = 0.1
-			MakeHole(pos, holeamount*2, holeamount*1.5, holeamount, true)
-			ClearShape(curShape)
-			VisualizeExplosion(pos, nERAep^.5*0.02, nERAep^.5*0.04)
-			RemoveTag(curShape, "component")
-			RemoveTag(curShape, "ERA")
-		end
-		
-		local matstrength = 0
-		if HasTag(curShape, "matStrength") then matstrength = tonumber(GetTagValue(curShape, "matStrength")) end
-		
-		local armorval = math.max(math.max(nRHA,matstrength), nCHA)
-		
-		local expended = 0
-		
-		local rejectedShapes = {}
-		local pennedRHAValues = {}
-		local penetration = false
```
