```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\movement.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\movement.lua
@@ -1,100 +1,11 @@
-function init()
-	wheels = FindBodies("TABSWheel")
-	hull = FindBody("tankHull")
-
-	wheelHandler = {}
-
-	for i = 1, #wheels do
-		local wheel=wheels[i]
-		wheelHandler[wheel] = {}
-		wheelHandler[wheel].origT = TransformToLocalTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), GetBodyTransform(wheel))
-	end
-end
-
-function tick(dt)
-	throttle = InputValue('uparrow')-InputValue('downarrow')
-	steer = InputValue('leftarrow')-InputValue('rightarrow')
-end
-
-function update(dt)
-	local hullVel=GetBodyVelocity(hull)
-	local hullAngVel=GetBodyAngularVelocity(hull)
-
-	for wheelID,wheel in pairs(wheelHandler) do
-		local radius=.4
-		local wheelNewT=TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT)
-		local wheelTouchPos=TransformToParentPoint(wheelNewT,Vec(0,-radius,0))
-		local wheelNormal=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,1,0))
-		wheelNewT.pos = VecAdd(wheelNewT.pos,VecScale(GetBodyVelocityAtPos(hull,wheelNewT.pos),1/60))
-		--[[ local wheelXDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(1,0,0))
-		local wheelZDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,0,1)) ]]
-		
-		QueryRejectBody(hull)
-		QueryRejectBody(wheelID)
-		local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(wheelTouchPos,VecScale(wheelNormal,radius*2)),VecScale(wheelNormal,-1),.1+radius*2,.1)
-		local susTravel = dist-radius*2
-		DebugWatch(wheelID..' sus travel',susTravel)
-
-		local wheelVel=GetBodyVelocityAtPos(hull,TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT.pos))
-		local wheelFutureT=TransformToParentTransform(wheelNewT, Transform(Vec(0,-math.clamp(susTravel,-.1,.1),0)))
-
-		SetBodyTransform(wheelID, wheelFutureT)
-		--SetBodyVelocity(wheelID,wheelVel)
-		--SetBodyAngularVelocity(wheelID,hullAngVel)
-
-		local springConst = 0.2
-
-		--susTravel is how much the wheel is digging into the ground
-		if hit then
-			local f = math.clamp(-susTravel*springConst*2000,-100,100)
-			DebugPrint(f)
-			
-			ApplyBodyImpulse(hull, wheelNewT.pos, VecScale(wheelNormal,-susTravel*springConst*5000) )
-			--[[ if VecDot(wheelVel,normal)<0 then
-				SetBodyVelocity(wheelID,ProjectVecOnPlane(wheelVel,normal))
-			end ]]
-			--ConstrainVelocity(hull, GetShapeBody(shape), wheelNewT.pos, wheelNormal, -susTravel, -math.abs(susTravel)*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull), math.abs(susTravel)*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull))
-			--ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,wheelNewT.pos,VecScale(wheelNormal,-susTravel*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull)*dt))
-		end
-
-		--white for original transform of wheel, red for current, green for where it would touch the ground
-		DebugCross(TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT).pos)
-		DebugCross(GetBodyTransform(wheelID).pos,1)
-		DebugCross(TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(wheelID), Vec(0,-radius)),0,1)
-
-		local engineStrength = 20000
-		local wheelForwardDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,0,-1))
-		local wheelDriveVec = VecScale(wheelForwardDir,throttle*engineStrength*dt)
-
-		local rollResistCoef = 12
-		local rollDragVec = VecScale(hullVel,-rollResistCoef*dt)
-		if hit then
-			ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,wheelTouchPos,VecAdd(wheelDriveVec,rollDragVec))
-		end
-	end
-	local coefOfFriction = 0.30 -- unique to vehicles
-	local frontalArea = 2.2 -- unique to vehicles
-	local airDensity = 1.29
-	local airDragVec = VecScale(hullVel,-VecLength(hullVel)*coefOfFriction*frontalArea*airDensity*.5*dt)
-	ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(hull),GetBodyCenterOfMass(hull)),airDragVec)
-end
+#version 2
 function math.clamp(val, lower, upper)
     if lower > upper then lower, upper = upper, lower end -- swap if boundaries supplied the wrong way
     return math.max(lower, math.min(upper, val))
 end
 
-
-
---0.2 in vanilla, makes sure that the max possible force that can act on the torso never goes to 0, as long as feet touch the ground
---not sure what it affects at different values
-ConstantLiftForceFraction = 0.2
---MaxHoverOffset is a buffer area for the upward standing force. While this close or closer to ideal standing height, both max velocity and force go down for standing
---0.2 in vanilla
-MaxHoverOffset = 0.2
-MaxUpwardVelocity = 2 --how fast max can go up to reach standing height during normal walking. 2 in vanilla
---for standing, ie upward force, not to fall on the ground
 function hoverFloat()
-	if hover.contact > 0 then --only if there's something to stand on
+	if hover.contact ~= 0 then --only if there's something to stand on
 		--0.2 here is a buffer area for the upward standing force. 
 		--While this close or closer to ideal standing height, both max velocity and force go down for standing, not to overshoot within this range
 		--UpwardOffset for moving up and down with steps
@@ -108,7 +19,87 @@
 		ConstrainVelocity(robot.body, hover.hitBody, robot.bodyCenter, Vec(0,1,0), v, 0 , f)
 	end
 end
+
 function ProjectVecOnPlane(v,n)
 	local inv_denom=1/VecDot(n,n)
 	return VecSub(v,VecScale(n,inv_denom*VecDot(n,v)*inv_denom))
-end 
+end
+
+function server.init()
+    wheels = FindBodies("TABSWheel")
+    hull = FindBody("tankHull")
+    wheelHandler = {}
+    for i = 1, #wheels do
+    	local wheel=wheels[i]
+    	wheelHandler[wheel] = {}
+    	wheelHandler[wheel].origT = TransformToLocalTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), GetBodyTransform(wheel))
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        local hullVel=GetBodyVelocity(hull)
+        local hullAngVel=GetBodyAngularVelocity(hull)
+        for wheelID,wheel in pairs(wheelHandler) do
+        	local radius=.4
+        	local wheelNewT=TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT)
+        	local wheelTouchPos=TransformToParentPoint(wheelNewT,Vec(0,-radius,0))
+        	local wheelNormal=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,1,0))
+        	wheelNewT.pos = VecAdd(wheelNewT.pos,VecScale(GetBodyVelocityAtPos(hull,wheelNewT.pos),1/60))
+        	--[[ local wheelXDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(1,0,0))
+        	local wheelZDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,0,1)) ]]
+
+        	QueryRejectBody(hull)
+        	QueryRejectBody(wheelID)
+        	local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(wheelTouchPos,VecScale(wheelNormal,radius*2)),VecScale(wheelNormal,-1),.1+radius*2,.1)
+        	local susTravel = dist-radius*2
+        	DebugWatch(wheelID..' sus travel',susTravel)
+
+        	local wheelVel=GetBodyVelocityAtPos(hull,TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT.pos))
+        	local wheelFutureT=TransformToParentTransform(wheelNewT, Transform(Vec(0,-math.clamp(susTravel,-.1,.1),0)))
+
+        	SetBodyTransform(wheelID, wheelFutureT)
+        	--SetBodyVelocity(wheelID,wheelVel)
+        	--SetBodyAngularVelocity(wheelID,hullAngVel)
+
+        	local springConst = 0.2
+
+        	--susTravel is how much the wheel is digging into the ground
+        	if hit then
+        		local f = math.clamp(-susTravel*springConst*2000,-100,100)
+        		DebugPrint(f)
+
+        		ApplyBodyImpulse(hull, wheelNewT.pos, VecScale(wheelNormal,-susTravel*springConst*5000) )
+        		--[[ if VecDot(wheelVel,normal)<0 then
+        			SetBodyVelocity(wheelID,ProjectVecOnPlane(wheelVel,normal))
+        		end ]]
+        		--ConstrainVelocity(hull, GetShapeBody(shape), wheelNewT.pos, wheelNormal, -susTravel, -math.abs(susTravel)*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull), math.abs(susTravel)*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull))
+        		--ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,wheelNewT.pos,VecScale(wheelNormal,-susTravel*springConst*GetBodyMass(hull)*dt))
+        	end
+        	--white for original transform of wheel, red for current, green for where it would touch the ground
+        	DebugCross(TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(hull), wheel.origT).pos)
+        	DebugCross(GetBodyTransform(wheelID).pos,1)
+        	DebugCross(TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(wheelID), Vec(0,-radius)),0,1)
+        	local engineStrength = 20000
+        	local wheelForwardDir=TransformToParentVec(wheelNewT,Vec(0,0,-1))
+        	local wheelDriveVec = VecScale(wheelForwardDir,throttle*engineStrength*dt)
+        	local rollResistCoef = 12
+        	local rollDragVec = VecScale(hullVel,-rollResistCoef*dt)
+        	if hit then
+        		ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,wheelTouchPos,VecAdd(wheelDriveVec,rollDragVec))
+        	end
+        end
+        local coefOfFriction = 0.30 -- unique to vehicles
+        local frontalArea = 2.2 -- unique to vehicles
+        local airDensity = 1.29
+        local airDragVec = VecScale(hullVel,-VecLength(hullVel)*coefOfFriction*frontalArea*airDensity*.5*dt)
+        ApplyBodyImpulse(hull,TransformToParentPoint(GetBodyTransform(hull),GetBodyCenterOfMass(hull)),airDragVec)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    throttle = InputValue('uparrow')-InputValue('downarrow')
+    steer = InputValue('leftarrow')-InputValue('rightarrow')
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\pathfinding\AStarSearch.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\pathfinding\mapBuilder.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\pathfinding\mapBuilder.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\pathfinding\mapBuilder.lua
@@ -1,208 +1,4 @@
-#include "mapNode.lua"
-#include "AStarSearch.lua"
-
-
---[[
-**********************************************************************
-*
-*  
-*
-* FILENAME :        mapBuilder.lua             
-*
-* DESCRIPTION :
-*   File that constructs the map based on scanning positions for materials
-*   Buidls a 2d array representing a weighted graph of every map location
-*   
-
-*
-* NOTES :
-*       
-*
-* AUTHOR :    elboydo        START DATE   :    Jan  2021
-*                Release Date :    29 Nov 2021 
-*
-]]
-
-
-RACESTARTED = false
-map = {
-  xIndex = 0,
-  data = {
-
-  },
-
-  validSurfaceColours ={ 
-      [1] = {
-        r = 0.20,
-        g = 0.20,
-        b = 0.20,
-        range = 0.01
-      },
-    },
-}
-
--- negative grid pos is solved by simply showing 
-mapSize = {
-			x=400,
-			y=400,
-			grid = 5,
-      gridHeight = 1,
-      gridResolution = 0.5,
-      gridThres      = 0.2,
-
-      scanHeight = 100,
-
-      scanLength = 200,
-
-      weights = {
-          goodTerrain = 0.1,
-          badTerrain   = 10,
-          avoidTerrain = 25,
-          impassableTerrain = 50,
-      }
-		}
-    path = nil
-
-function init()
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\player_movement.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\player_movement.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\player_movement.lua
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+#version 2
 function InitPlayerMovement()
 	PCx,PCy,PCz,PCrx,PCry,PCrz = 0,0,0,0,0,0,0
 	sin1 = 0
@@ -19,7 +20,7 @@
 end
 
 function PlayerMovementUpdate(dt)
-	local PV = GetPlayerVelocity()
+	local PV = GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)
 	local SF = 1
 	if InputDown("shift") or VecLength(PV) < 1 then
 		SF = 0
@@ -27,7 +28,7 @@
 	SetPlayerGroundVelocity(Vec(-PV[1]*SF,0,-PV[3]*SF))
 
 	if InputDown("crouch") and slideTimer > 3 then
-		SetPlayerVelocity(VecScale(slideDir,math.min(.8*(slideTimer-2)^2,20)))
+		SetPlayerVelocity(playerId, VecScale(slideDir,math.min(.8*(slideTimer-2)^2,20)))
 		slideTimer = slideTimer	- 5*GetTimeStep()
 	else
 		slideTimer = math.min(slideTimer + .1*(VecLength(PV)-slideTimer),10)
@@ -35,10 +36,10 @@
 end
 
 function PlayerMovementTick(dt)
-	local PV = GetPlayerVelocity()
+	local PV = GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)
 	if InputPressed("crouch") then slideDir = VecNormalize(PV) slideSpeed = VecLength(PV) end
 
-	if TABSSettings.toggle.playerleaning and GetPlayerVehicle()==0 then
+	if TABSSettings.toggle.playerleaning and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId)==0 then
 		if InputDown("q") and not InputDown("e") then
 			leanState = "left"
 		elseif InputDown("e") and not InputDown("q") then
@@ -51,7 +52,7 @@
 
 function PlayerCameraUpdate(dt)
 
-	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0, 10)
+	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0, 10)
 	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
 	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
 	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
@@ -60,9 +61,9 @@
 end
 
 function PlayerCameraTick(dt,ENV_sat,ENV_bloom,ENV_cont,bodyCamToggle,mult)
-	local pv = TransformToLocalVec(GetPlayerCameraTransform(),GetPlayerVelocity())
-	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0, 10)
-	local crx,cry,crz = GetQuatEuler(GetPlayerCameraTransform().rot)
+	local pv = TransformToLocalVec(GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId),GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
+	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0, 10)
+	local crx,cry,crz = GetQuatEuler(GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId).rot)
 
 	PCrx = PCrx + mult*(1*InputValue("mousedy") + 5*pv[2] + sin1*3*speed^.5)*dt^.5*.15
 	PCry = PCry + mult*(1*InputValue("mousedx") + sin2*2*speed^.5)*dt^.5*.15
@@ -95,8 +96,8 @@
 	local suppression = GetFloat("level.tabs.suppression")
 	if suppression > 0 and false then --Temporarily disabled
 		suppression = math.clamp(suppression*.99 - 2*dt,0,suppressionMax)
-		SetFloat("level.tabs.suppression",suppression)
-		if GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
+		SetFloat("level.tabs.suppression",suppression, true)
+		if GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
 			local sf = (suppressionMax-suppression)/suppressionMax
 			if bodyCamToggle then sf = sf*.8 end
 			SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", ENV_sat*sf)
@@ -111,4 +112,5 @@
 		SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", ENV_sat)
 	end
 	-- DebugWatch("Suppression",suppression)
-end+end
+
```

```diff
+#version 2
 local FILENAME = "MOD/TABS/scripts/shape_utils.lua"
 
-if ClearKey then -- <script>

-			shapedata = string.format( "shape=\"%s\"", table.concat( content, "" ) )

-		if parameters.size then
-			size = string.format( "size=\"%d %d %d\"", unpack( parameters.size ) )
-		end

-		                      palettedata )
-	end
-
-	function CreatePalette( entries )
-		local palettexml = voxscript { palette = entries }
-		return Spawn( palettexml, Transform(), true, false )[1]
-	end
-
-	function SetShapePaletteContent( shape, entries )
-		local palette = CreatePalette( entries )
-		CopyShapePalette( palette, shape )
-		Delete( palette )
-	end
-
-	function SetShapesPaletteContent( shapes, entries )
-		local palette = CreatePalette( entries )
-		for i = 1, #shapes do
-			CopyShapePalette( palette, shapes[i] )
-		end
-		Delete( palette )
-	end
-
-	function GetShapePaletteContent( shape )
-		local forward = GetShapePalette( shape )
-		local reverse = {}
-		for i = 1, #forward do
-			local mat, r, g, b, a, re, sh, me, em = GetShapeMaterial( shape, forward[i] )
-			local t = {
-				index = forward[i],
-				material = mat,
-				r = r,
-				g = g,
-				b = b,
-				a = a,
-				reflect = re,
-				shiny = sh,
-				metal = me,
-				emissive = em,
-			}
-			forward[i] = t
-			reverse[t.index] = t
-		end
-		return forward, reverse
-	end
-
-	function GetShapesPaletteContent( shapes )
-		local forward = {}
-		local reverse = {}
-		for i = 1, #shapes do
-			local shape = shapes[i]
-			local usedpalette = GetShapePalette( shape )
-			for j = 1, #usedpalette do
-				if not reverse[usedpalette[j]] then
-					local material, r, g, b, a, re, sh, me, em = GetShapeMaterial( shape, usedpalette[j] )
-					local t = {
-						index = usedpalette[j],
-						material = material,
-						r = r,
-						g = g,
-						b = b,
-						a = a,
-						reflect = re,
-						shiny = sh,
-						metal = me,
-						emissive = em,
-					}
-					forward[#forward + 1] = t
-					reverse[usedpalette[j]] = t
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		return forward, reverse
-	end
-
-	function CreateShapeFromContent( content, x2, y2, z2 )
-		if not x2 then
-			content, x2, y2, z2 = unpack( content )
-		end
-		local newdataxml = voxscript { shape = content, size = { x2, y2, z2 } }
-		local newdata = Spawn( newdataxml, Transform(), true, false )[1]
-		SetBrush( "cube", 1, content[1] )
-		DrawShapeBox( newdata, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 )
-		SetBrush( "cube", 1, content[#content] )
-		DrawShapeBox( newdata, x2 - 1, y2 - 1, z2 - 1, x2 - 1, y2 - 1, z2 - 1 )
-		return newdata
-	end
-
-	function SetShapeContent( shape, content )
-		local x2, y2, z2 = GetShapeSize( shape )
-		if type( content[1] ) == "table" then
-			content, x2, y2, z2 = unpack( content )
-		end
-		local newdata = CreateShapeFromContent( content, x2, y2, z2 )
-		CopyShapeContent( newdata, shape )
-		Delete( newdata )
-	end
-
-	function GetShapeContent( shape )
-		local content = {}
-		local x2, y2, z2 = GetShapeSize( shape )
-		for x = 0, x2 - 1 do
-			for y = 0, y2 - 1 do
-				for z = 0, z2 - 1 do
-					local _, _, _, _, _, index = GetShapeMaterialAtIndex( shape, x, y, z )
-					content[#content + 1] = index
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		return content, x2, y2, z2
-	end
-
-	function CarveShape( shape, carver, offset )
-		-- TODO: batch carving?
-		if type( carver ) == "number" then
-			carver = { GetShapeContent( carver ), GetShapeSize( carver ) }
-		end
-		local oP, oR = Vec( 0, 0, 0 ), Vec( 0, 0, 0 )
-		if offset then
-			if offset.pos then
-				oP = offset.pos
-				oR = Vec( GetQuatEuler( offset.rot ) )
-			else
-				oP = offset
-			end
-		end
-		local original = GetShapeContent( shape )
-		local positive = voxscript { shape = original, size = { GetShapeSize( shape ) } }
-		local negative = type( carver ) == "string" and string.format( [[<vox file="%s"/>]], carver ) or
-			                 voxscript { shape = carver[1], size = { select( 2, unpack( carver ) ) } }
-		local xml = string.format( [[
-			<body dynamic="true">
-				%s
-				<group pos="%f %f %f" rot="%f %f %f">
-					%s
-				</group>
-			</body>
-		]], positive, oP[1], oP[2], oP[3], oR[1], oR[2], oR[3], negative )
-		local body, resultShape, negativeShape = unpack( Spawn( xml, Transform(), false, false ) )
-		CopyShapeContent( resultShape, shape )
-		SetShapeLocalTransform( shape, TransformToParentTransform( GetShapeLocalTransform( shape ),
-		                                                           GetShapeWorldTransform( resultShape ) ) )
-		Delete( body )
-		Delete( resultShape )
-		Delete( negativeShape )
-		return shape
-	end
-
-	function CloneShape( shape )
-		local save = CreateShape()
-		CopyShapeContent( shape, save )
-		local x, y, z, scale = GetShapeSize( shape )
-		local start = GetShapeWorldTransform( shape )
-		ResizeShape( shape, 0, 0, 0, x - 1, y - 1, z + 1 )
-		SetBrush( "cube", 1, 1 )
-		DrawShapeBox( shape, 0, 0, z + 1, 0, 0, z + 1 )
-		local pieces = SplitShape( shape, false )
-		local moved = VecScale( TransformToLocalPoint( GetShapeWorldTransform( shape ), start.pos ), 1 / scale )
-		local mx, my, mz = math.floor( moved[1] + 0.5 ), math.floor( moved[2] + 0.5 ), math.floor( moved[3] + 0.5 )
-		ResizeShape( shape, mx, my, mz, 1, 1, 1 )
-		CopyShapeContent( save, shape )
-		local splitoffset = VecScale( TransformToLocalPoint( GetShapeWorldTransform( pieces[1] ), start.pos ), 1 / scale )
-		local sx, sy, sz = math.floor( splitoffset[1] + 0.5 ), math.floor( splitoffset[2] + 0.5 ),
-							math.floor( splitoffset[3] + 0.5 )
-		ResizeShape( pieces[1], sx, sy, sz, 1, 1, 1 )
-		CopyShapeContent( save, pieces[1] )
-		Delete( save )
-		for i = 2, #pieces do
-			Delete( pieces[i] )
-		end
-		return pieces[1], shape
-	end
-else -- <voxscript>
-	local sx, sy, sz = GetInt( "size", 1, 1, 1 )
-	local shapedata = GetString( "shape" )
-	local palettedata = GetString( "palette" )
-
-	local function getbyte( str, offset )
-		local a, b = string.byte( str, offset, offset + 1 )
-		return (a - 65) * 16 + b - 65
-	end
-
-	function init()
-		if palettedata and palettedata ~= "" then
-			local colors = {}
-			for index, m, r, g, b, a, re, sh, me, em in palettedata:gmatch(
-				                                            "(%d+)/(%w+)/(%d+)/(%d+)/(%d+)/([%d.]+)/([%d.]+)/([%d.]+)/([%d.]+)/([%d.]+)" ) do
-				colors[tonumber( index )] = {
-					m,
-					tonumber( r ) / 255,
-					tonumber( g ) / 255,
-					tonumber( b ) / 255,
-					tonumber( a ),
-					tonumber( re ),
-					tonumber( sh ),
-					tonumber( me ),
-					tonumber( em ),
-				}
-			end
-			for i = 1, 255 do
-				if colors[i] then
-					CreateMaterial( unpack( colors[i] ) )
-				else
-					CreateMaterial( "none" ) -- gaps in the palette can't be left out
-				end
-			end
-			if not shapedata or shapedata == "" then
-				Vox( 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 )
-				for index in pairs( colors ) do
-					Material( index )
-					Box( index - 1, 0, 0, index, 1, 1 )
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		if shapedata and shapedata ~= "" then
-			Vox( 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 )
-			for i = 0, #shapedata / 2 - 1 do
-				local index = getbyte( shapedata, i * 2 + 1 )
-				if index > 0 then
-					Material( index )
-					local x, y, z = math.floor( i / sy / sz ) % sx, math.floor( i / sz ) % sy, i % sz
-					Box( x, y, z, x + 1, y + 1, z + 1 )
-				end
-			end
-			Material( 1 ) -- ensure the shape size is as requested
-			Box( 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1 )
-			Box( sx - 1, sy - 1, sz - 1, sx, sy, sz )
-		end
-	end
-end
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\sights.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\suspension.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\suspension.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\suspension.lua
@@ -1,11 +1,4 @@
-----MADE BY OKIDOKI-----
---[[
-function clamp(value, mi, ma)
-	if value < mi then value = mi end
-	if value > ma then value = ma end
-	return value
-end]]
-
+#version 2
 function Suspension_init(vInfo)
 suspension_up = 0
 suspension_down = 0
@@ -23,9 +16,7 @@
 reset_limit = 0
 end
 
-
 function Suspension_tick(vInfo,dt)
-
 
 if HasTag(vInfo.vehiclehandle,"Suspension") then --- start
 	if suspension_vel == nil then
@@ -52,9 +43,6 @@
 local wheelsrw = GetEntityChildren(vehicle_body, "rw", true, "wheel")
 local wheelslw = GetEntityChildren(vehicle_body, "lw", true, "wheel")
 
-
-
-
 if HasTag(vInfo.vehiclehandle,"S_lean") and not HasTag(vInfo.vehiclehandle,"S_vert") then
     if InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.suspension) then
         suspensionmod = suspensionmod + 1
@@ -86,7 +74,6 @@
         suspensionmod = 1	
 	end
 end
-
 
 --DebugPrint(suspensionmod)
 --[[DebugPrint(suspension_up)
@@ -120,7 +107,6 @@
             suspension_left = suspension_left - suspension_vel
 			suspension_right = suspension_right + suspension_vel	   				
         end
```

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+
```

```diff
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())

 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))

@@ -235,4 +113,120 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-ak-5c"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "AK-5C", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/ak-5c.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="556x45",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.017,-.5),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.017,.02),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.3,.5),
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=700,
+    	accuracy=.0003,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={45,90,0},
+    	recoilVertical=.6,
+    	recoilHorizontal=.5,
+    	recoilWander=.8,
+    	recoilMax=12,
+    	recoilKickRot=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=.7,
+    	kickOverlap=.6,
+    	vertTravelMult=1,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-slap"},
+    	chargeTypes={"boltrelease","ar-charginghandle"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.08,
+    	reciprocatingChargingHandle=true,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_foregrip"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","specter-1-4x","pk-122","et-553","aimpoint-t2","et-exps3","vortex-1-6x24","elcan-c79-olive","elcan-c79","aimpoint-m4","atacr-7-35x56","acog-4x32","uh-1"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.Stanag)},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarl_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltRelease = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_boltrelease.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-aks-74u"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "AKS-74U", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/aks74u.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="545x39",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,-.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.3),
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=720,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=0.9,
+    	recoilMax=5,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=1.5,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.3,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","magpul_afg_foregrip","kac_foregrip","rk1_foregrip","surefire-long2","magpul_foregrip"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"Beryl-Muzzle","muzzle-booster","ak74-muzzle","zenit-dtk2","pbs4-suppressor","pbs1-suppressor","hexagon-suppressor","NONE"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Lower_Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"aks74u-handguard-wood-lower","aks74u-handguard-polymer-lower","aks74u-handguard-polymer-lower(plum)","aks74u-handguard-wood-dong-lower","zenit_b11","Beryl-Handguard-down"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    	["Upper_Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"ak74-handguard-wood-upper","ak74-handguard-polymer-upper","ak74-handguard-polymer-upper(plum)","zenit_b19","ak74-handguard-steel-upper","Beryl-Handguard-mini","NONE"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-15","perst-3","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-acro-rail","trijicon-rmr-rail"},
+    		order=5,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","pk-122","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-acro-rail","trijicon-rmr-rail","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","ekp-1","1p63","usp-1","pso-1","aks74u-rail","pgo-7ak","nspu"},
+    		order=7,
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"Beryl-Stock","aks74u-stock","aks74u-stock-folded","zenit-pt1","ak-buffer-tube"},
+    		order=8,
+    	},
+    	["Stock2"]={
+    		attachments={"m4a1-stock-1","sopmod-stock","hk416-stock-1"},
+    		order=9,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"Beryl-Magazine",unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.AK545)},
+    		order=10,
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"Beryl-Pistol-Grip","ak74-pistolgrip-wood","ak74-pistolgrip-polymer","ak74-pistolgrip-polymer(plum)","zenit-rk3"},
+    		order=11,
+    	},
+    	["Mount_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","6Kh4-bayonet","6Kh5-bayonet"},
+    		order=12,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak12_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\aps.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+    		order=7,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)

+        		WeaponTick(dt)

+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end

+function client.init()

+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")

+    WeaponDraw(dt)
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\aug-a2.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-auto5"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Auto 5", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/auto5.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="12ga-00buckshot",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(.02,.015,.055),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,-.02),
+    	casingType="shotgun",
+    	magSize=4,
+    	fireRate=550,
+    	accuracy=.01,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=0.1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=2,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.15,
+    	recoilKickRot=1,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=1.3,
+    	reloadTime=1.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.2,
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=0.65,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.09,
+    	barrelRecoilDist=.09,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"12ga-00buckshot","12ga-000buckshot","12ga-slug","12ga-birdshot"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine2"]={
+    		attachments={"auto5-mag-4","auto5-mag-6","auto5-mag-8","auto5-mag-10"},
+    	},
+    	["Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"auto5-handguard-1","auto5-handguard-2"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"auto5-barrel-long","auto5-barrel-short","auto5-barrel-whippet"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("shotgun")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    boltCloseSoundPlaying = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_load_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\crowbar.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
-	end
```

```diff
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-deagle"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Desert Eagle XIX", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/deagle.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="50ae",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.2),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.055,0),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.3,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=8,
+    	fireRate=500,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.9,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=4,
+    	recoilWander=6,
+    	recoilKickRot=35,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=3,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.16,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=0,
+    	hammerAngle=-67,
+    	boltTime=.6,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.073,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"deagle-barrel","deagle-barrel2"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-acro-rail","trijicon-rmr-rail","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_foregrip","rk1_foregrip"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"none","deagle-mount"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"deagle-50ae","deagle-44mag"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/as val/as-val_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_magout_empty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_magin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_charge_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
 	a10RadioInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/a10/a10-prestrike-0.ogg")

+			lastPlayerTrans = GetPlayerTransform(playerId)

@@ -49,8 +50,8 @@

-			SetBool("game.input.locktool", true)

 			if droneAmmoType == "Grenade" then
 				if InputPressed("lmb") then
@@ -183,14 +184,14 @@

 			SetCameraTransform(droneTrans,droneZoom)

 		end
 	end

@@ -231,7 +232,7 @@
 function DroneDraw()

 	UiPush()
```

```diff
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	magSize=10,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=0.7,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=2.5,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=3.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"bolt"},
+    	boltTime=0.9,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    	boltAngle=45,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Handguard="dvl-handguard",
+    	Top_Rail="atacr-7-35x56",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"dvl-barrel","dvl-suppressor","dvl-barrel_2","dvl-suppressor_2"},
+    	},
+    	["Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","dvl-handguard","dvl-handguard_2"},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"dvl-stock_1","dvl-stock_2"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","atacr-7-35x56","vortex-1-6x24","1p69","aimpoint-t2","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","elcan-c79","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","uh-1","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dvl10/dvl_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dvl10/dvl_boltclose.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

```diff
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak12_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_magout_empty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_magin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/stg44/stg44_charge_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-g17"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "G17", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    customAttachmentProperties = function(attachment)
+    end
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/g17.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.3),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.055,0),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=17,
+    	fireRate=1350,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.8,
+    	recoilVertical=1.5,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.6,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	recoilKickRot=10,
+    	vertTravelMult=1,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=3,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.05,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Slide="g17-slide",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Slide"]={
+    		attachments={"g17-slide","g17-slide1","g17-slide2","g17-slide3","g17-slide4","g17-slide5","g17-slide6"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-acro-rail","trijicon-rmr-rail","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-x400","glock-mount"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-x400"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"g17-barrel","g17-barrel2","g17-barrel3"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"glock-mag-17","glock-mag-33"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    --SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    	if attachment.type == "slide" then
+    		fireModes = attachment.firemodes or DefaulFireModes
+    		curFireMode = 1
+    		fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
+    		selectorAngle = selectorAngles[curFireMode]
+    		PlaySound(SOUNDS.selectFire)
+    	end
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+    	},
+    	["Side_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3","surefire-long5","kac-rib-g3-blk","kac-rib-g3-od"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"g3-mag-20","g3-mag-10","g3-mag-30"},
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-762"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\g36.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={

+    	},
+    	["Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"g36-6port-handguard","g36-4port-handguard","g36-2port-handguard","g36-ultima-2port-handguard-blk","g36-ultima-2port-handguard-tan"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine_Well"]={

+    	},
+    	["Magazine_2"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.Stanag)},
+    	},
+    	["Carry_Handle"]={
+    		attachments={"g36-scoped-carry-handle","g36-railed-carry-handle"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"none","specter-1-4x","pk-122","et-553","specter-1-4x-tan","aimpoint-t2","et-exps3","vortex-1-6x24","aimpoint-m4","atacr-7-35x56","acog-4x32","uh-1","et-exps3tan"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip-tan","magpul_foregrip","magpul_foregrip-tan"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
```
