```diff
-	selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-	
-	--DebugPrint("Selected Shell = " ..tostring(selected_shell).. " Shell Name = " ..tostring(shellInfo.name[selected_shell]).. " Shell Type = " ..tostring(shellInfo.type[selected_shell]))
-	
-	cartridge = info.cartridge
-	baseVelocity = deepcopy(shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell])
-	VelocityMultiplier = 1
-	--if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-		Prices = {}
-	--end
-	recoilTimer = 0
-	reloadTimer = 0
-	magTimer = 0
-	reloadTime = info.reloadTime
-	reloading = false
-	reloadTypes = info.reloadTypes or {"NONE"}
-	reloadType = reloadTypes[1]
-	boltTimer = 0
-	boltNeeded = false
-	boltTime = info.boltTime or .5
-	chargeTypes = info.chargeTypes or {"NONE"}
-	chargeType = chargeTypes[1]
-	PreviousAttachmentData = {}
-	AttachmentAdditionsData = {
-		Recoil = {},
-		MuzzleVelocity = {},
-		ShootPosAdd = {},
-	}
-	laser = true
-	laserShapes = {}
-	
-	
-	pointAim = false
-	accuracy = info.accuracy
-	selectFire = 0
-	fireModes = info.fireModes
-	fireModeUpdate = false
-	curFireMode = 1
-	fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-	for i=1,#fireModes do 
-		if string.sub(fireModes[i],1,5) == 'burst' then
-			burstinfo = {
-				size = tonumber(Split(fireModes[i], '-')[2]) or 3,
-				shotsfired = 0,
-			}
-			fireModes[i] = 'burst'
-		end
-	end
-	DefaulFireModes = deepcopy(fireModes)
-	selectorAngles = info.selectorAngles
-	selectorAngle = selectorAngles[curFireMode]
-	openBolt = info.openBolt==true
-	hasopenbolt = openBolt
-	rnd1, rnd2, rnd3, rnd4, rnd5, rnd6 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
-	recoilVertical = info.recoilVertical
-	recoilHorizontal = info.recoilHorizontal
-	recoilWander = info.recoilWander
-	recoilKick = info.recoilKick or .03
-	recoilKickRot = info.recoilKickRot or 1
-	recoilAngle = 0
-	recoilMax = info.recoilMax
-	kickOverlap = info.kickOverlap or .5
-	vertTravelMult = info.vertTravelMult or 1
-
-	weightFactor = info.weightFactor or 1
-
-	for prop, val in pairs(info) do
-		weaponHandler.properties[prop] = deepcopy(val)
-	end
-
-	-- TABS Controls loaded here
-	InitOptions()
-
-end
-
--- Animation variables
-function InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
-	hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 200)
-	hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
-
-	-- Second Order Systems for weapon animation
-	local a = 90/weightFactor-math.clamp(7*(weightFactor-1),0,7) --100/weightFactor-math.clamp(7*(weightFactor-1),0,7)
-	local b = .11+math.clamp(0.15*(weightFactor-1),0,.05) --.08+.0007*fov+math.clamp(0.15*(weightFactor-1),0,.15)
-	local c = .05 --.45 --.45+.005*fov
-	WeaponSOS = InitSOS(a,b,c,.9)
-	ADSfov = 0
-	ADSorx = 0
-	ADSory = 0
-
-	RightHandSOS = InitSOS(200,.2,.2)
-	LeftHandSOS = InitSOS(200,.2,.2)
-
-	storedWeaponImpulse = {0,0,0,0,0,0}
-	totalImpulsesThisTick = 0
-
-	
-
-	RECx = 0
-	RECy = 0
-	RECz = 0
-	RECrotx = 0
-	RECroty = 0
-	RECrotz = 0
-
-	RECvelx = 0
-	RECvely = 0
-	RECvelz = 0
-	RECvelrotx = 0
-	RECvelroty = 0
-	RECvelrotz = 0
-
-	crouchoffset = 0
-
-	sin1 = 0
-	cos1 = 1
-	sin2 = 0
-	cos2 = 1
-	swayy = 0
-	swayx = 0
-
-	stabilityFactor = 0
-
-	sprintTimer = 0
-
-	scopeTimer = 0
-
-	selectAttachments = false
-
-	aimingToggle = false
-
-	thirdPersonToggle = false
-end
-
-function InitKeyFrames(keyFrames)
-	weaponHandler.keyFrames = keyFrames
-end
-
--- Initialising hands
-function InitHands(body, handObject)
-	local handBodies = {}
-
-	local handPrefab="MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/hands/hands_generic-bloody.xml"
-
-	local baseTransform = Transform()
-	local entities = Spawn(handPrefab, baseTransform)
-
-	for i, entity in pairs(entities) do
-		local type = GetEntityType(entity)
-		if type == "body" then
-			local part = GetTagValue(entity, "part")
-			local bS = GetBodyShapes(entity)
-			local bT = GetBodyTransform(entity)
-
-			local newBody = {
-				part=part,
-				shapes={},
-
-				initLocalTransform=Transform(), --TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, bT),
-				curLocalTransform=Transform(), --TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, bT),
-
-				setLocalTransform = function(self,t)
-					self.curLocalTransform = TransformCopy(t)
-					for i, shape in pairs(self.shapes) do
-						local shapeTransformDifference = TransformToParentTransform(self.initLocalTransform, TransformToParentTransform(t, shape.localTransform))
-						SetShapeLocalTransform(shape.handle, shapeTransformDifference)
-					end
-				end,
-				getLocalTransform = function(self)
-					return self.curLocalTransform
-				end,
-				delete = function(self)
-					for i, shape in pairs(self.shapes) do
-						Delete(shape.handle)
-					end
-					self = nil
-				end,
-			}
-
-			for j=1,#bS do
-				local shape = bS[j]
-				table.insert(newBody.shapes, {
-					handle=shape,
-					localTransform=TransformToLocalTransform(bT, GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)),
-				})
-				SetShapeBody(shape, body, TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)))
-			end
-
-			handBodies[part] = newBody
-		end
-	end
-
-	return handBodies
-end
-
-function DeleteHands()
-	for handle, body in pairs(weaponHandler.handBodies) do
-		for i=1,#body.shapes do
-			Delete(body.shapes[i].handle)
-		end
-		weaponHandler.handBodies[handle] = nil
-	end
-end
-
--- Loading the tool from an XML file
-function LoadTool(body, prefab)
-	local tbS = GetBodyShapes(body)
-	for i=1,#tbS do Delete(tbS[i]) end
-
-	local baseTransform = Transform()
-	local entities = Spawn(prefab, baseTransform)
-
-	SortNewEntities(entities, body)
-
-	if not GetBool("game.thirdperson") then
-		weaponHandler.handBodies = InitHands(body, handObject)
-	end
-
-	LoadAttachments(body)
-
-	weaponInitialised = true
-end
-
-function LoadAttachments(body)
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local curAttachmentID = attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[curAttachmentID]
-				if curAttachment then
-					local entities = Spawn(curAttachment.xml, pointInfo.initLocalTransform)
-
-					SortNewEntities(entities, body, pointInfo.pointType)
-
-					SetAttachmentProperties(curAttachment,point)
-				elseif string.upper(curAttachmentID) ~= "NONE" then
-					DebugPrint("Attachment not found: "..curAttachmentID)
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function SortNewEntities(entities, body, partOverride)
-	local baseTransform = Transform()
-
-	for i, entity in pairs(entities) do
-		local type = GetEntityType(entity)
-		if type == "body" then
-			local part = GetTagValue(entity, "part")
-			local bS = GetBodyShapes(entity)
-			local bT = GetBodyTransform(entity)
-
-			local newBody = {
-				part=part,
-				shapes={},
-				attachPoints={},
-
-				initLocalTransform=TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, bT),
-				curLocalTransform=TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, bT),
-
-				setLocalTransform = function(self,t)
-					self.curLocalTransform = TransformCopy(t)
-					for i, shape in pairs(self.shapes) do
-						local shapeTransformDifference = TransformToParentTransform(self.initLocalTransform, TransformToParentTransform(t, shape.localTransform))
-						SetShapeLocalTransform(shape.handle, shapeTransformDifference)
-					end
-				end,
-				getLocalTransform = function(self)
-					return self.curLocalTransform
-				end,
-				delete = function(self)
-					for i, shape in pairs(self.shapes) do
-						Delete(shape.handle)
-					end
-
-					-- Deleting child attachment points
-					for point, pointInfo in pairs(self.attachPoints) do
-						if weaponHandler.bodies[point] then 
-							weaponHandler.bodies[point]:delete()
-						end
-						attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment = "NONE"
-						
-						self.attachPoints[point] = nil
-					end
-					self = nil
-				end,
-			}
-
-			for j=1,#bS do
-				local shape = bS[j]
-				if HasTag(shape, 'laser') then
-					table.insert(laserShapes, shape)
-				end
-				table.insert(newBody.shapes, {
-					handle=shape,
-					localTransform=TransformToLocalTransform(bT, GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)),
-				})
-				SetShapeBody(shape, body, TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)))
-			end
-
-			if partOverride~=nil then
-				weaponHandler.bodies[partOverride] = newBody
-			else
-				weaponHandler.bodies[part] = newBody
-			end
-		elseif type == "location" then
-			local attachpoint = GetTagValue(entity, "attachpoint")
-
-			local newLocation = {
-				initLocalTransform=TransformToLocalTransform(baseTransform, GetLocationTransform(entity)),
-				pointType=attachpoint,
-			}
-
-			local parentBody = partOverride or "Receiver" -- If an attachment has an attach point on it, its parent will be the attachment
-			weaponHandler.bodies[parentBody].attachPoints[attachpoint] = newLocation
-			-- DebugPrint("Parent: "..parentBody)
-			-- DebugPrint("Attach Point: "..attachpoint)
-		end
-	end
-end
-
--- Initialising weapon sounds
-function InitSounds(weaponType)
-	local SOUNDS = LoadTABSSounds()
-	
-	if weaponType == "pistol" then
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Up = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_up_pistol.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Down = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_down_pistol.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.casingBounce = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/casings/pistol_0.ogg")
-	elseif weaponType == "smg" then
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Up = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_up_smg.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Down = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_down_smg.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.casingBounce = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/casings/pistol_0.ogg")
-	elseif weaponType == "sniper" then
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Up = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_up_sniper.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Down = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_down_sniper.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.casingBounce = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/casings/sniper_0.ogg")
-	elseif weaponType == "shotgun" then
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Up = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_up.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Down = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_down.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.casingBounce = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/casings/shotgun_0.ogg")
-	else
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Up = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_up.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.ADS_Down = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ads_down.ogg", true)
-		SOUNDS.casingBounce = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/casings/rifle_0.ogg")
-	end
-
-	return SOUNDS
-end
-
-function ChangeENV(type)
-	local r,g,b = 1,1,1
-
-	if type == "Default" then
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("exposure", ENV_Emin, ENV_Emax)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("skyboxtint", ENV_sb1, ENV_sb2, ENV_sb3)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("constant", ENV_c1, ENV_c2, ENV_c3)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("bloom", ENV_bloom)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunbrightness", ENV_sun)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", ENV_sat)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("colorbalance", ENV_cb1, ENV_cb2, ENV_cb3)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("fogparams", ENV_fog1,ENV_fog2,ENV_fog3,ENV_fog4)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunLength", ENV_sunLength)
-		EnvState = 'Default'
-		
-	elseif type == "Day" then
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("exposure", ENV_Emin, ENV_Emax)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("skyboxtint", ENV_sb1, ENV_sb2, ENV_sb3)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("constant", ENV_c1, ENV_c2, ENV_c3)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("bloom", ENV_bloom)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunbrightness", ENV_sun)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", 1)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("colorbalance", ENV_cb1+r-1, ENV_cb2+g-1, ENV_cb3+b-1)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("fogparams", ENV_fog1,ENV_fog2,ENV_fog3,ENV_fog4)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunLength", ENV_sunLength)
-		EnvState = 'Day'
-		
-	elseif type == "Night" then
-		local avgSBT = (ENV_sb1+ENV_sb2+ENV_sb3)/3
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("exposure", ENV_Emax*15, ENV_Emax*20)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("skyboxtint", 0, avgSBT+1, .25*(avgSBT+1))
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("constant", ENV_c1 - 0.5, ENV_c2, ENV_c3)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("bloom", 10)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunbrightness", 15*(avgSBT*ENV_sun^2)^2+.2)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", 0)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("colorbalance", 0, 0.2, 0.05)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("fogParams", ENV_fog1*2,ENV_fog2*2,ENV_fog3/10,ENV_fog4/2)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunLength", ENV_sunLength)
-		EnvState = 'Night'
-		
-	elseif type == "Thermal" then
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("exposure", 1, 5)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("skyboxtint", ENV_sb1/5, ENV_sb2/5, ENV_sb3/5)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("constant", 0.01*r, 0.01*g, 0.01*b)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("bloom",10)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunbrightness", 0.1)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("saturation", 0)
-		SetPostProcessingProperty("colorbalance", r, g, b)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("fogParams", 1000,2000,1,1)
-		SetEnvironmentProperty("sunLength", 0)
-		EnvState = 'Thermal'
-		
-	end
-end
-
-function GetEnv()
-	ENV_Emin, ENV_Emax = GetEnvironmentProperty("exposure")
-	ENV_sb1, ENV_sb2, ENV_sb3 = GetEnvironmentProperty("skyboxtint")
-	ENV_c1, ENV_c2, ENV_c3 = GetEnvironmentProperty("constant")
-	ENV_bloom = GetPostProcessingProperty("bloom")
-	ENV_sun = GetEnvironmentProperty("sunbrightness")
-	ENV_sat = GetPostProcessingProperty("saturation")
-	ENV_gamma = GetPostProcessingProperty("gamma")
-	ENV_fog1, ENV_fog2, ENV_fog3, ENV_fog4 = GetEnvironmentProperty("fogparams")
-	ENV_cb1, ENV_cb2, ENV_cb3 = GetPostProcessingProperty("colorbalance")
-	ENV_sunLength = GetEnvironmentProperty("sunLength")
-end
-
------------------------
--- WEAPON ANIMATIONS --
------------------------
-
-function WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
-	if GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.smoothcam") then
-		ADSfov = ADSfov - 8*(ADSfov+1.3*VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()))*dt
-	else
-		ADSfov = ADSfov - 8*(ADSfov)*dt
-	end
-end
-
-function WeaponTick(dt)
-	local pct = GetPlayerCameraTransform()
-	local pv = TransformToLocalVec(pct,GetPlayerVelocity())
-
-
-	-- Weapon movement
-	if not selectAttachments then -- Used to look kinda cool when selecting attachments, but made categories sometimes swap around as you tried to select them
-		WeaponSOS:addRotationalVelocity(-.12*InputValue("mousedy"), -.1*InputValue("mousedx"), -.12*InputValue("mousedx"))
-		WeaponSOS:addRotationalVelocity(.2*WeaponSOS:getVelAtIndex(1),-.5*WeaponSOS:getVelAtIndex(2),-.3*WeaponSOS:getVelAtIndex(3))
-	end
-
-	ADSorx = math.clamp(ADSorx - .01*InputValue("mousedy"),-5,5)
-	ADSory = math.clamp(ADSory - .01*InputValue("mousedx"),-5,5)
-	if aiming or selectAttachments then ADSorx = 0 ADSory = 0 end
-
-	local cf = .1 -- crouch factor
-	if weightFactor == nil then weightFactor = 1 end
-	if InputDown("ctrl") then cf = 0 end
-	if reloading then cf = cf + 2 end
-	stabilityFactor = math.clamp(stabilityFactor - (stabilityFactor-weightFactor*(VecLength(pv)^.5-cf))*dt/weightFactor^.25 + .000005*(InputValue("mousedx")^2+InputValue("mousedy")^2)^.5/dt,0,5)
-
-
-	-- Aiming FOV and blur
-	SetCameraFov(math.max(GetInt("options.gfx.fov")-ADSfov+recoilTimer/shotDelay,5))
-
-	if aiming then SetCameraDof(1, math.max(0.1*recoilTimer/shotDelay-shotDelay*.3,0)) end
-	if ADSfov > 20 and scopeTimer == 1 then
-		local dir = TransformToParentVec(pct,Vec(0,0,-1))
-		QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody())
-		local hit, dist = QueryRaycast(pct.pos, dir, 1000, 0, true)
-		SetCameraDof(dist-recoilTimer/shotDelay*500-25*math.max(stabilityFactor-.5,0),(ADSfov-20)/30+recoilTimer)
-	end
-	if aiming and not reloading and boltTimer <= 0 then
-		if pointAim then
-			scopeTimer = math.clamp(scopeTimer-3*dt,.5,1)
-		else
-			scopeTimer = math.clamp(scopeTimer+3*dt,0,1)
-		end
-	else
-		scopeTimer = math.clamp(scopeTimer-3*dt,0,1)
-	end
-
-	
-	selectAttachments = InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.select_attachments) and not aiming and not InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.sprint)
-	if not selectAttachments and attachmentPresets ~= nil then
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(attachmentPresets) do
-			pointInfo.orderDisplay = RSV(1)
-		end
-	end
-
-	local ctgt = 0
-	if InputDown("crouch") then
-		ctgt = .8
-	end
-	local prx = GetQuatEuler(GetPlayerCameraTransform().rot)
-	crouchoffset = crouchoffset + .1*((prx/90)^3 + ctgt - crouchoffset)
-
-
-	-- Shared weapon sounds
-	if aiming and not aimingToggle then
-		aimingToggle = true
-		PlaySound(SOUNDS.ADS_Up)
-	elseif not aiming and aimingToggle then
-		aimingToggle = false
-		PlaySound(SOUNDS.ADS_Down)
-	end
-
-	local sttgt = 0
-	if VecLength(pv) > 5 then sttgt = 1 end
-	sprintTimer = sprintTimer + dt*(sttgt-sprintTimer)
-
-	extraFOV = 0
-
-end
-
-function RecieveDebugEvent() 
-	ClearDebug = true
-
-end
-
-function WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
-	HandleProjectiles()
-	if InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.toggle_debug) and not InputDown("ctrl") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
-	if InputDown("ctrl") and InputPressed(TABSControls.vehicles.toggle_debug) then
-		debuglines = {}
-		debugholes = {}
-	end
-	if ClearDebug then
-		debuglines = {}
-		debugholes = {}
-		ClearDebug = false
-	end
-	if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
-
-	if recoilTimer > 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
-	if shootTimer > 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
-	if boltTimer > 0 then
-		boltTimer = boltTimer - dt
-	elseif boltTimer < 0 then
-		boltTimer = 0
-		boltOpenSoundPlaying = false
-		boltCloseSoundPlaying = false
-		boltNeeded = false
-	end
-	-- ManageRecoil()
-end
-
-function AddWeaponImpulse(impulse)
-	for i=1, #impulse do
-		storedWeaponImpulse[i] = storedWeaponImpulse[i] + impulse[i] --/((GetTimeStep()*60)^.5)
-	end
-	totalImpulsesThisTick = totalImpulsesThisTick + 1
-	if totalImpulsesThisTick == 1 then initialImpulseTime = GetTime() end
-end
-
-function WeaponUpdate(dt)
-	local targetTransform = GetWeaponTransform()
-	WeaponSOS:updateAcceleration(targetTransform)
-	WeaponSOS:updateVelocity(targetTransform)
-
-	local sWI = storedWeaponImpulse
-	local tI = math.max(totalImpulsesThisTick,1)
-	local scalingFactor = 20
-	local iDT = scalingFactor*dt
-	-- Ideally this should count from the start to the end of the impulse, so short impulses would be scaled only in the frame that they happened
-	-- if initialImpulseTime ~= nil then iDT = scalingFactor*(GetTime()-initialImpulseTime) end
-	WeaponSOS:addImpulse(sWI[1]/tI/iDT,sWI[2]/tI/iDT,sWI[3]/tI/iDT,sWI[4]/tI/iDT,sWI[5]/tI/iDT,sWI[6]/tI/iDT)
-	
-	storedWeaponImpulse = {0,0,0,0,0,0}
-	totalImpulsesThisTick = 0
-	initialImpulseTime = nil
-
-	ManageRecoil()
-end
-
-function WeaponInputs()
-	if not reloading and (not InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.sprint) or aiming) and GetPlayerGrabShape() == 0 and shootTimer <= 0 and boltTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
-		if ammo > 0 then
-			if InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "full" then
-				ShootWeapon()
-			elseif fireMode == "burst"then
-				if InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and burstinfo.shotsfired < burstinfo.size then
-					ShootWeapon()
-					burstinfo.shotsfired = burstinfo.shotsfired + 1
-				elseif InputReleased(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) then
-					burstinfo.shotsfired = 0
-				end
-			elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "semi" then
-				ShootWeapon()
-			elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "alternative" then
-				ShootWeapon()
-			elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "secondary" then
-				ShootWeapon()
-			elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "bolt" then
-				if boltNeeded then
-					boltTimer = boltTime
-				else
-					ShootWeapon()
-					boltNeeded = true
-				end
-			elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) then
-				PlaySound(SOUNDS.dryFire)
-				AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,-4,-2,0})
-			end
-		elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) then
-			PlaySound(SOUNDS.dryFire)
-			AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,-4,-2,0})
-		end
-	elseif not reloading and InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.shoot) and fireMode == "bolt" and boltNeeded and boltTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
-		boltTimer = boltTime
-	end
-	if InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.reload) and (ammo < magSize or not boltNeeded and ammo <= magSize) and (reloadType == "shotgun" or reloadType == "revolver-single") and not reloading and not selectAttachments then
-		if chargeType ~= 'mosin' and boltTimer <= 0 then
-			reloadTimer = reloadTime
-			reloading = true
-		elseif chargeType == 'mosin' and boltTimer <= boltTime*.45 then 
-			reloadTimer = reloadTime
-			reloading = true
-		end
-	elseif InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.reload) and (ammo <= magSize and not openBolt or ammo < magSize) and reloadType ~= "shotgun" and reloadType ~= "revolver-single" and not reloading and boltTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
-		reloadTimer = reloadTime
-		reloading = true
-		reloadType = reloadTypes[math.random(1,#reloadTypes)]
-		chargeType = chargeTypes[math.random(1,#chargeTypes)]
-	end
-
-	if InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.select_fire) then
-		SelectFire()
-	end
-
-	aiming = InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.aim) and not InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.shift) and GetPlayerGrabShape() == 0
-	-- if InputPressed(TABSControls.weapons.aim) and aiming then AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,50,80,160}) end
-	if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
-	
-	if InputPressed('x') then laser = not laser end
-end
-
-function ShootWeapon()
-
-	selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-	--DebugPrint("Ammo/Magsize = " ..tostring(ammo).. " / " ..tostring(magSize))
-	
-	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
-	local pos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,VecAdd(shootPos,CalculateVecAdds('ShootPosAdd')))
-	if fireMode == 'secondary' then
-		pos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,shootPos)
-	end
-
-	local casingTrans = TransformToParentTransform(toolTrans,Transform(weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitPos,QuatEuler()))
-	local casingDir = weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitDir
-
-	-- Round info and sound
-	shellInfo.sound[selected_shell] = SOUNDS.weaponFire
-	if attachmentHandler.Muzzle then
-		local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler.Muzzle.curAttachment]
-		if curAttachment then
-			if curAttachment.suppressed then
-				shellInfo.sound[selected_shell] = SOUNDS.weaponFireSup
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if attachmentHandler.Barrel then
-		local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler.Barrel.curAttachment]
-		if curAttachment then
-			if curAttachment.suppressed then
-				shellInfo.sound[selected_shell] = SOUNDS.weaponFireSup
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	-- Shooting
-	PlaySound(shellInfo.sound[selected_shell],pos,1)
-	-- Disable tracer for small arms
-	--shellInfo.tracer = false
-	baseVelocity = deepcopy(shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell])
-	shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell] = baseVelocity*CalculateMultiplier('MuzzleVelocity')
-	
-	local rejectedBodies = GetAnimatorBodies(GetPlayerAnimator())
-	rejectedBodies[#rejectedBodies+1] = GetToolBody()
-	
-	Shoot(pos, TransformToParentVec(toolTrans,Vec(0,0,-1)), shellInfo, rejectedBodies, false, accuracy, 0, "mg", 0.5, 1, nil, nil, selected_shell)
-	shellInfo.velocity[selected_shell] = baseVelocity
-	ShakeCamera(.45)
-	if (weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitPos) and fireMode ~= "alternative"  then
-		if fireMode == "bolt" or fireMode == "secondary" then
-			casingEjected = false
-		else
-			SpentCasing(casingTrans, casingDir, 4, 2, .1, shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell], (weaponHandler.properties.casingType or "rifle"), SOUNDS.casingBounce)
-		end
-	end
-
-	ammo = ammo - 1
-	recoilTimer = shotDelay*kickOverlap
-	shootTimer = shotDelay
-	if recoilAngle < recoilMax then
-		recoilAngle = recoilAngle + (recoilVertical*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))
-	end
-
-	-- Recoil
-	local rndFactor = (1+.25*stabilityFactor)
-	rnd1, rnd2, rnd3, rnd4, rnd5, rnd6 = rnd1+(math.random()-0.5)*(recoilWander*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))*rndFactor, rnd2+(math.random()-0.5)*(recoilWander*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))*rndFactor, rnd3+(math.random()-0.5)*(recoilWander*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))/4*rndFactor, (math.random()-0.5)*((recoilHorizontal*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))*rndFactor, (math.random()-0.5)*(recoilHorizontal*CalculateMultiplier('Recoil'))*rndFactor, (math.random()-0.5)*recoilHorizontal/4*rndFactor
-	RECImpulse(0,-.15,1.5,50+rnd1*30,rnd2*30,rnd3*30)
-end
-
-function CalculateMultiplier(index)
-	local multiplier = 1
-	for k,v in pairs(AttachmentAdditionsData[index]) do
-		multiplier = multiplier * v
-	end
-	return multiplier
-end
-
-function CalculateVecAdds(index)
-	local multiplier = Vec(0,0,0)
-	for k,v in pairs(AttachmentAdditionsData[index]) do
-		multiplier = VecAdd(multiplier, v)
-	end
-	return multiplier
-end
-
-function SelectFire()
-	prevFireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-	curFireMode = curFireMode%#fireModes + 1
-	fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-	selectorAngle = selectorAngles[curFireMode]
-	PlaySound(SOUNDS.selectFire)
-	fireModeUpdate = true
-end
-
-function REC(bool, x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz)
-
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local a = 550
-	local d = 20
-
-	RECvelx = RECvelx + a*(x-RECx)*dt
-	RECx = RECx + RECvelx*dt
-	RECvelx = RECvelx - d*RECvelx*dt
-
-	RECvely = RECvely + a*(y-RECy)*dt
-	RECy = RECy + RECvely*dt
-	RECvely = RECvely - d*RECvely*dt
-
-	RECvelz = RECvelz + a*(z-RECz)*dt
-	RECz = RECz + RECvelz*dt
-	RECvelz = RECvelz - d*RECvelz*dt
-
-	RECvelrotx = RECvelrotx + a*(rotx-RECrotx)*dt
-	RECrotx = RECrotx + RECvelrotx*dt
-	RECvelrotx = RECvelrotx - d*RECvelrotx*dt
-
-	RECvelroty = RECvelroty + a*(roty-RECroty)*dt
-	RECroty = RECroty + RECvelroty*dt
-	RECvelroty = RECvelroty - d*RECvelroty*dt
-
-	RECvelrotz = RECvelrotz + a*(rotz-RECrotz)*dt
-	RECrotz = RECrotz + RECvelrotz*dt
-	RECvelrotz = RECvelrotz - d*RECvelrotz*dt
-
-	local offset = Transform(Vec(RECx, RECy, RECz), QuatEuler(RECrotx, RECroty, RECrotz))
-
-	return offset
-end
-
-function RECImpulse(x,y,z,rx,ry,rz)
-	local f = 10*GetTimeStep()^.5
-	RECvelx = RECvelx+x*f
-	RECvely = RECvely+y*f
-	RECvelz = RECvelz+z*f
-	RECvelrotx = RECvelrotx+rx*f
-	RECvelroty = RECvelroty+ry*f
-	RECvelrotz = RECvelrotz+rz*f
-end
-
-function ManageRecoil(recoverySpeed)
-	if recoverySpeed == nil or recoverySpeed < .01 then recoverySpeed = 0.05 end
-
-	if shootTimer <= 0 then
-		if math.abs(recoilAngle) < 0.01 then
-			recoilAngle = 0
-		elseif recoilAngle > 0 then
-			recoilAngle = recoilAngle - (recoilAngle+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif recoilAngle < 0 then
-			recoilAngle = recoilAngle - (recoilAngle-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd1) < 0.05 then
-			rnd1 = 0
-		elseif rnd1 > 0 then
-			rnd1 = rnd1 - (rnd1+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd1 < 0 then
-			rnd1 = rnd1 - (rnd1-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd2) < 0.05 then
-			rnd2 = 0
-		elseif rnd2 > 0 then
-			rnd2 = rnd2 - (rnd2+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd2 < 0 then
-			rnd2 = rnd2 - (rnd2-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd3) < 0.05 then
-			rnd3 = 0
-		elseif rnd3 > 0 then
-			rnd3 = rnd3 - (rnd3+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd3 < 0 then
-			rnd3 = rnd3 - (rnd3-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd4) < 0.05 then
-			rnd4 = 0
-		elseif rnd4 > 0 then
-			rnd4 = rnd4 - (rnd4+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd4 < 0 then
-			rnd4 = rnd4 - (rnd4-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd5) < 0.05 then
-			rnd5 = 0
-		elseif rnd5 > 0 then
-			rnd5 = rnd5 - (rnd5+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd5 < 0 then
-			rnd5 = rnd5 - (rnd5-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-		if math.abs(rnd6) < 0.05 then
-			rnd6 = 0
-		elseif rnd6 > 0 then
-			rnd6 = rnd6 - (rnd6+0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		elseif rnd6 < 0 then
-			rnd6 = rnd6 - (rnd6-0.25)*recoverySpeed
-		end
-	end
-end
-
--- Managing hands
-function ManageHands(body)
-	if not weaponInitialised then return end
-
-	local btrans = GetBodyTransform(body)
-	local ct = GetPlayerCameraTransform()
-
-	rightHandTrans = RightHandSOS:getTransform()
-	leftHandTrans = LeftHandSOS:getTransform()
-
-
-	thirdPersonToggled = thirdPersonToggle ~= GetBool("game.thirdperson")
-
-	if thirdPersonToggled then
-		if GetBool("game.thirdperson") then
-			DeleteHands()
-		else
-			weaponHandler.handBodies = InitHands(body, handObject)
-		end
-	end
-	if GetBool("game.thirdperson") then -- TPP
-
-		SetToolHandPoseLocalTransform(rightHandTrans, leftHandTrans)
-
-	else -- FPP
-
-		-- Left Arm
-		h1p1l = leftHandTrans.pos
-		-- DebugCross(TransformToParentPoint(btrans,h1p1l))
-
-		h1p2l = TransformToLocalPoint(btrans, TransformToParentPoint(ct, Vec(-0.8, -1, 0.2)))
-		hnd1 = Transform(h1p1l, QuatRotateQuat(QuatLookAt(h1p2l, h1p1l), QuatEuler(0,0,0)))
-		a1p1l = VecAdd(h1p1l, TransformToParentVec(hnd1, Vec(-0.01, -.02, .35)))
-
-		a1p2l = TransformToLocalPoint(btrans, TransformToParentPoint(ct, Vec(-1, -.3, 0.5)))
-		amt1 = Transform(a1p1l, QuatRotateQuat(QuatLookAt(a1p2l, a1p1l), QuatEuler(0,0,0)))
-		weaponHandler.handBodies.LLARM:setLocalTransform(hnd1)
-		weaponHandler.handBodies.ULARM:setLocalTransform(amt1)
-
-		-- Right Arm
-		h2p1l = rightHandTrans.pos
-
-		h2p2l = TransformToLocalPoint(btrans, TransformToParentPoint(ct, Vec(0.7, -.4, 0.9)))
-		hnd2 = Transform(h2p1l, QuatRotateQuat(QuatLookAt(h2p2l, h2p1l), QuatEuler(0,0,0)))
-		weaponHandler.handBodies.LRARM:setLocalTransform(hnd2)
-
-	end
-
-	thirdPersonToggle = GetBool("game.thirdperson")
-
-end
-
--- Animating reloads and selector switches
-function AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
-	if not weaponInitialised then return end
-	local dt = GetTimeStep()
-	local selected_shell = getSelectedShell(shellInfo)
-	-- Timers for animation
-
-	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
-		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
-	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
-
-		reloadTimer = 0
-		reloading = false
-		if reloadType=="shotgun" or reloadType=="revolver-single" then
-			ammo = ammo + 1
-			if reloadType=="revolver-single" then
-				boltNeeded = true
-				boltTimer = boltTime
-				casingEjected = false
-			end
-		elseif ammo > 0 and not boltNeeded and not openBolt then
-			ammo = magSize + 1
-		else
-			ammo = magSize
-
-			-- ending weapon impulse
-			local reloadsWithEndingImpulse = {"ar-charginghandle","ak-charge","pistol-slide"}
-			if table.contains(reloadsWithEndingImpulse, chargeType) then
-				AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.1,-40,0,0})
-			end
-		end
-
-		magOutSoundPlaying = false
-		magInSoundPlaying = false
-		cockSoundPlaying = false
-		hatchOpenSoundPlaying = false
-		hatchCloseSoundPlaying = false
-		boltReleaseSoundPlaying = false
-		magSlapped = false
-		boltOpenSoundPlaying = false
-		boltCloseSoundPlaying = false
-
-		if weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine then weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:setLocalTransform(Transform()) end
-		if weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier then weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier:setLocalTransform(Transform()) end
-		if weaponHandler.bodies.Charging_Handle then weaponHandler.bodies.Charging_Handle:setLocalTransform(Transform()) end
-
-	end
-
-	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0.1, 10)
-	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*1.4, -1.2, 1.2)
-	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*1.4, -1.2, 1.2)
-	if TABSSettings.toggle.playercontroller then
-		swayy = sin1*.5
-		swayx = sin2*.2
-	else
-		swayy = sin1*.2
-		swayx = sin2*.12
-	end
-	if aiming then
-		swayy = sin1*.12
-		swayx = sin2*.04
-	end
-	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.3*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.3*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.3*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.3*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-
-
-
-	-- Reload animation
-
-	local TOTAL_MAG_TIME = reloadTime - boltTime
-	if chargeType ~= 'mosin' then
-		magTimer = reloadTimer - boltTime
-	else
-		if BoltOpen then
-			magTimer = reloadTimer - boltTime
-		else
-			magTimer = reloadTimer + boltTime*0.45
-		end
-	end
-	local mt = Transform()
-	
-	if magTimer > 0 or (ammo==0 and chargeType ~= 'sks-charge' and chargeType ~= 'mosin') then
-		if reloadType == "rock-in" then
-			local MAG_ANGLE = 20
-			local MAG_VERT_DIST = 1.1
-
-			local MAGOUT_START_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.95
-			local MAGOUT_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.85
-			local MAGOUT_DURATION = MAGOUT_START_TIME - MAGOUT_END_TIME
-
-			local MAG_STORE_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.6
-			local MAG_STORE_DURATION = MAGOUT_END_TIME - MAG_STORE_TIME
-
-			local MAG_GRAB_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.45
-			local MAGIN_START_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.18
-			local MAG_GRAB_DURATION = MAG_GRAB_TIME - MAGIN_START_TIME
-
-			local MAGIN_PAUSE_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.16
-
-			local MAGIN_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.03
-			local MAGIN_DURATION = MAGIN_START_TIME - MAGIN_END_TIME
-
-			
-			if reloading then
-				if magTimer < MAGOUT_START_TIME and magTimer >= MAGOUT_END_TIME then
-
-					local t = (MAGOUT_START_TIME-magTimer)/MAGOUT_DURATION
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE*t,0,0))
-					if not magOutSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.magOut)
-						magOutSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,1,0,0})
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAGOUT_END_TIME and magTimer >= MAG_STORE_TIME then
-
-					local t = (MAGOUT_END_TIME-magTimer)/MAG_STORE_DURATION
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST*t,0))
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE,0,0))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAG_STORE_TIME and magTimer >= MAG_GRAB_TIME then
-
-					-- mt = hideTrans
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST,0))
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE,0,0))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAG_GRAB_TIME and magTimer >= MAGIN_START_TIME then
-
-					local t = (magTimer-MAGIN_START_TIME)/MAG_GRAB_DURATION
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST*t,0))
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE,0,0))
-
-					if not magInSoundPlaying and magTimer < MAGIN_START_TIME+.45 then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.magIn)
-						magInSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					if magTimer < MAGIN_START_TIME+.1 then
-						AddWeaponImpulse({0,-.004,0,1,0,0})
-					end
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAGIN_START_TIME and magTimer >= MAGIN_PAUSE_TIME then
-
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE,0,0))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAGIN_PAUSE_TIME and magTimer >= MAGIN_END_TIME then
-
-					if magTimer > MAGIN_END_TIME+.15 then
-						AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,-2,0,0})
-					end
-
-					local t = (magTimer-MAGIN_END_TIME)/MAGIN_DURATION
-					mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(MAG_ANGLE*t,0,0))
-
-				end
-			end
-
-		elseif string.sub(reloadType,1,8) == "standard" then -- Standard vertical insertion
-
-			local MAG_VERT_DIST = 1.1
-			local MAG_Z_DIST = 0
-			if reloadType == "standard-angled" then
-				MAG_Z_DIST = MAG_VERT_DIST*(weaponHandler.properties.reloadAngleFraction or 0)
-			end
-
-			local MAGOUT_START_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.92
-			local MAGOUT_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.65
-			local MAGOUT_DURATION = MAGOUT_START_TIME - MAGOUT_END_TIME
-
-			local MAG_GRAB_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.3
-			local MAGIN_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.05
-			if reloadType == "standard-slap" then
-				MAG_GRAB_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.55
-				MAGIN_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.3
-			end
-			local MAGIN_DURATION = MAG_GRAB_TIME - MAGIN_END_TIME
-			local MAGIN_SOUND_DELAY = weaponHandler.properties.magInSoundDelay or 0
-
-			if reloading then
-
-				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
-					PlaySound(SOUNDS.magOut)
-					magOutSoundPlaying = true
-					AddWeaponImpulse({-.02,-.1,0,20,10,-30})
-				end
-
-				if magTimer < MAGOUT_START_TIME and magTimer >= MAGOUT_END_TIME then
-
-					local t = (MAGOUT_START_TIME-magTimer)/MAGOUT_DURATION
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST*t,MAG_Z_DIST*t))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAGOUT_END_TIME and magTimer >= MAG_GRAB_TIME then
-
-					-- mt = hideTrans
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST,MAG_Z_DIST))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAG_GRAB_TIME and magTimer >= MAGIN_END_TIME then
-
-					local t = (magTimer-MAGIN_END_TIME)/MAGIN_DURATION
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST*t,MAG_Z_DIST*t))
-					if magTimer < MAG_GRAB_TIME-MAGIN_SOUND_DELAY and not magInSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.magIn)
-						magInSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					if reloadType == "standard-slap" and magTimer < MAGIN_END_TIME + .15 or magTimer < MAGIN_END_TIME + .1 then
-						AddWeaponImpulse({0,.01,0,0,0,0})
-					end
-
-				end
-			end
-
-		elseif string.sub(reloadType,1,8) == "shotgun" then -- Shotgun shell insertion
-
-			local MAG_VERT_DIST = .7
-
-			local MAG_GRAB_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.9
-			local MAGIN_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.1
-			local MAGIN_DURATION = MAG_GRAB_TIME - MAGIN_END_TIME
-			local MAGIN_SOUND_DELAY = weaponHandler.properties.magInSoundDelay or 0
-
-			if reloading then
-
-				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
-					PlaySound(SOUNDS.magOut)
-					magOutSoundPlaying = true
-					AddWeaponImpulse({-.02,-.1,0,20,10,-30})
-				end
-
-				if magTimer >= MAG_GRAB_TIME then
-
-					-- mt = hideTrans
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST,0))
-
-				elseif magTimer < MAG_GRAB_TIME and magTimer >= MAGIN_END_TIME then
-
-					local t = (magTimer-MAGIN_END_TIME)/MAGIN_DURATION
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-MAG_VERT_DIST*t,0))
-					if magTimer < MAG_GRAB_TIME-MAGIN_SOUND_DELAY and not magInSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.magIn)
-						magInSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					if magTimer < MAGIN_END_TIME + .15 then
-						AddWeaponImpulse({0,.01,0,0,0,0})
-					end
-
-				end
-			end
-
-		elseif reloadType == "revolver-single" then
-			
-			local MAG_VERT_DIST = .3
-
-			local MAG_GRAB_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.9
-			local MAGIN_END_TIME = TOTAL_MAG_TIME*.1
-			local MAGIN_DURATION = MAG_GRAB_TIME - MAGIN_END_TIME
-			local MAGIN_SOUND_DELAY = weaponHandler.properties.magInSoundDelay or 0
-
-			if reloading then
-				if not casingEjected and magTimer < 0.5 then

-				if magTimer >= MAG_GRAB_TIME then

-					-- mt = hideTrans

-				if magTimer >= ROCKET_INSERT_TIME then

-					local t = (reloadTimer-ROCKET_INSERT_TIME)/ROCKET_RAISE_DURATION

-				weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine_Hatch:setLocalTransform(ht)

-			end

-	elseif reloading then

-				reloadTimer = -1
-			else
-			end
-		elseif chargeType == 'mosin' then
-			if InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.reload) and ammo < magSize and not InputReleased(TABSControls.weapons.reload) then
-				reloadTimer = -1
-			else
-			end
-		end
-		
-	end
-	if fireMode ~= 'secondary' then
-		if weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine then weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:setLocalTransform(mt) end
-		if weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine_2 then weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine_2:setLocalTransform(mt) end
-	end
-
-
-	-- Charging handle and bolt animation
-	sTfrac = 1-shootTimer/shotDelay
-	local e = 2.718
-	local a = 15
-	local boltPosFac = (e*a*sTfrac*math.exp(-a*sTfrac))^.5
-	
-	local BOLT_RECOIL_DIST = weaponHandler.properties.boltRecoilDist or .1
-	local btt = Transform(Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*boltPosFac))
-
-	--local BARREL_RECOIL_DIST = weaponHandler.properties.barrelRecoilDist or 0
-	--local brd = Transform(Vec(0,0,BARREL_RECOIL_DIST*boltPosFac))
-
-	--local BARREL_PITCH_ANGLE = weaponHandler.properties.barrelPitchAngle or 0
-	--local brt = Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(BARREL_PITCH_ANGLE*boltPosFac,0,0))
-	
-	local BARREL_RECOIL_DIST = weaponHandler.properties.barrelRecoilDist or 0
-
-	local BARREL_PITCH_ANGLE = weaponHandler.properties.barrelPitchAngle or 0
-	local brt = Transform(Vec(0,0,BARREL_RECOIL_DIST*boltPosFac),QuatEuler(BARREL_PITCH_ANGLE*boltPosFac,0,0))
-	
-	local HAMMER_ANGLE = weaponHandler.properties.hammerAngle or 0
-	local hrt = Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(HAMMER_ANGLE*boltPosFac,0,0))
-	
-	local CYLINDER_ROT = weaponHandler.properties.cylinderRot or 0
-	local crt = Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(0,0,CYLINDER_ROT*boltPosFac))
-	
-	local LEVER_ANGLE = weaponHandler.properties.leverAngle or 0
-	local lrt = Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(LEVER_ANGLE*boltPosFac,0,0))
-
-	local cht = Transform()
-	if weaponHandler.properties.reciprocatingChargingHandle then
-		cht = TransformCopy(btt)
-	end
-
-	local boltHoldOpenCond = ammo == 0 and shootTimer < shotDelay*.8
-
-	if chargeType == "ar-charginghandle" then
-
-		if reloading then
-			if ammo == 0 then
-
-				if reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .15 then
-					local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.25
-					cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t))
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-					if not cockSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.cock)
-						cockSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.01,1,0,0})
-				elseif reloadTimer < .15 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
-					cht.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-				elseif reloadTimer < .1 and reloadTimer >= .05 then
-					local t = (reloadTimer-.05)/.05
-					cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t))
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t))
-				elseif reloadTimer > .1 then
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-				end
-
-			end
-		elseif boltHoldOpenCond then
-			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-		end
-
-	elseif chargeType == "g36-charginghandle" then
-
-		if reloading then
-			if ammo == 0 then
-
-				local BOLT_BACK_DIST = .02
-
-				if reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .3 then
-					local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.1
-					cht.rot = QuatEuler(0,90*t,0)
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-					if not cockSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.cock)
-						cockSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.03,2,0,0})
-				elseif reloadTimer < .3 and reloadTimer >= .2 then
-					local t = (.3-reloadTimer)/.1
-					cht.rot = QuatEuler(0,90,0)
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+BOLT_BACK_DIST*t))
-					AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.03,2,0,0})
-				elseif reloadTimer < .23 and reloadTimer >= .18 then
-					cht.rot = QuatEuler(0,90,0)
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+BOLT_BACK_DIST))
-				elseif reloadTimer < .18 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
-					local t = (reloadTimer-.1)/.08
-					cht.rot = QuatEuler(0,90*t,0)
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,(BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+BOLT_BACK_DIST)*t^.5))
-				elseif reloadTimer > .18 then
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-				end
-
-			end
-		elseif boltHoldOpenCond then
-			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-		end
-
-		cht.pos = VecCopy(btt.pos)
-
-	elseif chargeType == "boltrelease" then
-
-		if reloading then
-			if ammo == 0 then
-
-				if reloadTimer < .5 then
-					if not boltReleaseSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.boltRelease)
-						boltReleaseSoundPlaying = true
-						AddWeaponImpulse({.2,-.02,0,0,10,-50})
-						ShakeCamera(.325)
-					end
-				end
-				if reloadTimer < .5 and reloadTimer >= .4 then
-					local t = (reloadTimer-.4)/.1
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.16*t))
-				elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.16))
-				elseif reloadTimer < .35 then
-					reloadTimer = -1
-				end
-
-			end
-		elseif boltHoldOpenCond then
-			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST))
-		end
-
-	elseif chargeType == "ak-charge" then
-		
-		if reloading and (ammo < 1 or (not reloadType == "shotgun")) then
-			if reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
-				local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.3
-				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t))
-				if not cockSoundPlaying then
-					PlaySound(SOUNDS.cock)
-					cockSoundPlaying = true
-				end
-				AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.03,1,0,0})
-			elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
-				local t = reloadTimer/.1
-				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t))
-			end
-		end
-
-	elseif chargeType == "sks-charge" then
-		if reloading then
-			if true then
-				local EXTRA_BOLT_DIST = weaponHandler.properties.extraBoltRecoilDist
-				if reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .15 then
-					local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.25
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+EXTRA_BOLT_DIST*t))
-					if not cockSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(SOUNDS.cock)
-						cockSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-					AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.2*recoilKick,1,0,0})
-				elseif reloadTimer < .15 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+EXTRA_BOLT_DIST))
-				elseif reloadTimer < .1 and reloadTimer >= .05 then
-					local t = (reloadTimer-.05)/.05
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,(BOLT_RECOIL_DIST+EXTRA_BOLT_DIST)*t))
-				elseif reloadTimer > .1 or InputDown('r') then

-			end

-		local t = boltPosFac

-		else
-			hrt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,0)
-		end

-		if ammo == 0 then

-			local EXTRA_SLIDE_DIST = BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*.5

-			local BOLT_FORWARD_START = boltTime*.3
-			local BOLT_FORWARD_END = boltTime*.2
-			local BOLT_ROTATEBACK_END = boltTime*.05
-
-
-			if boltTimer < BOLT_ROTATE_START and boltTimer >= BOLT_ROTATE_END then

-				local t = (BOLT_ROTATE_START-boltTimer)/(BOLT_ROTATE_START-BOLT_ROTATE_END)

-		if boltTimer > 0 then
-
-			local BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE = weaponHandler.properties.boltAngle or 90

-			local BOLT_BACK_END = boltTime*.45
-			local BOLT_FORWARD_START = boltTime*.3
-			local BOLT_FORWARD_END = boltTime*.2
-			local BOLT_ROTATEBACK_END = boltTime*.05

-				boltTimer = boltTime*.45
-			end
-			if boltTimer < BOLT_ROTATE_START and boltTimer >= BOLT_ROTATE_END then
-
-				local t = (BOLT_ROTATE_START-boltTimer)/(BOLT_ROTATE_START-BOLT_ROTATE_END)
-				btt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE*t)

-
-				local t = (BOLT_ROTATE_END-boltTimer)/(BOLT_ROTATE_END-BOLT_BACK_END)
-				btt.pos = Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t)
-				btt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE)
-				AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,.02,2,-.5,0})
-
-				if t>.5 and not casingEjected then
-					local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
-					local casingTrans = TransformToParentTransform(toolTrans,Transform(weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitPos,QuatEuler()))
-					local casingDir = weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitDir
-					SpentCasing(casingTrans, casingDir, 4, 2, .1, shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell], (weaponHandler.properties.casingType or "rifle"), SOUNDS.casingBounce)
-
-					casingEjected = true
-				end
-				BoltOpen = true
-
-			elseif boltTimer < BOLT_BACK_END and boltTimer >= BOLT_FORWARD_START then
-
-				btt.pos = Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST)
-				btt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE)
-
-			elseif boltTimer < BOLT_FORWARD_START and boltTimer >= BOLT_FORWARD_END then
-
-				local t = (boltTimer-BOLT_FORWARD_END)/(BOLT_FORWARD_START-BOLT_FORWARD_END)
-				btt.pos = Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t)
-				btt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE)

-

-
-			elseif boltTimer < BOLT_FORWARD_END and boltTimer >= BOLT_ROTATEBACK_END then
-
-				local t = (boltTimer-BOLT_ROTATEBACK_END)/(BOLT_FORWARD_END-BOLT_ROTATEBACK_END)
-				btt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,BOLT_ROTATE_ANGLE*t)
-				AddWeaponImpulse({0,0,0,0,0,-3})
-				BoltOpen = false
-			end
-		elseif boltHoldOpenCond or (InputDown(TABSControls.weapons.reload) and ammo <= magSize and not InputReleased(TABSControls.weapons.reload)) then
-			
-			
-
-		end
-
-	elseif chargeType == "pump" then
-
-		if reloading and reloadTimer < boltTime*.85 and boltTimer <= 0 and ammo == 0 then
-			boltTimer = boltTime
-			reloadTimer = -1
-		end
-
-		btt = Transform()
-		
-		if not casingEjected or ammo == 0 then
-			lrt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,0)
-		end
-		
-		if ammo == 0 or (boltNeeded and boltTimer == 0) then
-			hrt.rot = QuatEuler(HAMMER_ANGLE,0,0)
-			crt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,CYLINDER_ROT)
-		elseif boltTimer > (boltTime / 1.5) then
-			local t = (boltTimer - (boltTime / 1.5)) / (boltTime - (boltTime / 1.5))
-			hrt.rot = QuatEuler(HAMMER_ANGLE*t,0,0)
-			crt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,CYLINDER_ROT*t)
-		else
-			hrt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,0)
-			crt.rot = QuatEuler(0,0,0)
-		end
-		
-		if boltTimer > 0 then
-
-			local BOLT_BACK_START = boltTime*.9
-			local BOLT_BACK_END = boltTime*.65
-			local BOLT_FORWARD_START = boltTime*.4
-			local BOLT_FORWARD_END = boltTime*.1
-			
-			if boltTimer < BOLT_BACK_START and boltTimer >= BOLT_BACK_END then
-
-				local t = (BOLT_BACK_START-boltTimer)/(BOLT_BACK_START-BOLT_BACK_END)
-				btt.pos = Vec(0,0,BOLT_RECOIL_DIST*t)

-					local casingDir = weaponHandler.properties.casingEmitDir

-						SpentCasing(casingTrans, casingDir, 4, 2, .1, shellInfo.shellcaliber[selected_shell], (weaponHandler.properties.casingType or "rifle"), SOUNDS.casingBounce)
-
-						casingEjected = true

-			elseif boltTimer < BOLT_BACK_END and boltTimer >= BOLT_FORWARD_START then

-
-			elseif boltTimer < BOLT_FORWARD_START and boltTimer >= BOLT_FORWARD_END then

-					PlaySound(SOUNDS.boltClose)
-					boltCloseSoundPlaying = true
-				end
-
-			end
-
-		end
-
-	end
-	
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier and fireMode ~= 'secondary' then weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier:setLocalTransform(btt) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Charging_Handle then weaponHandler.bodies.Charging_Handle:setLocalTransform(cht) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Slide and fireMode ~= 'secondary'  then weaponHandler.bodies.Slide:setLocalTransform(btt) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Barrel then weaponHandler.bodies.Barrel:setLocalTransform(brt) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Hammer then weaponHandler.bodies.Hammer:setLocalTransform(hrt) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Cylinder then weaponHandler.bodies.Cylinder:setLocalTransform(crt) end
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Lever then weaponHandler.bodies.Lever:setLocalTransform(lrt) end
-
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Selector_Switch then weaponHandler.bodies.Selector_Switch:setLocalTransform(Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(selectorAngle,0,0))) end
-	
-	-- FOV
-
-	targetFOV = targetFOV or 0
-	if reloading then targetFOV = 0 end
-	if GetBool("savegame.mod.options.toggle.smoothcam") then
-		ADSfov = ADSfov - 8*(ADSfov-targetFOV+1.3*VecLength(pv))*dt
-	else
-		ADSfov = ADSfov - 8*(ADSfov-targetFOV)*dt
-	end
-
-
-	-- Base weapon position
-
-	-- WeaponSOS:updateTransform(targetTransform)
-	WeaponSOS:updateTransformOnly()
-	local baseTransform = WeaponSOS:getTransform()
-
-	local adjustedRecoilTimer = recoilTimer/(shotDelay*kickOverlap)
-	local HORIZONTAL_RECOIL_ADJUST = -800
-	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/HORIZONTAL_RECOIL_ADJUST, -(rnd1+rnd4)/HORIZONTAL_RECOIL_ADJUST+(recoilAngle/300)*vertTravelMult, recoilKick*adjustedRecoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+recoilKickRot*adjustedRecoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
-	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
-	weaponTransform = Transform()
-	weaponTransform.pos = VecAdd(baseTransform.pos, RECoffset.pos)
-	weaponTransform.rot = QuatRotateQuat(baseTransform.rot, RECoffset.rot)
-
-	return weaponTransform
-
-end
-
-
-
-
-
---------------------
--- MISC FUNCTIONS --
---------------------
-
-function CheckAmmo(magslot)
-	local checkammo =  magtable2[magslot][2]
-	local maxammo = magtable2[magslot][3]
-	local percentage = checkammo/maxammo
-	if percentage >= 1 then
-		checkammotext = "Full"
-	elseif percentage > 0.8 then
-		checkammotext = "Nearly Full"
-	elseif percentage > 0.6 then
-		checkammotext = "Just Over Half Full"
-	elseif percentage > 0.4 then
-		checkammotext = "About Half Full"
-	elseif percentage > 0.2 then
-		checkammotext = "Just Under Half Full"
-	elseif percentage > 0 then
-		checkammotext = "Nearly Empty"
-	else
-		checkammotext = "Empty"
-	end
-	return checkammotext
-end
-
-
-
-
-
------------------
--- ATTACHMENTS --
------------------
-
-function WeaponDraw(dt)
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories() end
-		--if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories() SetTimeScale(0.2) else SetTimeScale(1) end
-		ManageAttachments()
-	end
-end
-
-function AutoAimAtSightCenter(x,y,fov)
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local pPos = pointInfo.initLocalTransform.pos
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment]
-				if curAttachment then
-					if curAttachment.sightCenter ~= nil then
-						if Sights[Cursight] == point then
-							local scPos = curAttachment.sightCenter
-							
-							-- Fold down front sight
-							if curAttachment.draw and weaponHandler.bodies.Folding_Sight then
-								local foldAngle = weaponHandler.properties.sightFoldAngle or -90
-								weaponHandler.bodies.Folding_Sight:setLocalTransform(Transform(Vec(),QuatEuler(foldAngle,0,0)))
-							end
-							return -pPos[1]-scPos[1], -pPos[2]-scPos[2], (curAttachment.FOV or fov)
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	if weaponHandler.bodies.Folding_Sight then weaponHandler.bodies.Folding_Sight:setLocalTransform(Transform()) end
-	return x,y,fov
-end
-
-function GetGripPos()
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local pPos = pointInfo.initLocalTransform.pos
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment]
-				if curAttachment then
-					if curAttachment.gripPos ~= nil then
-						local gPos = curAttachment.gripPos
-
-						return VecAdd(pPos, gPos)
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function GetGripPosRight()
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local pPos = pointInfo.initLocalTransform.pos
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment]
-				if curAttachment then
-					if curAttachment.gripPosRight ~= nil then
-						local gPos = curAttachment.gripPosRight
-
-						return VecAdd(pPos, gPos)
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function AttachmentButton(itemType,itemID,wantHint,location,Description,W,H)
-	local clicked=false
-	UiPush()
-		local item=GetString("savegame.mod."..itemType)
-		if item==itemID then
-			UiColor(.5,1,.5,.5)
-		else
-			UiColor(0,0,0,.5)
-		end
-		local w,h=UiGetImageSize("MOD/icon/"..itemID..".png")
-		local ww=W or w+12
-		local wh=H or h+12
-		-- UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png",ww,wh,6,6)
-		-- UiColor(1,1,1)
-		-- UiImageBox("ui/common/box-outline-6.png",ww,wh,6,6)
-
-		UiCustomImageBoxText("MOD/icon/"..itemID..".png",w,h,string.upper(itemID),16)
-
-		if UiIsMouseInRect(w,h) and InputPressed("lmb") then
-			clicked=true
-			PlaySound(uiselect, GetPlayerTransform().pos, 1)
-			if item == itemID then
-				SetString("savegame.mod."..itemType, "")
-			else
-				SetString("savegame.mod."..itemType, itemID)
-			end
-		end
-		if wantHint then
-			hoverindex=hoverindex+1
-			local hover,x,y=hovering(ww,wh,hoverindex)
-			if hover > 0 then
-				hint=true
-				info={location[1],location[2],ww,wh,hover,x,y,Description}
-			else
-				hint=hint or false
-			end
-		end
-	UiPop()
-	return clicked,ww,wh
-end
-
-function AttachmentCategories()
-	if attachmentHandler == nil then return end
-	local body = GetToolBody()
-
-	UiMakeInteractive()
-	UiPush()
-		UiCustomColor("white_highlight")
-		UiAlign("left top")
-		UiFont("MOD/TABS/img/fonts/Teko-Regular.ttf", 24)
-		UiText("MMB To Randomise\nScroll wheel to zoom")
-	UiPop()
-
-	attachmentRadius = attachmentRadius + .5*InputValue("mousewheel")
-
-	local total = 0
-	local exclOrders = {}
-	for p, i in pairs(attachmentHandler) do if i.requirements ~= nil then if i.requirements() then total = total + 1 else table.insert(exclOrders,i.order) end else total = total + 1 end end
-
-	-- Combining all attachment points into one table for easy access
-
-	local totalValid = 0 -- Needs to be changed once I start using requirements() again
-	attachPoints = {}
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			attachPoints[point] = pointInfo
-			totalValid = totalValid + 1
-		end
-	end
-
-
-	-- Calculating order of attachment points based on distance to attachment point
-
-	local attachmentOrder = {}
-	for i = 1, totalValid do
-		local minDist = 9999999
-		local minPoint = ""
-
-		local minPos
-
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(attachPoints) do
-			local requirementsMet = true
-			if pointInfo.requirements ~= nil then if not pointInfo.requirements() then requirementsMet = false end end
-
-
-			-- Calculating distance
-			local ptr = Transform()
-			ptr=TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(body),pointInfo.initLocalTransform)
-			local x,y,dist=UiWorldToPixel(ptr.pos)
-
-			local frac = 1-i/totalValid
-			local fovFac = 1+(120-GetInt("options.gfx.fov"))/60
-			local radius = math.clamp(attachmentRadius, 1, 10)
-			local apos = TransformToParentPoint(GetPlayerCameraTransform(), Vec(math.sin((frac)*math.pi*2)*radius, math.cos((frac)*math.pi*2)*UiHeight()/UiWidth()*radius, -5*fovFac))
-			local x2,y2=UiWorldToPixel(apos)
-
-			local dist = ((x2-x)^2+(y2-y)^2)^0.5
-
-			if requirementsMet then
-				if dist < minDist and attachmentOrder[point] == nil then
-					minDist = dist
-					minPoint = point
-					minPos = apos
-				end
-			end
-		end
-
-		attachmentOrder[minPoint] = {
-			order = i,
-			apos = minPos
-		}
-
-	end
-
-

-			local requirementsMet = true

-			local order = attachmentOrder[point].order/totalValid
-
-			if requirementsMet then

-
-					UiAlign("top left")

-
-									if UiIsMouseInRect(ww, wh) and InputPressed("lmb") or InputDown("mmb") and math.random() < .01 then
-
-										-- ChangeAttachments(point,attachment,vox)

-												weaponHandler.bodies[point]:delete()

-

-function ChangeAttachments(point,attachment,vox)
-	if vox == nil then vox = weaponVoxFile end
-	local info = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[point].attachments[attachment]
-	local pointInfo = attachmentHandler[point]
-
-	local oldInfo = attachmentPresets[point].attachments[attachments[point]]
-	if oldInfo ~= nil then
-		if oldInfo.shapes ~= nil then
-			for i = 1, #oldInfo.shapes do
-				Delete(weaponShapes[oldInfo.shapes[i].shape])
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	attachments[point] = attachment
-	local b = GetToolBody()
-	if info.shapes then
-		for i = 1, #info.shapes do
-			local scale = .2
-			local svox = vox
-			if info.shapes[i].scale then scale = info.shapes[i].scale end
-			if info.vox ~= nil then svox = info.vox end
-			local xml = '<vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/small arms/'..svox..'.vox" object="'..info.shapes[i].shape..'" scale="'..tostring(scale)..'" texture="12 .5" blendtexture="5 .007"/>'
-			if info.shapes[i].lt then
-				xml = '<vox tags="nocull" pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/TABS/vox/small arms/'..svox..'.vox" object="'..info.shapes[i].shape..'" scale="'..tostring(scale)..'" texture="12 .5" blendtexture="5 .007">'..info.shapes[i].lt..'</vox>'
-			end
-			local e = Spawn(xml)
-			local s = GetBodyShapes(e[1])[1]
-			local t = TransformCopy(info.shapes[i].transform)
-			if pointInfo.offset then
-				t.pos = VecAdd(t.pos, pointInfo.offset())
-			end
-			SetShapeBody(s,b,t)
-			weaponShapes[info.shapes[i].shape] = s
-		end
-	end
-
-	if info.properties ~= nil then
-		info.properties()
-	end
-
-
-	
-	RecombobulateAttachments()
-end
-
-function RecombobulateAttachments()
-	for point, pointInfo in pairs(attachmentPresets) do
-		for attachment, info in pairs(pointInfo.attachments) do
-			if info.shapes then
-				for i = 1, #info.shapes do
-					local t = TransformCopy(info.shapes[i].transform)
-					if pointInfo.offset then
-						t.pos = VecAdd(t.pos, pointInfo.offset())
-					end
-					SetShapeLocalTransform(weaponShapes[info.shapes[i].shape],t)
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function ManageExtraMagShapes()
-	for i = 1, #attachmentPresets.magazine.attachments[attachments.magazine].shapes do
-		local shape = attachmentPresets.magazine.attachments[attachments.magazine].shapes[i]
-		if shape.shape ~= magazine then
-			local t = TransformToLocalTransform(magTrans,shape.transform)
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(weaponShapes[shape.shape],TransformToParentTransform(mt,t))
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-
-

-function ManageAttachments()
-	--[[if attachmentHandler.Top_Rail then
-		local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler.Top_Rail.curAttachment]
-		if curAttachment then
-			if curAttachment.draw then
-				curAttachment:draw(weaponHandler.bodies.Receiver.attachPoints.Top_Rail.initLocalTransform.pos)
-			end
-		end
-	end]]
-	local cursight = Sights[Cursight]
-	local sightfound = false
-	Sights = {}
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment]
-				if curAttachment then
-					if curAttachment.draw and curAttachment.type == 'optic' then
-						table.insert(Sights, point)
-					
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	for i=1,#Sights do
-		if Sights[i] == cursight then
-			Cursight = i
-			sightfound = true
-		end
-	end
-	if not sightfound then
-		Cursight = 1
-	end
-	if InputPressed('x') then
-		if Cursight < #Sights then
-			Cursight = Cursight + 1
-		else
-			Cursight = 1
-		end
-	end
-	for part, partInfo in pairs(weaponHandler.bodies) do
-		for point, pointInfo in pairs(partInfo.attachPoints) do
-			if attachmentHandler[point] then
-				local curAttachment = ALL_ATTACHMENTS[attachmentHandler[point].curAttachment]
-				if curAttachment then
-					if curAttachment.draw and curAttachment.type == 'optic' then
-						if Sights[Cursight] == point then
-							curAttachment.draw(curAttachment, pointInfo.initLocalTransform.pos)
-						end
-					end
-					if curAttachment.type == 'secondary' then
-						if fireMode == 'secondary' then
-							if fireModeUpdate and prevFireMode ~= 'secondary' then
-								prevAmmo = ammo
-								weaponHandler.properties.magSize = magSize
-								prevSounds = deepcopy(SOUNDS)
-								
-								cartridge = SecondaryWeaponInfo.cartridge 
-								shellInfo = GetShellInfoFromRegistry(cartridge)
-								shootPos = VecAdd(pointInfo.initLocalTransform.pos, SecondaryWeaponInfo.shootPos)
-								magSize = SecondaryWeaponInfo.magSize
-								reloadTypes = SecondaryWeaponInfo.reloadTypes
-								ammo = SecondaryWeaponInfo.ammo
-								reloadTime = SecondaryWeaponInfo.reloadTime
-								chargeTypes = deepcopy(SecondaryWeaponInfo.chargeTypes)
-								openBolt = deepcopy(SecondaryWeaponInfo.openBolt)
-								for k,v in pairs(SecondaryWeaponInfo.SOUNDS) do
-									SOUNDS[k] = v
-									
-								end
-								
-								fireModeUpdate = false
-							end
-							SecondaryWeaponInfo.ammo = ammo 
-							if InputPressed('h') then
-								prevFireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-								curFireMode = 1
-								fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-								fireModeUpdate = true
-								 
-							end
-						elseif fireMode ~= 'secondary' then
-							if fireModeUpdate and prevFireMode == 'secondary'then
-								cartridge = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.cartridge)
-								shellInfo = deepcopy(GetShellInfoFromRegistry(cartridge))
-								shootPos = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.shootPos)
-								magSize = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.magSize)
-								reloadTypes = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.reloadTypes)
-								reloadTime = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.reloadTime)
-								ammo = math.min(prevAmmo, magSize)
-								chargeTypes = deepcopy(weaponHandler.properties.chargeTypes)
-								openBolt = hasopenbolt
-								for k,v in pairs(SecondaryWeaponInfo.SOUNDS) do
-									SOUNDS[k] = prevSounds[k]
-									
-								end
-								fireModeUpdate = false
-							end
-							
-							if InputPressed('h') then
-								prevFireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-								curFireMode = #fireModes
-								fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
-								fireModeUpdate = true
-							end
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function DrawHoloSight(cond,sightcenter,tolerance,reticle,size,altreticle)
-	if not cond then return end
-	if altreticle == nil then altreticle = reticle end
-	if cond then
-		local gt = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
-		local rpos = TransformToParentPoint(gt, sightcenter)
-		local rdist = VecLength(VecSub(GetPlayerCameraTransform().pos, rpos))
-		local dir = TransformToParentVec(gt, Vec(0, 0, -1))
-		local hit, dist = QueryRaycast(rpos, dir, 500, 0, true)
-		local hitpoint = VecAdd(rpos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-		-- DebugCross(rpos)
-
-		-- not for drawing sight, rather getting dist between sight center and edge
-		local camtrans = GetPlayerCameraTransform()
-		local sightdist = VecLength(VecSub(camtrans.pos, rpos))
-		local holopoint = VecAdd(camtrans.pos, VecScale(VecNormalize(VecSub(camtrans.pos, hitpoint)), -sightdist))
-
-		if VecLength(VecSub(TransformToParentPoint(gt, sightcenter), holopoint)) < tolerance then -- when walking, this calc will lag behind and sometimes cut off the reticle when it shouldn't
-			UiPush()
-				UiAlign("center middle")
-				UiColor(1,1,1,0.5)
-				local uiw = UiWidth()
-
-				local x, y = UiWorldToPixel(hitpoint)
-
-				local zRot = WeaponSOS:getTransformAtIndex(6)
-				
-				-- Tolerance Window
-				local x2, y2, dist = UiWorldToPixel(rpos)
-				UiTranslate(x2,y2)
-				local ws = tolerance/dist*uiw*.8 -- *.8 is so that the reticle can be cutoff by the window and then by the tolerance if statement above
-				UiRotate(zRot)
-				UiWindow(ws,ws,true,true)
-				-- UiRect(1000, 1000) -- For visualizing window size
-				UiRotate(-zRot)
-				UiTranslate(UiCenter(), UiMiddle())
-
-				-- Reticle
-				UiTranslate(x-x2,y-y2)
-				local fov = (GetInt("options.gfx.fov")-ADSfov)/120
-				local w, h = math.ceil((size/fov)*uiw/1920), math.ceil((size/fov)*uiw/1920)
-				UiPush()
-					-- Z axis rotation
-					UiRotate(zRot)
-					-- Scaling reticle size by distance from optic
-					-- UiScale(.2/rdist)
-					if altaim then
-						UiImageBox(altreticle, w, h)
-					else
-						UiImageBox(reticle, w, h)
-					end
-				UiPop()
-			UiPop()
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function DrawScope(cond,attachmentBody,sightcenter,reticle,altreticle,env)
-	if altreticle == nil then altreticle = reticle end
-	if cond and aiming and not pointAim and scopeTimer == 1 and not reloading then
-		if env and EnvState ~= env then
-			ChangeENV(env)
-		end
-		
-		local gt = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
-		local sightrear = VecAdd(sightcenter,Vec(0,0,-.5)) -- was .5, could try .1
-		local gunpos = TransformToParentPoint(gt, sightcenter)
-		local rearpos = TransformToParentPoint(gt, sightrear)
-		local dir = TransformToParentVec(gt, Vec(0, 0, -1))
-		local dist = 500
-		local hitpoint = VecAdd(gunpos, VecScale(dir, dist))
-
-		local camtrans = GetPlayerCameraTransform()
-		local sightdist = VecLength(VecSub(camtrans.pos, gunpos))
-
-		local holopoint = VecAdd(camtrans.pos, VecScale(VecNormalize(VecSub(camtrans.pos, hitpoint)), -sightdist))
-		UiPush()
-			local w, h = UiGetImageSize(reticle)
-			local x, y = UiWorldToPixel(hitpoint)
-			UiTranslate(x-w/2, y-h/2)
-			UiPush()
-				-- z axis rotation
-				UiAlign("center middle")
-				UiTranslate(w/2,h/2)
-				UiRotate(ADSrotz)
-				UiPush()
-					UiRotate(WeaponSOS:getTransformAtIndex(6))
-					UiImage(reticle)
-				UiPop()
-				
-				UiPush()
-					UiTranslate(0, h)
-					UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-					UiTranslate(0, h)
-					UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-					UiTranslate(0, h)
-					UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-				UiPop()
-				UiPush()
-					UiTranslate(0, -h)
-					UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-				UiPop()
-			UiPop()
-		UiPop()
-		UiPush()
-			UiAlign("center middle")
-			local w, h = UiWidth(), UiHeight()
-			local iw, ih = UiGetImageSize("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticleoutline.png")
-			local x, y = UiWorldToPixel(rearpos)
-			x = math.clamp(x,w/2-200,w/2+200)
-			y = math.clamp(y,h/2-100,10000)
-			UiTranslate(-(x-w), -(y-h))
-			UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticleoutline.png")
-			UiTranslate(0, ih)
-			UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-			UiTranslate(0, ih)
-			UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-			UiTranslate(0, ih)
-			UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-			UiTranslate(0, ih)
-			UiImage("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/black.png")
-		UiPop()
-		UiBlur(.3*math.clamp(stabilityFactor-1,0,1))
-
-		--[[if attachmentPreset ~= nil then
-			if attachmentPreset.shapes ~= nil then
-				for i = 1, #attachmentPreset.shapes do
-					SetShapeLocalTransform(weaponShapes[attachmentPreset.shapes[i].shape], hideTrans)
-				end
-			end
-		end]]
-		if attachmentBody then
-			attachmentBody:setLocalTransform(hideTrans)
-		end
-	else
-		if EnvState ~= 'Default' then
-			ChangeENV('Default')
-		end
-		--[[if attachmentPreset ~= nil then
-			if attachmentPreset.shapes ~= nil then
-				for i = 1, #attachmentPreset.shapes do
-					SetShapeLocalTransform(weaponShapes[attachmentPreset.shapes[i].shape], attachmentPreset.shapes[i].transform)
-				end
-			end
-		end]]
-		if attachmentBody then
-			attachmentBody:setLocalTransform(Transform())

-end

+#version 2
 function round(number, decimals)
     local power = 10^decimals
     return math.floor(number * power) / power
@@ -2997,6 +13,7 @@
     end
     return result;
 end
+
 function IDBuilder(t)
 	local ID=""
     for _,s in ipairs(t)do
@@ -3026,30 +43,3 @@
 	end
 end
 
-if ScriptWasSpawned then
-	OriginalLoadSound = LoadSound
-	function LoadSound(sound, noreplace)
-		if not noreplace then
-			if string.sub(sound,1,3) == 'MOD' then
-				local newsound = string.sub(sound,4)
-				return OriginalLoadSound(''..ObjectPrefix..':'..newsound..'')
-			elseif string.sub(sound,1,4) == 'TABS' then
-				newsound = string.sub(sound,5)
-				return OriginalLoadSound('MOD'..newsound..'')
-			end
-		else
-			return OriginalLoadSound(sound)
-		end
-	end	
-	
-	function Gun_Init()
-		Gun, Error = loadfile(string.sub(Script, 5))
-		if not Error then
-			Gun()	
-		end
-	end
-	Gun_Init()
-	init()
-
-end
-

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\hk416.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-iwitavor"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "IWI Tavor X95", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/iwitavor.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="556x45",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.017,-.6),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.017,.06),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.3,.5),
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=700,
+    	accuracy=.0003,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={45,90,0},
+    	recoilVertical=.1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=.2,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=.4,
+    	recoilKickRot=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-slap"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"boltrelease"},
+    	boltTime=.3,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.08,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_foregrip"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-553","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","pk-122","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-m4","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","specter-1-4x-tan","elcan-c79","vortex-1-6x24","atacr-7-35x56"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.Stanag)},
+    	},	
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarl_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltRelease = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_boltrelease.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\kar98k.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
 	if aiming then

 		fov = 0

 		end

+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))

@@ -193,12 +65,127 @@
 
 	local leftHandPos = Vec(0.01,-.014,-.03)
 	local rightHandPos = Vec(0,-.029,.23)
-	if reloading and magTimer > 0 then
+	if reloading and magTimer ~= 0 then
 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0.02,.0,.08))
-	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer > 0 then
+	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer ~= 0 then
 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier:getLocalTransform(), Vec(.05, -.03, .12))
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-kar98k"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Kar 98k", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/kar98k.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="792x57-2",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.025,-.55),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.02,.08),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	magSize=5,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2 ,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=1.6,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"mosin"},
+    	boltTime=1.0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    --SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/kar98k/Kar98k_Reload_Insert_Bullet_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/kar98k/kar98k_boltopen_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/kar98k/kar98k_boltclose_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\lebelm93.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\lebelm93.lua
@@ -1,134 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"

-#include "../common.lua"
-
-function init()
-	toolID = "tabs-lebelm93"
-	RegisterTool(toolID, "Lebel Mle 1886 M93", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
-	SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true)
-
-	InitBallistics()
-	InitOptions()

-	--------------------
-	-- General Config --

-	handObject = "1"

 		end

 	local leftHandPos = Vec(-0.005,-.005,-.15)

 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0.02,.0,-.04))
```
