```diff
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-lebelm93"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Lebel Mle 1886 M93", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/lebelm93.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="8x50mmR",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.025,-.55),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.02,.08),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	casingType="rifle-3",
+    	magSize=8,
+    	fireRate=43,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2 ,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=1.6,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"mosin"},
+    	boltTime=1.0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltclose.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\lee-enfield.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+    if shootTimer ~= 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-lee-enfield" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(.35,.05,-1.3))
+
+    	if InputPressed("lmb") and not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and ammo > 0 and shootTimer <= 0 then
+    		local shellInfo = deepcopy(shellTypes["792x57"])
+    		shellInfo.sound = weaponSound
+    		Shoot(shootPos, TransformToParentVec(toolTrans,Vec(0,0,-1)), shellInfo, {}, false, accuracy, 0, 0.5, 1)
+    		ShakeCamera(.6)
+    		ammo = ammo - 1
+    		recoilTimer = .1
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			shootTimer = shotDelay
+    			PlaySound(boltSound)
+    		end
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo < magSize and not reloading and shootTimer <= 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    	end
+
+    	local aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0.3,-.3,-.5,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    		if aiming then
+    			if shootTimer > .15 and shootTimer < .4 then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.225,-.55,0,5,5,0,-.2
+    			elseif shootTimer > .4 and shootTimer < .9 then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.25,-.55,5,5,5,0,-.2
+    			elseif attachments.sight == "scope1" then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .025,-.225,-.5,0,0,0,70,-.2
+    			else
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.15,-.5,0,0,0,10,-.2
+    			end
+    			accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    		elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.1,-.45,-.25,-20,50,30,0,0
+    			accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    		else
+    			if shootTimer > .15 and shootTimer < .9 then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.35,-.6,20,10,10,0,-.2
+    			end
+    			accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    		end
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    		sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    		cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    		sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    		cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    		swayy = sin1/2
+    		swayx = sin2/3
+    		if aiming then
+    			swayy = sin1/8
+    			swayx = sin2/10
+    		end
+
+    		local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    		if reloading then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, -.1, 0, 10, 20, 20
+    		end
+
+    		ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    		if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    			reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    		elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    			reloadTimer = 0
+    			reloading = false
+    			ammo = magSize
+    		end
+
+    		local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = 0, -.1*recoilTimer, recoilTimer, 20*recoilTimer, 0, 0 
+    		RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    		GUNoffset = Transform()
+    		GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    		GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			barrel = shapes[2]
+    			sight = shapes[3]
+    			bolt = shapes[4]
+    			clamp = shapes[5]
+    			boltretainer = shapes[6]
+    			trigger = shapes[7]
+    			stock1 = shapes[8]
+    			stock2 = shapes[9]
+    			stock3 = shapes[10]
+    			scope1part1 = shapes[11]
+    			scope1part2 = shapes[12]
+
+    			barrelTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(barrel)
+    			sightTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(sight)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    			clampTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(clamp)
+    			boltretainerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer)
+    			triggerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(trigger)
+    			stock1Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock1)
+    			stock2Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock2)
+    			stock3Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock3)
+    			scope1Trans1 = GetShapeLocalTransform(scope1part1)
+    			scope1Trans2 = GetShapeLocalTransform(scope1part2)
+    		end
+
+    		local rocketRelDist = 2*reloadTimer
+    		brt = TransformCopy(barrelTrans)
+    		brt.pos = VecAdd(brt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.02,0))
+
+    		stt = TransformCopy(sightTrans)
+    		stt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(stt.rot,QuatEuler(0,45,0))
+    		stt.pos = VecAdd(stt.pos,Vec(-.021,.025,0))
+
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(-.025,0,0))
+
+    		if shootTimer > 0 and shootTimer < .8 then
+    			if shootTimer >= .65 then
+    				local t = (.8-shootTimer)/.15
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(0,-90*t,0))
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(.1*t,.05*t^2,0))
+    			elseif shootTimer < .65 and shootTimer >= .4 then
+    				local t = (.4-shootTimer)/.25
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(.1,.05,.2+.2*t))
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(0,-90,0))
+    			elseif shootTimer < .4 and shootTimer >= .15 then
+    				local t = (shootTimer-.4)/.25
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(.1,.05,.2+.2*t))
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(0,-90,0))
+    			else
+    				local t = shootTimer/.15
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(0,-90*t,0))
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(.1*t,.05*t^2,0))
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		cmpt = TransformCopy(clampTrans)
+    		cmpt.pos = VecAdd(cmpt.pos,Vec(0,-.015,0))
+
+    		btrt = TransformCopy(boltretainerTrans)
+    		btrt.pos = VecAdd(btrt.pos,Vec(0,-.025,0))
+
+    		trt = TransformCopy(triggerTrans)
+    		trt.pos = VecAdd(trt.pos,Vec(.025,.025,0))
+
+    		st1t = TransformCopy(stock1Trans)
+    		st1t.pos = VecAdd(st1t.pos,Vec(.025,-.04,-0.03))
+    		st1t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(st1t.rot,QuatEuler(15,0,0))
+    		st2t = TransformCopy(stock2Trans)
+    		st2t.pos = VecAdd(st2t.pos,Vec(.026,-.025,-0.055))
+    		st2t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(st2t.rot,QuatEuler(45,0,0))
+    		st3t = TransformCopy(stock3Trans)
+    		st3t.pos = VecAdd(st3t.pos,Vec(.024,0,-.02))
+
+    		sc1t1 = TransformCopy(scope1Trans1)
+    		sc1t2 = TransformCopy(scope1Trans2)
+    		if attachments.sight == "scope1" and (not aiming or shootTimer > 0) then
+    			sc1t1.pos = VecAdd(sc1t1.pos,Vec(.025,.025,0))
+    			sc1t2.pos = VecAdd(sc1t2.pos,Vec(0,0,.025))
+    		else
+    			sc1t1 = hideTrans
+    			sc1t2 = hideTrans
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(barrel, brt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(sight, stt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(clamp, cmpt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer, btrt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(trigger, trt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock1, st1t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock2, st2t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock3, st3t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(scope1part1, sc1t1)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(scope1part2, sc1t2)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-lee-enfield" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading and shootTimer <= 0
+
+    	if attachments.sight == "scope1" and aiming then
+    	UiPush()
+    		UiAlign("top left")
+    		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle2_mosin.png",UiWidth(),UiHeight())
+    	UiPop()
+    	end
+    end
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-luger"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "P08 Luger", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/luger.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.2),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.04,-.015),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.5,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=8,
+    	fireRate=600,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.7,
+    	recoilVertical=1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.5,
+    	recoilWander=0.9,
+    	recoilKickRot=4,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=15,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.6,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=0,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.02,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m1-bazooka.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\m1-bazooka.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\m1-bazooka.lua
@@ -1,140 +1,139 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"
-#include "../ballistics.lua"
-#include "../common.lua"
-
-function init()
-	RegisterTool("tabs-m1-bazooka", "M1 Bazooka", "MOD/TABS/vox/m1-bazooka.vox", 3)
-	SetBool("game.tool.tabs-m1-bazooka.enabled", true)
-
-	hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
-	hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
-
-	InitBallistics()
-	drawDebug = false
-	magSize = 1
-	ammo = magSize
-
-	shotDelay = .15
-	recoilTimer = 0
-	reloadTimer = 0

-	hipAccuracy = 0.03

-

-	cos1 = 1

+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-m1-bazooka", "M1 Bazooka", "MOD/TABS/vox/m1-bazooka.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-m1-bazooka.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 1
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = .15
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2
+    reloading = false
+    aimAccuracy = 0.005
+    hipAccuracy = 0.03
+    accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("sniper")
+    sin1 = 0
+    cos1 = 1
+    sin2 = 0
+    cos2 = 1
+    swayy = 0
+    swayx = 0
 end
 
-function update(dt)
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m1-bazooka" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.05,0,0,0,0,0,0
-		if aiming then
-			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.325,-.125,.1,0,0,0,10,-.1
-			accuracy = aimAccuracy
-		elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
-			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .3,-.3,.1,-20,50,30,0,0
-			accuracy = hipAccuracy
-		else
-			accuracy = hipAccuracy
-		end
-
-		local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0.5, 10)
-		sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		swayy = sin1*.5
-		swayx = sin2*.3
-		if aiming then
-			swayy = sin1*.15
-			swayx = sin2*.1

+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m1-bazooka" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.05,0,0,0,0,0,0
+    	if aiming then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.325,-.125,.1,0,0,0,10,-.1
+    		accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .3,-.3,.1,-20,50,30,0,0
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	else
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.5
+    	swayx = sin2*.3
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.15
+    		swayx = sin2*.1
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, -.4, -1, -50, 0, 10
+    	end
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		ammo = magSize
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+    end
+end
+
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m1-garand.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    			sightTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(sight)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    			clampTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(clamp)
+    			boltretainerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer)
+    			triggerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(trigger)
+    			stock1Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock1)
+    			stock2Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock2)
+    			stock3Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock3)
+    			rsightTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(rsight)
+    		end
+
+    		local rocketRelDist = 2*reloadTimer
+    		brt = TransformCopy(barrelTrans)
+    		brt.pos = VecAdd(brt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.02,0))
+
+    		stt = TransformCopy(sightTrans)
+    		stt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(stt.rot,QuatEuler(0,45,0))
+    		stt.pos = VecAdd(stt.pos,Vec(-.021,.025,0))
+
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		if ammo == 0 or reloading and reloadTimer < 2.5 then
+    			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.005,.1))
+    		else
+    			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.005,.7*shootTimer))
+    		end
+
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < 1.1 and reloadTimer >= .5 then
+    				-- local t = (reloadTimer-.5)/.6
+    				-- mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,0))
+    				if not magInSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magInSound)
+    					magInSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		cmpt = TransformCopy(clampTrans)
+    		cmpt.pos = VecAdd(cmpt.pos,Vec(0,-.015,0))
+
+    		btrt = TransformCopy(boltretainerTrans)
+    		btrt.pos = VecAdd(btrt.pos,Vec(0,-.025,0))
+
+    		trt = TransformCopy(triggerTrans)
+    		trt.pos = VecAdd(trt.pos,Vec(.025,.025,0))
+
+    		st1t = TransformCopy(stock1Trans)
+    		st1t.pos = VecAdd(st1t.pos,Vec(0,-.045,-0.03))
+    		st1t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(st1t.rot,QuatEuler(15,0,0))
+    		st2t = TransformCopy(stock2Trans)
+    		st2t.pos = VecAdd(st2t.pos,Vec(0,-.065,-0.055))
+    		st2t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(st2t.rot,QuatEuler(45,0,0))
+    		st3t = TransformCopy(stock3Trans)
+    		st3t.pos = VecAdd(st3t.pos,Vec(.025,-.025,-.02))
+
+    		rst = TransformCopy(rsightTrans)
+    		rst.pos = VecAdd(rst.pos, Vec(.025,-.01,0))
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(barrel, brt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(sight, stt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(clamp, cmpt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer, btrt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(trigger, trt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock1, st1t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock2, st2t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock3, st3t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(rsight, rst)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m1-garand" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.05,-.3,-.5,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    	if aiming then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.35,-.14,-.5,0,0,0,10,-.2
+    		accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.1,-.45,-.25,-20,50,30,0,0
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.7
+    	swayx = sin2*.5
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.3
+    		swayx = sin2*.2
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, -.1, 0, 10, 20, 20
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		ammo = magSize
+    		magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    		magInSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/400, -(rnd1+rnd4)/400-(recoilAngle/400)-.2*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/200+2*recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+40*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m107.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
-					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))

-			end
-
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle, cht)
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)

-end

-function draw()
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m4a1" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories(attachmentPresets,weaponVoxFile) end
-
-		DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="et552",Vec(0,.2475,-.3),.05,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_eotech_holo.png",15)
-		DrawScope(attachments.toprail=="acog" and aiming and not pointAim and scopeTimer == 1,attachmentPresets.toprail.attachments.acog,Vec(0,.2475,-.5),"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_acog.png")
-	end
-end+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-m107", "M107", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-m4a1.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 30
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = 60/300
+    shootTimer = 0
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2.6
+    reloading = false
+    pointAim = false
+    accuracy = 0.0005
+    selectFire = 0
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("sniper")
+    rnd1, rnd2, rnd3, rnd4, rnd5, rnd6 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    recoilVertical = .8
+    recoilHorizontal = .6
+    recoilWander = 1
+    recoilAngle = 0
+    recoilMax = 20
+    kickOverlap = .8
+    sin1 = 0
+    cos1 = 1
+    sin2 = 0
+    cos2 = 1
+    swayy = 0
+    swayx = 0
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    magInSoundPlaying = false
+    cockSoundPlaying = false
+    attachments = {}
+    attachments.toprail = "none"
+    attachments.muzzle = "compensator"
+    weaponVoxFile = "ak74"
+    weaponSchematic = {
+    	["receiver"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,-.24,0),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["upper-receiver"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.06,-.075,.12),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["stock-1"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,-.18,.45),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["barrel-1"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.015,0.06,-.54),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["guard-1_1g"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.06,.015,-.54),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["guard-1_2g"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.03,-.54),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["sight-post"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.015,.03,-1.02),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["front-sight"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.015,.21,-1.11),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.06,
+    	},
+    	["charging-handle"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.12,-.06),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["bolt"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.03,.06,-.3),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    	["mag-30-s"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.055,-.36,-.375),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.3,
+    	},
+    }
+    attachmentPresets={
+    	["toprail"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(0,.15,-.3)),
+    		order=0,
+    		attachments={
+    			["none"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="carry-handle",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.15,-.09),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    			["irons"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="rear-sight",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.15,-.12),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    			["et552"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="holo-1_1",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.06,.15,-.18),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    				[2]={
+    					shape="holo-1_2",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.165,-.181),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    			["acog"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="acog_1",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.045,.15,-.12),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    				[2]={
+    					shape="acog_2",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.06,.195,-.33),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    		},
+    	},
+    	["muzzle"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(0,.06,-1.17)),
+    		order=0,
+    		attachments={
+    			["none"]={
+    			},
+    			["compensator"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="comp-1",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(-.03,.045,-1.17),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    				},
+    				[2]={
+    					shape="comp-2",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(0,.01,-1.17),QuatEuler(-90,0,45)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    			["suppressor"]={
+    				[1]={
+    					shape="suppressor",
+    					transform=Transform(Vec(0,.02,-1.17),QuatEuler(-90,0,45)),
+    				},
+    			},
+    		},
+    	},
+    }
+    shapesInitializedT1 = false
+    shapesInitializedT2 = false
+    weaponShapes = {}
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_0.ogg")
+    weaponSoundSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_sup_0.ogg")
+    selectFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar.ogg")
+    dryFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire.ogg")
+    magOutSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_magout.ogg")
+    magInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_magin.ogg")
+    cockSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+    if shootTimer ~= 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
+    ManageRecoil()
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m4a1" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(0,.075,-1.1))
+
+    	if not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and shootTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			if InputDown("lmb") and selectFire == 1 then
+    				ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    			elseif InputPressed("lmb") and selectFire == 0 then
+    				ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    			end
+    		elseif InputPressed("lmb") then
+    			PlaySound(dryFireSound)
+    		end
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo <= magSize and not reloading and not selectAttachments then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    		ADSImpulse(-.1,-.3,0,0,40,200)
+    	end
+
+    	if InputPressed("v") then
+    		SelectFire()
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+    	if InputPressed("rmb") and aiming then ADSImpulse(0,0,0,50,80,160) end
+    	if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		if not shapesInitializedT1 then
+    			shapesInitializedT1 = true
+    		elseif not shapesInitializedT2 then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile)
+    		end
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile)
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			magazine = weaponShapes["mag-30-s"]
+    			charginghandle = weaponShapes["charging-handle"]
+    			bolt = weaponShapes["bolt"]
+
+    			magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine)
+    			charginghandleTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    		end
+
+    		mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < 2.6 and reloadTimer >= 2 then
+    				local t = (2.6-reloadTimer)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,0))
+    				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magOutSound)
+    					magOutSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 2 and reloadTimer >= 1.3 then
+    				mt = hideTrans
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.3 and reloadTimer >= .7 then
+    				local t = (reloadTimer-.7)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,0))
+    				if not magInSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magInSound)
+    					magInSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		cht = TransformCopy(charginghandleTrans)
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos, Vec(0,0,.2*shootTimer/shotDelay))
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < .7 and ammo ~= 0 then
+    				reloadTimer = -1
+    			elseif reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
+    				local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.3
+    				cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    				if not cockSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(cockSound)
+    					cockSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
+    				local t = reloadTimer/.1
+    				cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle, cht)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m4a1" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.325,-.7,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    	if aiming then
+    		if pointAim then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.25,-.5,0,0,40,5,-.2
+    		else
+    			if attachments.toprail == "acog" then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.247,-.3,0,0,0,70,-.2
+    			else
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.25,-.5,0,0,0,15,-.2
+    			end
+    		end
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .2,-.3,-.55,-20,50,30,0,0
+    	elseif selectAttachments then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .35,-.3,-.7,10,50,10,0,0
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.7
+    	swayx = sin2*.5
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.3
+    		swayx = sin2*.2
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		if reloadTimer > 1.2 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 5, 10, -5
+    		elseif reloadTimer > .6 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 10, 20, -10
+    		else
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, 0, 0, 15, -10, 0
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			ammo = magSize + 1
+    		else
+    			ammo = magSize
+    			ADSImpulse(0,0,.1,-100,0,0)
+    		end
+    		magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    		magInSoundPlaying = false
+    		cockSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/800, -(rnd1+rnd4)/800+(recoilAngle/200)-.05*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/400+recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+20*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+
+    	local h1pos = Vec(-.05,-.05,-.8)
+    	local h2pos = Vec(-.05,-.15,-.2)
+    	if reloading and ammo > 0 or reloading and ammo == 0 and reloadTimer > .7 then
+    		h1pos = VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine).pos,Vec(-.05,.15,0))
+    	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 and reloadTimer <= .7 and reloadTimer > .1 then
+    		h1pos = VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle).pos,Vec(0,.05,-.05))
+    	end
+    	ManageHands(h1pos,h2pos,weaponShapes)
+
+    else
+    	WeaponUnselectedTick()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m4a1" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories(attachmentPresets,weaponVoxFile) end
+
+    	DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="et552",Vec(0,.2475,-.3),.05,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_eotech_holo.png",15)
+    	DrawScope(attachments.toprail=="acog" and aiming and not pointAim and scopeTimer == 1,attachmentPresets.toprail.attachments.acog,Vec(0,.2475,-.5),"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_acog.png")
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m14.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m14"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M14", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m14.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="762x51",
+    	shootPos=Vec(-.011,.024,-.6),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,.02),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",
+    	magSize=8,
+    	fireRate=350,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.4,
+    	recoilVertical=.5,
+    	recoilHorizontal=3,
+    	recoilWander=1.6,
+    	recoilMax=7,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=-2,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.3,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"sks-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.5,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.07,
+    	extraBoltRecoilDist=.03,
+    	boltAngle=45,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Mount"]={
+    		attachments={"m14-garand","m14-garand-green","mk14"},
+    	},	
+    	["Mount-2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","m14-mount"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","magpul_afg_foregrip","kac_foregrip","rk1_foregrip","magpul_foregrip"},
+    	},	
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"m14-muzzle","surefire-762"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},		
+    	["Top_Rail_4"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_5"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_3"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","specter-1-4x-tan","elcan-c79","vortex-1-6x24"},
+    	}
+    })		
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltclose.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")	
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m16.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltRelease = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_boltrelease.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m1873"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Model 1873", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m1873.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="44mag",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(.0,.015,.075),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.03,.6,-.02),
+    	casingType="pistol-3",
+    	magSize=5,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.01,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=1.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.2,
+    	recoilWander=0.8,
+    	recoilMax=11,
+    	recoilKick=.07,
+    	recoilKickRot=1,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=1.1,
+    	reloadTime=1.05,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.3,
+    	chargeTypes={"pump"},
+    	hammerAngle=-45,
+    	leverAngle=90,
+    	boltTime=0.6,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.04,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-barrel-sawn","m1873-barrel-18","m1873-barrel-20","m1873-barrel-24","m1873-barrel-30"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine2"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-mag-5","m1873-mag-10","m1873-mag-12"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine3"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-mag-5","m1873-mag-10","m1873-mag-12","m1873-mag-15"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine4"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-mag-5"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine5"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-mag-5","m1873-mag-10"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine6"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-mag-12","m1873-mag-15","m1873-mag-17"},
+    	},
+    	["Forearm"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-forearm-0","m1873-forearm-1"},
+    	},
+    	["Forearm2"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-forearm-0","m1873-forearm-2"},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-stock-1","m1873-stock-2"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"m1873-irons","m1873-peep"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    boltCloseSoundPlaying = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if (not aiming) and boltTimer == 0 and magSize < 12 then
+        	allowSpin = true
+        elseif aiming and not spinning or magSize >= 12 then
+        	allowSpin = false
+        end
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dvl10/dvl_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m1911"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M1911", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m1911.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="45acp",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.2),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.055,0),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.3,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=7,
+    	fireRate=600,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.8,
+    	recoilVertical=1.0,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=3,
+    	recoilKickRot=20,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=20,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=1,
+    	hammerAngle=-65,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.042,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Slide"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-slide1","m1911-slide2"},
+    	},
+    	["Hammer"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-hammer1","m1911-hammer2"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-barrel","m1911-barrel3","m1911-barrel2"},
+    	},
+    	["Frame"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-frame1","m1911-frame2"},
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-grip2","m1911-grip3","m1911-grip1"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"m1911-mag-7","m1911-mag-15"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
-end+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-m1a1-thompson", "M1A1 Thompson", "MOD/TABS/vox/m1a1-thompson.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-m1a1-thompson.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 30
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = 60/750
+    shootTimer = 0
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2
+    reloading = false
+    pointAim = false
+    aimAccuracy = 0.005
+    hipAccuracy = 0.03
+    accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("smg")
+    rnd1, rnd2, rnd3, rnd4, rnd5, rnd6 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    recoilVertical = .4
+    recoilHorizontal = .3
+    recoilWander = .3
+    recoilAngle = 0
+    recoilMax = 20
+    kickOverlap = .7
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    magInSoundPlaying = false
+    cockSoundPlaying = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    magOutSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1a1-thompson/m1a1-thompson_magout_0.ogg")
+    magInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1a1-thompson/m1a1-thompson_magin_0.ogg")
+    cockSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1a1-thompson/m1a1-thompson_charge_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+    if shootTimer ~= 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
+    ManageRecoil()
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m1a1-thompson" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(.025,.125,-.85))
+
+    	if InputDown("lmb") and not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and ammo > 0 and shootTimer <= 0 then
+    		ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo < magSize and not reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+    	if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			barrel = shapes[2]
+    			bolt = shapes[3]
+    			stock1 = shapes[4]
+    			sight = shapes[5]
+    			guard = shapes[6]
+    			magazine = shapes[7]
+    			trigger = shapes[8]
+
+    			barrelTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(barrel)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    			stock1Trans = GetShapeLocalTransform(stock1)
+    			sightTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(sight)
+    			guardTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(guard)
+    			magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine)
+    			triggerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(trigger)
+    		end
+
+    		brt = TransformCopy(barrelTrans)
+    		brt.pos = VecAdd(brt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.01,0))
+
+    		stt = TransformCopy(sightTrans)
+    		stt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(stt.rot,QuatEuler(-25,0,0))
+    		stt.pos = VecAdd(stt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.025,0))
+
+    		st1t = TransformCopy(stock1Trans)
+    		st1t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(st1t.rot,QuatEuler(10,0,0))
+    		st1t.pos = VecAdd(st1t.pos,Vec(-.025,0,0))
+
+    		trt = TransformCopy(triggerTrans)
+    		trt.pos = VecAdd(trt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.01,0))
+
+    		gdt = TransformCopy(guardTrans)
+    		gdt.pos = VecAdd(gdt.pos,Vec(0,.01,0))
+
+    		mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
+    		mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(.025,0,0))
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < 2 and reloadTimer >= 1.4 then
+    				local t = (2-reloadTimer)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,0))
+    				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magOutSound)
+    					magOutSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.4 and reloadTimer >= 1.1 then
+    				mt = hideTrans
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.1 and reloadTimer >= .5 then
+    				local t = (reloadTimer-.5)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,0))
+    				if not magInSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magInSound)
+    					magInSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(-.025,-.03,1.5*shootTimer))
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < .4 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
+    				local t = (.4-reloadTimer)/.3
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    				if not cockSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(cockSound)
+    					cockSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
+    				local t = reloadTimer/.1
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.2*t))
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(barrel, brt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(sight, stt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(stock1, st1t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(trigger, trt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer, btrt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(guard, gdt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-m1a1-thompson" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.325,-.7,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    	if aiming then
+    		if pointAim then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0.025,-.2,-.6,0,0,40,5,-.2
+    			accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    		else
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.2,-.6,0,0,0,10,-.2
+    			accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    		end
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.3,-.6,-20,50,30,0,0
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	else
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.5
+    	swayx = sin2*.3
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.15
+    		swayx = sin2*.1
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.1+.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		if reloadTimer > 1.2 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, .025, 0, 5, 10, -5
+    		elseif reloadTimer > .5 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, .025, 0, 10, 20, -10
+    		else
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, 0, 0, 15, 5, 0
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		ammo = magSize
+    		magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    		magInSoundPlaying = false
+    		cockSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/400, -(rnd1+rnd4)/400-(recoilAngle/400)-.1*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/200+recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+20*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+    end
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m1bazooka.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\m1bazooka.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\m1bazooka.lua
@@ -1,128 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"
-#include "../ballistics.lua"
-#include "../common.lua"
-

 	if aiming and not reloading then
@@ -164,7 +40,7 @@
 		end
 	end
 
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov
@@ -192,4 +68,114 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m1bazooka"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M1-Bazooka", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m1bazooka.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="m6a1",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,-.016,-.55),
+    	magSize=1,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	sightFoldAngle=90,
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilKick=.2,
+    	recoilKickRot=5,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	reloadTime=2,
+    	reloadTypes={"rocket-load"},
+    	insertDistance=-0.55,
+    	boltTime=0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    --SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_load_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m1garand.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
 		fov = 0
 		if boltTimer < boltTime*.93 then
 			if aiming then

-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m1garand"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M1-Garand", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m1garand.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="30-06",
+    	shootPos=Vec(-.011,.024,-.6),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,.02),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",
+    	magSize=7,
+    	fireRate=350,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.4,
+    	recoilVertical=.5,
+    	recoilHorizontal=3,
+    	recoilWander=1.6,
+    	recoilMax=7,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=-2,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.3,
+    	reloadTime=1,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"sks-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.5,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.07,
+    	extraBoltRecoilDist=.03,
+    	boltAngle=45,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    --	Mount="m1-garand",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    --	["Mount"]={
+    --		attachments={"m1-garand"},
+    --		order=1,
+       --  	},
+    })		
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_load_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltclose.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")	
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\m700.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m700"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M700", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m700.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="762x51-2",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.6),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	magSize=5,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.5,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"bolt"},
+    	boltTime=1,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.09,
+    	boltAngle=50,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","atacr-7-35x56","leupold-5hd-5-25x56","vortex-1-6x24","1p69","aimpoint-t2","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","elcan-c79","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","uh-1","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"m700-stock-1","m700-stock-2",},
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-762","surefire-762-cb","surefire-762-tan"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"m700-bull-28","m700-barrel-28","m700-bull-26","m700-barrel-26","m700-bull-24","m700-barrel-24","m700-barrel-20","m700-barrel-165","m700-barrel-14"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"m700-mag-5","m700-mag-10"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dvl10/dvl_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dvl10/dvl_boltclose.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+#version 2
 function GetWeaponTransform()
 	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov = .1,-.075,-0.56,0,0,0,0
 	if ammo > 0 and not reloading then
@@ -164,7 +39,7 @@
 		end
 	end
 
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov
@@ -182,4 +57,116 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m72"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M72A7", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m72.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="m72a7",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,-.035,-.2),
+    	magSize=1,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.3,
+    	recoilVertical=3,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=.5,
+    	recoilMax=1,
+    	reloadTime=2,
+    	reloadTypes={"law-rocket"},
+    	chargeTypes={"law"},
+    	boltTime=1,
+    	boltRecoilDist=-.23,
+    	barrelPitchAngle=90,
+    	magOutSoundDelay=1.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m72/m72_fire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m72/m72_tube_imp_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m72/m72_deploy_1.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+        			body = b

+        	end

+        end

+end
```

```diff
 function GetWeaponTransform()
 	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov = .11,-.13,-.6,0,0,0,0
 	if aiming then
@@ -197,7 +31,7 @@
 	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
 	if reloading then
 		fov = 0

 			if magTimer > .8 then
 				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .03, -.01, 0.1, -25, 25, 74.5
 			else
@@ -213,7 +47,7 @@
 	elseif boltTimer > 0 and boltTimer > boltTime*.3 then
 		fov = 0
 		if aiming then
-			if pointAim and ammo > 0 then
+			if pointAim and ammo ~= 0 then
 				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, 0, 0, 5, -5, -10
 			else
 				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .02, 0, 0, 5, -3, 2

 		end
 	end

+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))

 	if reloading then

 			rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0,-.05,.01))
 			leftHandPos = Vec(-.02,-.02,-.15)
 		else
 			leftHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0,-.05,.01))
 		end

+	elseif boltTimer ~= 0 then
```
