```diff
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m870"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M870", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m870.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="12ga-00buckshot",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(.02,.015,.055),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,-.02),
+    	casingType="shotgun",
+    	magSize=7,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.01,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=15,
+    	recoilKick=.1,
+    	recoilKickRot=1,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=1.2,
+    	reloadTime=1.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.3,
+    	chargeTypes={"pump"},
+    	boltTime=0.6,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Magazine2="m870-mag-7",
+    	Barrel="m870-barrel-20",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bolt_Carrier"]={
+    		attachments={"m870-handguard-1","m870-handguard-2"},
+    		order=0,
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","magpul_afg_foregrip","kac_foregrip","rk1_foregrip","surefire-long2"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"12ga-00buckshot","12ga-000buckshot","12ga-slug","12ga-birdshot"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine2"]={
+    		attachments={"m870-mag-4","m870-mag-7","m870-mag-10"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"m870-barrel-20","m870-barrel-26","m870-barrel-30"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","trijicon-rmr-rail","aimpoint-acro-rail","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-m4","uh-1","specter-1-4x","elcan-c79","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","vortex-1-6x24","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","trijicon-rmr-rail","aimpoint-acro-rail"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"none","m870-mount"},
+    		order=6,
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"m870-stock-1","m870-stock-2","m870-stock-3"},
+    		order=7,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("shotgun")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    boltCloseSoundPlaying = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_pump.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_load_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-m9a1"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M9A1", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/m9a1.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.3),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.055,0),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=15,
+    	fireRate=600,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.8,
+    	recoilVertical=1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.6,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilKickRot=5,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=15,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=0,
+    	hammerAngle=-70,
+    	barrelRecoilDist=.005,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.04,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Slide"]={
+    		attachments={"m9-slide","m9-slide1","m9-slide2"},
+    		order=0,
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-x400"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"m9-barrel","m9-barrel2"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"m9-grip1","m9-grip2"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"m9-mag-15","m9-mag-30"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+
```

```diff
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov
@@ -230,4 +96,131 @@
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-makarov"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Makarov", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/makarov.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x18",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.2),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.04,-.015),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.5,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=8,
+    	fireRate=600,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.7,
+    	recoilVertical=1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.5,
+    	recoilWander=0.9,
+    	recoilKickRot=4,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=15,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.6,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=0,
+    	hammerAngle=-60,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.02,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Slide"]={
+    		attachments={"makpm-slide","makpb-slide"},
+    		order=0,
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","makpb-suppressor"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"mak-grip1"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"mak-mag-8"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("pistol")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\mosin.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff

 	if aiming then
@@ -182,7 +44,7 @@
 	if reloading then
 		fov = 0
 		x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.06, -.03, 0.13, 16, 40, 7.5
-	elseif boltTimer > 0 then
+	elseif boltTimer ~= 0 then
 		fov = 0
 		if boltTimer < boltTime*.93 then
 			if aiming and not pointAim then
@@ -193,7 +55,7 @@
 		end
 	end

+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))

@@ -203,12 +65,137 @@
 
 	local leftHandPos = Vec(0.01,-.014,-.03)
 	local rightHandPos = Vec(0,-.029,.23)
-	if reloading and magTimer > 0 then
+	if reloading and magTimer ~= 0 then
 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0.02,.0,.08))
-	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer > 0 then
+	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer ~= 0 then
 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier:getLocalTransform(), Vec(.05, .01, .07))
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-mosin"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Mosin-Nagant", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/mosin.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="762x54-2",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.025,-.55),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.02,.08),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	casingType="rifle-3",
+    	magSize=5,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2 ,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=1.6,
+    	reloadTypes={"shotgun"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"mosin"},
+    	boltTime=1.0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"mosin-stock_1","mosin-stock_2","mosin-stock_3","mosin-stock_4","mosin-stock_5"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","pu-1"},
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","mosin-bayonet"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltclose.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
@@ -233,4 +98,126 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))

-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-mp-40"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "MP-40", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/mp40.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.55),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.0162,-.131),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=550,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=5,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=2.5,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.5,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.4,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=-.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"mp40-stock","mp40-stock-folded"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},	
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_boltopen.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\mp5.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
 				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0.04, 15, 5, -5

-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))

 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-mp5"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "MP5", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/mp5.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.025,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.035,-.035),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.8),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=800,
+    	accuracy=.0003,
+    	fireModes={"semi","burst-3","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-15,20,65,-60},
+    	weightFactor=1.0,
+    	recoilVertical=.1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=.2,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=.4,
+    	recoilKickRot=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.4,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.4,
+    	chargeTypes={"ar-charginghandle"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.05,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"mp5-receiver","mp5-tracer","mp510-receiver"},
+    	},
+    	["Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"mp5-handguard-1","mp5-handguard-2","mp5-handguard-3","mp5sd-handguard-1"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","mp5sd-suppressor"},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"mp5-stock-1","mp5-stock-2"},
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_foregrip","rk1_foregrip"},
+    	},
+    	["Side_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-15","perst-3","surefire-long5","kac-rib-mp5"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"none","mp5-mount"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-553","et-exps3","uh-1","pk-122","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-m4","specter-1-4x","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","vortex-1-6x24","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/mp5_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/mp5_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.017,.02),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.3,.5),
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0003,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={45,90,0},
+    	recoilVertical=.1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=.2,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=.4,
+    	recoilKickRot=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-slap"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"boltrelease"},
+    	boltTime=.5,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.08,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Magazine="grot-mag30",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip-tan","magpul_foregrip","magpul_foregrip-cb","magpul_foregrip-tan","kac-rib-4-blk"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Mount_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","mount-picatinny-rail"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_3"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-553","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","pk-122","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-m4","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","specter-1-4x-tan","elcan-c79","vortex-1-6x24","atacr-7-35x56"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_4"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_5"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_4a"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","msbs-grot-cover"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_5a"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","msbs-grot-cover"},
+    	},	
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"grot-mag30","grot762-mag10",unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.Stanag)},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.STOCKS.BufferTube)},
+    	},
+    	["Stock_2"]={
+    		attachments={"msbs-grot-stock","ar-stock-adapter","msbs762-stock"},
+    	},
+    	["Rear_Sight"]={
+    		attachments={"grot-rear-sight-1","grot-rear-sight-2"},
+    	},
+    	["Mount_Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"msbs-grot-stock-2","msbs-grot-stock-1"},
+    	},		
+    	["Mount"]={
+    		attachments={"msbsgrot-receiver","msbs762-receiver","msbs762-receiver-yellow"},
+    	},				
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"msbs-muzzle","nt4-suppressor","nt4-suppressor-cb","nt4-suppressor-tan"},
+    	},		
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarl_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltRelease = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_boltrelease.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\nagant.lua

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    --SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1

+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+

+        		SetHandTransforms()

+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
```

```diff
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/oc14-groza.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x39",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.011,-.4),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,-.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.3),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=750,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=5,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=2.5,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.5,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Pistol_Grip="ak74-pistolgrip-polymer",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"muzzle-oc14","oc14-suppressor","oc14-gp-30"},
+    	},
+    	["Upper_Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"oc14-handguard-wood-upper","ak74-handguard-polymer-upper","ak74-handguard-polymer-upper(plum)","ak74-handguard-steel-upper"},
+    	},
+    	["Mount"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","oc14-dovetail"},
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","okp-7","ekp-1","1p63","pso-1","usp-1","nspu"},
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"ak74-pistolgrip-wood","ak74-pistolgrip-polymer","ak74-pistolgrip-polymer(plum)"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/as val/as-val_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\p08-luger.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
-end+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-p08", "P08 Luger", "MOD/TABS/vox/p08-luger.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-p08.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 7
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = 60/550
+    shootTimer = 0
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2
+    reloading = false
+    pointAim = false
+    aimAccuracy = 0.02
+    hipAccuracy = 0.08
+    accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("pistol")
+    rnd1, rnd2, rnd3, rnd4, rnd5, rnd6 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    recoilVertical = 2
+    recoilHorizontal = 2
+    recoilWander = 1.5
+    recoilAngle = 0
+    recoilMax = 20
+    kickOverlap = .7
+    sin1 = 0
+    cos1 = 1
+    sin2 = 0
+    cos2 = 1
+    swayy = 0
+    swayx = 0
+    magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    magInSoundPlaying = false
+    cockSoundPlaying = false
+    attachments = {}
+    attachments.sight = "" -- "holo1"
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    magOutSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17reload.ogg")
+    magInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17reload2.ogg")
+    cockSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+    if shootTimer ~= 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
+    ManageRecoil()
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-p08" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(0,.05,-.8))
+
+    	if InputPressed("lmb") and not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and ammo > 0 and shootTimer <= 0 then
+    		ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo <= magSize and not reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+    	if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			barrel = shapes[2]
+    			trigger = shapes[3]
+    			magazine = shapes[4]
+    			bolt = shapes[5]
+    			bolt2 = shapes[6]
+    			trigger2 = shapes[7]
+
+    			barrelTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(barrel)
+    			triggerTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(trigger)
+    			magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    		end
+
+    		local rocketRelDist = 2*reloadTimer
+    		brt = TransformCopy(barrelTrans)
+    		brt.pos = VecAdd(brt.pos,Vec(0,-.02,0))
+
+    		trt = TransformCopy(triggerTrans)
+    		tr2t = TransformCopy(triggerTrans)
+    		trt.pos = VecAdd(trt.pos,Vec(.005,0.05,0.1))
+    		trt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(trt.rot,QuatEuler(-30,0,0))
+    		tr2t.pos = VecAdd(tr2t.pos,Vec(-.005,0.05,0.1))
+    		tr2t.rot = QuatRotateQuat(tr2t.rot,QuatEuler(-30,0,0))
+
+    		mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
+    		mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,0.05,0.07))
+    		mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(-30,0,0))
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < 2 and reloadTimer >= 1.4 then
+    				local t = (2-reloadTimer)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-.5*t,.25*t))
+    				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magOutSound)
+    					magOutSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.4 and reloadTimer >= 1.3 then
+    				mt = hideTrans
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.3 and reloadTimer >= .7 then
+    				local t = (reloadTimer-.7)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-.5*t,.25*t))
+    				if not magInSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magInSound)
+    					magInSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,-.03,-0.03*shootTimer/shotDelay))
+    		btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(70*shootTimer/shotDelay,0,0))
+    		bt2t = TransformToParentTransform(btt,Transform(Vec(0,.1-.06*(shootTimer/shotDelay)^.5,-0.015+.03*(shootTimer/shotDelay)^.5),QuatEuler(-110*shootTimer/shotDelay,0,0)))
+
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < .65 and ammo ~= 0 then
+    				reloadTimer = -1
+    			elseif reloadTimer < .3 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
+    				local t = (.3-reloadTimer)/.2
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,-0.03*t))
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(70*t,0,0))
+    				bt2t = TransformToParentTransform(btt,Transform(Vec(0,.1-.06*t^.5,-0.015+.03*t^.5),QuatEuler(-110*t,0,0)))
+    				if not cockSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(cockSound)
+    					cockSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
+    				local t = reloadTimer/.1
+    				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,-0.03*t))
+    				btt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(btt.rot,QuatEuler(70*t,0,0))
+    				bt2t = TransformToParentTransform(btt,Transform(Vec(0,.1-.06*t^.5,-0.015+.03*t^.5),QuatEuler(-110*t,0,0)))
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(barrel, brt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(trigger, trt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(trigger2, tr2t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(boltretainer, btrt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt2, bt2t)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-p08" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.225,-.8,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    	if aiming then
+    		if pointAim then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.15,-.7,0,0,40,5,-.2
+    			accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    		else
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0.025,-.085,-.8,0,0,0,10,-.2
+    			accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    		end
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .1,-.25,-.6,-15,10,20,0,0
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	else
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.7
+    	swayx = sin2*.5
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.3
+    		swayx = sin2*.2
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		if reloadTimer > 1.2 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .075, -.1, 5, 10, -15
+    		elseif reloadTimer > .6 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .075, -.05, 10, 20, -15
+    		else
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, 0.05, 0.05, 15, 5, 0
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			ammo = magSize + 1
+    		else
+    			ammo = magSize
+    		end
+    		magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    		magInSoundPlaying = false
+    		cockSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/800, -(rnd1+rnd4)/800+(recoilAngle/200)-.1*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/400+recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+20*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\Panzerbuchse39.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-panzerbuchse39", "Panzerbuchse 39", "MOD/TABS/vox/panzerbuchse39.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-panzerbuchse39.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 1
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = .15
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2.5
+    reloading = false
+    aimAccuracy = 0.005
+    hipAccuracy = 0.03
+    accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("sniper")
+    RECdelta = {0,0,0,0,0,0}
+    sin1 = 0
+    cos1 = 1
+    sin2 = 0
+    cos2 = 1
+    swayy = 0
+    swayx = 0
+    bulletInSoundPlaying = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/panzerbuchse/panzerbuchse_0.ogg")
+    bulletOutSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/panzerbuchse/bullet_out_0.ogg.ogg")
+    bulletInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/panzerbuchse/bullet_in_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-panzerbuchse39" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(.025,-.1,-.8))
+
+    	if InputPressed("lmb") and not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and ammo ~= 0 then
+    		local shellInfo = deepcopy(shellTypes["792x94"])
+    		shellInfo.sound = weaponSound
+    		PlaySound(weaponSound,shootPos,1)
+    		Shoot(shootPos, TransformToParentVec(toolTrans,Vec(0,0,-1)), shellInfo, {GetToolBody()}, false, accuracy, 0, "mg", 0.5, 1)
+    		RECImpulse(0,-.2,2,60,0,0)
+    		ShakeCamera(.7)
+    		ammo = 0
+    		recoilTimer = shotDelay
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo < magSize and not reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+    	bipodded = QueryRaycast(TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(.325,-.1,-.7)),Vec(0,-1,0),1)
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			guard = shapes[2]
+    			bullet = shapes[3]
+    			magazines = shapes[4]
+    			bipodL = shapes[5]
+    			bipodR = shapes[6]
+    			carryHandle = shapes[7]
+
+    			guardTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(guard)
+    			bulletTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bullet)
+    			magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazines)
+    			bipodLTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bipodL)
+    			bipodRTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bipodR)
+    			carryHandleTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(carryHandle)
+
+    		end
+
+    		gdt = TransformCopy(guardTrans)
+    		gdt.pos = VecAdd(gdt.pos,Vec(-.025,.025,0))
+    		blt = TransformCopy(bulletTrans)
+    		if reloading and reloadTimer >= p1 then
+    			local t = (reloadTimer-p1)
+    			blt.pos = VecAdd(blt.pos,Vec(.105,0.1-.2*t,0.4-.4*t))
+    			blt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(blt.rot,QuatEuler(t*-45,0,0))
+    		elseif reloading and reloadTimer < p1 then
+    			blt.pos = VecAdd(blt.pos,Vec(0,-0.05,reloadTimer))
+    			if reloadTimer < .3 and not bulletInSoundPlaying then
+    				PlaySound(bulletInSound)
+    				bulletInSoundPlaying = true
+    			end
+    		else
+    			blt = hideTrans
+    		end
+    		mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
+    		mt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(mt.rot,QuatEuler(45,0,0))
+
+    		bplt = TransformCopy(bipodLTrans)
+    		bplt.pos = VecAdd(bplt.pos,Vec(-.025,0,0))
+    		bprt = TransformCopy(bipodRTrans)
+    		bprt.pos = VecAdd(bprt.pos,Vec(-.025,0,0))
+    		local trx, try, trz = GetQuatEuler(GetBodyTransform(b).rot)
+    		if bipodded then
+    			bplt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(bplt.rot,QuatEuler(-trx-80,30,10))
+    			bprt.rot = QuatRotateQuat(bprt.rot,QuatEuler(-trx-80,-30,-10))
+    		end
+
+    		cht = TransformCopy(carryHandleTrans)
+    		cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,-45,0))
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(guard, gdt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bullet, blt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(magazines, mt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bipodL, bplt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bipodR, bprt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(carryHandle, cht)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-panzerbuchse39" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0.3,-.1,-1.2,0,0,0,0,3.5
+    	if aiming then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.025,0,-1,0,0,0,10,3.5
+    		accuracy = aimAccuracy
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = -.2,-.35,-.6,-20,50,30,0,3
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	else
+    		accuracy = hipAccuracy
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		ammo = magSize
+    		bulletInSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.7
+    	swayx = sin2*.5
+    	if bipodded then
+    		swayx = sin1*.15
+    		swayy = sin2*.1
+    	elseif aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.3
+    		swayx = sin2*.2
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	p1 = 1.5
+    	if reloading then
+    		if reloadTimer < p1 then
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.3, .15, .3, 10, 30, 10
+    		else
+    			x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.3, .1, .2, 0, 10, 10
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1-swayx*speed/100, y+y1+swayy*speed/100, z+z1, rotx+rotx1-swayy, roty+roty1-swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = 0, -.1*recoilTimer, recoilTimer, 20*recoilTimer, 0, 0 
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+    end
+end
+

```

---

```diff
-end+end

+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-panzerfaust30"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Panzerfaust 30", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/panzerfaust.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="faustpatrone30",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,-.035,-.2),
+    	magSize=1,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=3,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=.5,
+    	recoilMax=1,
+    	reloadTime=2,
+    	reloadTypes={"law-rocket"},
+    	chargeTypes={"panzerfaust"},
+    	boltTime=1,
+    	boltRecoilDist=-.23,
+    	barrelPitchAngle=-90,
+    	magOutSoundDelay=1.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m72/m72_tube_imp_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_boltopen.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\panzerschreck.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\panzerschreck.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\panzerschreck.lua
@@ -1,76 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"
-#include "../ballistics.lua"
-#include "../common.lua"
-
-function init()
-	RegisterTool("tabs-panzerschreck", "Panzerschreck", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
-	SetBool("game.tool.tabs-panzerschreck.enabled", true)
-
-	hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
-	hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
-
-	InitBallistics()
-	drawDebug = false
-	magSize = 1
-	ammo = magSize
-	weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_0.ogg")
-
-	shotDelay = .15
-	recoilTimer = 0
-	reloadTimer = 0
-	reloadTime = 2
-	reloading = false
-	accuracy = 0.005
-	weightFactor = 1.2
-
-	rangeIndex = 1
-	ranges = {50,100,200,300}
-	range = ranges[rangeIndex]
-	rangeTextTimer = 0
-
-	dryFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
-
-	InitAnimationVariables()
-	InitSounds("sniper")
-
-	sin1 = 0
-	cos1 = 1
-	sin2 = 0
-	cos2 = 1
-	swayy = 0
-	swayx = 0
-
-	attachments = {}
-
-	weaponVoxFile = "panzerschreck"
-
-	weaponSchematic={
-		["launcher"]={
-			transform=Transform(Vec(-.22,-.3,.4),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
-			scale=.2,
-		},
-		["front-sight"]={
-			transform=Transform(Vec(-.024,-.08,-.64),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
-			scale=.04,
-		},
-		["rear-sight-bracket"]={
-			transform=Transform(Vec(-.024,-.06,-.312),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
-			scale=.04,
-		},
-		["rpzb-gr4322"]={
-			transform=Transform(Vec(-.05,-.13,.2),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
-			scale=.2,
-		}
-	}
-
-	attachmentPresets={}
-
-	shapesInitializedT1 = false
-	shapesInitializedT2 = false
-	weaponShapes = {}
-end
-
+#version 2
 function rangeWeapon()
 	if InputPressed("pgup") then
 		rangeIndex = math.clamp(rangeIndex+1,1,#ranges)
@@ -85,141 +13,207 @@
 	end
 end
 
-function update(dt)
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-panzerschreck" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.05,0,0,0,0,0,.7
-		if aiming then
-			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .08,-.05,.1,0,0,0,10,.7
-		elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
-			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .3,-.025,-.1,-20,20,10,0,.2
-		end
-
-		local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0.5, 10)
-		sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		swayy = sin1*.5
-		swayx = sin2*.3
-		if aiming then
-			swayy = sin1*.15
-			swayx = sin2*.1
-		end
-		swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-
-		local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
-		if reloading then

-end
-

-		end
-

-

-
-		-- Tool Transform/Animations

-
-			if not shapesInitializedT1 then
-				shapesInitializedT1 = true
-			elseif not shapesInitializedT2 then
-				InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile)
-			end
-
-			WeaponTick()
-

-

-

-			end
-
-			local rocketRelDist = 2*reloadTimer
-			rkt = TransformCopy(rocketTrans)
-			rkt.pos = VecAdd(rkt.pos,Vec(0,0,rocketRelDist))

-			end
-
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(rocket, rkt)

-end
-
-function draw(dt)
-
-	if rangeTextTimer > 0 then
-		UiPush()
-			UiColor(1,1,1,rangeTextTimer^.5)
-			UiFont("bold.ttf",30)

-			UiTranslate(UiCenter(),UiHeight()-40)

-			rangeTextTimer = rangeTextTimer - dt
-		UiPop()
-	end
-end+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-panzerschreck", "Panzerschreck", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-panzerschreck.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())
+    InitBallistics()
+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 1
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = .15
+    recoilTimer = 0
+    reloadTimer = 0
+    reloadTime = 2
+    reloading = false
+    accuracy = 0.005
+    weightFactor = 1.2
+    rangeIndex = 1
+    ranges = {50,100,200,300}
+    range = ranges[rangeIndex]
+    rangeTextTimer = 0
+    InitAnimationVariables()
+    InitSounds("sniper")
+    sin1 = 0
+    cos1 = 1
+    sin2 = 0
+    cos2 = 1
+    swayy = 0
+    swayx = 0
+    attachments = {}
+    weaponVoxFile = "panzerschreck"
+    weaponSchematic={
+    	["launcher"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.22,-.3,.4),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.2,
+    	},
+    	["front-sight"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.024,-.08,-.64),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.04,
+    	},
+    	["rear-sight-bracket"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.024,-.06,-.312),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.04,
+    	},
+    	["rpzb-gr4322"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(-.05,-.13,.2),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    		scale=.2,
+    	}
+    }
+    attachmentPresets={}
+    shapesInitializedT1 = false
+    shapesInitializedT2 = false
+    weaponShapes = {}
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_0.ogg")
+    dryFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-panzerschreck" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(0,-.05,-1.3))
+
+    	if not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 then
+    		if InputPressed("lmb") and ammo ~= 0 then
+    			Shoot(shootPos, TransformToParentVec(toolTrans,Vec(0,0,-1)), deepcopy(shellTypes.panzerschreck), {GetToolBody()}, false, accuracy, 0, "sphere", 0.5, 1)
+    			PlaySound(weaponSound,shootPos,1)
+    			ShakeCamera(.6)
+    			ammo = 0
+    			recoilTimer = shotDelay
+    			PlaySound(dryFireSound)
+    		elseif InputPressed("lmb") then
+    			PlaySound(dryFireSound)
+    		end
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo < magSize and not reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and not reloading
+
+    	rangeWeapon()
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		if not shapesInitializedT1 then
+    			shapesInitializedT1 = true
+    		elseif not shapesInitializedT2 then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile)
+    		end
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile)
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			rocket = weaponShapes["rpzb-gr4322"]
+
+    			rocketTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(rocket)
+    		end
+
+    		local rocketRelDist = 2*reloadTimer
+    		rkt = TransformCopy(rocketTrans)
+    		rkt.pos = VecAdd(rkt.pos,Vec(0,0,rocketRelDist))
+    		if ammo == 0 and not reloading then
+    			rkt = TransformCopy(hideTrans)
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(rocket, rkt)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-panzerschreck" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.05,0,0,0,0,0,.7
+    	if aiming then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .08,-.05,.1,0,0,0,10,.7
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .3,-.025,-.1,-20,20,10,0,.2
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.5
+    	swayx = sin2*.3
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.15
+    		swayx = sin2*.1
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.1, -.2, -.9, -35, -25, 10
+    		time = 1
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		ammo = magSize
+    	end
+
+    	GUNoffset = TransformCopy(ADSoffset)
+
+    	local h1pos = Vec(0,-.25,-.3)
+    	local h2pos = Vec(-.075,-.25,-.5)
+    	if reloading then
+    		h1pos = VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(rocket).pos,Vec(.05,.05,-.1))
+    	end
+    	ManageHands(h1pos,h2pos,weaponShapes)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if rangeTextTimer ~= 0 then
+    	UiPush()
+    		UiColor(1,1,1,rangeTextTimer^.5)
+    		UiFont("bold.ttf",30)
+    		UiAlign("bottom center")
+    		UiTranslate(UiCenter(),UiHeight()-40)
+    		UiText(range)
+    		rangeTextTimer = rangeTextTimer - dt
+    	UiPop()
+    end
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\pb.lua

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
@@ -202,4 +68,125 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-pb"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Parker Bros. SxS", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/pb.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="10ga-00buckshot",
+    	shootPos=Vec(-.01,.0175,-.7),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(-.015,.015,.04),
+    	casingEmitPosAlt=Vec(.025,.015,.04),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(0.007,.015,.025),
+    	casingType="shotgun-3",
+    	magSize=2,
+    	fireRate=1000,
+    	accuracy=.001,
+    	fireModes={"alternative","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.3,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=3,
+    	recoilWander=3,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.2,
+    	recoilKickRot=3,
+    	kickOverlap=.4,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.0,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"break"},
+    	boltTime=0,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Ammo"]={
+    		attachments={"10ga-00buckshot","10ga-000buckshot","10ga-slug","10ga-wax-slug","10ga-birdshot"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("shotgun")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m107/m107_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_load_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_load_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.hatchOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_hatch_open.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.hatchClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_hatch_close.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-41_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\pkm.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\pkm.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\pkm.lua
@@ -1,203 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"

+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\pp19-01vityaz.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"pp19-01vityaz-muzzle","pbs1-suppressor"},
+    		order=7,
+    	},	
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"pp19-01vityaz-barrel"},
+    		order=8,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    		order=9,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","vortex-1-6x24","specter-1-4x","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","1p69","elcan-c79","acog-4x32","aimpoint-m4"},
+    		order=10,
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","magpul_afg_foregrip","kac_foregrip","rk1_foregrip","surefire-long2","magpul_foregrip"},
+    		order=11,
+    	},		
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-pp19bizon"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "PP-19 Bizon", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/pp19bizon.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x18",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,-.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=64,
+    	fireRate=700,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=5,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=2.5,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.5,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Top_Rail"]={

+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE", unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.OPTICS.Dovetail)},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"aks74u-stock","aks74u-stock-folded"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"pp19bizon-muzzle","pbs1-suppressor"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},	
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")

+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-pp91kedr"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "PP-91 Kedr", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()

+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.04,-.26),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.1,-.045),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.5,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",

+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)

+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)
