```diff
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-ppsh41"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "PPSH-41", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/ppsh41.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="7.62x25",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.35),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,0,-.09),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.1,.7,.2),
+    	casingType="pistol-2",
+    	magSize=35,
+    	fireRate=1000,
+    	accuracy=.001,
+    	fireModes={"full","semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,0,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=0.2,
+    	recoilWander=0.9,
+    	recoilMax=2,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=-5.0,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.5,
+    	reloadTime=2.7,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.4,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	boltTime=.6,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.085,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"ppsh-mag-35","ppsh-mag-71"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/hk/hk_boltopen.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-41_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_clipout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_clipin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.hatchOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_hatch_open.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.hatchClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-1_hatch_close.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ptrs-41/ptrs-41_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\rgm40.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\rgm40.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\rgm40.lua
@@ -1,135 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"

-	SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
-	SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
-
-	SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
-	SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_load_0.ogg")
-	-- SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
-end

-function update(dt)
-	WeaponUpdate(dt)
-end
-
-function tick(dt)
-
-	WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
-
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-
-		WeaponInputs()
-
-		local b = GetToolBody()
-		if b ~= 0 then
-
-			if loadToolDelay > 0 then
-				loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
-			elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
-				LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
-				loadToolDelay = -1
-			end
-
-			WeaponTick(dt)
-
-			SetBool("hud.aimdot", false)
-
-			local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
-			local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
-			SetHandTransforms()
-			ManageHands(b)
-			SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
-
-			if body ~= b then
-				LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
-				body = b
-			end
-
-		end
-	else
-		WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
-	end
-end
-
-function draw()
-	WeaponDraw(dt)
-end
-
+#version 2
 function GetWeaponTransform()
 	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov = .11,-.075,-.325,4.7,0,0,0
 	if aiming and not reloading then
@@ -171,7 +40,7 @@
 		end
 	end
 
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov
@@ -196,4 +65,116 @@
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-rgm40"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "RGM-40", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/rgm40.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="vog25",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,-.03,-.45),
+    	magSize=1,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={180,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.0,
+    	recoilVertical=5,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilKick=.02,
+    	recoilKickRot=.5,
+    	recoilMax=1,
+    	reloadTime=1.0,
+    	reloadTypes={"grenade-frontload"},
+    	boltTime=0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Ammo"]={
+    		attachments={"vog25","grd100"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_load_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
```

```diff
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-rpg7"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "RPG-7V2", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/rpg7.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="pg7v",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,-.016,-.55),
+    	magSize=1,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={0,0},
+    	sightFoldAngle=90,
+    	weightFactor=1.2,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilKick=.2,
+    	recoilKickRot=5,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	reloadTime=1.8,
+    	reloadTypes={"rocket-load"},
+    	insertDistance=0.5,
+    	boltTime=0,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    	openBolt=true,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Ammo"]={
+    		attachments={"pg7v","og7v","pg7vt","gtb7m"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"rpg7sights","pgo-7"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_fire_plr_emty_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_raise.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/rpg/RPG_reload_fast_load_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

```diff
+    	vertTravelMult=1.7,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.085,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"saiga-12_mag-12","saiga-12_mag-20"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Ammo"]={
+    		attachments={"12ga-00buckshot","12ga-000buckshot","12ga-slug"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","saiga-12-dustcover",unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.OPTICS.Dovetail)},
+    		order=3	,
+    	},
+    	["Lower_Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"saiga-12-handguard-polymer-lower","saiga-12-handguard-wood-lower","saiga-12k-handguard-wood-lower","saiga-12k-handguard-polymer-lower"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},
+    	["Upper_Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"saiga-12-handguard-polymer-upper","saiga-12-handguard-wood-upper","NONE"},
+    		order=5,
+    	},		
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"saiga-12-polymer-stock","saiga-12-polymer-stock-folded","saiga-12-polymer-wood","zenit-pt1","ak-buffer-tube","aks74u-stock","aks74u-stock-folded"},
+    		order=6,
+    	},
+    	["Stock2"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.STOCKS.BufferTube)},
+    		order=7,
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"saiga-12-pistolgrip-polymer","saiga-12-pistolgrip-wood"},
+    		order=8,
+    	},
+    	["Mount_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","saiga-12-rail"},
+    		order=9,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","vortex-1-6x24","specter-1-4x","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","1p69","elcan-c79","acog-4x32","aimpoint-m4"},
+    		order=10,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","surefire-long","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    		order=11,			
+    	},	
+    	["Mount_4"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","saiga-12-rail-3"},
+    		order=12,
+    	},
+    	["Mount_3"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","saiga-12-rail-2"},
+    		order=13,
+    	},
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip-tan","magpul_foregrip","magpul_foregrip-cb","magpul_foregrip-tan"},
+    		order=14,			
+    	},
+    	["Mount"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","saiga-12-dovetail"},
+    		order=15,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("shotgun")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m870/m870_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\scar-h.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-scar-l"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "SCAR-L MK16", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/scar-l.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="556x45",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.017,-.6),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.017,.02),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.3,.5),
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=650,
+    	accuracy=.0003,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={45,90,0},
+    	recoilVertical=.1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=.2,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=.4,
+    	recoilKickRot=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-slap"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"boltrelease","ar-charginghandle"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.08,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Magazine="stanag-30-tan",
+    	Stock="scarl_stock-fde",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Bottom_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","kac_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip","magpul_afg_foregrip-tan","magpul_foregrip","magpul_foregrip-cb","magpul_foregrip-tan","kac-rib-4-blk"},
+    	},
+    	["Barrel"]={
+    		attachments={"scarl-barrel-145","scarl-barrel-10"},
+    	},
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","nt4-suppressor","nt4-suppressor-cb","nt4-suppressor-tan","surefire-556","surefire-556-cb","surefire-556-tan"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail_2"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","an-peq-2","an-peq-2-tan","an-peq-15","an-peq-15-tan","perst-3"},
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"scar-rear-sight","et-553","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","pk-122","aimpoint-t2","aimpoint-m4","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","specter-1-4x-tan","elcan-c79","vortex-1-6x24","atacr-7-35x56","fast-riser"},
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","et-exps3cb","et-exps3tan","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={unpack(ATTACHMENT_GROUPS.MAGAZINES.Stanag)},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"scarl_stock-fde","scarl_stock-blk"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarl_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltRelease = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scar_boltrelease.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\sks.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_load_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ks23/ks23_boltclose.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")	
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
```

```diff
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-sr-3"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "SR-3M", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/sr-3m.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x39",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.0165,-.3),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,-.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.3),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",
+    	magSize=20,
+    	fireRate=800,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=.9,
+    	recoilMax=6,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"rock-in"},
+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {}
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","sr-3-suppressor"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"sr3m-mag-30","as-val-mag-20-bak(plum)","as-val-mag-30-bak(plum)"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Handguard"]={
+    		attachments={"sr-3-handguard-polymer","sr-3-handguard-polymer(plum)"},
+    		order=3,
+    	},
+    	["Dustcover"]={
+    		attachments={"as-val-dustcover"},--,"asm-dustcover","NONE"},
+    		order=4,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","vortex-1-6x24","specter-1-4x","uh-1","aimpoint-t2","1p69","elcan-c79","acog-4x32","aimpoint-m4"},
+    		order=5,
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","okp-7","ekp-1","1p63","pso-1vss","mi-gen2-ak-sidemount","pgo-7ak","usp-1","nspu"},
+    		order=6,
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"as-val-pistolgrip-polymer","as-val-pistolgrip-polymer(plum)"},
+    		order=7,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/as val/as-val_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/ak/ak_charge.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "StG-44", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()

+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/stg44.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="792x33",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.55),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.0162,-.131),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",

+    	fireRate=600,

+    	recoilMax=5,

+    	chargeTypes={"ak-charge"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,

+    })

+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+

+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()

+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\sv98.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tools\sv98.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tools\sv98.lua
@@ -1,146 +1,4 @@
-#include "gunfunctions.lua"
-#include "../ammo.lua"
-#include "../ballistics.lua"
-#include "../common.lua"
-
-function init()
-	toolID = "tabs-sv98"
-	RegisterTool(toolID, "SV-98", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)

 function GetWeaponTransform()

 				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, .02, 0, 8, 13, -12
 			end

+	elseif boltTimer ~= 0 then
 		fov = 0
 		if boltTimer < boltTime*.93 then
 			if aiming then
@@ -211,7 +69,7 @@
 		end
 	end
 
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov

 	local leftHandPos = Vec(0,-.02,-.15)
 	local rightHandPos = Vec(0,-.07,.17)
-	if reloading and magTimer > 0 then
+	if reloading and magTimer ~= 0 then
 		leftHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Magazine:getLocalTransform(), Vec(0,-.05,.01))
-	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer > 0 then
+	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 or boltTimer ~= 0 then
 		rightHandPos = TransformToParentPoint(weaponHandler.bodies.Bolt_Carrier:getLocalTransform(), Vec(.05, -.03, .12))
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-sv98"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "SV-98", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/sv98.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="762x54-2",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.01,.05),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(1,.5,.7),
+    	magSize=10,
+    	fireRate=200,
+    	accuracy=.0001,
+    	fireModes={"bolt","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.5,
+    	recoilVertical=2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=2,
+    	recoilWander=0,
+    	recoilMax=10,
+    	recoilKick=.05,
+    	recoilKickRot=2,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2.2,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard"},
+    	magInSoundDelay=.15,
+    	chargeTypes={"bolt"},
+    	boltTime=1,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    	boltAngle=45,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    	Top_Rail="1p69",
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","sv98-suppressor"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Top_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","1p69","vortex-1-6x24","aimpoint-t2","acog-4x32","acog-35x35","specter-1-4x","elcan-c79","pk-122","et-553","et-exps3","uh-1","fast-riser"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    	["Riser_Rail"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","et-exps3","uh-1","aimpoint-t2"},
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("sniper")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/scar/scarh_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltOpen = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltopen.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.boltClose = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/mosin/mosin_boltclose.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\svd.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
-end+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\thompson.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))

@@ -238,3 +90,137 @@
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
 
 end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-thompson"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "M1928 Thompson", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    --------------------
+    -- General Config --
+    --------------------
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/thompson.xml"
+    handObject = "1"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="45acp",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.016,-.45),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.04,-.07),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(0.8,.6,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=30,
+    	fireRate=660,
+    	accuracy=.0004,
+    	fireModes={"semi","full","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={-10,-20,0},
+    	weightFactor=1.1,
+    	recoilVertical=.2,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1,
+    	recoilWander=0.9,
+    	recoilMax=5,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	recoilKickRot=1.5,
+    	kickOverlap=.1,
+    	vertTravelMult=0.3,
+    	reloadTime=3.1,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-slap"},
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	boltTime=.7,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    ----------------
+    -- Animations --
+    ----------------
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    -----------------
+    -- Attachments --
+    -----------------
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Magazine"]={
+    		attachments={"thompson-mag-30rnd","thompson-mag-50rnd","thompson-mag-100rnd"},
+    	},
+    	["Pistol_Grip"]={
+    		attachments={"thompson-pistol-grip","thompson-pistol-gripA"},
+    	},
+    	["Stock"]={
+    		attachments={"thompson-stock","thompson-stockA"},
+    	},		
+    	["foregrip"]={
+    		attachments={"thompson-hanguard","thompson-hanguard-2","thompson-hanguardA","thompson-hanguard-2A"},
+    	},		
+    	["Optic"]={
+    		attachments={"thompson-rear-sight","thompson-rear-sight-2","thompson-rear-sight-3"},
+    	},			
+    	["Muzzle"]={
+    		attachments={"NONE","thompson-muzzle"},
+    	},		
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds("smg")
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform()
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m1911/m1911_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ak.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_charge.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magSlap = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/m4/m4a1_magslap.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains

```diff
--- function update(dt)
-function tick(dt)
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .2,-.275,-.6,0,0,0,0,-.2
-		if aiming then
-			if pointAim then
-				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.2,-.4,0,0,40,5,-.2
-			else
-				if attachments.toprail == "acog" then
-					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.19,-.3,0,0,0,70,-.2

-						x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.235,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
-					else
-						x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.18,-.3,0,0,0,65,-.2
-					end
-				elseif attachments.toprail == "et552" or attachments.toprail == "uh-1" then
-					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.185,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
-				elseif attachments.toprail == "uh-1" then
-					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.185,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
-				else
-					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.191,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
-				end
-			end
-		elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
-			if sprintTimer > .9 then
-				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .2,-.25,-.55,-20,50,30,0,0
-			else
-				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.25,-.55,-20,15,35,0,0
-			end
-		elseif selectAttachments then
-			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.2,-.7,10,50,10,0,0
-		end
-
-		local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity()), 0.5, 10)
-		sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
-		sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
-		swayy = sin1*.7
-		swayx = sin2*.5
-		if aiming then
-			swayy = sin1*.3
-			swayx = sin2*.2
-		end
-		swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-		swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
-
-		local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
-		if reloading then
-			if aiming then
-				if pointAim then
-					if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 5, 5, -35
-					elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 5, 10, -40
-					else
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 3, 2, -35
-					end
-				else
-					if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 5, 5, -5
-					elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 5, 10, -10
-					else
-						x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 3, 2, 3
-					end
-				end
-			else
-				if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
-					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 5, 5, -5
-				elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
-					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 10, 15, -10
-				else
-					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, 0, 0, 3, 2, 3
-				end
-			end
-		end
-
-		ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
-
-		if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
-			reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
-		elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
-			reloadTimer = 0
-			reloading = false
-			if ammo > 0 then
-				ammo = magSize + 1
-			else
-				ammo = magSize
-			end
-			magOutSoundPlaying = false
-			magInSoundPlaying = false
-			cockSoundPlaying = false
-			boltReleaseSoundPlaying = false
-		end
-
-		local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/800, -(rnd1+rnd4)/800+(recoilAngle/200)-.025*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/400+recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+10*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
-		RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
-		GUNoffset = Transform()
-		GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
-		GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
-
-		local h1pos = Vec(-.025,-.05,-.6)
-		local h2pos = Vec(-.06,-.05,-.15)
-		if reloading and reloadTimer > .6 then
-			h1pos = VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine).pos,Vec(-.025,.15,-.1))
-		elseif reloading and ammo == 0 and reloadTimer <= .5 and reloadTimer > .1 then
-			if reloadType == "charging-handle" then
-				h1pos = TransformToParentPoint(GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle),Vec(0,.15,0))
-			else
-				if reloadTimer > .35 then
-					h1pos = Vec(-.35,-.05,-.3)
-				else
-					h1pos = Vec(0,.025,-.4)
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		ManageHands(h1pos,h2pos,weaponShapes,handID)
-		
-	else
-		WeaponUnselectedTick()
-	end
--- end
-
--- function tick(dt)
-	HandleProjectiles()
-	if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
-	if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
-
-	if recoilTimer > 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
-	if shootTimer > 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
-	ManageRecoil()
-
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-
-		-- Shooting and Controls
-		local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
-		local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(0,.05,-.75))
-
-		if not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape() == 0 and shootTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
-			if ammo > 0 then
-				if InputDown("lmb") and selectFire == 1 then
-					ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
-				elseif InputPressed("lmb") and selectFire == 0 then
-					ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
-				end
-			elseif InputPressed("lmb") then
-				PlaySound(dryFireSound)
-			end
-		end
-		if InputPressed("r") and ammo <= magSize and not reloading and not selectAttachments then
-			reloadTimer = reloadTime
-			reloading = true
-			ADSImpulse(-.1,-.3,0,0,40,200)
-			if math.random() < .5 then
-				reloadType = "charging-handle"
-			else
-				reloadType = "bolt-release"
-			end
-		end
-
-		if InputPressed("v") then
-			SelectFire()
-		end
-
-		aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape() == 0
-		-- if InputPressed("rmb") and aiming then ADSImpulse(0,0,0,50,80,160) end
-		if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
-		if InputPressed("alt") then altAim = not altAim end
-
-		-- Tool Transform/Animations
-		local b = GetToolBody()
-		if b ~= 0 then
-
-			if not shapesInitializedT1 then
-				shapesInitializedT1 = true
-			elseif not shapesInitializedT2 then
-				InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile,handID)
-			end
-
-			WeaponTick()
-
-			SetBool("hud.aimdot", false)
-
-			SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
-
-			-- Specific subshape transform and animations
-			if body ~= b then
-				InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile,handID)
-				body = b
-				local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
-
-				magazine = weaponShapes[attachments.magazine]
-				charginghandle = weaponShapes["charging-handle"]
-				bolt = weaponShapes["bolt"]
-
-				magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine)
-				charginghandleTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle)
-				boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
-			end
-
-			mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
-			if reloading then
-				if reloadTimer < 2.6 and reloadTimer >= 2 then
-					local t = (2.6-reloadTimer)/.6
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,.25*t))
-					if not magOutSoundPlaying then
-						PlaySound(magOutSound)
-						magOutSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-				elseif reloadTimer < 2 and reloadTimer >= 1.3 then
-					mt = hideTrans
-				elseif reloadTimer < 1.3 and reloadTimer >= .6 then
-					local t = (reloadTimer-.6)/.7
-					mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,.25*t))
-					if not magInSoundPlaying and reloadTimer < 1 then
-						PlaySound(magInSound)
-						magInSoundPlaying = true
-					end
-				end
-			end
-
-			cht = TransformCopy(charginghandleTrans)
-			btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
-			if reloading then
-				if reloadTimer < .6 and ammo > 0 then
-					reloadTimer = -1
-				elseif reloadType == "charging-handle" and ammo == 0 then
-
-					if reloadTimer < .3 and reloadTimer >= .2 then
-						local t = (.3-reloadTimer)/.1
-						t = t^2
-						cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60*t))
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
-						if not cockSoundPlaying then
-							PlaySound(cockSound)
-							cockSoundPlaying = true
-						end
-						ADSImpulse(0,0,0,2,10,0)
-					elseif reloadTimer < .2 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
-						local t = (.2-reloadTimer)/.1
-						cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.1*t))
-						cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60))
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
-						ADSImpulse(.01,0,.07,4,15,0)
-					elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
-						local t = reloadTimer/.1
-						t = t^2
-						cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.1*t))
-						cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60*t))
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06*t))
-					else
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
-					end
-
-				elseif ammo == 0 then
-
-					if reloadTimer < .4 then
-						if not boltReleaseSoundPlaying then
-							PlaySound(boltReleaseSound)
-							boltReleaseSoundPlaying = true
-							ADSImpulse(1,-.1,0,0,60,-200)
-							ShakeCamera(.325)
-						end
-					end
-					if reloadTimer < .35 and reloadTimer >= .25 then
-						local t = (reloadTimer-.25)/.1
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06*t))
-					elseif reloadTimer > .35 then
-						btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
-					elseif reloadTimer < .15 then
-						reloadTimer = -1
-					end
-
-				end
-			elseif ammo == 0 then
-				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
-			else
-				btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos, Vec(0,0,.06*shootTimer/shotDelay))
-			end
-
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle, cht)
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
-			SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function draw()
-	if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle() == 0 then
-		if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories(attachmentPresets,weaponVoxFile) end
-
-		DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="et552",Vec(0,.185,-.3),.04,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_eotech_holo.png",15)
-		DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="hamr" and altAim,Vec(0,.235,-.3),.05,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_reddot.png",15)

-	end
-end+function server.init()
+    RegisterTool("tabs-vector", "Vector", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool.tabs-vector.enabled", true, true)
+    hidePos = Vec(0, -200, 0)
+    hideTrans = Transform(hidePos,QuatEuler())

+    drawDebug = false
+    magSize = 33
+    ammo = magSize
+    shotDelay = 60/1200
+    shootTimer = 0
+    recoilTimer = 0

+    reloading = false

+    pointAim = false
+    altAim = false

+    	},
+    	["muzzle"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(0,.04,-.6)),
+    		order=1,
+    		orderDisplay=0,
+    		attachments={
+    			["none"]={
+    			},
+    			["compensator"]={
+    				shapes={
+    					{
+    						shape="comp-1",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(-.02,.03,-.6),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    					},
+    					{
+    						shape="comp-2",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(0,.0067,-.6),QuatEuler(-90,0,45)),
+    					},
+    				},
+    			},
+    			["suppressor"]={
+    				shapes={
+    					{
+    						shape="suppressor",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(-.02,.01,-.6),QuatEuler(-90,0,0)),
+    					},
+    				},
+    			},
+    		},
+    	},
+    	["magazine"]={
+    		transform=Transform(Vec(0,-.08,-.3)),
+    		order=2,
+    		orderDisplay=0,
+    		attachments={
+    			["mag-33"]={
+    				shapes={
+    					{
+    						shape="mag-33",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(-.02,-.34,-.195),QuatEuler(-105,0,0)),
+    					},
+    				},
+    				properties=function () magSize=33 ammo=math.min(ammo,magSize) magazine=weaponShapes[attachments.magazine] magTrans=GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine) end,
+    			},
+    			["mag-17"]={
+    				shapes={
+    					{
+    						shape="mag-17",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(-.02,-.22,-.225),QuatEuler(-105,0,0)),
+    					},
+    				},
+    				properties=function () magSize=17 ammo=math.min(ammo,magSize) magazine=weaponShapes[attachments.magazine] magTrans=GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine) end,
+    			},
+    			["drum-50"]={
+    				shapes={
+    					{
+    						shape="drum-50",
+    						transform=Transform(Vec(-.08,-.32,-.18),QuatEuler(-105,0,0)),
+    					},
+    				},
+    				properties=function () magSize=50 ammo=math.min(ammo,magSize) magazine=weaponShapes[attachments.magazine] magTrans=GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine) end,
+    			},
+    		},
+    	},
+    }
+    shapesInitializedT1 = false
+    shapesInitializedT2 = false
+    weaponShapes = {}
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        -- end
+        -- function tick(dt)
+        	HandleProjectiles()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    weaponSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_0.ogg")
+    weaponSoundSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_sup_0.ogg")
+    selectFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar.ogg")
+    dryFireSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire.ogg")
+    magOutSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_magout.ogg")
+    magInSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_magin.ogg")
+    cockSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_charge.ogg")
+    boltReleaseSound = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/vector/vector_boltrelease.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	local x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .2,-.275,-.6,0,0,0,0,-.2
+    	if aiming then
+    		if pointAim then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.2,-.4,0,0,40,5,-.2
+    		else
+    			if attachments.toprail == "acog" then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.19,-.3,0,0,0,70,-.2
+    			elseif attachments.toprail == "hamr" then
+    				if altAim then
+    					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.235,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
+    				else
+    					x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.18,-.3,0,0,0,65,-.2
+    				end
+    			elseif attachments.toprail == "et552" or attachments.toprail == "uh-1" then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.185,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
+    			elseif attachments.toprail == "uh-1" then
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.185,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
+    			else
+    				x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = 0,-.191,-.4,0,0,0,15,-.2
+    			end
+    		end
+    	elseif InputDown("shift") and not reloading then
+    		if sprintTimer > .9 then
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .2,-.25,-.55,-20,50,30,0,0
+    		else
+    			x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .05,-.25,-.55,-20,15,35,0,0
+    		end
+    	elseif selectAttachments then
+    		x, y, z, rotx, roty, rotz, fov, time = .25,-.2,-.7,10,50,10,0,0
+    	end
+
+    	local speed = math.clamp(VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId)), 0.5, 10)
+    	sin1 = math.clamp(sin1 + cos1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos1 = math.clamp(cos1 - sin1*dt*speed*2.8, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	sin2 = math.clamp(sin2 + cos2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	cos2 = math.clamp(cos2 - sin2*dt*speed*0.7, -1.2, 1.2)
+    	swayy = sin1*.7
+    	swayx = sin2*.5
+    	if aiming then
+    		swayy = sin1*.3
+    		swayx = sin2*.2
+    	end
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*2.7)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayx = swayx + math.sin(GetTime()*4.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*2.3)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+    	swayy = swayy + math.sin(GetTime()*5.1)*(.5*stabilityFactor)/math.max(speed,1)
+
+    	local x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
+    	if reloading then
+    		if aiming then
+    			if pointAim then
+    				if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 5, 5, -35
+    				elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 5, 10, -40
+    				else
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .025, .025, 0, 3, 2, -35
+    				end
+    			else
+    				if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 5, 5, -5
+    				elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 5, 10, -10
+    				else
+    					x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = .075, -.025, 0, 3, 2, 3
+    				end
+    			end
+    		else
+    			if reloadTimer > 1.1 then
+    				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 5, 5, -5
+    			elseif reloadTimer > .4 then
+    				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.025, .025, 0, 10, 15, -10
+    			else
+    				x1, y1, z1, rotx1, roty1, rotz1 = -.05, 0, 0, 3, 2, 3
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	ADSoffset = ADS(true, fov, time, x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1, rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1)
+
+    	if reloadTimer >= 0 and reloading then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTimer - dt
+    	elseif reloadTimer < 0 then
+    		reloadTimer = 0
+    		reloading = false
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			ammo = magSize + 1
+    		else
+    			ammo = magSize
+    		end
+    		magOutSoundPlaying = false
+    		magInSoundPlaying = false
+    		cockSoundPlaying = false
+    		boltReleaseSoundPlaying = false
+    	end
+
+    	local rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3 = (rnd2+rnd5)/800, -(rnd1+rnd4)/800+(recoilAngle/200)-.025*recoilTimer, (rnd3+rnd6)/400+recoilTimer, (rnd1+rnd4)+10*recoilTimer+recoilAngle, (rnd2+rnd5), (rnd3+rnd6)
+    	RECoffset = REC(true, rx, ry, rz, rr1, rr2, rr3)
+    	GUNoffset = Transform()
+    	GUNoffset.pos = VecAdd(ADSoffset.pos, RECoffset.pos)
+    	GUNoffset.rot = QuatRotateQuat(ADSoffset.rot, RECoffset.rot)
+
+    	local h1pos = Vec(-.025,-.05,-.6)
+    	local h2pos = Vec(-.06,-.05,-.15)
+    	if reloading and reloadTimer > .6 then
+    		h1pos = VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine).pos,Vec(-.025,.15,-.1))
+    	elseif reloading and ammo == 0 and reloadTimer <= .5 and reloadTimer > .1 then
+    		if reloadType == "charging-handle" then
+    			h1pos = TransformToParentPoint(GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle),Vec(0,.15,0))
+    		else
+    			if reloadTimer > .35 then
+    				h1pos = Vec(-.35,-.05,-.3)
+    			else
+    				h1pos = Vec(0,.025,-.4)
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+    	ManageHands(h1pos,h2pos,weaponShapes,handID)
+
+    else
+    	WeaponUnselectedTick()
+    end
+    if InputPressed("q") then drawDebug = not drawDebug end
+    if drawDebug then DebugShooting() end
+
+    if recoilTimer ~= 0 then recoilTimer = math.max(recoilTimer - dt,0) end
+    if shootTimer ~= 0 then shootTimer = math.max(shootTimer - dt,0) end
+    ManageRecoil()
+
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+    	-- Shooting and Controls
+    	local toolTrans = GetBodyTransform(GetToolBody())
+    	local shootPos = TransformToParentPoint(toolTrans,Vec(0,.05,-.75))
+
+    	if not reloading and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0 and shootTimer <= 0 and not selectAttachments then
+    		if ammo ~= 0 then
+    			if InputDown("lmb") and selectFire == 1 then
+    				ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    			elseif InputPressed("lmb") and selectFire == 0 then
+    				ShootWeapon(shootPos,toolTrans)
+    			end
+    		elseif InputPressed("lmb") then
+    			PlaySound(dryFireSound)
+    		end
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("r") and ammo <= magSize and not reloading and not selectAttachments then
+    		reloadTimer = reloadTime
+    		reloading = true
+    		ADSImpulse(-.1,-.3,0,0,40,200)
+    		if math.random() < .5 then
+    			reloadType = "charging-handle"
+    		else
+    			reloadType = "bolt-release"
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if InputPressed("v") then
+    		SelectFire()
+    	end
+
+    	aiming = InputDown("rmb") and not InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerGrabShape(playerId) == 0
+    	-- if InputPressed("rmb") and aiming then ADSImpulse(0,0,0,50,80,160) end
+    	if InputPressed("c") then pointAim = not pointAim end
+    	if InputPressed("alt") then altAim = not altAim end
+
+    	-- Tool Transform/Animations
+    	local b = GetToolBody()
+    	if b ~= 0 then
+
+    		if not shapesInitializedT1 then
+    			shapesInitializedT1 = true
+    		elseif not shapesInitializedT2 then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile,handID)
+    		end
+
+    		WeaponTick()
+
+    		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+    		SetToolTransform(GUNoffset, 0.2)
+
+    		-- Specific subshape transform and animations
+    		if body ~= b then
+    			InitShapes(b,weaponSchematic,weaponVoxFile,handID)
+    			body = b
+    			local shapes = GetBodyShapes(b)
+
+    			magazine = weaponShapes[attachments.magazine]
+    			charginghandle = weaponShapes["charging-handle"]
+    			bolt = weaponShapes["bolt"]
+
+    			magTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(magazine)
+    			charginghandleTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle)
+    			boltTrans = GetShapeLocalTransform(bolt)
+    		end
+
+    		mt = TransformCopy(magTrans)
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < 2.6 and reloadTimer >= 2 then
+    				local t = (2.6-reloadTimer)/.6
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,.25*t))
+    				if not magOutSoundPlaying then
+    					PlaySound(magOutSound)
+    					magOutSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 2 and reloadTimer >= 1.3 then
+    				mt = hideTrans
+    			elseif reloadTimer < 1.3 and reloadTimer >= .6 then
+    				local t = (reloadTimer-.6)/.7
+    				mt.pos = VecAdd(mt.pos,Vec(0,-1*t,.25*t))
+    				if not magInSoundPlaying and reloadTimer < 1 then
+    					PlaySound(magInSound)
+    					magInSoundPlaying = true
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		cht = TransformCopy(charginghandleTrans)
+    		btt = TransformCopy(boltTrans)
+    		if reloading then
+    			if reloadTimer < .6 and ammo ~= 0 then
+    				reloadTimer = -1
+    			elseif reloadType == "charging-handle" and ammo == 0 then
+
+    				if reloadTimer < .3 and reloadTimer >= .2 then
+    					local t = (.3-reloadTimer)/.1
+    					t = t^2
+    					cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60*t))
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
+    					if not cockSoundPlaying then
+    						PlaySound(cockSound)
+    						cockSoundPlaying = true
+    					end
+    					ADSImpulse(0,0,0,2,10,0)
+    				elseif reloadTimer < .2 and reloadTimer >= .1 then
+    					local t = (.2-reloadTimer)/.1
+    					cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.1*t))
+    					cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60))
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
+    					ADSImpulse(.01,0,.07,4,15,0)
+    				elseif reloadTimer < .1 then
+    					local t = reloadTimer/.1
+    					t = t^2
+    					cht.pos = VecAdd(cht.pos,Vec(0,0,.1*t))
+    					cht.rot = QuatRotateQuat(cht.rot,QuatEuler(0,0,60*t))
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06*t))
+    				else
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
+    				end
+
+    			elseif ammo == 0 then
+
+    				if reloadTimer < .4 then
+    					if not boltReleaseSoundPlaying then
+    						PlaySound(boltReleaseSound)
+    						boltReleaseSoundPlaying = true
+    						ADSImpulse(1,-.1,0,0,60,-200)
+    						ShakeCamera(.325)
+    					end
+    				end
+    				if reloadTimer < .35 and reloadTimer >= .25 then
+    					local t = (reloadTimer-.25)/.1
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06*t))
+    				elseif reloadTimer > .35 then
+    					btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
+    				elseif reloadTimer < .15 then
+    					reloadTimer = -1
+    				end
+
+    			end
+    		elseif ammo == 0 then
+    			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos,Vec(0,0,.06))
+    		else
+    			btt.pos = VecAdd(btt.pos, Vec(0,0,.06*shootTimer/shotDelay))
+    		end
+
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(charginghandle, cht)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(bolt, btt)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(magazine, mt)
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if GetString("game.player.tool") == "tabs-vector" and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+    	if selectAttachments then AttachmentCategories(attachmentPresets,weaponVoxFile) end
+
+    	DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="et552",Vec(0,.185,-.3),.04,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_eotech_holo.png",15)
+    	DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="hamr" and altAim,Vec(0,.235,-.3),.05,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_reddot.png",15)
+    	DrawHoloSight(attachments.toprail=="uh-1",Vec(0,.185,-.3),.04,"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_uh-1.png",50)
+    	DrawScope(attachments.toprail=="acog" and aiming and not pointAim and scopeTimer == 1 and not reloading,attachmentPresets.toprail.attachments.acog,Vec(0,.19,-.5),"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_acog.png")
+    	DrawScope(attachments.toprail=="hamr" and aiming and not pointAim and scopeTimer == 1 and not reloading and not altAim,attachmentPresets.toprail.attachments.hamr,Vec(0,.18,-.5),"MOD/TABS/img/small arms reticles/reticle_hamr.png")
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tools\vis100.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+#version 2

 	if pointAim then
@@ -194,7 +69,7 @@
 		end
 	end
 
-	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity())
+	local speed = VecLength(GetPlayerVelocity(playerId))
 	local targetTransform = Transform(Vec(x+x1+swayx*speed^2/800, y+y1-swayy*speed^2/800, z+z1), QuatEuler(rotx+rotx1+swayy, roty+roty1+swayx, rotz+rotz1))
 	
 	return targetTransform, fov
@@ -221,4 +96,122 @@
 	end
 	RightHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(rightHandPos))
 	LeftHandSOS:updateTransform(Transform(leftHandPos))
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    toolID = "tabs-vis100"
+    RegisterTool(toolID, "Vis-100", "MOD/TABS/vox/base-weapon.vox", 3)
+    SetBool("game.tool."..toolID..".enabled", true, true)
+    InitBallistics()
+    InitOptions()
+    customAttachmentProperties = function(attachment)
+    end
+    loadToolDelay = 2
+    weaponPrefab = "MOD/TABS/tempweaponvox/vis100.xml"
+    handObject = "4"
+    weaponHandler = InitWeaponHandler()
+    InitWeaponVariables({
+    	cartridge="9x19",
+    	shootPos=Vec(0,.05,-.3),
+    	casingEmitPos=Vec(0,.055,0),
+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="pistol",
+    	magSize=17,
+    	fireRate=1350,
+    	accuracy=.0015,
+    	fireModes={"semi","safe"},
+    	selectorAngles={90,0},
+    	weightFactor=.8,
+    	recoilVertical=1.5,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.6,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilMax=8,
+    	recoilKick=.01,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	recoilKickRot=10,
+    	vertTravelMult=1,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=3,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.05,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {
+    }
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    --SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    	if attachment.type == "slide" then
+    		fireModes = attachment.firemodes or DefaulFireModes
+    		curFireMode = 1
+    		fireMode = fireModes[curFireMode]
+    		selectorAngle = selectorAngles[curFireMode]
+    		PlaySound(SOUNDS.selectFire)
+    	end
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\tracks.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\tracks.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\tracks.lua
@@ -1,44 +1,4 @@
-#include "shape_utils.lua"
-
---The same couple of track pieces are copied to different tanks so they are only the last one in the code, they shoudl be initiallised properly where each tank gets their own.
-
---move up on down on bottom need queryraycast ignores vehicle and non physical need to adjust track length, fractional thing is a bit dodgy
---track length doesn't change significantly
-
---how to have left and right has track 1 on each side, everything goes into the numbering thing which separately gives them some tag like left right based on location right or left of center
---min max average height, above or below? based on that should move forward or back on first
-
---some system for testing wheels while adjusting travel, range, p, i, d, move the thing below, thing below maybe adjust dist and angle and height
---keeping thing in place with another PID
---or just use ropes
-
---how to correct for hull transform issue? something with velocity compared to prior pos but position also self corrects, so the spike back doesn't matter
-
---spawn in individual tracks in the constructor.
---There should be like a setting for distance between tracks or maybe number of tracks and distance is from total dist calculation
---Needs to be configurable which file for track is spawned in, maybe it's going to be a tag somewhere or something
-
---tell side of track location in code from where it is in relation to body transform more right or left on x axis
-
---test update or tick transforming to body
---width can be ignored if you make everything center
-
---in draw the track position lines up with the falling behind debugcross
---tick doesn't seem to be any different
---update seems to be the same
---with next frame thing it doesn't lag
---shakes either way but frame prediction seems to make it worse
---can see the shake as distance travelled in frame doubles then goes to 0 (see graph)
-
---later could take into account wheel height to adjust
---how to adjust where it goes?
---could somehow take existing shape?
---revert back to full thing as one body far away
---could it read shape from existing?
---next one not priorsame shape, is it slow on load?
-
-
---assuming track is aligned so that (long, up, sideways)
```
